ReviewText: Nice, small and quaint hotel. Great location for a Midtown NYC visit. Very walkable to all major areas & attractions. The staff was wonderful and very helpful. My only concerns was there are no refrigerators in the rooms so you had to travel to another floor for a cold drink. And no snack/food bar inside the hotel.

Title: Good hotel, very well located
ReviewText:
Normal hotel, very well located with good staff.

Room was very small, I couldn’t have 2 opened suitcases at the same time due to the lack of space, the bed took the entire room. Gym is also super small but well equipped.

It was a good stay and I would go back.

Title: Find ANY other hotel in NYC than this one
ReviewText: Do not stay here for business, you will not sleep and you will not be productive. This hotel is an embarrassment to the Marriott Brand.

Title: Terrible
ReviewText: With all of the options in NYC, please pick somewhere else.

Title: Good location, tired Hotel
ReviewText: We spent two nights last week at the Hotel. We found it to be small, a tight lobby with no food options. We used two Suite Night Upgrades for what they call a larger room, a waste, and with our status should have been complimentary. Some thoughts; the Hotel is clean, most rooms have lousy views and the shower had terrible water pressure. We stay with Marriott exclusively when we travel, this place didn't impress, but a good midtown location.

Title: My New Hub in NYC
ReviewText: Female receptionist was very courteous and had a welcoming smile. I felt welcomed

Title: So convenient!
ReviewText: This was my second stay at the courtyard 5th Avenue, and I have recommended it to several people. The staff are so nice and professional, and the location can’t be beat. Thanks for a great stay!

Title: OK hotel
ReviewText: I only stay at Marriott hotels and this Courtyard was just ok.  Nothing special although it was very clean and comfortable. The staff on checkin was not very friendly but efficient.  In the pictures of the hotel it showed a Starbucks next door...not there now !  There is nowhere in the hotel to get sodas/snacks without going outside and walking a few blocks (in the cold and rain no less!). But it is an okay hotel to stay in for a few days.

Title: Excellent stay
ReviewText: Totally enjoyed the stay at the Courtyard. It was conveniently located , clean and comfortable. No complaints at all. Housekeeper TERESA did wonderful job keeping our room clean and organized. Definitely, would  stay here again

Title: Hit all the marks (except the shower)
ReviewText:
Very pleased with the location, bed quality, and room size. There is no food service at this location, but there are plenty of options right out the door. They do provide coffee and tea, and as a tea drinker, the tea quality was great. 

I had a larger corner room and it was very spacious, the TV was massive, and had a nice work desk - I travel on business, so this was a great place for me to call home. Unfortunately, and I hope it was just my room, the shower pressure was so low it was a real struggle to get a good shower (I have long hair). They also do not provide a lot of bath amenities which isn't a big deal, just plan accordingly. For the price, it was a great stay.

Title: Ideal location with reasonable rates but nothing else much to expect
ReviewText: Besides the wonderful location that is minutes away from Times Square and reasonable rates, nothing else meets my expectations with poor view room assigned on a low floor. Hotel do not provide breakfast and was not given any privilege base on my status..

Title: Average
ReviewText: Front desk staff rude..rest of the staff excellent

Title: New Years Eve stay
ReviewText: Stayed here with my boyfriend on new years eve to see the NYC ball drop. It was very easy to book and affordable.  The customer service and parking valet professional and friendly.  It’s a great place to stay in the city, close to everything.  I’ll be staying again real soon.

Title: Amazing Hotel For An Amazing Price
ReviewText: We stayed at the hotel only for a few day but we had a great time. The hotel was clean and the customer service was great. We arrived early then expected, the hotel staff were able to hold our items while they got the room ready in a timely manner. The self serve coffee was good with plenty of options. The gym was quite small but still good enough to get a quick workout in. Even though we didn’t have any room service options when it came to food, because of the central location of the hotel there are plenty of good food options right around the corner (less then a five minute walk). Housekeeping was excellent. The hotel was nice and secure, we had no worries about leaving out stuff in the rooms. The lower parking rate also helped keep the cost down. Over all 9/10 would recommend staying.

Title: A/C
ReviewText: When the weather is very cold, the A/C mini split system is not enough

Title: Nice stay in the center of the city
ReviewText: I would stay here again because of the location within waling distance to Bryant Park, Times Square and Rockefeller Center. The lobby is very small but the staff is very helpful and pleasant.  The room was small but all that we needed as a place to rest between sight seeing and dinner.

Title: Room accommodations
ReviewText: Not a comfortable night rest

Title: Marriott Courtyard NYC
ReviewText: Excellent location to all of NYC's great locations and staff very helpful

Title: Perfect!!
ReviewText: Staff was great and friendly service was perfect and the room was clean and comfy

Title: not Marriott standards...lots of room for improvement
ReviewText: Looked forward to a quick trip to NYC between Christmas and New Years.  Requested early check-in for 3 rooms (for ourselves and 4 teens) booked well in advance.  Arrived early but told rooms not ready, so we were checked-in and our luggage stored. We were told we'd receive a message when rooms were ready but never received.  We went back to hotel at 4pm and found a large line at the front desk. Waited over 30 minutes in line (with one person at front desk) and told our rooms were still not ready.  They did agree to give us keys to one room as we had dinner/theater plans.  When we returned, we were assigned 2 more rooms, but unfortunately our kids were 15 floors up from us!  Only 1 front door and one elevator was operational for the duration of our stay.  After waiting over half hour for elevator, had to walk up/down 23 flights of stairs! Rooms were clean, but honestly have NEVER had such a poor experience with Marriott. They wasted no time charging our credit card $1530 before we even checked out. Filed a complaint with Marriott Bonvoy, but haven't heard back from hotel management as promised.  Times are tough for hospitality, but this is unacceptable.

Title: Pleasant stay in the heart of Manhattan
ReviewText: We stayed at this small hotel on a Christmas Eve. It is located across the street from the NY Public Library and Bryant Park. The park is home to a Winter Village and is very festive at this time of year. The staff was especially kind and helpful. The rooms were small but clean and well maintained. On the mezzanine level there is a hot drinks station with  delicious hot cocoa, coffee and tea which was appreciated as the temperatures were extremely cold.  The hot drinks station needed some maintenance later in the evening but this was understandable. Overall, we had a very pleasant experience.

Title: The place to stay in NYC...
ReviewText: Very affordable and well located in 5th Ave to enjoy as many NYC amenities

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Loved being close to all the excitement but not in the dead center like time square. Valet service was great and parking rate was reasonable. Staffs were very polite and informative. I would love to go back soon.

Title: Good stay
ReviewText: Excellent location and service! They allowed us to check in early so that we stayed for 24 hrs daily. Excellent car parking service too.

Title: Just a bed
ReviewText: The heat didn’t work, I left early due to these issues, water was brown,no beverages,I got charged for valet on two nights and only used it for one night

Title: Great place to stay!
ReviewText: Loved the location, the quality and the service!

Title: Family time in NYC
ReviewText: We stayed here to enjoy Christmas time in NYC while also picking up our daughter from college. We wanted to see the typical tourist attractions in the city. This hotel is close to Grand Central and major attractions, but is not in the craziness of Times Square. Staff were ALL super friendly. The valet/ luggage guy works his tail off juggling it all with a smile on his face! Hotel was clean. Hotel itself is on the smaller side with no restaurant, but there’s plenty of places within walking distance. We would stay here again.

Title: Nyc 2022
ReviewText: Great location Steph couldn’t of been more accommodating and would go back next year

Title: Christmas visit
ReviewText: Hotel staff great only drawback was drilling during Friday outside my room

Title: Boobs
ReviewText: Horrible and it’s horrible

Title: Very clean and great amenities.
ReviewText: This was one of the cleanest hotels I have stayed in and the staff was helpful with local area attractions.

Title: FisrtTripNYC
ReviewText: Great location for seeing the lights.

Title: NYC 2022
ReviewText: Enjoyed my stay. Great location. Great staff

Title: Amazing location
ReviewText: Had a wonderful weekend stay at this hotel. Location is perfect for exploring the city and enjoying some cafes and pubs. Clean, neat and friendly

Title: Wonderful Hotel, Great Staff, Rooms & Coffee
ReviewText: This hotel hits all the spots.  Great rooms, wonderful coffee, super convenient part of town and most of all -- the people make you feel welcomed and are genuinely happy to have you there!

Title: Hôtel à éviter fortement !!
ReviewText:
Personnel désagréable et malpoli de permet de toquer à la chambre à 22h30
Compte débité 2 fois et se permettent de dire que c’est la banque le problème (impossible)
Très cher pour ce que c’est salle de bain à l’ancienne

Title: My forever place to stay!!!
ReviewText:
I’ve stayed at many hotel in the city, very expensive 5 star hotels with “ high” reviews and I still usually prepare for something to go wrong. This hotel was such a different experience!! Check in took less then 4 minutes in a very busy lobby AND was up in my beautiful room by 1pm! I’m so very thankful to the wonderful staff, house keeping, the coffee machine was on another level! ( meaning amazing! ) the elevator was so fast in a tall building, check out was fast, everything was so clean and the bed was actually comfortable. I needed more soap and expected to wait forever, but it came faster then I needed it. Housekeeping came early after we were given later check out, she was so apologetic and asked if there was anything we needed while we were still there. You can not beat the location by Bryant park and Rockefeller and the room was very spacious including the washroom. The TV welcomed me by name! And was so large with lots of channels. Blackout curtains, I really could go on. Everything you need and I wish we stayed longer!
My ONE and only issue, the sofa mattress was beyond awful!! The sofa was comfortable, but definitely not to sleep on the pullout portion of it.. please upgrade it! 
My stay was so perfect that I would hands down sleep on it over a comfortable bed anywhere else! 😁
Our purpose was to be within walking distance from all the things we wanted to see or do! Bryant park, Radio city and Rockefeller, The Empire State Building, 5th Ave!! Times Square, And all the great shopping and restaurants! 
There’s no need for me to search for hotels anymore when I come into the city as I do often, I’ve found my forever place to stay!

Title: Average
ReviewText: Hotel was average. Had some cleaning issues.

Title: My Worst experience at the expensive hotel in New York city in Thanksgiving 2022
ReviewText: Bad review for this hotel during my stay in Thanksgiving 2022 in New York city.

Title: Hôtel bien placé mais cher
ReviewText:
Hôtel très bien placé, très central. La chambre était de taille moyenne, le lit très confortable et la salle de bain en bon état avec une baignoire. 
Par contre, hôtesses d’accueil nonchalantes. Il y a qu’une seule machine a café pour 30 étages

Title: Great location and staff
ReviewText: We stayed six nights and it ticked all the boxes - great proximity and access to sights. Rooms were well cleaned and staff were helpful.

Title: Courtyard met our needs.
ReviewText: The courtyard is located in a convenient spot.  The room is very small, but was all we needed.  It would be great if they could upgrade the coffee service.  Staff was pleasant and helpful. We were there Thanksgiving morning and they were helpful, even when it was very busy.

Title: Amazing location with extremely friendly staff
ReviewText: You cannot beat the location and taking advantage of the valet parking is key! The staff went above and beyond to accommodate it was extremely friendly. They went out of their way to even give attention to my four-year-old daughter and make her feel welcome. Having the coffee machine available 24 hours a day was great as well it just was a little hard because there’s only one and sometimes there was a line but that’s to be expected. Definitely planning on staying again and would recommend to anyone and everyone.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: The staff was very professional. We did not request housekeeping but she checked with us daily to see if we needed anything. My favorite thing was the location of this hotel. It’s not as busy as Times Square but it’s accessible. I particularly liked being close to Bryant Park, Rockefeller Center, Macys, Theater District and Fifth Avenue shopping. I will definitely stay here again.

Title: Noisy days and nights
ReviewText:
Construction on the hotel required by city regulations made for very noisy and uncomfortable stay.
Suggest you always check with hotel before making reservations to see if any construction, repairs, updating will be going on during your stay.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: The hotel was clean, and in great location. Not too close or too far from time square, restaurants, broadway, Bryant park or subways,

Title: manhattan marriott
ReviewText: nice hotel, not a lot of space or storage

Title: This Courtyard is not the same
ReviewText: I usually love to stay at Courtyard Marriot hotels and I choose them because its normally easy to see and feel the higher quality.  This is not the case for this one.  The hotel is old and feels run down.  One of the elevators was broken for half the week which is quite a pain in a  with 20+ floors.

Title: Wonderful experience
ReviewText: My family and I stayed at the Courtyard Marriot for a family event. We experienced  very professional and polite staff. All of our requests were taken care of within a minimal amount of time. I highly recommend the Courtyard Marriott to anyone who plans to travel into the midtown area of New York City.

Title: L'emplacement pour seul intérêt
ReviewText: L'emplacement pour seul intérêt. Le personnel est pro et serviable. Il n'y a rien d'autre de bien

Title: stay
ReviewText:
The hotel is under construction. The walls are thin.   You can hear everything on the stress.
The staff was great!

Title: Broken elevator and terrible jackhammer noise
ReviewText: The hotel was a good location however the inside of the hotel was a little dirty and outdated. The rooms were small and because of work happening on the outside of the building a room sounded like there’s a jackhammer right outside of our window the majority of our trip. In addition to the excessive noise, one of the two elevators was not functioning the majority of our trip which made there be long lines to get to the room and to get down to the lobby and people crammed in the elevator so I didn’t feel safe

Title: Great Location - Just Needs Some Room Updates
ReviewText:
This is a great location - midtown on 5th Ave, allowing easy access to all parts of Manhattan.
The housekeeping kept things clean and were very friendly. The room needs some updates including furniture, mattress, and pillows.

Title: Not what it used to be
ReviewText: Staff was excellent. Room location in hotel was terrible.  Like a dungeon. Back of hotel, low floor (requested high floor. Could not see any sunlight at all without craining your neck.. Thought some elite status meant something) poor a/c unit. Open window meant listening to the VERY loud fans in the alley. Could not hear myself think. Mattresses need to be replaced. Could feel every spring. Not the Marriott quality I've come to expect. Stayed at this hotel 4 times. Great location. Booked thru Marriott, not a 3rd party. Did not use rewards points. Thought they would save the crappy rooms for 3rd party bookings. Won't be staying here again.

Title: Staff was fantastic. Hotel was not.
ReviewText: As a 25 your business traveler, it was very disappointing to have a hotel that did not have any basic amenities I would expect at a Marriott. They had warm seltzer water cans instead of bottled water next to the elevator (zero bottled water in the room), my sheets and towels had black marks on them, the desk chair was broken and nasty. I would not recommend staying there until they revamp the entire place. Everything just felt old, low end, and not worth the expensive cost. The staff was very kind, professional, and doing the best they could with what appeared to be a truly beaten down hotel.

Title: Great location and great service
ReviewText: My family stayed here for several nights. This location was a ten minute walk to almost everywhere we wanted to go. We were able to walk to our room from our Broadway show, from shopping at Macy's, to Grand Central Station. There's a 24 hour CVS 2 blocks away for anything we forgot to pack. And away from Times Square enough that the atmosphere is quieter outside the hotel.

Title: Avoid if you can - expensive for what you get
ReviewText: Location is good. Rooms are tiny and look very old and unkept. Bathrooms are small and there is hardly any space around the basin (sink) area. Closet is small. Amenities are non existent (unless one considers having a coffee/tea machine in the mezzanine floor amenities). Will not stay there again for sure.

Title: Great location & Friendly staff
ReviewText: Stayed at the Marriott on 5th & east 40th and it was nice. Friendly staff, great location. No real food or beverage service available in the hotel but there are some good restaurants near by. Gym is very small and will only accommodate 2-3 people at a time.

Title: Mediocre at best
ReviewText: Absolutely no services at all!

Title: Not suitable for group business
ReviewText: We had some maintenance issues onsite, which I'll leave out of my review other than that. When traveling for work it's a fine place to sleep, but as we were traveling a group of 6 it was not suitable for group collaboration or working sessions. There are no spaces to accomplish this.

Title: Comfortable hotel in a convenient location
ReviewText:
There’s no acknowledgement of status or even an introduction to hotel amenities by the front desk staff. One even hung up on me when I called. You’re basically checked in and sent on your way. Only one elevator worked so the wait was often long. 

This hotel does have amazing housekeeping staff that keep it very clean and the bed was comfortable. If you’re looking for no frills this is a decent hotel for the location. Just don’t expect any service or acknowledgement from the front desk staff.

Title: Ungemütliches Hotel
ReviewText: Gewöhnliche Ausstattung, lautes Zimmer und keine gemütliche Lobby

Title: Great stay
ReviewText: Enjoyed our stay! Conveniently located, nice staff and comfy beds.

Title: Great location!
ReviewText: It’s in the middle of everything.  Clean room and comfortable beds. Can’t beat the value for this.  Always felt safe, went with young kids.

Title: Excellent Location
ReviewText:
The Hotel it’s good. 
Location :  Excellent 
Staff:   Excellent 
Building:  needs improvement 
Rooms : Needs improvements

Title: Good location
ReviewText: The bellman both on the day of check-in and check-out are very helpful.

Title: Good hotel for NYC in Midtown Manhattan
ReviewText: You can easily rely on this hotel for a stay in NYC.

Title: Old noisy and unpleasant
ReviewText: I have stayed at the hotel a lot over the years as it is next to my office. Every time I say never again. It is so loud in the rooms from the air con and the road and the lift that you barely sleep. It is not that this is a cheap hotel. It is not. I will continue to avoid.

Title: Nice, clean, Great location, friendly and helpful staff.
ReviewText: Room was nice and clean with a great view. Beds were comfortable. Staff was very friendly and helpful during our stay. We would definitely stay again and have already recommended the hotel to a friend.

Title: Truly best overall hotel in NYC , best value and service
ReviewText:
This is always our Home away from Home
Exceptional service , sparkling clean 
Best location

Title: Missing the mark
ReviewText: As a long time Marriott customer, the hotel failed to deliver. The room furniture was tatty, bathroom floor suspect, no amenities, the website said breakfast was included but no breakfast. The exterior of the building is having work done so no peace and quiet during the day. Overall, I won't be rushing back.

Title: Weekend Getaway
ReviewText: Outstanding location. Centrally located to tourist attractions, i.e. Times Square etc. The concierges were great!

Title: Superb location. Friendly, professional staff.
ReviewText: Very pleased with hotel. There is some construction going on, but we requested a higher floor and no noise at all. Very clean. Complimentary coffee/latte machine is one of the reasons I will stay here again. Wonderful staff.

Title: Enjoyed our stay.
ReviewText:
Great location. Easy access to subways and Bryant park. All our extra room requests were honored. Unfortunately rooms do not come with refrigerators but they able to bring us one as we requested. Hotel was kept clean and maid service was excellent. While bathrooms were not super modern they were clean and in good shape. We were on an upper floor and had no issues with the elevators being slow even though it was a busy weekend. The coffee/ chai tea maker downstairs was wonderful. Way better than a Starbucks. 
Prices vary by the date you stay and it is New York, so it was expensive but it was a treat. We enjoyed our stay.

Title: Run down hotel with poor maintenance and upkeep
ReviewText: Poor upkeep and poor service . The only thing good was the location

Title: Perfect location -Comfortable stay
ReviewText: I can highly recommend the Courtyard Marriott Midtown East. Our stay was everything we expected and more. Very Comfortable beds and bedding. Strong water pressure so showers were enjoyable. Body Shop in–shower toiletries which never ran out during our 11 night stay. Easily controlled digital AC that did not disappoint. Cleaning staff that were dedicated and simply lovely. Consistent towel replacement. Yes! Concierges that were friendly and knowledgeable —particularly Willie who became a friend. Perfect Midtown location particularly in regards to Theatre district and of course Bryant Square which we loved!  And elevators that were consistent and timely...,wow!

Title: Perfect!
ReviewText: Thank you everything was perfect

Title: Nice location
ReviewText: Great location with option of two beds. Clean space with great security

Title: Mets Game
ReviewText: This is our second time staying at this location. Great area, friendly staff but not the best amenities at the hotel but There is everything you need right outside the hotel doors.

Title: Good centrally located hotel
ReviewText: This is a good, small hotel in two blocks from Grand Central.  Lots of food choices within a block.  A good quality coffee machine in the mezzanine was most welcome.  Housekeeping was excellent, the staff went above and beyond to make our stay a very pleasant one.  Rooms are above-average size by NYC standards.  A well run no frills hotel with all the boxes ticked.

Title: Courtyard on 5th
ReviewText: Easy to find, convenient location.  Very friendly and accommodating staff.

Title: Great location--clean, comfortable and quiet.
ReviewText: This hotel is located right across 5th Avenue from the NY Public Library.  It's a perfect place to be for visiting midtown Manhattan.  The staff members were friendly and accommodating.  Most importantly, the rooms were clean and quiet and the beds were very comfortable.  We heard no street noises--only the quiet hum of the air conditioner--and got a great night's rest.

Title: Big ups to Sonia and her team. Amazing stay
ReviewText: It was my trip to New York  and was smoothly early check in after a long 22hours flight, Sonia and her team were very professional and helpful, with directions for attractions and restaurants. Hotel location is excellent close to most of the attractions sites and restaurants I loved it. I cant wait to be back.

Title: Not up to Standards
ReviewText: As I said in the first question, this Courtyard is not up to Courtyard by Marriott standards

Title: Quiet, accessible location
ReviewText: This hotel provides great access to midtown, while being away from the tourist hubbub. Room was large and quiet. All-day access to coffee and tea. Friendly staff.

Title: Great Location
ReviewText:
Right next to Bryant Park and a public library. 
Walking distance to time square and food attractions.

Title: Unrestful Pests.  Friendly Staff.
ReviewText: Just stayed here for 4 nights, reserving two rooms for our family visiting NYC.  The location is a good one near Bryant Park and walking distance to all that mid-town has to offer.  Rooms are appropriate in size and condition for the rate and hotel class.  Staff was very friendly.   Coffee on mezzanine was good.  The second night we were there a cockroach was found in one our 29th floor bathrooms.  Teens did not sleep the rest of the night.  We let the front desk know and asked them to be moved.  They agreed.  While teens were in our room they found another cockroach in our bathroom.   Asked to move our room as well although at this point no one was super comfortable.  Maintenance did come up and “catch” one of them and we were assured this was the first time this had happened.  Needless to say we were never at ease after that.  Always checking the floor even after we moved rooms.  The staff was friendly and I suppose handled it the best they could but I will be choosing another location in the future.

Title: Great hotel and perfect location!
ReviewText: We’ve been staying here for years and will continue to do so!

Title: Pleasant  Stay
ReviewText: Pleasant stay. Room was clean.  Could use some updating, but decent.

Title: Great location and great staff
ReviewText: The staff is very attentive and helpful, the hotel is very well located near the NY Public Library and Bryant Park. The room is confortable, but does not have a small fridge, which could be helpful. The rooms are quiet and the beds are very good.

Title: New York stay
ReviewText: I give the review a good for the hotel due to the access of the location where we need to be

Title: Great stay
ReviewText:
We went to New York as a family (kids are 8 and 13) for a few days.
The hotel is centrally located, so it was easy to walk to Times Square, Empire State Building, etc. Lots of restaurants and shops close by. Room was small (to be expected in NY), but very clean and modern, as was the rest of the hotel.
The staff were friendly and responded to requests quickly; I mostly used the text function on the Marriott App and it worked really well.
I would definitely recommend this hotel.

Title: Noisy and cramped
ReviewText: The hotel was undergoing noisy work during stay and I was not warned about it until arriving to hotel. The room had a bad smell. The spaces are small and cramped. It is conveniently located though in Manhattan and close to major attractions or easy to get via subway

Title: Ac was a nightmare
ReviewText: Overall the location is fantastic the staff is great. The ac was a nightmare kept turning on automatically when putting it to the off position. It would turn on in the middle of the night so loudly. Would consider another option next stay.

Title: Location Location
ReviewText: Stayed specifically because of location to subway and Grand Central. Also weekend rate was very reasonable.

Title: Low category hotel
ReviewText: Hôtel vieillot qui a besoin de grosses rénovations

Title: Our stay
ReviewText: Our stay was fine until we were leaving. Asked the hotel to hold our bags and the attendant made a crass comment about stealing my lingerie in front of my 10 year old daughter. Until then, everything was fine. He also insisted we would not make our flight if we took public transportation and said it would be $80 for a cab. We chose to take public transportation ($6 and very easy to do) and made it with 2 hours to spare.

Title: Not bad
ReviewText: Very small room and they don’t put any fruit or water in the room

Title: Horrible Concierge
ReviewText: The elevator broke down with no notice given waited for 25 min until another guest walked up and said it was no good. Upon carrying out luggage down concierge didn’t even apologize for the inconvenience just took out key card and walked away.

Title: Not Maintained
ReviewText: The hotel is poorly maintained and operated. Facilities (notably the elevator) were not reliable, and even Left us stranded. We requested fire department but no one showed up to elevator. Stain in room and on sheets.

Title: Perfect place
ReviewText: Perfectly located!  Was able to walk to most places and rarely needed transportation. Only negative is no fridge in room and ice is only on two floors.

Title: Great
ReviewText: Location is great…..very friendly and helpful staff….very clean.   Would stay again.   Definitely recommend.

Title: Convenient location with limited facilities
ReviewText: Near Time Sq and next to Bryant Park, clean rooms. However, shared coffee facilities is always crowded and valet parking is not convenient.

Title: Excellent Team!!!
ReviewText: We stayed at the Courtyard Marriott Manhattan/Fifth Avenue in two separate weeks for a total of 11days in June 2022. Our family had two rooms for each stay. We stayed here as it is by far the best of the various Marriott hotels we have stayed in NYC over the years. Good value for money, excellent location, wonderful window views, and great service! The whole Team and Staff —special shout out to Frank, Eddie, Sophia, Rosario and Kenneth — made our family feel welcome and comfortable. The hotel was clean, housekeeping was really good plus the coffee/hot choco available anytime of the day made the stay even better. We intend to make this our “home” base every time we will be in NYC. We are now telling family and friends to make sure to check this hotel first when they plan and book their stay. Thank you again to the whole Team for taking care of us…see  you all again soon!

Title: Perfect for seeing the big apple
ReviewText: Perfectly located and easy to navigate through the city

Title: Just ok
ReviewText: Just ok hotel, could be alot better, needs improvement

Title: Great staff and accommodations.
ReviewText: Hotel was perfect location.

Title: Avoid this Courtyard
ReviewText: If you are a loyal Bonvoy member, forgo your points and don’t stay here. There are way better options than this. This is by far the worst Courtyard I have stayed in New York and around the world. If it wasn’t for the location, would not have chosen this hotel. The rooms are old with dirty carpeting and peeling paint from the walls and furniture, moldy tiles and stained tub, loud (can’t emphasize this enough) air conditioning unit (had to wear ear plugs), towels that are past their tenure, and linens that smell like musty cigarette smoke. Our room was not serviced until after 5pm and repeated requests. They informed me they just skipped my room because I had a do not disturb sign in the morning (which was promptly removed at 10am when I left). This is Courtyard at its worst.

Title: great stay at nyc
ReviewText: well situated and great staff

Title: Needs interior renovation
ReviewText: I love Marriott Brand of hotels, but this one was the worse I have ever stayed in. The hotel rooms are outdated and has broken and worn out furniture. The carpeting is dirty and sheets not new or clean. Wall paper was peeling and the paint looks like a child painted the walls and trim very sloppy.   I changed my room twice . Also there is no cafe. My friends room was even worse. I was on the 11th floor moved to the 7th and he was on the 3rd and changed his room twice as well.

Title: Disastrous experience
ReviewText: They didn't even offer bottled water, there was no food available, the room was not cleaned properly with glow sticks left hanging on mirrors, hair all over the bathroom floor, and stains on the sheets.

Title: The worst hotel in NY
ReviewText: Dirty bad service rude bathroom was clogged room sticks waited for my car that I paid 70 dollars for 45m

Title: Great location and super clean!
ReviewText:
During a recent Ladies Trip to the city, we chose this based on reasonable pricing. We loved the location, being right by Bryant Park and walking distance to most things. 
The rooms were very clean! The beds were comfortable, but I do love a Marriott bed! 
The staff at the front desk were excellent! The valet/doorman Frank was beyond amazing. I'd choose this location again in a heartbeat!

Title: A weekend in midtown Manhattan
ReviewText: Marriott Courtyard staff--Sonia, Rosario, Frank, and the rest were courteous, friendly, and helpful.  They were able to make minor accommodations for us with ease despite having a fully-booked hotel.

Title: Great Location!
ReviewText: Great customer service and location it's perfect!

Title: Courtyard is close to everything!
ReviewText:
Close to all NYC has to offer: Public Library/Times Square/Broadway are all a short walk. 
--AC leaked on our last 2 nights, soaking the carpet
--Toilet had problems flushing
--phone did not work
--no USB charging ports on walls or lamps--bring your own
--did not acknowledge I was a Bonvoy Member
--soft/comfortable beds
--staff responded to requests quickly
--AWESOME doorman
--fast elevator
--would recommend this hotel to others

Title: Courtyard New York/Fifth Avenue June 2022
ReviewText: Hotel was hard to find (no visible signs amongst scaffolding outside entrance). Rooms were outdated and small, did not at all resemble the pictures online.  Frank (the valet parking attendant) was fantastic.  Very friendly, helpful (gave directions and approximate length of commute to my destination each day) and my car was always brought around promptly (significantly under the 45 minutes we were told to call ahead to have the car ready).

Title: Wonderful location. Clean hotel.
ReviewText:
My wife and I took our daughter to NYC for a senior trip. The hotel has a great location close to lots of mass transit. It was easy to commute in from LaGuardia and then to hop on different subway lines to get anywhere in the city quickly. The hotel is almost right across the street from the NY public library and Bryant park. We enjoyed breakfast in the park a couple of days after picking up food from a number of convenient bakeries and grocery stores.

The hotel isn't fancy, but the place is clean and the staff were super helpful. Exercise room is very small, but I ran outdoors the whole week. Central park is just a mile up the road. There's no business center if you need a quiet place to work outside your room. There's no restaurant associated with the hotel, but there are lots of great places to eat nearby.

Title: Frank was great!
ReviewText: Enjoyed our stay. Front desk and Frank (concierge, bellman, doorman) really made a difference. Only downside was poor lighting in the bathroom.

Title: Extremely small and dated rooms
ReviewText: This is by far my least favourite stay in NYC. The hotel rooms are very dated and extremely small. The room has white light instead of yellow light which it makes it further gloomy and dull. The toiletries does not have body lotion either. also note they do not offer breakfast buffet, they said they have not resumed since pandemic.

Title: Best hotel for your NYC staying
ReviewText:
Best location, good room sizes, spotless clean and superb customer service !
You truly can’t find anything else for the overall package .

Title: Poorly kept hotel
ReviewText:
The carpets in the room were dirtier than NY city sidewalks, sofa-bed broken, dirty and had not been vacuumed under the sofa for months.
Staff were firendly but hotel operator does not care about the upkeep.

Title: Short break with family
ReviewText: Hotel in a great location, short walk to Grand Central and subway stations and 2 minutes walk from Bryant Park. Room small but very clean and comfortable. Would be great to have more seating at reception. Concierge very helpful.

Title: Great Stay
ReviewText: Great service and clean hotel

Title: Trade show
ReviewText: Decent stay and service although the bed had some crumbs on them when made up.

Title: Used points - Wasted
ReviewText:
I used two free night points on this stay. Typically the Marriotts we stay in are beautiful or at least very nice. This was a motel feel and really poorly upkept. Room had holes in the top of the dresser and literally paper thin blanket. Room did not feel
clean. This was by no means anything more than a 2 star on a good day

Title: Family vacation
ReviewText: The toilet kept running one night but fixed abd working the rest of the time. Quick abs friendly service.

Title: Great Location
ReviewText: The hotel is in a great location that is walking distance to grand central station to take a quick shuttle to times square or other parts of the city.  Very good restaurants, bars, and shopping that are walking distance from hotel.  The room is comfortable that has complimentary coffee in the rooms. You can barely hear the noise outside. The elevators didn't take long. Friendly staff and concierge that can help you with any questions about the city. Fast check in process. Fitness center has enough equipment to get a morning workout in for cardio or strength. We had a great time and plan to come back.

Title: Good
ReviewText: Staff was very good, but 1 elevator in operation made for long waits to get to and from room. Cleaning staff was very friendly.

Title: Decent nothing special
ReviewText:
The hotel was overall decent and nicely located. But nothing special especially for the price and being an elite member
I didn’t feel treated the best. The hotel bathroom wallpaper had old blood splatters and parts of room falling apart. Didn’t complain because we were traveling with my mom who’s never been to nyc (& not a complainer) and our 6 month old. Just didn’t touch the wallpaper where it was (by the mirror so out of reach for baby and no reason to touch it lol) and were mindful of other areas in general. The staff weren’t the friendliest but I guess that’s New York. Compared to the Fairfield in we stayed at in nyc in the summer- this was very disappointing. Would not stay here again unless prices at other Marriott too expensive

Title: Unable to pay because of the new system
ReviewText: The new system, or the ignorance on its functions of the staff did not permit our payment.

Title: Bad enough to make me reconsider Marriott
ReviewText: Terrible experience - have escalated to Bonvoy rewards

Title: Excelente
ReviewText: Excelente! Personal amable

Title: Great location
ReviewText: the location is amazing;  the beds as always very good;  is what we needed.

Title: Nie mehr wieder
ReviewText: Betrugsversuch an Rezeption, unfreundliches und unmotiviertes Personal, laute Zimmer, schlechtes Roomservice

Title: Perfect location for your vacation to NYC!
ReviewText: This Courtyard is in the perfect location for your visit to New York City!

Title: Will stay here again for sure.
ReviewText: This hotel was conveniently located. The room was clean, quiet, and affordable.

Title: Courtyard Marriott on 40th st
ReviewText: Good location if you are coming to HSBC on 5th Ave

Title: Never stay at this property, when Marriott has much better options in the neighbourhood
ReviewText: This property is very very tired, first room I was given was dirty, dirty, dirty and bathroom was from 30 years ago, no upgrades.  Second room on the 16th floor was marginal better, less dirty, upgraded bathroom likely 20 years old.  There are so many better Mariott properties to stay in the area, only stayed here based on company recommended hotel for a group meeting in NYC.  Never again!

Title: Great, convenient location
ReviewText: This Marriott Courtyard is close to Times Square and is convenient to pretty much everything. I would highly recommend it to anyone visiting New York whether it’s for business or for pleasure.

Title: NYC trip
ReviewText: This is my second time at this hotel. Very friendly staff and comfortable stay.

Title: NYC Trip
ReviewText: Everyone was very nice and housekeeping did a great job.

Title: Needs face lift
ReviewText: basic  - no frills, not even a real lobby  needs facelift

Title: Bleach in the Air and Freezing to Spare
ReviewText: The room was clean. The beds smelled so much like bleach you got a headache. The heating and AC was half accurate. Frankly, the heat was not on until I called it in.

Title: Horrible experience. Accommodation not provided even with a reservation. Do NOT recommend.
ReviewText: Didn’t have room for us even though I had a reservation. Hotel didn’t inform me they would put us in a different hotel on first night because they ran out of rooms. Had to leave work in the morning to check out from temp hotel and went back to check in again next day. Ahh just very bad experience.

Title: Decent, but noisy
ReviewText: The rooms are nice, well furnished for small NYC hotel rooms. However, you can hear everything in the halls as the door blocks no noise, and there is noise from outside as well (though it's unavoidable in NYC). Shower pressure was pretty low on my most recent visit.

Title: Awesome NY trip
ReviewText: I strongly recommend this hotel, close to many attractions and restaurants without the crowded areas of the cities.

Title: Excellent experience
ReviewText: Courteous staff, well located in NY, and efficient in/out process.

Title: Great location, great staff, smaller rooms
ReviewText: Location is right by the New York Library, Bryant Park and a short walk to Times Square and Rockefeller center. The hotel is smaller though if you don't mind that. Small lobby. Rooms are small. But if you don't plan on spending much time in the room so should be no problem. We enjoyed our stay here. Staff was friendly from check in to check out. A bonus here is that on the floor above the lobby has a water machine. So no need to buy water! Hot water or cold water. It was so nice. Also had a coffee machine but we didn't like the coffee. Also has tea available. Complimentary for guests.

Title: Glad to be back!
ReviewText: This was our first visit back since the pandemic! Great location near sights and transportation. Walkable from the theatre district. The hotel was in good shape. There had been upgrades on the elevators and hallways. Starbucks is no longer next door, but the hotel provides a coffee station on the mezzanine. Plenty of coffee shops, sandwich shops, and restaurants nearby. For croissants, we recommend Marvelous by Fred on Sixth Ave. and West 37 Street.

Title: I’ve been to better Marriots’
ReviewText:
I was disappointed in the design of the hotel. The rooms are right on top of each other so much so you can hear everything in the rooms and in the hallway. 
When the cleaning crew were cleaning a room adjacent to me, 9:30pm I could hear everything especially then talking in their walkie talkies without regard of people sleeping.

Title: Not what you would expect
ReviewText: Although this hotel is in a fantastic location, it’s maintenance is less than desirable. This hotel doesn’t meet the expectations of a Courtyard or Marriott. There was visible mold on the tile floor and baseboards of the bathroom and the carpet outside the bathroom was lifted and bumpy probably due to water damage. The lighting is terrible and a solution would be to open the blinds but the library and offices are directly across the street. There are no food options at the hotel and although the hotel website says there is a Starbucks, it’s not in or connected to the hotel and that location has shut down and is no longer open.

Title: The staff and hotel were great.
ReviewText: The staff and the hotel were amazing but the bed was hard as a rock. Hotel was in a great location.

Title: Perfect for a NYC getaway
ReviewText: Clean and spacious rooms, reasonable prices, unbeatable location.

Title: Great Service
ReviewText: The hotel was clean and the staff was very attentive. The only downside is the size of the rooms, but that is expected in New York. The location was good, just steps from 5th Avenue and walking distance from a lot of sites.

Title: Super Ausgangspunkt für NYC Sightseeing
ReviewText: Beste Mid-Town-Lage nur wenige Blocks von Grand Central, Empire State Building und Times Square entfernt. Optimale Lage für diverse Erkundungen in New York. Freundlicher Service im Haus und gute Frühstücks- usw. Locations in direkter Umgebung.

Title: Another pleasant stay
ReviewText: This location is right next to Grand Central Station and Bryant Park.   Our stay has always been comfortable and pleasant and this time was no exception.  The staff is always helpful and nice.  I have used Marriott both domestic and internationally. for over 20 years and will continue to do so with their consistency and hospitality.

Title: Perfect location if you just want to sleep and get going the next morning
ReviewText:
A very average hotel in a great location. Could use some modern renovations. 
Front desk staff were friendly enough. The doorman seemed to have a bit of an attitude towards some of the guests that were in front of us because they didn’t tip him when they returned to pick up their luggage. Maybe he was having a bad day, but certainly showed in his actions and how he spoke to them and ultimately the same attitude was directed to me when it was my turn to pick up my luggage. The bed sheets were not changed in our room from the prior guests which was a bit disgusting. My wife refused to sleep on them until they were changed. They had nobody to change them at 10pm so they gave us another room. Next morning, no hot water in the shower. Maintenance was working to fix it, but we had to check out at 11 before it was done.  I was promised by the night shift manager and the front desk person to be credited 15000 miles on my Bonvoy account within couple of days. It’s been 8 days already and nothing credited yet. I would give the hotel a 2nd chance next time we go to NYC because of its location and hopefully they’ll get their act together.

Title: Great Location!
ReviewText: Being so close to Bryant Park was great! Added bonus: the stunningly renovated Stavros Niarchos branch of the NYPL library. Head to the library's roof terrace for a great view.

Title: Nice place, awesome location
ReviewText: Rooms are good size for a NY hotel. Location is great, just a couple of blocks away from Grand Central Station and close to Bryant park. Lots of dining options close by (none at the hotel). Staff very friendly and helpful (look out for Willie he was the best)

Title: Good location
ReviewText: The location is perfect, installations aren’t bad but a renovation is needed.

Title: Perfectly located
ReviewText: This hotel was nice, clean, and perfectly located. It's close to Grand Central Station, Bryant Park, and Times Square. We had a lovely time and loved the convienece.

Title: Great location, but rooms & staff not great
ReviewText: Good location in midtown, but unfriendly front desk. No insulation leads to cold breeze in the room.

Title: Awesome Experience, Great Location
ReviewText: Great place and location (right near Bryant park!). The staff was friendly and accommodating. Definitely recommend.

Title: Not staying there again
ReviewText:
HVAC system too loud for the cost of the hotel. Same brand hotels in other parts of town of other parts of the world in better shape.
Who uses carpets in hotels anymore?

Title: Great location for tourists, comfortable stay
ReviewText: In the hart of Manhattan, rooms are very clean and comfortable. Parking could have been cheaper for guests, but that’s Manhattan…

Title: An excellent stay at Courtyard Fith Av
ReviewText: The location is perfect to visit Manhattan, and the staff was always willing to help us, and really kind.

Title: The lack of service was shocking.
ReviewText: Visited as part of a Conference and was shocked by the lack of quality service. Due to a lack of employees, there was no daily housekeeping, the restaurant was closed and the room was not ready on time. During the banquet, the food wasn't on time either.

Title: Well Located
ReviewText:
Nice hotel near the New York Public Library on Fifth Avenue. One half block away across Fifth Avenue. Reasonable sized rooms at a reasonable price on the days we stayed. Free unlimited excellent coffee at a machine that grinds fresh beans on the second floor. No need to walk around the block to a coffee shop for your morning coffee. Friendly lobby staff.

You are in midtown New York so there are countless dining options within a few blocks. No restaurant at the hotel.

Title: Great experience
ReviewText: Location was great - very close to Grand Central and lots of shopping and food near by.  We walked to Times Square, Central Park, 34th Street, and up and down 5th Avenue and it was great.

Title: Clean room, ready on time
ReviewText: My room was ready on time and it was clean. The bed was comfortable and the shower was hot.

Title: Great stay
ReviewText: Staff was great, place was clean, convenient location, what more can you ask for

Title: Not suitable for families
ReviewText: Good location. However hotel is good for traveling solo or as a couple. Also there is not a single area to seat down and relax out of your room. So it is good only if you if plan to stay all day outside. Small rooms, no bistro, no coffee. In my opinion this hotel should not be branded a  Courtyard but as another more basic hotel within the Marriot chain.

Title: No amenities
ReviewText: Good staff s d location, zero amenities.

Title: Great place to stay for student group
ReviewText:
The hotel was clean and had larger than normal rooms for the city.

The staff particularly made our stay enjoyable. They all were very personable and helpful.

My only concern was the early hours which the neighborhood restaurants closed (around 9pm).

Title: A nice little sanctuary away from home.
ReviewText: I truly enjoyed my stay. The views from my window were gorgeous. The staff treated me very well, especially the housekeeper on my floor. I was by myself and was pleased that you have to have a room key to even operate the elevator. This made me feel safe. I will definitely return!

Title: Great Location ….
ReviewText: The location for NYC couldn’t be better. But the room and hotel left much to be desired for the price.

Title: Enjoyable time in NYC
ReviewText: Great location, excellent staff, clean rooms.

Title: Excellent service
ReviewText: Stayed at this property while visiting friends and family and from the moment we checked in till the day we left received nothing but stellar customer service from every staff member that we encountered. We asked for simple things like a shower cap and help with Wi-Fi and someone immediately came to help us solve these little problems. Was also surprised to receive daily room service since most hotels are using the excuse of Covid to not clean rooms on a daily basis. I would highly recommend this hotel as I received better customer service then I’ve received at many five star hotels lately. Although the rooms are small  and basic they are extremely clean and you have everything you need at your doorstep with their excellent location.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: First time to NY, this hotel was a great location the staff were friendly and helpful. There are no options for food inside the hotel. Otherwise it was a great first introduction to Manhattan!

Title: Broadway Bound Perfection
ReviewText: My best friend and I loved this location and hotel. It was perfect to get to all the shows and Times Square! We loved being close to the NY Public Library and when we come back, will probably fly into Newark and take the train into Grand Central Station since it’s only two blocks away. It was clean, well-maintained, the beds were super comfy, and the staff was super friendly! It was a fantastic trip!

Title: Perfect stay in NYC
ReviewText:
Good place for a family trip un NyC. 
Employees are very Nice . Room clean and confortable.
We recommend !

Title: Very good location
ReviewText:
We spend one week at Courtyard and the location is perfect! Close to the Bryant Park and main subway stations. Walking distance of Empire State, Grand  Central Station and Time Square.
Courtyard is super clean and altough there is no breakfast or kitchen, there is a coffe station with all types of teas and coffes.

Title: Good choice!!!
ReviewText: Without luxury very good choice for a couple of days. Excellent location, early check in, speedy check out, confortable beds.

Title: La mejor y más cómoda ubicación que he encontrado en mis viajes a NYC
ReviewText:
El hotel tiene una ubicación inmejorable en una zona céntrica y hermosa. 
Solo a un par de pasos de la Biblioteca, Grand Central y demás atracciones populares de NYC, rodeado de innumerables lugares para comer y compartir. 
La limpieza del lugar es excelente y su personal es sumamente amable. Especial agradecimiento a Frank.

Title: Excelente hotel en NYC!
ReviewText: 10/10 cumple, satisface y supera las expectativas.

Title: Great stay with a slight hiccup
ReviewText: Hotel is in a great location to subways and places to eat. My only complaint is that during my stay the hotels keycard system was not functioning. The staff was accommodating and apologetic, but I feel like the hotel should have a contingency plan in place for just such an issue.

Title: Nice hotel at a Good Price
ReviewText: Very clean, simple hotel right across from Bryant Park. Excellent stay. No dining area but you don’t really need it because there are so many restaurants nearby. The rooms are a good size for a Manhattan hotel and they’re very clean. Loved it.

Title: Volvería a hospedarme
ReviewText: Inmejorable ubicación y excelente atención.

Title: The stay was just OK
ReviewText: The check-in process was easy and fast however, the receptionist did not inform me about the amenities available or services I can avail during my stay. Although this is not the typical high-end hotel, but I expected to see the basic amenities available for a hotel.

Title: Clean and good value for the location - super close to Times Square and Subway
ReviewText: Clean and close to Times Square - not many amenities like restaurant or bar but good value for location.

Title: Excellent hotel
ReviewText:
Excellent hotel and location. It’s near to Bryant Park and all subways.
The bedrooms are clean and big.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: The hotel is very clean, staff is friendly. The location is great.

Title: 5X Perfecto
ReviewText:
El hotel es perfecto en ubicación a una cuadra del bryan para donde patinamos varias dias y muy cerca de la estación del subway. Perfecto en atención, Kenia la recepcionista nos recibió de forma divina, amable, cordial, bilingüe, siempre con una sonrisa y orientando en lo que necesites, en combinación con Pedro te hacen sentir en cada, a propósito Ambos nos recomendaron un restaurante chino donde pedimos comida para cenar a otro nivel.
El restaurante no tiene servicio de desayuna pero en compensación tiene una máquina de té, café y el mejor chocolate 24/7. La cama está tan cómoda que no queríamos levantarnos a pasear.

Title: Buena
ReviewText: Buena. Deberian tener neverita en el cuarto y las alfombras tenian mucho polvo.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: The staff were friendly, the location wonderful and for New York, the room was a decent size. We were walking distance to so many things. We would definitely stay here again.

Title: Nice folks, good stay :)
ReviewText: Nice folks, good stay and affordable. My daughter was having surgery at a nearby hospital. We live about 3 hours away and I needed a place to put my things, get a shower and lay my head. Everyone was very nice, the room was clean. No complaints.

Title: En el centro de todo
ReviewText:
Excelente mantenimiento 
Excelente ubicación 
Excelente atención

Title: Excelente
ReviewText: Excelente ubicación, excelente servicio, definitivamente volvemos.

Title: Good sex
ReviewText: Their coffee is like sex. And the staff is really great... Like good sex

Title: Basic
ReviewText:
Good location
Clean room 
No food & beverage on site 
Rude and unhelpful front desk staff

Title: Excelente estadía
ReviewText: Recomendado! El hotel tiene una ubicación privilegiada, las habitaciones limpias y cómodas, el personal atento y amable, ofrecen servicio de café y bebidas gratis lo cual ha sido un gran plus y se agradece.

Title: Great hotel
ReviewText: I normally only stay at hotels that offer continental breakfast, however this one didn’t but nonetheless I still got my monies worth and then some as I loved staying here because this truly is a great hotel, the location of it is pretty good (central) and the staff are amazing and helpful.

Title: We thought Marriott was better
ReviewText: The customer service was poor! The facilities felt very old and the service wasn't great to begin with. We were 4 adults and were given only three big towels even after notifying it to the reception. The reception wasn't very helpful in managing the amount of guests waiting for their luggage. The positive aspect is the location and the complimentary tee/coffee. Other than that we were quite disappointed in Marriott.

Title: Buen hotel
ReviewText:
Buen hotel, ubicación y personal.
Necesitan mejorar alfombras, colchones en sofá cama

Title: Dirty room clean bathroom
ReviewText:
Great doorman on 7/4/21 Evening shift. Clean bathroom and clean towels. Dirty and tired room. No baby crib. I asked for a crib when I made the reservation and I also told the gentleman who checked us IN but nothing was done until I spoke to another front desk agent who sent us a broken/dirty crib full of dust. I had to move the sofa next to the bed for my baby. However, underneath the sofa was so much trash and empty bottled water it was disgusting. Bathroom vent and heater were so loud.
Curtain was broken it got stuck down so we didn't even know if we had a nice view.
No valet I had to go self park which was ok the doorman helped us by letting us park to unload.

Title: Overpriced, undelivered tiny
ReviewText: Not worth a quarter of what was charged

Title: Wonderful time in NYC
ReviewText: We had a wonderful visit, the hotel was perfectly located, the price was amazing, and I will definitely stay again!

Title: NYC
ReviewText:
Staff was excellent! Room was clean.
Coffee was awful.

Title: A friendly start to 2022
ReviewText:
The staff at this Marriott location was extremely accommodating--kind, friendly, patient, professional and personable. This is extremely important at a time when some people can be so short-tempered and mean, grappling to deal with the many emotions associated with the pandemic and the state of this world. 
The location was perfect with the library just outside my window and perfect distance from the crowd for a brisk walk.  
This is my first ever being in NY for new years and the staff (especially Willie and front desk personnel) at  Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue helped to make it a near perfect stay. 
I highly recommend this location for a peaceful, fun, relaxing, and exciting stay!

Title: Sub par hotel
ReviewText: The walls are very thin and we could over hear normal conversations of other guests. There were 3-4 rooms on our floor filled with 3+ 20 something’s yelling and partying (probably because this was a budget friendly hotel for the location). There was no food or drinks. I will say the bed was comfy but given we were up multiple times calling security on the party rooms we didn’t get much sleep at all. I would not stay here again.

Title: Excelente localizacion!
ReviewText: Muy bien ubicado, el personal muy amable, Cinthia de housekeping es excelente. Si se va a quedar pida con anticipacion nevera y microondas, para mi es la unica leve falla ya que en el hotel no hay nada para comer, solo una muy buena maquina de cafe. Por supuesto me volveria a quedar.

Title: Awesome!
ReviewText: I went with my family and spent a really good time in the hotel! Clean and very good service.

Title: In the middle of everything! Buy appear enough from every thing
ReviewText:
The place is just perfect. You can walk around Manhattan from here. Is closed enough from all the must seen!!! But also apart from de crowd and noise! 
We went shopping and had the privilege to drop off the shopping bags at the hotel and keep going!

Title: 5th Ave. Courtyard
ReviewText: Excellent place for a stay in NYC. Central to so many places and activities, very courteous staff, and many good restaurants in the area! No dining in the house.

Title: Christmas day weekend
ReviewText: Good location and great staff. Stayed of 1 night it was great.

Title: Overnight trip from Mass to NYC.
ReviewText: Great Location and clean.

Title: Good Location
ReviewText: The only good thing about this hotel is the location. Personnel is very good too. Rooms are very clean. Small rooms, very small lobby, no restaurant and most important if you booked thru a third party even if you are a Marriott Platinum Elite not even a bottle of water is offered.

Title: Terrible experience. Never again.
ReviewText: The worse service ever had. Sofa bed is worse than sleeping on floor.

Title: Great stay during the holidays
ReviewText: We had a great stay. We were there for 2 nights. The room was cleaned when we arrived and the next day. Location is very good. Staff was courteous and helpful. Our experience was good.

Title: Great Pick for Hotel!
ReviewText:
Came in for a short weekend to see NYC at Christmas. This location is very central and walkable to all the highlights. Great access to Bryant Park, Times Square, Rockefeller, Broadway, short subway ride to 9/11 Memorial and Battery Park. 

Staff was very friendly and accommodating. Needed a later check-out + a fridge for medication. Staff jumped right on both with a smile.

Would definitely recommend this property + stay here again!

Title: Great Stay
ReviewText: We had a great stay at this hotel; this hotel is located in an excellent spot in New York City in the middle of all the happenings. Although most of the events were cancelled due to COVID but we enjoyed our stay.

Title: Christmas vacation
ReviewText: I visited New York for the first time with my family and we stayed for a night at this hotel and our stay was amazing

Title: sip
ReviewText: nice and comfortable .  the employees are great and friendly.  it was further away than i thought from times square but not too bad .

Title: Covid Protocols definitely not enforced at this location
ReviewText: I called prior to my stay to inquire about covid protocols and was told masks in all common areas was required.  This was not enforced at all.  I saw staff talking directly to guests not wearing masks over and over during my 5 day stay.  People were also not wearing masks in the elevator, so I took the stairs almost my entire trip.  I stayed during the recent Dec 2021 surge, and did my best to protect me and my family.  I made a complaint on the second day of my stay, but saw no changes. The staff was simply not empowered or comfortable enough asking guests to put their masks on, or they didn't care or take it seriously.  Guests were walking / talking in common areas and in the lobby in full sight of the staff with masks around their necks and nothing was ever said.  So if covid safety is important to you, I recommend another location or a different hotel. I personally will not be coming back here, and this is my usual go-to when I visit, as I like Bryant Park a lot.

Title: Great location. Comfortable room.
ReviewText: We had room 501 and it was comfortable and surprisingly quiet. The location of this hotel is perfect. The Starbucks however is closed but there is a pickup window right around the corner on 5th Ave. I would definitely stay at this hotel again. I have no complaints.

Title: Good stay
ReviewText: The hotel was a fine place to stay in NYC. Very central. However incredibly expensive for a very bare bones hotel.

Title: Great choice for a weekend away
ReviewText: My daughter and I had a great experience here. The location was perfect- so close to Bryant park and a short walk to Times Square.

Title: Traveller
ReviewText: Disgusting dirty and smelly

Title: Nice location - needs updating
ReviewText: This property is in a convenient location and close to Rockefeller center, times square etc. But it's a bit run down and needs to be updated to stay on track with typical Marriott quality

Title: Great Location, Older Hotel
ReviewText: My friend and I stayed at this Marriott property on a recent girls trip to NYC. It was a great location, staff was very friendly, however the hotel has not been updated in many years. The rooms were quite small and the bathroom was also small with older fixtures and sink area. For the cost/amount of points, the quality was a bit surprising.

Title: Nice hotel/ great location ….no breakfast
ReviewText:
Well maintained property.  Solid internet and reasonably quick elevators.    Excellent location for Bryant Park, Library, Theater district and Times Sq.
One surprise was no breakfast.  But, just around the corner was Essen’s.  Very many breakfast options that were well prepared.

Title: Perfect location/Excellent service
ReviewText: Great location and exceptional staff!  Immediate response when we requested items and very helpful information about things to do/places to eat.  Rooms very clean.  If you want a quieter room, request away from the street.

Title: This is the one!!
ReviewText: I’ve stayed in at least 12 to 15 different hotels and this one is now my favorite. Why?? Mostly because the staff made us feel like we were worth the trouble they went thru to see we had exactly what we needed to make everything easier.  Friendly, kind, helpful, always easy to reach, and cheerful while doing so. And the hotel is near EVERYTHING!! Thank you to all those who helped make our stay effortless. If you’re looking for a hotel in NYC, this is the one!

Title: Great location and hotel
ReviewText: Great location to Grand Central. Clean, efficient staff. Free coffee a plus!

Title: Never will I ever
ReviewText: I will never ever stay at this hotel or a Marriott again. I booked two months in advance, prepaid and when I got there after a long day flying cross country, my room was given to someone else. The manager did not think this was a big deal, he told me this happens all the time. They put me up in a hotel a few blocks away but were unable to get my stuff there requiring meandering through the NYC streets at night with baggage. Once at that hotel, I had to move back to the original hotel because they couldn’t just honor my rate for both hotels. (They made me pay for the second night even when they put me in this situation). I could have seen more of NYC on my stopover but I spent too much time having to move hotels. I still can’t fathom how they think doing all that was fine and how the manager thought I was ridiculous for being upset.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Excellent location, allows walk to theaters, restaurants, library. Very helpful friendly staff.

Title: Fun in NYC
ReviewText: Even with all the renovations that was going on the staff worked real hard to make sure we had a great stay.

Title: Confort and good service.
ReviewText: My husband and I celebrated our 25 years of marriage in NY, and one of the good experiences we won’t forget of this celebration is the hotel we chose for staying. We appreciate the cordiality of all its hosts, the excellent quality of its beverages at the mezannine, the good and fast hot showers, the quality of its amenities,  its cleanliness and the comfort for sleeping. Thanks for everything!!

Title: Review
ReviewText: Excellent location, friendly staff. Rooms in need of renovation.

Title: Great weekend stay at the Courtyard at 40th St. & Fifth Ave.
ReviewText: Good room and excellent service by the staff.  Location was also very good.

Title: Stay
ReviewText: One of the best Courtyard i ve ever been. Nice view, nice rooms, nice employees.

Title: Good Stay
ReviewText: Great location, great staff. Parking is $50/day 2 blocks away. Bed was a little hard, pillows meh. But otherwise, great!

Title: Great staff!
ReviewText:
Staff were super helpful and gave us a higher floor! They brought an extra chair to the room so my kids could use the table in the room for dinner!
Definitely would stay again!

Title: Great stay
ReviewText: The beds were comfy as usual. The staff was courteous.

Title: Excellent customer service
ReviewText: Customer service was great!  Coffee machine was outstanding because I could also utilize the hot chocolate option for our children..clean rooms..perfect location to explore..elevators worked great so I don't understand reviews I read saying they didn't because they were swift and working for us..Perfect spot to walk to the Macy's Day Parade and get a great spot to view it. Took less than 10 minutes to get to 6th and 42nd where we viewed..Pedro the bellman was excellent with the way he provided "his" services.  He takes pride in his work.  Upon checking out, I don't remember his name but he was very pleasant and had outstanding customer service as well...I never met Sophia in person but she was also great to talk to when I would call periodically to ask questions about particular things being I'm from North Carolina and had no clue how New York was or The Macy's Day Parade was. Just want to say thank you to all staff at this Marriot.  They went above and beyond our family's expectations.  We will definitely be back to explore again and do more shopping...I would rate this hotel 100 stars if I could.   Thank you for making one of my bucket list experiences the best ever! It was everything I dreamed of.

Title: Had to leave without staying
ReviewText: I did not stay there as I had an emergency and had to leave.  I was charged my complete stay nevertheless

Title: Great location
ReviewText: This hotel is in the perfect location if you plan to shop and prefer to walk everywhere. Hotel was clean and the staff friendly.

Title: Courtyard by Marriott Fifth Avenue
ReviewText: Excellent location, very good service

Title: Comfortable room in a excellent location  5th av near Bryant Park
ReviewText: Marriot 5th Avenue is in a great location , near Bryant park and halfway between uptown and downtown

Title: Excellent Choice for Midtown Weekend Stay
ReviewText: (See my prior entry above under “Describe your stay”

Title: Convenient and safe Midtown location
ReviewText: Good midtown location off Fifth Avenue.  Convenient for crosstown bus if attending Javits Shows.  Easy walk to Grand Central.  Safe area if you travel alone or with family.

Title: Great Midtown Location
ReviewText: We love this courtyard. Walking distance to Bryant Park, Grand Central and Broadway.

Title: Nice location.  Outdated hotel.
ReviewText: For a Marriott product, this hotel was subpar.  Although the location was fantastic, the hotel itself was a bit outdated.  Bathroom wasn't very clean.  Blinds were from the 70s.  Not to the standards that Marriott is known for.

Title: Mediocre hotel but reasonably priced
ReviewText: This hotel room was small and antiquated. The hotel was located close to Bryant park and midtown which was good. The hotel room got really hot and we couldn’t control the thermostat.

Title: Old - not the quality I'm used to in a Marriott
ReviewText: Room was old, curtain was broken, carpet looked like it had been there 30 years.  If you are travelling to NYC on a budget, this might work but don't expect Marriott quality

Title: Marriott Courtyard stay in Manhattan
ReviewText: Lovely part of town at 5th avenue & east 40th street. Friendly staff that accommodated my lower floor request. Only negative was no option for any kind of food or beverage located on the hotel premises but their are options nearby.

Title: Cumple con lo ofrecido
ReviewText: Personal muy amable, bebidas complementarias perfectas pars estadía en NYC en otoño. Arreglo del ascensor hizo que estadía no fuera perfecta.

Title: great location
ReviewText: the rooms are smartly designed with drawer and closet space. Stayed for 4 nights and was comfortable. Room cleaned daily. Great location. Just around the corner is a food emporium, Essen. Great for any meal. Won't be disappointed in the area. Excellent location.

Title: getaway
ReviewText: no amenities, not even any vending machines.Front desk less than helpful along with a poor manager when it was brought to his attention. Room was very small compared to pics on web site.Too many other hotels in the same area to receive this kind of service. Not what we were use to for a Marriott property.

Title: Won't stay here again!
ReviewText: The service of the housekeeper was great; the overall staff was helpful. Others clients on elevator said they had stayed there before and same thing happened with the elevator. Location was good but definitely NOT worth the 100,000 points I used for 2 nights! This was NOT a category 5 hotel nor a 5!

Title: Stay at the New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue
ReviewText: Enjoyed my stay. Hope to be back soon

Title: Marriott
ReviewText: Simple and easy to get to from all the major attractions in Midtown. Service and hotel were amazing and clean

Title: This is a great place to stay!
ReviewText: The rooms are clean, staff is excellent and the location is awesome.  I highly recommend this hotel.

Title: Great hotel!!
ReviewText: Great location. Friendly staff. Very clean rooms. Quiet street!

Title: Great Simple Convenient Hotel
ReviewText: Great simple convenient hotel, with lovely staff. In a wonderful location. Rooms are average size but very clean. I feel safe in this hotel.

Title: Great stay!
ReviewText: Stayed at the courtyard only one night but had a great stay. We arrived mid morning and the front desk was nice enough to let us check into one of our two rooms early which was a pleasant surprise! The hotel and rooms were small but we knew this and booked two rooms for our family if four.  The cost was comparable to one room in other hotels with larger square footage. The hotel and rooms were extremely clean and pleasant. The beds and pillows were comfortable. The coffee machine in the mezzanine was nice after a long day in the city. We enjoyed the Bryant park area because we felt safe and it was convenient to everything. Everyone was friendly from the front desk, concierge, bell hop, and cleaning staff. We will definitely be back.

Title: Great Hotel For Any NYC Trip
ReviewText: The hotel had great accommodations like WiFi and a gym that’s accessible, a safe atmosphere, friendly and helpful staff, is in a great location to get to and from places, and was overall clean and kept up to date!

Title: Good Marriott
ReviewText: This Marriott is in a great location in the middle of Manhattan.  The rooms are small and the space is tight.  Staff was great.  Guests were polite.  It is not prettiest Marriott, but I would go back.

Title: One nigth
ReviewText: Water was my main problem, to drink not available, to bath not good enough.

Title: Great location. Clean rooms. Welcoming staff.
ReviewText: Stayed for 5 nights. The room was clean and housekeeping did a great job daily. Front desk staff and bellman were friendly and helpful. Location in midtown is great. Close to the library. Walking distance to Times Square. There is a convenience store and pizza shop right down the street.  Rooms are smaller, which you should expect in Manhattan. What I didn’t expect was how clean the rooms were. Will stay again.

Title: Needs updating
ReviewText: This hotel is in a great location but needs updating and amenities.

Title: Great location!
ReviewText: This Courtyard is in a great location, right near the New York Public Library off Fifth Avenue.  It's really close to Grand Central Station too.  Our room was quite large for NY standards, and the bed was really comfortable.  The room was clean and the staff very helpful.  The coffee was good and included with the room. I would definitely stay here again.

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Excelentes habitaciones y atención

Title: Clean and convenient location
ReviewText: This property is excellent  launching pad for exploring the city. If you plan on spending all day and night out and about this is a great location.  Easy to come back to if you need to freshen up or drop bags. Great food options near by for breakfast and lunch. Free tea and coffee in the lobby 24 hours is very nice. No restaurant on the property.  The staff is very friendly. I would book again.

Title: Good location
ReviewText: Location was very convenient to a wedding we were attending.  NYC city noise was definitely noticeable though.

Title: good and basic with great location
ReviewText:
The location is great. 
The room is comfy
service was good.
basic and good hotel.

Title: NYC trip
ReviewText: Excellent location everything is walking distance.

Title: Great time in NYC!
ReviewText: We were well accommodated and had a good time.

Title: Perfect location for NYC!
ReviewText: The Courtyard NY Manhattan/Fifth Ave is in a fantastic location! Walk to Grand Central Station, Rockefellar, Central Park, Bryant Park, etc. It's clean, the staff is super friendly! A real gem!

Title: Basic hotel that does it right
ReviewText: The room was clean, the AC cooled the room very well, the mattress and pillows were comfortable , the location is great!  You won’t find breakfast or much of a lobby but it was a good place for us to stay because it met our needs!  I will stay again just because of the location , the price and the cleanliness… and of course it was a huge plus to have a mattress that didn’t hurt my back!

Title: excelent location
ReviewText: the hotel has a good location.  people are very kind

Title: A conveniently located hotel in the heart of Manhattan
ReviewText: This Courtyard is located conveniently located, steps from Fifth Avenue, The New York Public library and Bryant Park. For those arriving at Newark Liberty airport, there are drop off and pick up bus stops for the Newark Airport express bus on 42nd St on the north side of Bryant Park.

Title: Old dark room, doesn’t feel like a Marriot
ReviewText: Our shower didn’t have hot water, carpet and bedding were old, the room was a dark cave and harsh white lights didn’t help.  Overall a bad experience, I’m very glad we only stayed one night

Title: Not what we expected
