ReviewText: Did not get the room booked and was not as pictured online.  Hotel had nothing to offer for food or beverage. The price was way high for what was offered & received.

Title: People make the place
ReviewText: The concierge, front desk, cleaning staff - all make this place comfortable and comforting!  Cannot beat the amenities for the price.

Title: Vacation time
ReviewText: I came to visit my family and it was so conveniently located in the center of everywhere I went. During my stay one of the elevators was not working and the doorman assured me it would be up and working soon. The very next day it was fixed! Amazing service. I'd love to stay here again.

Title: Not clean
ReviewText: Overall after a long flight you would expect a clean bathroom and shower to end the night. Unfortunately for us, our toilet had urine not flushed and shower amenities such as body wash and shampoo were empty. I would recommend pay a little more and stay at a better place.

Title: Excelente!!
ReviewText: Su ubicación es ideal en el mero centro de Manhattan, su personal muy atento, Sophia de recepción me ayudó a imprimir unas hojas que necesitaba, impecables sus instalaciones. Definitivamente volveremos!

Title: Prime location; wonderful, helpful staff members; comfortable accommodations.
ReviewText: The hotel is very close to the NY Public Libary--a great, central location.  Every staff member with whom we interacted was kind, friendly and most accommodating.  The rooms were quiet and clean and very comfortable.  We definitely will return.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: This is very close to subways and everything you want to get to

Title: Good stay in NYC in Bryant Park
ReviewText: We stayed at the Marriott Courtyard in Bryant Park over the Labor Day weekend as a family of 4. The hotel room was on the 25th floor, and it was exceptionally quiet for NYC. They cleaned the room everyday. The location was excellent given that it was in close proximity to Rockefeller Center, the Empire State Building and Times Square. I thought the staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful. The hotel took masking seriously which I appreciated given that everyone wants to vacation safely with their family. I would stay there again. The only thing I wish this Marriot had was a bigger lobby with an option to sit down for breakfast. The lobby was very small, and there was no on-site restaurant.

Title: Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue
ReviewText: The hotel and staff where both nice. The beds in the room where very uncomfortable. When I asked for an upgrade they said they had the room but the system couldn’t make the change because I paid for one of my nights with points. When we got to the room, my wife found fake nails on the floor near the bathroom.

Title: Good Stay
ReviewText: After reading other reviews I saw comments like noise room and slow elevator, so I asked the nice lady (Sophie?) or (Hannah?) at the counter for a room at a lower level, she said to me that low rooms are naturally noise so I dropped the elevator issue but there was the issue of noise so she upgraded my room and put me on the fifth floor and my stay was wonderful, The coffee on the mezzanine level was the best I ever had at a hotel or even restaurant as far as I am concerned.

Title: New York family visit
ReviewText: First time staying at this location. Easy access to many of the places we wanted to visit. Strategically located and very convenient, right off 5th Ave in Midtown.

Title: Review for NYC
ReviewText: Great location, easy access to subway. Central to almost everything.

Title: My stay
ReviewText: It was cool, just wish they had a fridge in the room

Title: No desayuno
ReviewText: La reserva incluía un desayuno que nunca se nos dio

Title: Great stay!
ReviewText: The location of the Marriott is great. The staff was helpful and kind. The hotel was tidy and professional. My 4 young female friends and I felt very safe staying here.

Title: Convenient to Big City yet still a quiet retreat
ReviewText: We found what was a perfect NYC hotel for us.  We loved the proximity to all things big city....subway, shopping, food, etc, while still having a quiet place to retreat and relax at the end of a busy day.  Tucked away on a quiet street just outside Bryant Park allowed for quick access to everything we could want or need without all the noise and lights.  Great location, great price, and great staff.

Title: Wonderful Stay at Courtyard on 5th Ave.
ReviewText: I was very impressed by the Courtyard on 5th Ave. The room and bathroom were very clean and nicely decorated, and we didn't hear much noise from other guests while in our room. We had requested to stay on a higher floor, and this request was taken into account. Our room had a beautiful view of the city. Additionally, we were planning on leaving New York during the late afternoon, and were worried about storing our luggage since check out was at 11. However, the hotel stored our belongings for free until we were ready to leave. One warning: there is a lot of noise on floors with the ice makers, so I would recommend asking for a different room assignment if you're on the 11th or 25th floor.

Title: Good for our family of 3
ReviewText: Wish there was a better option for a suite but none were available.

Title: Birthday weekend
ReviewText: I enjoyed myself immensely the staff was very friendly the room was very clean I enjoyed those lamps I just enjoyed everything it was a nice time

Title: Disappointed ☹️
ReviewText: As a regular Marriott customer I have never experienced such a dissatisfaction in a room availability. The agent who checked us in was emphatic nothing else was available.  But one half hour latter after asking to speak to the manager, a regular room was suddenly available???

Title: Great stay
ReviewText: Convenient to many attractions and shopping.

Title: Nice stay at courtyard midtown
ReviewText: It was a pleasant trip to New York.  The hotel was great and very convenient.  The staff was helpful, especially the concierge/doorman.  He was full of ideas to help our day trips and even got us a taxi.  When we go to nyc again, this would be the hotel to be at.

Title: Bed Bugs?!
ReviewText: The price was reasonable, for Midtown, and easy access to where I needed to go for work. That said, I woke up with bites on my legs. I have never encountered bed bugs so I dont know if it was this or fleas(?) but it happened in my sleep and was very difficult to concentrate in meetings the following days.

Title: Great location. Helpful staff
ReviewText: Great location, steps from Bryant Park. Very helpful and pleasant staff, especially valet. We had 2 queen beds (not full) which can be hard to find in Manhattan, and high floor room was pretty quiet.  Small bathroom might use a bit of updating.  Great to have a large full length mirror in the room.

Title: Outdated and small rooms
ReviewText: The rooms could be renovated. Our bathtub had paint chip marks. The lights were not very good. The desk char was very worn and was uncomfortable.

Title: STAY IN NYC
ReviewText: Good Stay Convinient location

Title: Great stay in Midtown without breaking the bank
ReviewText: Great location, clean, efficient, friendly helpful staff.  Excellent value for money. There is a cart outside in the morning for traditional NY breakfast. Great  bagels, croissants or eggs on a hard roll and it’s cheap !!

Title: Courtyard/Fifth Avenue is a great choice
ReviewText: I truly enjoyed my 2 night stay at the Courtyard Manhattan/Fifth Avenue.  The location is great as it is right in the heart of the shopping, restaurants, tourism and entertainment centers of NYC.  My stay was very comfortable, clean and affordable for myself and my family.  It will stay here again for upcoming visits.

Title: NYC Vacation
ReviewText: Clean overall hotel, friendly front desk and outstanding location!!!

Title: Not bad
ReviewText:
I got the high floor room, but still the view is still blocked by another building. On weekends, especially in the morning time where everybody tries to go out, elevators are packed and have to wait a few to squeeze in. And we had better chance because we were near the top floor. Those in the middle or low had harder time catching an elevator.
Room is small. I liked their public coffee machine and their water machine which I used to refill my water bottles.
For the price, it's an OK hotel, but overall, it's just not bad, but not great either.

Title: N/A
ReviewText: Excellent room and building. The building was used in a productive manner. The space was utilized in very modern functional manner.

Title: My stay at The Marriott Hotel in Manhattan
ReviewText: My stay was really nice at the hotel. It was very convenient location wise to places i needed to get to. The only thing I would've liked in the room that wasn't there was a small fridge and a microwave. The staff was excellent and very friendly and helpful when I needed directions to get to somewhere. Very courteous.

Title: Excelent service and location.
ReviewText: Extraordinary service and location.

Title: Ehhh…..
ReviewText: Well the rooms were an ok size, the beds were hard as a rock, and no refrigerator but a super small safe. One elevator was down 5 of our 8 night stay. A manager was never present at the front desk. Lobby was stark and uncomfortable.

Title: Hospitality Centered Stay
ReviewText: Really enjoyed our stay. The hospitality of the staff from every employee seemed above and beyond. We were very thankful for a fun family visit.

Title: Nice
ReviewText: It was a nice stay. Great location, the rooms good to sleep, but nothing to write home about :)! I would stay here again 100%

Title: Great location with friendly staff
ReviewText: We’ve stayed in NYC several times and this is a great value for the location and service. Small rooms are expected in the city, so if you’re looking for extra room, you’ll need to adjust your expectations to enjoy this excellent hotel.

Title: Buena ubicación
ReviewText: La ubicación del hotel es excelente, el hotel no tiene restaurantes, el hotel no tiene lobby, se deber mejorar en estos aspectos.

Title: Perfect location
ReviewText: Close to everything. Shopping, theater, restaurants

Title: Adequate
ReviewText: Parking is $45.00 and is off site with no valet service.

Title: I would stay here again!
ReviewText: When I arrived at the hotel, the staff informed me that the room was oversold, and that I would be in adjoining property. We understand that things can happen and we were very grateful to have been put up really close to Times Square. The location, being four blocks from Grand Central was perfect and the walk to the Bryant park Station was pleasant too.

Title: Perfect stay! Perfect Location!
ReviewText:
This hotel was perfect for everything. Staff was amazing, location was amazing !
Highly recommended!

Title: Excellent vacations time
ReviewText: 5 stars, excellent service , perfect locations and all staff was friendly ... very good for family and vacationed trip

Title: Super slow elavator and noise
ReviewText: I waited 45 minutes to get out of the hotel because one of the elavator was down and the other one was stopping at every single floor. Regardless, it's still slow during regular time, took like 15-20 minutes to get to the lobby. The elavator is in the middle of the building so you can hear all noise coming from the hallway when people returned to their room late at night or early in the morning.

Title: Used to be the Marriott the best for me.. not anymore for me
ReviewText:
- Elevator issue
- Bath room issue
- Rate was 224 when I booked. But increased to 284 without informed. I noticed only after the checkout.

Title: Older hotel
ReviewText: Close enough to subway and times square. However, room is small and is older.

Title: Challenges
ReviewText: Elevator was broken, tough to find coffee or water.  The line for check in or elevators was overwhelming.

Title: Maid service during COVID
ReviewText: It was so refreshing to actually have maid service in our room during COVID. We went on a 10 day trip around New York and DC and stayed at multiple hotels. This one was the only one that cleaned our room everyday. It was so nice to come back from our day of exploring and have fresh sheets and towels. I wish they served breakfast, but it was fine, since we were so close to bakeries, delis, and grocery stores. This hotel is in a good location - easy walk to Grand Central (2 blocks), Times Square (8 blocks), and so many shops.

Title: Brant Park Courtyard
ReviewText: Great location , friendly staff and very comfortable mattress

Title: New York still on the rebound
ReviewText: As prior residents looking around the city it’s definitely in recovery efforts from the pandemic and this was our second hotel in the city. It was clean, well staffed, had room service and was central in the city. We were expecting just the bare minimum and it was more than we could have hoped for during these times.

Title: Noise outside
ReviewText: The noise on the street from 4am on was ridiculous due to a metal plataform. You can hear it earlier but much less. Front desk staff  was not very helpful when told about the noise and I am sure they are aware it’s impossible that someone else hasn’t complained, They gave us a room on floor 15th you lightly hear the noise. Cleaning staff is really nice. Great to have coffee and tea available. It’s a wonderful location close to metro, Time Square, Essen to grab something to eat, CVS and other coffee shops.

Title: Excellent!
ReviewText: Great hotel close to everything!  We are definitely staying again soon!

Title: Family Week
ReviewText:
Great location, wonderful staff. 
Please update website about Starbucks closing . 
Coffee machine was broken in the Mezzanine

Title: Good for the price
ReviewText: The room was clean and beds were comfortable.  Coffee was out of order all 3 days. Strange it was not fixed but quick and easy to get coffee and breakfast  at Essen around the corner.

Title: Expensive for less
ReviewText: For the cost and standard of Marriott, this hotel is out of it, since the lack of maintenance and changes it needs is visible, more than anything because the area where it is deserves it.

Title: Great Location
ReviewText: The location was ideal for us as we were visiting family in the local area. We were able to walk to all our destinations. The area is very safe and restaurants and shops are all around. Being across from Bryant Park was also ideal for sitting and people watching.

Title: Family Visit
ReviewText: Clean small rooms, good location, no amenities, no lobby.   Expected a little more for the price

Title: Excelente
ReviewText: Extremadamente satisfecha con todo, la atención de parte del personal, la limpieza, la ubicación, todo. Volvería a escogerlo en un futuro.

Title: Mediocre
ReviewText: The stay was very average. Rooms are very small and there is no pool. We had to request a refrigerator and microwave. I will say that the distance to Times Square, Fifth Ave and Central Park was perfect for trying to fit in lots of sightseeing.

Title: Great time in Manhattan on 5th avenue
ReviewText: The staff were wonderful!  We got to the hotel too early to check in but they held our bags in a secure location so we could start enjoying the city until our room became available!  Fantastic service

Title: Feel like home away from home
ReviewText: I visit the Marriott Courtyard at 5th and 40th in Manhattan at least once per month. The staff is friendly and treat you like family returning home. Frank and arks my car and makes it so easy for me to just give it to him and go about my business. I was booked to stay at another hotel for this visit but canceled and went to the Marriott because they did I not have a Frank. Keep up the good work. I will be back!

Title: Continuous excellence by Marriott
ReviewText: Great Customer Service, very clean interiors and amazing location

Title: Great stay!
ReviewText: The hotel was clean and the front desk staff were very friendly. I had forgotten some souvenirs in my room and called the front desk and they shipped them to me within a week. Thank you!

Title: A great stay the heart of NYC
ReviewText: So convenient to stay here since we wanted to see the Today Show. The staff was wonderful. The room was quiet, comfortable and very clean!

Title: Front desk doesn’t care
ReviewText:
Do not stay here. Front desk doesn’t acknowledge your existence. Rooms smell like a bathroom, windows leak wind and cold and heating system is loud and does not perform adequately enough to make up for the cold drafts.

Good luck if you stay here.

Title: courtyard E 5th Ave
ReviewText: Clean no frills mid town hotel. If you are looking for a clean room to stay this is a good option.

Title: Baggage check
ReviewText: What a great location to stay in NYC.  You won't be disappointed.  Our party of 4 checked our bags at the front desk on checkout day and later came to change our clothes.  The staff person was so helpful and never made it feel like a burden.  Then when we were leaving the city, they were quick to bring our bags to the car.  I'll be back!

Title: Clean, great service and excellent location.
ReviewText: The staff at this courtyard is extremely helpful and accommodating. The room was  clean and house keeping service was suburb. Location and price you absolutely can’t beat! Nice to have a Starbucks next door too!

Title: Manhattan courtyard
ReviewText: Excellent stay, made exceptional because of Frank the doorman. This hotel is in a great location to tour Manhattan and Times Square by foot. Price was excellent for the location.

Title: Great location!
ReviewText: A very convenient location for sightseeing. The hotel itself is decent enough for the price I paid (free with points). That said, if I am spending cash out of pocket, spend  a little extra a night to stay in a nicer hotel. It is not the best Courtyard by any means, but it is predictably clean with a nice staff. The rooms are a bit worn out and the walls are paper thin.

Title: Small beds and loud
ReviewText: Bed was smaller than I reserved and paid for, and the room was incredibly loud. There was a large gap under the door, so we heard everything in the hallways and could hear through the walls into rooms nextdoor.

Title: Nice place to stay at
ReviewText: Nice location and cool hotel

Title: Tourists Delight
ReviewText: Don’t know that you can be better located to tour NYC and all its amenities. The hotel is Walking distance from many attractions and theaters but just far enough to avoid the hustle and bustle. Nice to know you can step away conveniently when you are ready to retreat. Lol

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Nothing was super special about this hotel but nothing terrible either. The room was small and simple but had everything we needed. It was a 10 minute walk to Times Square and right next to Bryant Park. A 10 minute walk to grand central. Overall good stat

Title: An Affordable, Clean and Friendly Place to stay in Manhattan
ReviewText:
The title says it all. You can stay right in the middle of things, the staff is friendly, the rooms are clean and comfortable. There is free coffee and tea 24/7, a Starbucks downstairs and anything else you need (drugstore, restaurants) are an easy 3-8 minute leisurely walk. Well, that was about as far as we needed to walk anyway. A view to speak of? Not from most rooms, but get outside and walk and of course taxis are on 5th Ave. to grab in
usually less than a minute. We had a great stay.

Title: Lovely, convenient, great customer service!
ReviewText: Small hotel right across from Bryant Park. Lovely staff. Rooms are clean and comfy. Very convenient location. Would highly recommend.

Title: Great spot
ReviewText: Great space - clean - courteous and professional staff - excellent location.

Title: The price doesn't worth it
ReviewText:
Very expensive for the price. 
Colors and furniture need to be updated or changed.

Title: Excellent value, great location
ReviewText: I stayed in a 2 queen bed (for three adults) on the 22nd floor.  I had a corner room.  The room was relatively quiet, reasonably modern (smart TV, etc), and clean.  However, it is small for three adults (and in line with most NYC hotel rooms).  The hotel is just across from the public library of 40th and 5th, an excellent and very central location.  There is a health club, albeit small, but 2-3 people can work out at the same time (there is one treadmill and one stationary bike, and free weights).  Coffee and tea is available in a common area, but there are no other amenities (e.g. an on-site restaurant) for example.  There is also a small business centre near the coffee/tea and gym.  The staff was excellent across the board - very helpful and friendly.  WiFi works fine, a prerequisite today of course.  The value was outstanding, although I recognise this is related to the market for NYC hotel rooms for the first week in January.  I would highly recommend this hotel for someone that plans to spend most of their time outside of the room, and does not need a full-service lobby, etc.  Everything is, after all, available at your fingertips since this is NYC.

Title: ロケーションは抜群
ReviewText:
フィフスアベニューまで徒歩30秒のロケーションは抜群。
ただ、部屋が狭く、冷蔵庫がないのは非常に不満。またアメニティも充実しているとは言い難い。フリーのコーヒーマシン、パソコンがあり旅慣れた予算重視のビジネスマン向け。

Title: Check-In challenges
ReviewText: Room was not ready. Hotel held my luggage and I had to wait 25 minutes to retrieve it.

Title: Outdated Hotel, with old interiors and dirty carpets
ReviewText: This Hotel has just rooms and reception desk. The Hotel is very small and old. Everything in the hotel is dated and old. Maintainace is very poor. Carpets felt full of dust and allergic.

Title: Great Feeling
ReviewText: I visit this Marriott every time I am in Manhattan for work. Frank the bell man greets me like family and makes the parking experience tolerable. I could stay at the Marquis but stay here and hope Frank is working the day I arrive!

Title: wonderful stay
ReviewText: this hotel is very well located. just a quick minutes walk to grand central station and about 10 minutes to times square, koreatown, empire state building, etc. the hotel is quite modern and very clean. the staff was helpful and nice.

Title: Horrible customer service
ReviewText: Very unfriendly staff in the evening shift. Told me to check in at 4pm, but did not start cleaning my room till 6:30pm. When I got to my room, the pillow cases were not even changed and stunk and had oil stains on them. Had to call 3 times and was told that I have to wait on personnel to come back from lunch. Didn't get them till 9pm. They do not care about your business. They won't even try to keep it. I left the next day and went to Westin Grand Central, where I was treated with respect and appreciation.

Title: A good hotel at a great location
ReviewText: Close to everything, right in the heart of Manhattan, helpful staff.

Title: Perfect service
ReviewText: Great, customer Services, very friendly crew

Title: Great Value
ReviewText: The location of this hotel is excellent as it is near the theatre district and near several train lines, so it's easy to get around Manhattan.  But more importantly, although the staff is small, they are competent and welcoming.  We were here over Christmas, a chaotic time at any hotel, but they took care of answering all my questions (which were many as it was my first stay at this particular hotel).  I would not hesitate to book this hotel again.

Title: Weekend in NYC
ReviewText: Room is small and no fridge, but convenient location to see tree and shopping! Walking distance to shopping shorter than a lyft ride. Disappointed that work was done on our floor when we wanted to take a break and relax mid day.

Title: Excellent stay
ReviewText: Recommended this property. Great location wonderful staff clean rooms!

Title: TV channel choices
ReviewText: There are three major financial channels and the highest rated channel is not included - Fox Business.  Much higher rated than CNBC and Bloomberg.

Title: Just average
ReviewText: The location is good and the hotel is just okay. No lobby at all and staff are not going to go out if their way for you.

Title: One bad apple . . . and a hairbrush.
ReviewText: We began our stay with Courtyard Fifth Avenue by finding a hairbrush in the top of the bedding on our bed that was not ours.  Let's just say that didn't leave a good impression for us about your cleanliness or expectations.  We went on from there having the concierge, Frank, when we asked him to save a jacket for us because we had come down with it and then realized that it was too warm to be of use say to us, "You want me to check this for you because you don't want to take it back up to your room?"  Yeah Frank. That's kind if your job.  Throughout the trip things continually fell apart -- the front door on one side or the other was consistently not working, the room was not cleaned on one occasion (not including the one that we told her not to bother because we really aren't high-maintenance and don't need for someone to put new sheets on our bed every day). We found out from the cab driver that our trip would have been less expensive but the hotel/concierge (he didn't say which) adds a gratuity onto the top of the charge that we expend for THEMSELVES? Sorry - in Texas if you EARN a tip you GET a tip.  If you just make a phone call or recommend something then getting a gratuity is at the whim of the guest you are serving.  Pedro and Willie were both VERY nice, helpful and while they may have been on their personal phones they always took the time to open the door for us and greet us -- Frank never did (check your tapes of the lobby while he works and see how many hours he spends on his personal business rather than Courtyard's).  I own three businesses and I know how difficult it is to get good help.  The front-desk woman from Greece (sorry, I forgot her name) was also very helpful.  I did wonder why I was sent "around the corner to 'Esses' (sp??) to get a soda when there was Jacks right across the intersection but now I guess that there are "buddy deals" throughout the Manhattan area? I don't know how to help you correct these situations but they definitely colored my view of Courtyard.

Title: NYC
ReviewText: Lobby experience could be more friendly at check in.

Title: They will steal from you
ReviewText: Disgusting behavior at check in. Was given smaller less expensive room but charged for the larger room I booked until I complained.

Title: Great location for a great price
ReviewText: This hotel is right by Bryant Park with a CVS and other convenient stores, restaurants and bars nearby.  It served us well on our Thanksgiving stay.  Clean and quiet with everything you need in NYC!

Title: Plain hotel done well
ReviewText: This is a no-frills hotel with little in the way of amenities beyond the room.  That said, the room is very comfortable and well appointed, the staff are very efficient and friendly, and the hotel is well located.  For both the business traveler and the tourist who seek a safe, comfortable room in this part of Manhattan, and nothing more, the hotel is a great choice.

Title: Disappointing experience
ReviewText: It was really bad experience, staff was not friendly at all, I was promised to have a rollaway bed but when I checked in they told me that they never offer these kind of beds and when I explained to them that O was promised in the phone to have a rollaway bed they told me you can leave the hotel and look for another hotel!

Title: Great Location, Average Service
ReviewText:
The location is great!! Very central to many things like Bryant Park, Times Square, NY Public Library & Macy's. But, in comparison to other Marriott staff, this hotel staff is not friendly.  We were not greeted when we entered the lobby and didn't feel we could ask questions about where to eat, etc.
The rooms are not insulated well so you can hear allot of street and hallway noise. 
The lobby is tiny and offers no sitting space. 
Hotel is very average compared to other Marriott hotels we've stayed at. 
It was adequate for our needs but nothing exceptional. We will not stay at this location again.

Title: Dirty Bathroom
ReviewText: The bathroom was very dirty

Title: Good location, small rooms
ReviewText: Great location if you just want a clean bed. Hotel itself is unimpressive and lacks basic amenities

Title: Great hotel/Great location
ReviewText: You will love this hotel. Great location. Very good room and staff.

Title: We love Courtyard!
ReviewText: Excellent hotel location for a NYC visit! Right by Bryant Park, clean & offered free offer and hot coco which was a hit with our group. Help with a ride to and from airport! Much better rate than a Taxi or Uber!

Title: Great location and A+ coffee
ReviewText: You are less than a mile from a lot of NYC iconic locations. The Grand Central Terminal is 3 blocks away. There is also the Bryant Park subway station (2 blocks away) Between those 2 stations, you can get to anywhere in the city via the subway. Google New York City MTA trip planner for subway and bus directions. Hotel is a great $$$ value.

Title: Great location!
ReviewText: Terrific location, close to sightseeing and subways.

Title: Best of NYC Marriotts

Title: Great place to say in Time Square

The Staff was professional and friendly and the rooms were clean and comfortable after a long day on the go.  Thanks Courtyard, we will see you again next time.

ReviewText: Convenient location, clean and bright room, free coffee and tea (tea selection is good), and super helpful and friendly staff members. I will stay here again if I visit NY again.

ReviewText: Old Courtyard hotel. Doesn’t fee it is a Courtyard. No water, no cups (even carton or paper). You will go to sleep nothing else.

Title: Deceptive and Fraud Management Team - STAY AWAY!!
ReviewText: Managers are unprofessional, rude and deceptive. They will change your reservation to triple your original booking rate without your knowledge (until check out) or consent. Will not return calls when questioned. Old hotel with no amenities. Uncomfortable bed and very noisy - could not sleep entire week stay. Worst hotel ever. Surprised part of Marriott properties.

Title: NY
ReviewText: My mom and I both enjoyed the facility

Title: Not up to Marriott name
ReviewText: I would not recommend or stay at this hotel again.  It is ‘subpar’ to say the least!

Title: New York Visit
ReviewText: Enjoyed the cleanliness of the hotel. Friendly staff and the limousine we rented to take us back to the Newark airport was very nice. It made the return to the airport a snap. No catching trains or figuring out schedules.

Title: Expensive and hidden charges.
ReviewText: Even though the hotels confirmation states that all charges are included, watch for additional charges after your stay that will not be explained to you by staff at check out

Title: One Week Holiday
ReviewText: Best location in busy Midtown Manhattan, right across from the gorgeous historic NYC Library, and about 500 ft away from Bryant Park. Very clean, functional hotel. Stayed a whole week. Everything about this hotel was excellent - the staff, the room, the location. If there are any negatives it would be this is not a "trendy/experiential" hotel, so if you're going for that, this may not be your choice. The second negative is a bit of nightime noise from outside making its way somehow through the large windows, but this is probably typically of anywhere in Midtown. The street is a bit quieter street though, so could've been worse I suppose. Our room was on the 23rd floor, perfect because the ice machines were on the 5th and 25th. Nice view of highrises to south.

Title: Rundown place not worth the money
ReviewText: Hairs on the bathroom, carpet is old and dirty, expensive for what it is. Great location.

Title: The Friendliest Hotel in Manhattan!
ReviewText: The friendliness, efficiency and professionalism of the staff was refreshing! The rooms were spacious and very clean. While there was not a restaurant, they did offer very good coffee and there was a Starbucks right next door. We can’t wait to book next years trip here.

Title: Satisfied stay
ReviewText: Good location, friendly staff would definitely stay there again

Title: Got what I needed
ReviewText: Just the right size, features and price. This property does not have a bistro

Title: Great location
ReviewText: 2nd year staying at this hotel for our visit to the usopen. Easy access to #7 train, great area for restaurants easy walk to Broadway!

Title: Courtyard stay
ReviewText: Everyone was as to be expected.  The lobby is pretty small and non-descript, but I already knew this from previous stays.  It is not an issue as the price is good.   The rooms are clean if cosy and the beds are comfortable.  The staff is pleasant.  The problem I had this time was that there was very loud construction on the building across the street all night long.  So, if you are a light sleeper, you may want to check in advance if construction is still in progress. Or, see if there is a room on another side of the building that is quieter.

Title: Terrible service at Courtyard near Grand Central, 5th Avenue and 40 th st.
ReviewText:
Staff was nor helpful at all. They steered us to the wrong accommodations and the room was in bad condition. The rollouts were in very bad shape and the room had a terrible smell.   The staff was more upset about us rightfully complaining than trying to help us with a solution. We were promised that the manager would get back to us, he/she never did. Overall very rude. For a few more dollars there are much better options within the Marriott chain in that area. Sorry to say that even though I am a Gold Bonvoy member, I would rather stay at another chain than return to this hotel. It’s a shame because it is very well
Located.

Title: Front desk staff very courteous and professional
ReviewText: I felt very welcomed when I arrived at this hotel.  I called several times prior to my stay and everyone was very patient and helpful in answering my questions.

Title: Acknowledge Marriott members

Title: Good stay at Courtyard Marriott
ReviewText: Very convenient location, it was close to my office in NYC when I needed to work late and stay over night.

Title: It’s not the JW
ReviewText: There are better Mariott locations.

Title: Excellent location
ReviewText: Perfect location for vacationers in the city! Walking distance to a lot of attractions and short Lyft rides to others. Had a double room with very comfortable beds, though a bit cramped for 3 people. No continental breakfast, unfortunately, but there are plenty of inexpensive alternatives nearby. The hotel was clean and up to date. Overall, a great experience and would recommend this hotel.

Title: Nice place in the big city
ReviewText: Nestled just east of 5th Ave near the public library,  this hotel is easy to get to and a great place to stay. Quiet, for Midtown,  handy to Grand Central, transit, and all that Manhattan offers. Great staff adds to the experience.  Highly recommended.

Title: Trip
ReviewText: Great location very clean and comfy rooms but air con very noisy

Title: Our Best Decision Yet!
ReviewText: Hotel was amazing people were all very friendly

Title: Great value midtown hotel
ReviewText: Excellent value & location

Title: Get it together front desk
ReviewText: Overall 7/10 but mainly bc of location

Title: Pago de puntos reward vs Pago en efectivo
ReviewText:
Como miembro Titan Elite estaba entusiasmado de llevar a mi familia conmigo a la ciudad que nunca duerme pues mi hijo de 10 anios de edad deseaba conocer el "Brooklyn Bridge" y podria hacer de los puntos acumulados que tenia en ese momento.
Puedo decir, que el viaje fue totalmente sorpresa para el. La semana anterior habiamos estado hospedados en Puerto Vallarta, MX (sol, arena y mar) y le di la noticia junto a mi esposa el dia anterior practicamante a media noche - no durmio de la emocion
Mi interes era por mostrarle la clase de hoteles en los cuales me quedo (ya habia sido huesped de esta localidad en 2 ocasiones anteriores) y de la ciudad de New York y me habia encantado el servicio del personal en aquel momento amen de la ubicacion del hotel.
Cual es mi sorpresa, que en lo referente a la estadia nada fue extraordinario. Fui tratado como in huesped que pareciera cae por error a ese hotel. Nunca se me hizo sentir como un huesped Titan Elite; si bien es cierto, no estaba pagando un solo centavo pero los puntos que utilizaria es practicamente por cada dolar que he gastado con ustedes. La habitacion estaba normal (piso 28) cero vista. No habia servicio de café de cortesia, el maletero nos hablo el ultimo dia cuando nos topamos en el elevador ofreciendonos un servicio de transporte al aeropuerto mas caro que el uber. Repito nada extraordinario, si la persona se hubiera acercado todos los dias, o simplemente los buenos dias/buenas noches, hubiera considerado el servicio de transporte, pero mi esposa incluso lo noto. 
En otra ocasion, mi esposa bajo al Starbucks de al lado y llega al cuarto diciendo que por el aire (quitaron el acceso interior al café) los popotes se le volaron y que el personal del lobby parecia habia presenciado la escena y no fueron por abrirle la puerta o ayudarla. 
En cuanto al servicio de limpieza, hubo un dia que no se realizo el servicio, en esa ocasion me toco hablar con la persona de limpieza y decirle que saldriamos tarde del cuarto (por cuestiones de clima) pero que podria hacerlo despues, ella comento que pasaria la nota a la persona de segundo turno, pero nada sucedio, reporte el caso al personal de lobby y solo toallas pedi pues no ofrecieron nada mas.
Pudiera decir que normalmente los hoteles Marriott son agradables en el trato pero en esta ocasion para nada sucedio y lo triste para mi es que mi famila estaba presente - nada de que alardear o presumir con ellos.

Title: Fifth and 40th
ReviewText: Convenient location, but very few amenities.  Surprised to find a CVS dispenser in the lobby.  Staff was excellent at the front desk; room very clean.  A great place for a good night's sleep in a central location.

Title: Great Hotel in New York
ReviewText: Great place to stay while In NYC!

Title: Courtyard Marriott on East 40th Street
ReviewText: Adequate, not as good as other Courtyards. In-room coffee was not impressive--Courtyard needs to upgrade them to capsule systems like Nespresso. Elevators were a bit slow and this location is across the street from a construction site. The climate unit in the room was also very loud.

Title: Review
ReviewText: TV did not work with remote. No working channel guide.

Title: Excelente lugar
ReviewText: Muy bueno para estadías de turismo

Title: Cómodo y bien ubicado
ReviewText: El Hotel está muy bien ubicado, la mayoría de las atracciones están cerca y se puede hacer a pie, igual hay subways y transporte muy cerca. Es bastante seguro. El personal es sumamente amable y eficiente, todos se adelantaron a nuestras necesidades, mejoraron la habitación y nos dieron mejores precios por los trips.  Es cómodo y tiene todo lo que necesitamos para nuestra estancia. No se escucha ruido de la calle en la habitación.

ReviewText: Thanks guys for always making sure the trip and stay is comfortable

Title: Great stay!
ReviewText: Staff was friendly and helpful. Quick check in.  Clean rooms. Very comfortable bed.  They brought up a refrigerator for our diabetic person in the party.  They recommended excellent restaurants nearby.  Scheduled a car pick up to the airport.  Allowed late check out.  I was more than pleased with our stay.  Yes, rooms are on the small side, but all rooms in New York are.

ReviewText: Hotel perfectly located.  Staff friendly and professional.  Rooms clean and modern

Title: Excellent location and staff
ReviewText: The hotel is clean, bathroom is big, and staff is nice.  Room was a bit tight with 4 people and 2 queen beds but overall would have no issues staying there again.  One more thing. The walls were well insulated. Didn't hear another guest at any time.

Title: Gold elite? Who cares
ReviewText:
Being a customer, you expect some one to walk the extra mile for you, one job! Make some one happy! I actually had to walk the extra 10 miles on my own...
Thank you Marriott
I still have legs to walk and a brain to think and make a choice of where to stay next

Title: Stay at 3 40th street
ReviewText: The hotel staff were quite friendly right from check in to check out. The breakfast voucher was unique. Rooms were decent and clean at all times. Noise was not an issue.

ReviewText: Poor customer service- small hotel- no lobby- no early check in no upgrades- disappointing

ReviewText: We got stuck in elevator for 15 minutes with 9 people in in and it was so hot we We’re panicking and yo make matters worse staff told us that elevator does that for over a year now!!!!! Our safe never worked and we had an awful night carrying our cash in city with us the whole time

ReviewText: The staff at this location go above & beyond to make your stay safe & comfortable. With a medical accident the staff personally assisted with the care & safety of myself & my family.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Room was nice bath room is small but great location and clean room.

Title: Great location and comfortable stay
ReviewText: Very close to Bryant Park and Times Square. This is a great location. The hotel was comfortable and of the level you would expect from Marriott! Would definitely stay here again!

Title: Solid choice for Midtown
ReviewText: This Courtyard is low frills compared to others in the brand, but provides an excellent option for those looking for a room in Midtown Manhattan. Located across the street from the main branch of the library, it's a quick walk to Times Square and the Theatre District or to Grand Central Station. Subway stops are a couple blocks away. The staff is super friendly and helpful. We particularly loved the way they cranked the air conditioning in our room way down so we'd have a cool room when we returned from our hot days our exploring the city.

Title: Please offer your guests water
ReviewText: This hotel not only does not offer a complimentary bottle of water but there is no water for purchase.  However, they will still charge you $28 for incidentals upon arrive, even though they offer nothing.  Presumably this charge will be removed from my card.  Rooms are very small even by NYC standards and could use a refurbish.  If you stay here make sure to bring water!

Title: 4th if July trip
ReviewText: The hotel has the perfect location, very well kept, and gracious staff! Coming back in a few months and will book here again.

Title: Clean, friendly, Great location!
ReviewText: I would stay here again and again!  Great location, friendly staff and very clean!

ReviewText: Great Location.  NO on site FOOD SERVICE of any kind. No Rooftop Bar, Pool or other real amenities offerings. A good place to sleep and get out and enjoy NYC...….by staying out of your room.

Title: Great hotel!
ReviewText: This hotel was convenient to all.  Staff is great and hotel is well maintained. Stayed with the family for 5 nights and overall was a great value for the time we stayed.

Title: Stay at Manhattan Courtyard
ReviewText: Excellent accomodations and great staff.

Title: Hotel with a great location.
ReviewText: The hotel is clean, friendly, helpful, and in a great location for walking to many sights.

Title: Family holiday
ReviewText:
We were visiting NY with our children. Great location in every way no matter what your plans are. Given location the lack of hotel dining not a problem. Many outlets to get food, snacks, drinks etc and not far from bars , restaurants etc. Complementary Coffee a bonus and children delighted with hot chocolate. 
Most comfortable bed I’ve slept in. 
Didn’t spent much time in rooms- the back room was dull but the front room was lovely and bright. 
Required a wheelchair accessible room which was confirmed by contacting the hotel prior to arrival. Accessibility suitable for our requirements which is always the main concern. 
Only a few blocks from Bryant Park and Grand Central which makes airport buses a good option 
Functional hotel and worked for us. Accessibility of hotel and location a bonus. Would return to it again

Title: Great location, very central,
ReviewText: A very central hotel, with many attractions, as well as subway, in walking distance. However, hotel needs some renovation.

Title: Very good choice for Manhattan
ReviewText:
Clean, courteous staff, comfortable room. Complimentary tea and coffee.  
Lobby seating area not great. View from corner bed room terrible. No privacy due to office windows directly opposite.

Title: Review
ReviewText: It’s old.  Needs updated to towels bathrrron and bed

Title: Issues
ReviewText: Internet and hot water did not work, toilet was clogged, view of construction site.

Title: Great location in Manhattan
ReviewText: Great hotel to use as a base for sightseeing and seeing plays in Manhattan.  Very convenient mid-town location near Bryant Park, Grand Central Station, Broadway and theaters.  Short walking distance to all of the above, so it was very easy to get around.  I would definitely recommend this hotel.

Title: Tired & Unloved on 5th Avenue
ReviewText:
The property has a small reception and limited public lounge space, no ground floor coffee/drinks lounge or restaurants. The location is good for shopping or leisure. 
My room was tired and very old fashioned compared to the new Courtyard Hotels I stay in when travelling to destinations such as India. 
A renovation/modernisation is politely recommended.

ReviewText: This location does not carry the basic amenities. The hotel staff is not friendly and does not care if you have children sleeping and noises neighbors.

Title: EXCELENTE SERVICIO, INSTALACIONES DEFICIENTES
ReviewText: Le falta mantenimiento al hotel y a las habitaciones en general.

Title: Great location needs updating though.
ReviewText: Pulling for this one. The interior is grumpy and the elevator is slow. They have limited king bed rooms which are much more spacious and quiet than the 2 queens. Needs a face lift.

Title: Great Location, Great Service.
ReviewText: My stay was great. The hotel location is excellent and the service was extremely professional and cordial. I have to especially commend Willie. He went the extra mile. Always smiling and always prompt to help. He was the highlight of my stay.

Title: hotel muito simples e pouco confortavel
ReviewText: achei muito ruim a limpeza do hotel, que tambem nao oferece frigobar, quarto sem poltrona, apenas dois elevadores muito lentos, sem concierge

ReviewText: This hotel was not a good fit for me. It didn’t have any ambience, no place to sit and have coffee or maybe even have a drink.  Room was very small and too compact. Also bad lighting.

Title: Great Place to stay overnight - comfortable bed - Clean Room
ReviewText: Bed very comfortable, clean room and bathroom, great location for easy walk to Restaurant Row and Broadway Theaters.

Title: Nice hotel

ReviewText: Nice room, Maid did an outstanding job cleaning the room daily. Convierge was outstanding, great help with transportation and show to see.

ReviewText: Disinterested staff. No room refrigerator. No place to sit in the room save a desk chair.

Title: Modest facility with good location
ReviewText: A humble facility with iver price if compared with rest if marriott across the world , though room is large compared to other new York hotels.

Title: Decent hotel for a short stay
ReviewText: Room was decent, no fridge though. Bathroom was small but clean. Liked they had the big dispensers in the bathroom so you don't have to ask for shampoo/conditioner. There's another Courtyard just up the street and our friends stayed there at same price and I would've chosen that courtyard instead. Staff was nice but not great with recommendations, we were sent to a restaurant that was already closed for the night. And asked for a close wine/liquor store and we ended up at a different one that ended up being much closer. And there were no wine glasses in the room so I asked for a couple and this sounded like a huge task to get them for us.

Title: GREAT hotel
ReviewText: My girls gave me a surprise trip to New York. This was my first time there since I was 11 years old; I am now 72 years old. The accommodations at the Courtyard were great and the staff especially Willie and Pedro really went out of their way to be sure we had everything that we needed. Willie kept us laughing the hold time. He was so much fun. We will never forget Willie. They are both great assess to your establishment.

Title: Excellent Location Courtyard Marriott
ReviewText: Small and cozy hotel in a perfect spot on 5th Ave. across NY’s Public Library.

Title: Marriott Courtyard Manhattan
ReviewText: Excellent place to stay in NY. I always stay at a Marriott property

Title: Great people but.......
ReviewText: Walls and window need to be sound proof

Title: Wonderful hotel in a wonderful place
ReviewText: A very nice stay made possible by the hrlurel staff, amnenuties sbd in general all aspects in the courtyard New York Manhattan!

Title: always happy
ReviewText: never disappointed with Marriott properties...will only stay at Marriotts

Title: Great Stay!
ReviewText: Excellent location to Times Square, Broadway and the subway! Friendly staff, excellent concierge! I would definitely stay here again.

Title: Fully dissatisfied
ReviewText:
We were excited to come to New York with the family. My children had never been, it was our 10 year anniversary, my sister in laws 30th birthday and it was the first time my aunt and her family came as it was their first time.  

When we checked in, one of our rooms were cancelled by a Marriott staff accidentally and there was no remorse or empathy for us, after we just completed a 9hr drive. 

After many discussions the staff said the only thing they could do is provide 20,000 points each to me and my cousin for all the issues but they did not honour their word. 

I’ve stayed in many Marriott’s around the world for work and holidays and this has really disappointed us as a family. 

I don’t know how Marriott staff members could be honest and not honour their word. It makes me feel like not staying at the hotels going forward. 

Be careful people.

Title: New York stay
ReviewText: Family trip for 6 days including sightseeing and shopping.

Title: TINY ROOMS
ReviewText: Be alert for TINY ROOMS and loud city noise.

Title: Nice Family Trip Hotel
ReviewText: Our stay at the hotel was overall great. We went with three small children for a quick trip during our Spring Break. I was a rewards member and used my points for this stay. They accommodated my setting options of extra towels, extra pillows, and a floor in the middle of the building choices. I appreciated those items met! I also needed a fridge, which these hotel rooms don't offer. I was quickly given one to my room, which met our needs for the kids. I was a nursing mother of a baby, so it met my needs of putting bottles in it. The rooms were comfortable and clean and the kids enjoyed their stay here. It was also out of the way of the busy hustle bustle but close enough that we could turn a corner and be right where we needed to be for the kids. All of their stores (American Girl, Nike, FAO) were walks that were doable from our location. H&M too was super close, which we liked as well! There was a Star Bucks next to us, which the kids enjoyed going to for breakfast- as they offered sandwiches, muffins etc with quick service even though it was very busy. We would stay at this location again!

Title: Great location
ReviewText: The hotel is a very comfortable option in a great location for business, lots of food options around and very close to Bryant Park and the NY library

Great staff very helpful

It is convenient to a number of museums, good restaurants, and wonderful shops if one is interested in walking rather than riding.  The staff is friendly and efficient.  The rooms are very nice and have all that one needs for a good night's stay.  It is our home away from home when we visit NYC.

Great location near Broadway/Times Square and being directly next to a Starbucks was nice as well.  No restaurant/bar in the hotel but when in NYC, who wants to eat/drink at the hotel!

Title: Great staff and great location!
ReviewText: Friendly, helpful staff combined with a great location can't be beat, really helps one get the most out of a stay in a city with so much to do and see!

Title: Vacaciones en NYC

Title: Great NY City Hotel!
ReviewText: This hotel was smack in the center of everything!  Rooms were very quiet, didn't hear our neighbors at all.  Room was spotless, staff was very accommodating and the beds were so comfortable!  I highly recommend!

Title: Good location in Midtown
ReviewText: Colse to Grand Central and Bryant Park. Easy walk to Times Square. Room is relatively large. Bathroom is clean.

Title: Hotel room was hot and the Thermostat didnt work
ReviewText: The thermostat on the wall didn't work. The heat kept coming on causing the temperature in the room to rise. There was no way to turn the heat off at the thermostat. When I open the windows to try to get some are even more heat came in causing the room to be really hot. I finally had to get the engineer to disconnect the heater so I could get some cool air into the room

ReviewText: Amazing location. Great staff.

Title: No amenities, no water, no vending machine.
ReviewText: There is no bottled water, food or beverage available at this hotel. And no vending machine.

Title: Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth
ReviewText: OK for a quick stay overnight if you can get a good rate!!

Title: New York trip
ReviewText:
We had business in Manhattan, so we chose the Marriott form past relationship with the Hotels.
It was the right choice

Title: Courtyard Marriott Fifth Ave - The Best Hotel Staff
ReviewText: This Hotel is to be recommended for the staff - They are simply the best and for the location - its killer. Right off Bryant Park

Title: Not what I expect from a Marriott
ReviewText:
I was recommended this hotel as it's close to the NY office I was visiting. The location was also great for tourism.
However the room was on 19th floor and I asked for a high room to avoid noise as much as possible. The rooms were clean but very drab and tired, the bathroom also needed updating. Water pressure was poor and drainage slow.
The gym was closed and I wasn't made aware of any food service available. Often there were no reception staff available or if they were they didn't acknowledge me.
My family comes to NYC each year for a spring break and I was interested to see if this would be a good hotel, it's not. I will be visiting for work a few more times this year and will look for alternatives.

Title: Great location and value
ReviewText: This Courtyard has a great location and good value for the area.  Close to Grand Central.  Friendly and helpful staff.

Title: Just not a Marriott
ReviewText: A non existent lobby / no facility to meet a guest or visitor/ not a bottle of water or snack for a late arrival and everything around is closed / really poor quality entrance and lobby - the look is run down and poky. No newspapers or maps.....just not a Mariott - denegrates the brand. Dump it.....

Title: stay
ReviewText: no complaints, staff is excellent, room is very cleaner. will stay again

Title: Great location-Amazing Staff!
ReviewText: This location is near the NY Public Library as well as Grand Central Station.  The staff were super professional and were able to accommodate us earlier than the official check-in time (we had a red-eye flight).  The rooms were great and the bed was the absolute most comfortable bed we've had in a long time.  Everyone at that hotel was incredibly professional, kind, and sincere.  We will stay here again!!

Title: Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue
ReviewText: Excellent except for the fact that cabs do not frequent E. 48th Street.

Title: Great location!
ReviewText: First trip to NY and we stay at this hotel. Room was comfortable enough for four people and the queen beds were perfect. The bathroom was very spacious. We were in the 25th floor and had views of office buildings, nothing really special. This wasn’t a deal breaker because using the federal government rate pricing was completely worth it. The location of this hotel is perfect. We did a lot of sightseeing to and most of things we saw were not too far away such as Times Square, Fifth Ave stores for shopping, Carmine’s, Grand Central Station, Rockefeller Center, Top of the Rock Observatory, etc. It was nice to be a block away from Bryant Park and subway station. The staff was friendly and helpful.

Title: Old and outdated - what a dump
ReviewText: Staff was fine, but the hotel is old and needs a lot of TLC

Title: Stay in Marriott Courtyard
ReviewText: Very convenient location for a business trip with access to various nice restaurants and close to Time Square. Upgrade of the facilities as well as cleanliness could be improved.

Title: A good central hotel
ReviewText: Excellent location, fairly basic hotel that ticks most of the boxes

Title: Comfortable and clean hotel
ReviewText: This hotel is in a great location. Very clean, nice staff and comfortable room.

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Our visit at this hotel was excellent.  Friendly staff was very accommodating.  Rooms were very clean and beds comfortable.  Water pressure in shower was great too.  Only drawback is that there is no food service offered at this hotel, but there is a Starbucks right next door.

Title: Great Hotel
ReviewText:
The hotel is closed to Grand Central and Byrant park. You can even walk to Central Park within 15 streets. Also, it's not bad for the visitors from JFK who travel via the subway. 
Restaurants are easy to find around the hotel. Starbucks, CVS, ramen, and etc. Moreover, MUJI is just next to the hotel. 
However, the coffee machine isn't clean at all. It hasn't been cleaned for a while. Also, the room lady would likely to get in your room early accidentally.

Title: Eh
ReviewText: Disappointed. As an elite member I paid for an elite hotel experience and none of my expectations were met. The king bed was comfortable and the bathroom way large for NYC however, those are the only positives about the hotel. The lobby area, although I would not call it a lobby, was just weird. When we arrived at the hotel there was an accident outside. Someone had thrown or something had fallen from the hotel and shattered the window of the car. There was a blood gushing out of a man's head and the hotel seemed not to care. They claimed they had no cameras to see what had happened when police asked. The hotel was also undergoing construction so there was no area outside of the room to sit, no restaurant or any food/beverage service available. In addition, all service workers used the same elevator and got off at floors under construction which then filled the elevator with toxic fumes. They did not even provide water in the room. The pull out couch was not made even though we specified more than two persons would be staying in the room. Only two sets of towels were available. When couch was pulled out room was cramped and you could not sit at the desk. There was no mini fridge or microwave. These are amenities I assumed would be provided at a Courtyard. Apparently there was not a microwave on the entire property. Just expected better experience. Will not stay here again.

Title: Too much noise
ReviewText: Not so clean and too much noise from construction nearby

Title: Good location, old and dingy
ReviewText: The location is great and super convenient to the subway. But the hotel is old, outdated. The rooms are not the cleanest, carpet and bed looked original and dirty. Same goes for the bathroom. There is no food available at the hotel, just a Starbucks next door.

Title: Impersonal and unfriendly
ReviewText: Other than location, I do not recommend this place. Staff was so unfriendly.

Title: Below Marriott Standards
ReviewText:
This is hotel is a no frills, No lobby , no refrigerator in room. NO bottled WATER anywhere in hotel, no vending machine.
Should of brought a cooler with me :(

Title: Magnifica ubicación, personal excelente

Title: Super tolles Hotel

Title: Muy bien situado.
ReviewText:
Hotel muy bien situado, próximo a Times Square y Central Station. Desde el hotel se pueden visitar andando una parte importante de las atracciones de Manhattan, y existen varias estaciones de metro muy próximas, por lo que su comunicación es inmejorable.
La habitación es confortable y limpia, aunque algo pequeña para cuatro personas.

Title: M Mel1
ReviewText: I had a great experience at the Courtyard! Everything was Good.

Title: Vacation in NYC
ReviewText: I really didn’t like it. The towels are thin.. for a group staying there I have always to order something..

Title: Great location & staff
ReviewText:
We were very happy with our stay at this location. The hotel is within blocks of Grand Central station, Bryant Park and not a super long walk to Times Square. Rockefeller center was less than 15 minutes walk. 

The staff was very welcoming, the front desk made a point of greeting us coming & going. Any staff we encountered in the hallway or elevator made a point of inquiring about our stay, they seemed to genuinely care about their guests. 

The rooms were very clean and comfortable. If you stay in a room with a pull out couch, just know that it’s not very comfortable for a teenager or adult but may be fine for small child.

Title: Review of Courtyard
ReviewText: Poor Hotel--no dining, no lobby, no coffee, no bar.

Title: Could have been better

Title: Shailesh Shah

Title: Mold under folding sofa bed and brown stains throughout room
ReviewText: This hote was a nightmare from beginning to end! Call staff to address concerns and got yelled at did not sleep all night as it was disgusting. Sat on the chair and waited for morning to leave this nightmare!

Title: Weekend getaway
ReviewText: Landed early and took a shot checking in. The staff at the desk found me a room immediately which was great. The location was great, close to Bryant Park and quick drives to anyplace else. The room was plenty big enough and very clean. One elevator broke, but the staff was on it immediately to have it fixed. I would stay here again.

Title: Maryland traveler
ReviewText: Location was great and price fair for a NYC hotel. The hotel has no amenities. Rooms are tiny.  Lobby has a front desk and a bench.  It was okay if you do not plan on spending much time in the room.  Biggest drawback: no refrigerator in the room.

Title: Coulda have been better
ReviewText: I know Manhattan is tight on space but the lobby area was ridiculously small. Besides one of the two elevators was malfunctioning and caused overflow of guests in the lobby

Title: Not terribly good. Acceptable at best. Good location.
ReviewText: Nothing to rave about. Good location is the best asset.

Title: not special
ReviewText: I enjoy the Marriott brand as a platinum member, but there are better properties nearby

Title: No water and no market at this Courtyard!!
ReviewText: I had to leave the hotel just to get a bottle of water.  Very disappointed to learn there was no market at this courtyard, I should have been told that .

Title: Great location
ReviewText: There is no vending machines or mini frig in room.

Title: Great location and quiet
ReviewText: I asked for a quiet room and it was terrific. The location was great in the city.

Title: Helpful staff.  Awful Room
ReviewText:
The staff was pleasant, responsive and helpful.  The location was great.  Those are the positives.  Without that, our overall rating would be a 1.
The room was small, dark, unattractive, and not up to my expectations for marriott properties.  Even though it is NYC, the rooms could have been made cheerful with bright lights.  The lights were inadequate for  using the full length mirror and made reading uncomfortable.   The toiletries were not pleasant.  Some were shared pump bottles with astringent and unpleasant scents.  Even my husband commented about them.    
We had also expected a fitness center, but we were told it was under renovation and we could use a fitness club  a long block away - not ideal.
 So our experience  was very disappointing.   I will not go to another Marriott with out checking the property in greater detail.

Title: Mid Town NYC
ReviewText: We were happy with our location as it had access to walking to so many of the sites we wanted to enjoy! We needed more time! Great staff, and having Starbucks next door just meant dressing warmly before our daily coffee fix!

Title: Rude staff
ReviewText:
The staff members were rude and treated us poorly throughout our stay.
Consierge was great- very helpful and nice. It’s a shame he has to put up with the rude behind the desk team.

Title: 1st time ever accused in Marriott
ReviewText:
Accused by Hotel Staff and Manager in Duty, there is nothing more insulting than not listening and understanding Customer Service in Marriott. Even while the hotel was well situated, staff did not listen neither was the Manager able to understand. I was charged for services not ordered and not true.
Based on such a bad experience I can recommend the hotel for its situation but not for customer service.

Title: Visite New York
ReviewText: Très bon acceuil, situation idéale pour visiter, près de tout

Title: Excellent Property
ReviewText: My friend and I had a great experience at this hotel. The gentleman at check-in was kind and informative, and was ready to answer all my questions. Our room was clean and comfortable, and we had housekeeping service each day. When we needed directions or recommendations, the front desk staff was there to help. I felt appreciated and valued as a guest, even though I was just one of hundreds of people staying there.

Title: Very good
ReviewText: Su ubicación es de las mejores, la atención muy buena

Title: Great hotel!
ReviewText: Great staff. Awesome location. Wonderful, clean rooms for NYC. Hotel is simple, not a lot of bells and whistles, but when you’re in NYC, you don’t need all that. Unless you’re planning to spend lots of time in your room. Close to everything!  I travel to NYC annually and won’t stay anywhere else. The only complaint I have is no mini fridge in rooms.

Title: Times Square getaway
ReviewText: We really enjoyed our stay at this hotel. The staff were excellent. Parking fee is high but good for 24 hours which gave us time to enjoy the city fir a few more hours after our check out. I really appreciated that they stored our luggage’s after the check out. When we got back our car was by the door waiting for us. We had a great time. Excellent location walking to Times Square and all that offers.

Title: Good location, but below expectations

Title: Excellent visit

Title: Terrible depressing hotel

We couldn’t leave the shade up because if we’re walking around and changing the people in the other office building could see us. Add to that there was not enough lighting so the room was dark and we had trouble trying to find our things. Do not ever stay in this hotel for the amount of money we paid for our weekend it was not worth it. The only good thing about this hotel was the concierge Sebastian who was helpful and friendly.

Title: Excellent Stay in NYC

Title: Terrible Stay

The noise level from the street is deafening with no resolution offered. The bellman was rude and condescending and refused to hail a cab when I saw him do it the day before. I would never stay here again!

ReviewText: We had a good stay at the Courtyard Marriott. It's not fancy and there are not a lot of amenities but the hotel is clean, the staff was friendly, and it's in a good location. I would stay here again.

Title: Good location

Title: Good service, courteous staff
ReviewText: My stay was as expected, the staff was courteous and helpful

Title: Friendly and clean hotel in a great location
ReviewText:
The staff were all very friendly and helpful, the workout room was neat and clean, the business center and coffee station were clean and working. The lobby areas was small, but they made very good use of small space. We stayed in the room with a king bed + sofa bed, so it was a bit larger. The room was very nice and was away from traffic, so was also quiet. Room and bathroom were all very clean, and everything in working order. Service was great when we needed extra items delivered to our rooms. 
The hotel was also situated in a great spot - close to parks, subway, shopping and within walking distance of so many NYC icons (Rockefeller Center, Central Park, Times Square, Grand Central...). And there is a Starbucks right next door.
Overall, a great place to stay!

Title: Expected more from Marriott
