Title: Excellent location
ReviewText: I will choose this hotel again for future trips to NYC.

Title: Courtyard Marriott New York
ReviewText:
I am really sorry to say that my stay at the Courtyard Marriott was very disappointing. Key points

1. Reception Staff - they all seemed friendly and courteous.
2. Room and Hotel Décor - this was generally poor, everything was very dated, the bedding was of poor quality, the carpets were old and worn, the room was more akin to a 3 star hotel.
3. Environment - I was woken up on 3 nights out of 4 by drilling on the street / building next door. I am not a light sleeper so the noise was substantial. On the first night I called reception to complain at 2am, I was told that this is likely to go on until 5am and the best they could do was offer me some ear plugs. I declined the offer. Fortunately the drilling subsided at around 2:30 and I was able to fall asleep again. This drilling and building work was repeated on other nights. No one bothered to follow-up and check that I was subsequently comfortable. I checked at the reception the next day and the comment had been logged, I had expected at least a message from the manager but nothing.
4. Departure - on leaving, I was told that I would be sent a receipt via email. I supplied my email address but have received nothing.

Overall, considering the experience / décor, this hotel is damaging the reputation of your brand. Especially given the cost of the stay. I honoured the full cost but I was very disappointed with the experience.

Title: Marriott Stay
ReviewText: Excellent service, location and very cleanliness rooms.

Title: NYC weekend
ReviewText: Pleasant stay, some rude guests, but staff was so friendly.

Title: Love This Place
ReviewText: Excellent location - close to everything, excellent staff - super friendly and helpful. I try and stay here anytime I'm in NYC. They don't have restaurant or bar services on site, but it's the middle of NYC, so good food and/or alcohol is easy to find. The rooms were nice to begin with, but they are in the process of renovating and updating the rooms, which is a nice perk. They also have free wifi access, which can't be beat.

Title: Clean and Comfortable Rooms
ReviewText:
We stayed one night and found the hotel to be more than suitable for our needs.
The rooms - even though on the small side - were extremely comfortable, clean and we experienced a great nights sleep in the comfortable bed.
The front desk staff were very friendly and helpful.
Needing to be close to Grand Central Station we found this hotel perfectly situated.
We also found it to be perfectly situated for walking Fifth Avenue and visiting the Empire State Building.
Would definitely stay at this hotel again.

Title: Excellent Location - Comfortable Room
ReviewText: The location can’t be beat...from the front door you are steps away from 5th Avenue, you will be within a couple of minute walk of the Empire State Building, Broadway, Bryant Park and if you are a shopper ....you will be in heaven with all of the specialty shops near by. As a business traveler I found the property to be clean, comfortable and the customer service was great!! The work spaces are good and high speed internet wad actually high speed. The hotel is also close to a huge variety of restaurants - fast food, casual dining and formal dining are all within a short walk or cab ride.

Title: OMA NE
ReviewText: Great location, no food on site, but close to all types of eateries.   Staff was excellent!

Title: Great place if you enjoy small rooms and noise
ReviewText: Really noisy outside because of construction - almost all night. The staff had to know about this, but no warning. Service was just okay. Rooms are tiny and outdated for the price, even for NYC

Title: Cristina
ReviewText: excelente estadia buena ubicacion del hotel y amabilidad del personal

Title: Comfortable Hotel at Convenient Location
ReviewText: We stay at this hotel almost every time we go to NYC.  It's got a convenient location, just off of 5th Aveneue, within easy walking distance to the theater district, and near Maison Kayser, Le Pain Quotidian, Panera, The Bryant Park Gill.  There is a Starbucks right next door.

Title: NYC
ReviewText: I would recommend staying at the courtyard New York Fifth Ave. greet staff and accommodations

Title: Not worth the stay
ReviewText: Overly pricey for this place. Location is great, right next to the NY Library and walking distance from Grand Central Train Station. Tiny Rooms. Cannot even walk properly with space. Not enough place to store luggage. Placed it on the bed. No restaurant. They give vouchers for the next door Deli with a limit of $10. Nothing great...I have stayed at many Marriott properties in different countries. This was disappointing. Look for better hotels.

Title: Great Location.
ReviewText: Great location for many activities. Smaller but very clean rooms. The elevators were great. Did not have to wait any time.

Title: Family of 9
ReviewText: Average hote l. Good location. Unfriendly front desk staff.   Other staff very accommodating

Title: family visit
ReviewText: Excellent location, helpful staff, clean rooms, good business center

Title: Amazing stay and location
ReviewText: The location is accessible to everything in Times Square. The hire staff is attentive and prompt.

Title: Stay in New York city
ReviewText: It is an okay hotel with limited amenities for the price you pay you would expect more

Title: Fab city break
ReviewText: Fab location of hotel. Easy to get to major sights and attractions. Only 5 minutes walk to Empire State Building and the hop on hop off busses. Numerous excellent places to eat nearby and some fab recommendations by the very helpful hotel staff. Hotel room clean, comfy with huge beds.

Title: NICE HOTEL
ReviewText: CENTRALLY LOCATED, CLEAN AND NICE BUT THE ROOM WAS A LITTLE TOO SMALL.

Title: Great stay !
ReviewText:
Close to everything! Great location!
We loved the complimentary Starbucks coffee and Tazo tea 24 hrs on the 2nd floor.

Title: Great location!
ReviewText: This hotel was perfectly located! Bryant park across the street and Times Square a few streets down. Staff was welcoming and accommodating. I would definitely recommend and stay again!

Title: Location location
ReviewText: Excellent location.  Very clean and comfortable.  Enjoyed our stay.

Title: Perfect location
ReviewText: Great location, not right in the middle of all of the nightlife, but close enough, just off a side street. Next to a starbucks... Next door to be exact. Quiet, for its location. Friendly and helpful hotel staff. Ease of check in, complimentary bag storage for checking out early. Bath products were of great quality. shampoo, conditioner an body wash pumps on wall in shower for adequate amounts and not having to squeeze small amounts out of a little bottle. Def recommend this hotel location to anyone. Will def look into staying here again in the future.

Title: Summer Opening Night
ReviewText: Frank and Pola provided great service in their respective responsibilities.

Title: Excellent location, outstanding hotel
ReviewText: Great room and location, only outdone by the attentive and friendly staff.

Title: NYC
ReviewText: No vending machines but staff offered free water. Loved that there were only a few rooms per floor. Maybe add a connecting door to Starbucks to avoid walking outside

Title: Paige
ReviewText: Everything was good but I did receive the room that was suppose to be  guaranteed to me.  I received a king room not the king guest room suite which I order.

Title: Bueno
ReviewText: Pueden mejorar la decoración y el espacio del hotel.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Small, but nice hotel in a great location, right near the NY Public Library. No food service. No bottled water available. Coffee and tea available in mezzanine. Nice friendly people working there.

Title: Wow - room size, comfortable queen beds, friendly staff!
ReviewText: I initially booked this hotel based on cost and it having two queen beds in a room.  Traveled with 4 girlfriends for a NYC getaway and this hotel was perfect for us.  So close to the NYC Public Library (take in the free tour if you can) and lovely Bryant Park and a short Uber ride to everything else on our list.

Title: Stolen goods
ReviewText: At first the hotel seemed great for a Manhattan hotel. Comfortable bed, friendly staff, etc. First day out with the family being tourists and my husband’s watch was taken from our hotel room. Granted he accidentally left it that day, but the hope would be it wouldn’t grow legs that quickly!  Of course it was not recovered and the hotel manager filed a report, but it certainly puts a damper on the trip.

Title: Great place!
ReviewText: Great place and staff. Thank you Sophia and Eddie for a great service and experience.

Title: Family Vacation
ReviewText:
Excellent location, steps from Times Square, Bryan Park, Central Station and shopping among other interesting places.
Hotel Staff is great, ready to provide advice, set up tours, transportation and anything you could need 
The room everyday was spotless, beds extremely comfortable, clean and well organize bathroom
This is my third stay in this hotel and planning to be here again on my next trip to New York

Title: Great Location Courtyard Manhattan
ReviewText: The location was central to what we wanted to do. It was easy to get to Grand Central and a very short Uber/Taxi ride to from everywhere else.  The hotel was very clean and fresh with a great bellman service.  Having a full Starbucks connected to the lobby from the street was nice and made the early morning starts easy.

Title: Great experience
ReviewText: Just returned from what was to be a 2 night stay the turned into a 4 night stay. Staff was excellent, close to everything. The only down side was no on site food service so had to go out to find nutrition, but lots close by!

Title: Exceptional location in NYC
ReviewText: The Marriott Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue is a gem tucked away near Bryant Park, convenient to Broadway and great dining/entertainment. If you like a smaller, boutique feeling hotel with a smaller lobby without a long wait for elevators, this is the perfect location. Our room was spacious with two queen beds and an updated bathroom. I can highly recommend this Marriott property when staying in NYC for business or leisure.

Title: Manhattan/Fifth Ave
ReviewText: We arrived Friday night to attend St. Patrick's Day Parade .. our grandson was marching with his high school, the location was perfect, the staff very attentive, over all a pleasant experience,

Title: Family trip to NYC
ReviewText:
The Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue provided me and my family with wonderful accommodations in the 
heart of the city making it easy to visit many landmarks due to it's central location.  The location and the price of pre purchasing our stay was what made us choose this location and we were very happy we did choose this location after the wonderful experience we had. The staff made us feel at home and really took the time to get to know us while ensuring our needs were met including arranging our transportation and giving us wonderful advice to enhance our trip.  The hotel rooms were modern and updated but very comfortable. Having a Starbucks just outside of the lobby was a definite plus!  All the public areas were as clean and well decorated as the rooms.  We loved the security of needing a key to gain access in the late evenings and to reach your floor throughout your stay, it made us feel very safe.  The coffee, hot chocolate and tea bar in the 2nd level was a stop each evening for us so we could have some hot tea or hot chocolate to warm up before bed and feel even more at home.  We had a fantastic vacation and plan to return, likely in the next six months.

Title: Exceeded Expectations
ReviewText: One has a lot of choices in Manhattan ranging from budget to luxury.  I was traveling with my wife and son for an overnight and we didn't need much other than a room with a pullout couch.  We arrived around 11:00 am on Saturday and immediately given a room.  The room is basic but functional.  Comfortable bed and my son reported that the pullout was perfect.  The hotel is perfect for business travelers and tourists on a budget although you are not compromising on quality and comfort.

Title: EAST 5thAve Marriott Courtyard
ReviewText: Very conveniently located to GCT. Within walking distance to midtown attractions including the theatre district, restaurant row and shopping.  Unfortunately this Marriottdidnot offer a in hotel dining/breakfast option however offered Starbucks.  The staff made an excellent suggestion for Sunday brunch (Madison & Vine).  The room was well priced

Title: Great rooms
ReviewText: The rooms are great, very clean and modern. Walking distance to downtown and very easy to access.

Title: Weekend away
ReviewText: Great location, very helpful staff. Local deli next door which was good for quick breakfast sandwich.

Title: Convenient location
ReviewText: Great location and accommodations are great and hotel staff are wonderful.

Title: Good
ReviewText: Staff is super friendly and knowledgeable. Doesn’t offer breakfast but Starbucks and a good deli next door. Free coffee tea and hot cocoa though.

Title: NYC trip for the night/Day
ReviewText: We had a great stay and would recommend staying there again. I have family that use the Marriott all the time and told us to go with you.

Title: Thoughts from a long time member
ReviewText: This Courtyard Marriott was convenient for my weekend plans, staff were extremely courteous and helpful. I would suggest more towels and a MAGNIFYING MIRROR in the bathroom, which would also be greatly improved with a larger vanity. The room was, overall, very comfortable and met my needs for the weekend.

Title: A Solid Value
ReviewText: The Courtyard was reasonably staffed and those that we accessed were helpful.  The location and price made it a very good value.

Title: Service with a Smile
ReviewText: Greeted by smiles and exceptional service at Courtyard NYC Fifth Avenue! Concierge services were helpful in selecting activities and securing theater tickets. Great location to many sites in NYC. Clean, safe, comfortable, reliable internet and other amenities all made for a pleasant stay. I'd definitely make reservations there again when traveling to NYC.

Title: Nice hotel and location
ReviewText: Hotel was nice and very central. The only query i had was ordering a taxi. I enquired a car or cab serivce who can take cards. I was told the car service does take cards but when I went to pay te driver advised there was no card service which was confusing

Title: Not up to Marriott standards
ReviewText: I was very disappointed in this hotel and felt it was well below usual Marriott standards.  The  room was not weel decorated, bathroom incredibly small, room extremely noisy from both internal and external noise ( on the 23 floor).  Mattress was not comfortable ( the only time a Marriott mattress has been uncomfortable) and the towels were threadbare.  Housekeeping only so-so.

Title: Case for transformation
ReviewText: Rare opportunity to turn everything around. Except for the location everything sucks.

Title: Perfect location for visiting NYC!
ReviewText: This hotel is located in a perfect location for visiting NYC. Landmarks such as Time Square, Empire State Building, the NY Public Library, Bryant Park... are at walking distance (5-10 min.).

Title: Bad
ReviewText: Just bad experience , elevator in bad shape. Room carpet old

Title: Choose for location if you plan on only sleeping here
ReviewText:
Pros: Location, clean 

Cons: Rude staff, slow service, staff tries to sell tour activities so if you're not in line for that they ignore you when you, for example, need your suitcase. I waited 20 minutes to get mine because the lobby person was too busy trying to sell tour bus tickets to other people and never once asked if I needed something. 
Room has no mini fridge, and the temp is maxed at 76 F. 
I asked to borrow a cork screw and offered to pick it up, they insisted they'd send it up. After 25 min my boyfriend went downstairs to pick it up, but they refused to give it to him and said someone would bring it up soon. After 10 more minutes we got it. Walking over to a CVS or Walgreens would have been faster.

Title: Reasonable, convenient hotel
ReviewText: This hotel offered nice quality for a reasonable price, in an excellent location for our trip trip NYC.

Title: Hotel cumple expectativas para fines de semana
ReviewText:
Excelente ubicación 
Cerca de todo en el centro de Manhattan 
Habitaciones pequeñas;un poco ruidoso;sin servicio de desayunos.

Title: Awesome!
ReviewText: Staff were courteous and helpful. Very clean rooms. The only thing that could make this hotel better is a breakfast included. Very close to Broadway, Times Square and Grand Central.

Title: Manager unhelpful
ReviewText: Manager was not accommodating, parking options were not explained, overall would not stay here again.

Title: This property falls a little short
ReviewText:
I’m an Elite Rewards Member and I faithfully stay at Marriott properties when available.  I can’t remember the last time I left a property dissatisfied until this trip.  This property just doesn’t live up to the Marriott brand.  I felt like I was staying at a value brand hotel.  This property is rated a very high category for reward points redemption both falls short on deliverance.  I understand it’s NYC but compared to the other Marriott properties,  this one needs a lot of work or a serious category reduction.

Staff was good considering what they had to work with regarding hotel amenities or lack there of.

If you are looking for a Marriott property in NYC to stay at, make this one a last resort and if you do choose it, don’t use your points.  It’s not worth the amount of points/night it demands.

Again, I’m a huge Marriott fan and my review is of this property alone.

Title: Stay at Christmas
ReviewText: Nice Hotel. But the Amenities were not good. Great location near Bryant Park. No restaurant just free coffee in the lobby. Valet was not very helpful. The room was a good size for NYC had a couch and a good size bed with large windows. The view was horrible looking right into Businesses was hoping for a better view not possible in this hotel.

Title: Courtyard stay
ReviewText: Great customer service in a great part of town.

Title: Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue
ReviewText: By far the dirtiest Marriott I have stayed at.

Title: Great Location, Simple & Effective Experience
ReviewText: Loved the simplicity of booking on website, reception was great in handling early checking and late checkout. Super location of the hotel next to Bryant Park, 5th Avenue, TSQ etc

Title: Magical Stay
ReviewText: I discovered through Ancestry.com that I had a sister 6 months ago, we chose the NYC Courtyard Marriott/Fifth Avenue as the location for our first meeting. It was a wise decision as evidenced by how special the hotel staff made us feel from reservations, check in, recommending restaurants, arranging a car service, greeting us by our first names and making us feel special. The location is within walking distance to most major attractions, restaurants, etc. I highly recommend this hotel. The staff are the BEST!

Title: Disappointed gold member
ReviewText:
The staff never showed up to clean room,
Upon arrival back to room at 5pm no staff was left
to clean room and staff had to be called twice to show up and just to give us towels . Very disappointed.  Manage said he would give me 10,000 points to make up for their mistake. Still haven’t received any points , I guess I need to call multiple times for that too !!!!

Title: No frills hotel, but perfect location
ReviewText: This hotel really is as basic as it gets - but is in the perfect location for a fun NYC weekend.  Almost all of the must sees - Empire State, Rockefeller, Times Square, Grand Central and Central Park (not to mention all the great shopping on Fifth Avenue) are only a short walk away!  Recommend this hotel for those that plan on enjoying the city and not relaxing at the hotel.

Title: Strategically placed
ReviewText: We took the taxi from Newark and the hotel was just blocks from the Lincoln Tunnel. Bryant Park was a short walk away. Its far enough away from Times square to give a breath of fresh air from the crowds. It's surrounded by great coffee houses and restaurants. Grand central station offers bus and train connections and thats just a few blocks north. Even in worn away shoes the location offers the pride of Broadway and Manhattan. The room was comfortable and the staff were all pleasant. I was happy not to have a hotel breakfast included and I enjoyed looking for the breakfast fare in Manhattan.

Title: Lo único positivo, su ubicación.
ReviewText: Está prácticamente en la Quinta Avenida, pero hay se acaba lo bueno. No existe lobby como tal y la entrada es poco más que un portal con un banquito y un pequeño mostrador de recepción. Las habitaciones en las plantas bajas son inhabitables porque transmiten todo el ruido de la calle, para colmo está rodeado de edificios en obras. El sistema de climatización de la habitación es un aparato de aire frío/calor que cada vez que arranca parece un Airbus calentando motores. No hay refrigerador ni caja de seguridad en la habitación. El sábado nos despertaron a las 8:45 al para limpiar la habitación; como le dije a la camarera que estábamos durmiendo, ese día nadie arregló nuestra habitación. No hay comedor, ni posibilidad de tomar desayuno en el hotel, sólo en un Starbucks que está en el local de al lado. Ha sido nuestra peor estancia en NY con mucha diferencia.

Title: Weekend
ReviewText: Was disappointed of the over all experience of the stay.  Location was hard to find, lobby area to small, lack of amenities.

Title: My experience
ReviewText: Overall was good stay, but room was too small for two beds. Would stay again. Good military discount was really appreciated.

Title: Rude Attitude of Staff a Big Turn Off
ReviewText: As an Elite Gold member, tI expected Marriott to have at least bottled waters for their guests, but it was not the case when I got there. Both receptionists also gave me attitude when I asked for it. The amenities are fine, which explains the average rating. Nothing special or fancy about this property. Mediocre at best.

Title: Great hotel
ReviewText: Clean quick check in and quick check out

Title: Nice Hotel
ReviewText: When I arrived at the Hotel the staff was very courteous and made me feel very welcome. Room was not ready since we were early but they kept our luggage at the Hotel while we went shopping. When we returned they had put our luggage in our room. I would stay at this location again.

Title: Excellent Experience
ReviewText: The Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue is my favorite hotel to stay at when I am in NYC. The location is superb, the room size is more than fair, the cleanliness, and without question the friendly and helpful staff is what keeps bringing me back. This will be my first choice when in NYC.

Title: Thanksgiving
ReviewText: We were in town for a family trip over Thanksgiving. The location to various attractions and the subway were big pluses, and the concierge was extremely helpful.

Title: Thanksgiving Trip
ReviewText:
Location is great.  The room is quite spacious but doesn't have microwave and small fridge.  The bed is very comfortable.
The room rate is expensive.  The staff is very helpful.

Title: No complaints
ReviewText:
Great location convenient to many sights
Clean comfortable rooms

Title: Fun in NYC
ReviewText: Great hotel,  great location,  great staff, very reasonable rate!! We wok definatly come back!!

Title: Great midtown spot
ReviewText: Clean friendly and accommodating location.  Excellent staff relations and fair pricing.

Title: NYC
ReviewText: Close to everything yet quiet

Title: Good location, friendly staff but tiny space
ReviewText: For family of four, very small. Also noise from construction across the street until 1 am.

Title: Clean and friendly
ReviewText: After an 3 hour delayed train and an unexpected 12 block walk to avoid closed roadways the staff made me feel welcome, valued, and relaxed with their friendly customer service oriented demeanor.  This experience continued into the morning when they were available to help, advise, and store my luggage so I did not have to take it to MSG.

Title: Rough Night in NYC
ReviewText:
Loudest hotel I have ever stayed at. Fire drills without warning, trash trucks all night, no heads up at all.

Bedding was very dirty.

Title: Great Stay
ReviewText: Great visit to NY! My next stay in NY will be here.

Title: NY November 8th
ReviewText: Great stay but construction outside and noise all night was disappointing

Title: Street noise
ReviewText: Great room, bed, staff and cleanliness. The noise from the street was so loud it was impossible to sleep at night. Jackhammers, banging crates, trucks, deliveries, shouting.  All night long

Title: Not up to Marriott Standard
ReviewText: Dirty, Loud, hotel that does not meet the Marriott Standard

Title: Excellent Hotel
ReviewText: Great Hotel, so much better then the Hotel we used last time in NYC. It would be nice if there was a no carpet option for rooms because my daughter and I both have allergies. Room was very clean.  Excellent location and very friendly staff. Will definitely consider staying here on our next visit.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Staff was amazing! Next door deli is 24/7. Starbucks next door also

Title: Good location, petite rooms, no frills hotel
ReviewText:
1. Location: Great
2. Rewards member benefits: Poor (No early check-in)
3. Dining: No breakfast
4. Room: Petite rooms
5. Room Service: Average (Shampoos/conditioners/bathing bars not replaced)

Title: Great location, excellent staff
ReviewText: Located near Bryant Park, this is a great location to tour the city on foot or by a short, less expensive taxi ride.  This is a tightly compact central NYC hotel at a reasonable price.  Lobby, fitness room, etc. are small but more than you need if you are here to explore.  You will get plenty of exercise walking and why pay for expansive marble lobbies. I would stay here again. Friendly, helpful staff

Title: Great location!
ReviewText: Great staff, great location - rooms are really small, but clean and comfortable.

Title: The office space View
ReviewText: It was better that some hotels but not what I expected for a Marriott

Title: Great NY location
ReviewText: We had a fantastic stay at this hotel location. Close to Time Square and Met Life Stadium. Free Starbucks coffe machine was an awesome surprise. The staff from the valet to the front desk were amazing and very helpful. We give it a 5 out of 5. Beds were very comfortable.

Title: Es bueno
ReviewText: En mi opinión tener algo de flores en la entrada sería muy bonito .y un pequeñito chocolate cuando uno deja el hotel

Title: Don’t choose if you have a choice for the price charged
ReviewText: For the price paid it was not worth staying in this hotel location

Title: Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue
ReviewText: The room was well designed and the bathroom was large.

Title: Love this hotel!
ReviewText: I stay at this hotel almost every time I come to Manhattan. I like the location for getting just about everywhere, and I can depend on the hotel staff and services to be just about perfect every time.

Title: Courtyard New York Manhatten/fifth avenue
ReviewText: This hotel is right off of 5th avenue. If you’re interested in shopping this is the hotel to stay at. Taxis are easy to get.

Title: Excelente atención
ReviewText: Recomiendo este hotel. Excelente atención y limpieza. Servicios requeridos desde la App se cumplieron exitosamente.

Title: Close but quiet
ReviewText: I am a rewards member so I was able to check-in early from the train. The desk staff, the cleaning staff and the concierge were all fantastic. The room was ready hours earlier than check-in time and I was given the room type I requested - high floor and quiet. The beds and linens were soooo nice! The hotel is in a perfect location near the lovely Bryant Park and close to everything we wanted to see. The concierge was fantastic and helped us strap our bags together for the 6 block walk back to Penn and gave us a bottle of water. This hotel does not have breakfast but there are tons of places close by to eat. I do wish the room had a refrigerator. This is a small hotel without a fancy lobby but perfect for us. I will be back for a 3rd visit.

Title: Marriott Courtyard Manhattan
ReviewText: Value for money ok. The hotel is dated and the staff not very freindly. Hotel had a bad smell and outdated bathrooms and smelly carpets are an issue.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Great location, Clean room, decent price

Title: Stay at this Hotel!!!! New York Gem!!!
ReviewText: From the moment you arrive at this Hotel you are greeted with a smile and have the feeling they care about your stay.  I asked for a quiet room and I got it!!  You get the feeling whatever your needs are this staff will jump through hoops to make you feel welcome and taken care of.  The rooms are quiet, clean and comfortable.  This Hotel is located close enough to anything you'd need to do in New York, so location is perfect!  I would recommend this Hotel to anyone who is looking for a relaxing, clean, comfortable stay in New York!! Book it!!!

Title: Manhattan Marriott
ReviewText: Would love to get the name of the bedding that was on the bed.  It was so comfortable

Title: Girls weekend with the fam
ReviewText: We had such a wonderful time.  Walked everywhere, very close to Times Square and Bryant Park is beautiful.

Title: Strive for 5
ReviewText: Perfectly located. Welcoming, attentive staff.

Title: Simple but everything you need
ReviewText: Clean and decently sized rooms considering the location in midtown. Can't beat the location.

Title: Gem in NYC
ReviewText: Clean, bright, friendly space. Made my stay in NYC even better.

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Excellent location, we had a very good experience.

Title: Hotel very good.  Limited to non-existent for any food/drink
ReviewText: No breakfast available except for coffee/tea/hot chocolate

Title: Courtyard NYC Manhatten, E40th st
ReviewText: excellent front desk and maid staff - very friendly;  reasonable rates;  décor a bit dated, but rooms are clean

Title: Our recent stay
ReviewText: We had an amazing stay for a girls trip. We were able to get to everything very quickly and the hotel was in a beautiful area. Would highly recommend to anyone wishing to come stay in NYC for a few day.

Title: First trip to NYC
ReviewText: Would recommend for families or couples as a great central location.

Title: Not good not bad
ReviewText: Not good not bad, only best thing is the location but not value for money.

Title: Very nice hotel.
ReviewText: This was our first time staying at the Marriott 5th Ave and it was a great experience. Staf was friendly, rooms were clean and beds were comfortable.

Title: Gracias Marriot
ReviewText: El Hotel satisface las necesidades del cliente.

Title: Great NYC hotel
ReviewText:
highly recommend the Courtyard Manhattan/Fifth Ave. when staying in NYC.
hotel was clean - especially bathroom in our room - and everything worked (which doesn't always happen in hotels)
staff were friendly and helpful.  umbrellas for guests on a rainy day was a plus, and it was nice to be greeted by front desk staff each time we arrived back at the hotel.
good tv selection and internet service for the brief periods in the room at night
fitness center was clean and modern
convenient - great location for access to Times Square, Empire State, Rockefeller, Broadway etc.
Starbucks next door, and hotel coffee station served Starbucks also.
didn't spend a lot of time in the hotel, as really it's just a place to sleep in NYC, but for the price, location and service this hotel met or exceeded all of our expectations.

Title: Courtyard Manhattan/Fifth
ReviewText: New York visit!  I love The Big Apple and had a great time!

Title: Friendliest Staff in NYC
ReviewText: When I stay at a hotel I want a clean room, a comfy bed and that's about it. I don't care about many amenities. I'm not picky. The one thing that will keep me returning to a hotel is the staff, I will keep returning to this particular hotel because they are literally THE friendliest hotel staff I have met to date in NYC, and I have stayed at a LOT of hotels in NYC this past year! Everyone from the desk staff to the concierge were genuine and friendly and the rooms were great too. But it was the staff that made my stay exceptional, and that's why I'll return!!

Title: Cleanliness
ReviewText: Room was dirty - both rooms that I was checked into

Title: NL
ReviewText: Excellent location and good service.

Title: PLEASENT STAY AT COURTYARD  FITH AVE NEW YORK
ReviewText: VERY WELL MAINTAINED  PROPERTY AT THE HEART OF   NEW YORK'S  FITH AVENUE    CONVENIENT LOCATED    EASY  PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION, STEPS BY BRYANT PARK. MANY  RESTAURANTS  IN WALKING DISTANCE ( NO RESTAURANT AT THE HOTEL ), TOP SHOPS AROUND THE CORNER. OVERALL  A PLACE TO COMEBACK HIGH RECOMMENDED

Title: Good Hotel Had Some Problems
ReviewText: the location i was at East 40th in Manhattan had decent room but was not clean in two days i was there and the lobby was not clean i fell down on my chronic injured back on slippery floor and have had some pain a week since .the staff only put a sign and a warning of slippery floor after i fell down not very responsible.

Title: Horrible mattress!
ReviewText: For the first time in my life I do not recommend a Marriott hotel. Worst mattress I've ever seen. Upon my return I spent $50 on a massage to try to heal the back pain it caused. Had 3 painful and sleepless nights there. Don't trade comfort for location, it's not worth it! If you're already booked, refuse room 1401.

Title: Poor
ReviewText: The elevator was broken the lights in my room didn't work and the rooms were small and outdated . This was not representative of the marriott brand

Title: Comfortable Stay at Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue
ReviewText: My family and I went to New York City for a long weekend and booked the Marriott Courtyard Fifth Avenue due to its central location, two queen beds in the room, and relatively low pre-pay rate.  The hotel and our room were clean and hotel staff were always friendly and polite.  The hotel is located near several subway lines.  On our next trip to New York City, we will strongly consider staying there again.

Title: bad room service
ReviewText: Everything was fair but the room service was quite lousy

Title: Clean and comfortable
ReviewText: Easy to access, right near the Public library and grand central station. Weather wasn't great, so it would have suited me better to be closer to theaters, but location was fine.

Title: Don't stay here
ReviewText: Poor on many levels. There are plenty of other options to stay.

Title: Clean, but thats all!
ReviewText: No view!  Small, dark, often cold and depressing room with a loud airconditioner and lousy internet.

Title: Two day stay to attend my son's wedding.
ReviewText: The concierge was very friendly and efficient.  The bedding in the room was very comfortable and the room was very clean.  The valet service was very efficient and helpful as parking in New York City can be difficult.

Title: It rocked.
ReviewText: Sophia was excellent at front desk.

Title: Value & Location
ReviewText: This Courtyard Marriott just a block away from Bryant park is a value for Manhattan.  The rooms are large and clean.  The hotel does not have a restaurant, but there is a Starbucks downstairs and a good deli next door.  I would recommend for a quick stay on a budget.

Title: Exlenwt location - excellent service
ReviewText: I stayed for 12 days for a business trip. Everything worked perfect. The staff is super nice and location couldn't been better

Title: Friendly staff!
ReviewText: I was in NYC for work, but brought my family with me (husband and two kids, 4&7). Excellent staff, from front desk to Frank the concierge and cleaning staff; even the repair man, who came up immediately when the toilet had a minor malfunction. We got a great room, high floor as requested, that wasn't overlooked. Comfortable beds and pillows, very fresh & clean. Great location, right by Bryant Park and library- close to everything, including Grandcentral terminal. staff excellent, esp to my two children. Will stay here again!

Title: Awesome visit to NYC
ReviewText: Hotel was reasonably priced and in a great location. Staff was very friendly & helpful.

Title: Memorial weekend 2017
ReviewText: We had a great time. Great location.  Not in the middle of th craziness of Time Square. Very quite neighborhood. Bryant Park and few subway station near the hotel. Also few blocks from the main attraction and from Time Square. Really enjoyed our stayed

Title: First trip to the Big Apple
ReviewText: In the busiest city in the world we were able to relax and come "home" to our Marriott hotel in NY.  The beds were comfy and the staff was excellent!  Bryant Park was only a block away and a nice break from the tall buildings .... there were trees, dining experiences and entertainment.

Title: Good place to stay in Mid-town Manhattan
ReviewText:
If you're looking for a good hotel of the Marriott quality level, this Courtyard is worth a visit.  It is centrally located in Manhattan, near Grand Central Station.  
Everything in the room was in working condition.  It has the facilities you would expect of a Courtyard - fitness center, office spot, and wi-fi.  Instead of a breakfast offering, they have an arrangement with the cafe next door.

Title: Great location!
ReviewText: Great location - close to Time Square, Central Park, shopping etc.  Much quieter than expected for NYC.  Friendly staff.  Great Deli next door.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Just a couple of blocks from Times Square and short walk to Madison Square Gardens and the Empire State Building.  We were able to walk to Central Park too!

Title: Small and Smelly
ReviewText: The courtyard on 35th has larger rooms, More ammenoties and is cleaner.

Title: Decent room and good location
ReviewText: Just across the street from Bryant Park and easy walk to Times Square for theater district.  Two blocks to Grand Central Station (and a couple to the left) and you can get anywhere in the city easily.  Nice food options in the area.  Lobby is small.  Did not use the fitness center (also small, but they have one).  Requested a late checkout as a GOLD member, which comes through on my reservation that I want it.  It was not noted and when I reminded them, they wrote it down, but still locked me out of my room.  Minor issue, but, come on.  This isn't that hard to read a reservation.  Don't send me "would you like late check out" and then not honor it.

Title: Ny
ReviewText: Points not credited properly. Spend 42 days Oct to Dec not credited properly. Also NY trip in Nov not credited in Jan 2017. Pl review n credit.

Title: Great location and great value!
ReviewText: Very clean and updated rooms. Super comfortable beds. Great location with access to many things to do.

Title: Close to everything
ReviewText: Fantastic location close to many of the best midtown attractions.

Title: Nice
ReviewText: Nice hotel.  No frills, but very clean and convenient location.

Title: Marriott courtyard
ReviewText: The staff was very friendly and helpful.

Title: birthday weekend in nyc
ReviewText: Courtyard is centrally located right accross the street from Bryant Park. Walking and subway is really convenient to a million places and shopping all around. Very quiet place to stay in NYC.

Title: Marriott for life
ReviewText: Location was perfect for everything that I wanted to do in NYC.

Title: Fantastic location
ReviewText: This hotel is situated in the fifth Avenue area of NYC. Walking distance to lots of restaurants, shopping, and attractions including the Empire State Building, Rockefeller Center, Bryant Park, and Times Square. The Penn Station Amtrack is also a short walk away.

Title: Elite 8
ReviewText: Property was small but that's New York, everyone was friendly.

Title: Just OK
ReviewText: The hotel is at a great location, but the property seems outdated. Lobby has no sitting area, has an old office building feeling. Elevators are scarec, only two for 30 floors, so expect long waits. Rooms are very small and offer no sitting area. The hotel has no convinience store, minibar or snackbar/restaurant so you will need to exit the property to get water. Fair hotel for very shorts stays.

Title: Spring Break NYC
ReviewText: We were stuck in the snowstorm and the staff did't care at all that our trip was a disaster because of the weather.

Title: First trip to NY
ReviewText: This was my first trip to NY and to the states. It couldn't get any more better than staying at this hotel.

Title: Frank - Best Bell Man in NYC
ReviewText: Frank who services the front door is a true Ambassador for the hotel and made our stay most enjoyable.

Title: Ok
ReviewText: I don't know what else to say but it's was ok

Title: Boa Opção e Localização
ReviewText:
Tive uma agradável surpresa com este hotel.  Em viagem a trabalho, foi perfeito e atendeu as expectativas com sobra.
Bom atendimento, sem complicações, sem filas e com pessoal muito bem educado em todos os turnos, não apenas no front-desk, mas para os outros serviços também.
Instalações limpas e bem cuidadas.

Title: Good stay
ReviewText: Great weekend at NY. Great location

Title: Great Service but small rooms
ReviewText: The Customer Service is A+ at this location.  The rooms are pretty SMALL though.

Title: Recent Stay at Courtyard NY 5th Ave
ReviewText: Very nice staff - the check-in and check-out process was a breeze. The property is central to several destination in Manhattan which makes it a desirable place to stay. I felt the property would benefit from a refresh of its interiors - ie: get rid of the popcorn ceiling and introduce some better lighting in the hotel hallways. The guest rooms are clean, tidy, and well decorated for the price point. For properties of this class, I would give the staff a 10/10 and the building a 7 or 8/10 from a décor standpoint. Overall, I enjoyed my stay.

Title: Not up to Courtyard Standards
ReviewText: Stayed overnight on 1/18/17.  Not what I had expected.  First, the 5th floor room was very small, aged, and the view was miserable.  If you stay here -- and they put you on one of the lower floors -- demand something better.  I should have turned right around when I saw the room and am kicking myself for not doing so.  Second, the sleeper bed that we had planned to use was extremely small.  And the sheets that came with it looked like they were a decade old.  Overall, the room was on the dirty side as well.  Not a pleasant experience.  The bellhops were great, but only one worked at a time and they could not keep up with the guests.

Title: Lifetime Gold Member
ReviewText: Disappointed they only extended a late checkout for one hour. I have lifetime Gold status.

Title: Small but comfortable and accommodating
ReviewText: This Hotel and rooms are small, but it was clean and comfortable.  The staff was very accommodating especially when I had to leave early because of threatening snow storm.  Although it has a Starbucks adjacent, it has no restaurant or food service available.

Title: buena estadia
ReviewText: Excelente estadia, servicio excelente

Title: Excellent Staff
ReviewText: Most helpful and accomadating staff. They should teach the class on how to treat guests. Everyone was very helpful with all that we needed.

Title: personal/medical trip
ReviewText: The courtyard marriot was nice, the location was great as it was right across the street from the Amen clinc where we spend every morning during our trip. The location to Bryant Park was great. Lots of great eats around and shopping. My biggest complaint was there wasn't a mini fridge in the room which would have been nice to chill drinks or put leftover food that we had from our meals out, since they did not offer any food or dining at this hotel.

Title: My Experience
ReviewText: Great location, easy access, courteous staff, walk-able location to public transportation and local sites, good restaurants in quick walking distance from location, plenty to see within easy walk from location.

Title: Business Stay
ReviewText: Wireless internet is worthless -- unprotected and unusable -- plan on using your own hot spot.  There is no food on site and no Executive Lounge either (for Gold and Platinum members).  Beds are small (no kings) and my bed was old and uncomfortable.  Price was great for NYC and location too at 40th and 5th -- but those are the only selling points for this hotel.

Title: Coordinator
ReviewText: overall was very good.  The location was fantastic, near of Times Square, Rockefeller Center

Title: Old Hotel Needs Updating
ReviewText: Rooms are small. Carpeting and bedding are worn. On-site staff are very nice.

Title: Extended Business Trip
ReviewText: The location of this hotel is perfect for my travel.  The staff was friendly and courteous.  I had a significant issue with the same day dry cleaning--my clothes were not delivered same day as promised (and paid for).  The staff had to chase down my clothes the morning I was checking out and I was late for my business meetings due to having to wait until my clothes were located and delivered.

Title: Visita NY
ReviewText: El servicio, ubicación y atenciones excelentes, la mejor opción para visitar la ciudad

Title: Highly recommend it
ReviewText: I highly recommend it, everything was smooth and perfect, not issues at all also his location is next to 5th ave.

Title: Hôtel bien situé
ReviewText: Hôtel fonctionnel et pratique vu sa situation. Literie impeccable. Décors de la chambre et de la salle de bain très minimalistes (néanmoins très propres). Nous déplorons l'absence d'une salle de déjeuner et d'un bar au sein de l'hôtel. Personnel de réception peu chaleureux envers les clients étrangers (à l'exception du personnel d'entretien très sympathique). C'est essentiellement sa situation à deux pas de la 5ème avenue qui nous insitera à y revenir.

Title: Weekend Family visit to NYC
ReviewText: Two beds in a room was difficult to find but this Courtyard by Marriott/5th avenue was an excellent value in a convenient location to shopping & entertainment.

Title: Excellent stay
ReviewText: Excellent stay and superb location. Highly recommended!

Title: no extra pillows
ReviewText: no extra pillows and that amenity has been in my Profiler for 25+ years.

Title: Great value for the location, excellent staff
ReviewText: If you want to stay in midtown Manhattan without spending a fortune, this location provides clean, comfortable accommodations with excellent staff.

Title: Great stay during the holidays
ReviewText: Great location in NYC.  Staff very accommodating and room very clean.

Title: Christmas Eve in New York
ReviewText: Simply wonderful way to spend Christmas Eve

Title: East side Christmas stay
ReviewText: This hotel is convenient to Radio City, the Rockeller Christmas Tree, St Patrick's Cathedral, Saks 5th Avenue Christmas display, Grand Central Terminal Christmas Train extravaganza & Lord & Taylor & Macy's Christmas animations.

Title: Great experience
ReviewText: We recently stayed three nights here to experience the Christmas atmosphere. Staff was very courteous and helpful. Rooms ready when we arrived and very clean. Comfortable beds, too.

Title: Great stay in NYC
ReviewText: Great stay in NYC. Location, location, location.

Title: Good location, not clean
ReviewText: The location couldn't have been more convenient, right off fifth and next to bryant park but the bathroom was very unclean

Title: Great hotel, great location.
ReviewText: Great hotel, very comfortable except for mattress on the sofa bed which was awful. Very convenient location.

Title: GREAT LOCATION
ReviewText: WE WERE GOING TO DO THE TOURISTY THINGS IN NY AND WANTED TO STAY CLOSE TO ROCKEFELLER CENTER. THIS WAS A SHORT WALK TO EVERYTHING! WE NEVER GOT IN A CAB OR SUBWAY. IT WAS A GREAT LOCATION, SHORT WALK TO MACYS, ROCKEFELLER CENTER, TIMES SQUARE. THE STAFF WAS FRIENDLY, THE HOTEL WAS QUIET. WOULD DEFINITELY STAY HERE AGAIN!

Title: Great location
ReviewText:
This hotel had a perfect location for everything and place we wanted to do and go. 
Can recommend this hotel and would very happerly stay here again.

Title: very convenient location
ReviewText: We have stayed at this hotel for 3 years in a row and love how convenient it is to so many places.  We walked to Macy's, Bryant Park, Rockefeller Center, down 5th Ave.,Central park, Times Square, and our Broadway shows.  There is a subway stop really close to the hotel as well.  There is a great little store next door for snacks, food, and drinks. Most of all, the concierges Frank and Willie made our trip so much fun!  They were so friendly, helpful,  and entertaining!   They certainly made or trip memorable.  The rooms are tight for 4 ladies, but I expect thati n NYC.  The beds were very comfortable!

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Got a great Black Friday rate for this hotel. Location was perfect for seeing the Christmas sites.

Title: Average Hotel
ReviewText: This hotel is your basic business traveler hotel.  No amenities, smaller clean rooms good for 1 person. No food or beverage service.  Would not recommend for extended stay or a good value based on the cost of the room.

Title: New York trip
ReviewText: great location and clean room

Title: One of the best places to stay in mid-town Manhattan
ReviewText: Great hotel with excellent service and a very friendly staff.

Title: Yearly family weekend in NYC
ReviewText: 8th year of family weekend in NYC stayed at both Marquis or Courtyard Both hotels are great bot concenseus is Courtyard is the best. Staying there next year

Title: Great hotel & close to 5th Ave
ReviewText: Great staff and clean rooms. Starbucks is right next door but the hotel also has a machine in the lobby that gives you free Starbucks coffee and hot chocolate. Right around the corner is the New York Library.

Title: JKT AGE 79
ReviewText: RESTAURANT (COFFEE SHOP)WAS NEXT DOOR ....CHECKING IN WAS A TAD BIT CROWDED........GETTING A TAXI WAS A "MIRACLE".........PLUS VERY,VERY COSTLY.........

Title: Less then Expected.
ReviewText: The room is very small and the Hotel does not have all the bells and whistles you might want.  There is no dining in the Hotel.

Title: Thanksgiving NYC Trip
ReviewText: The rooms are small, but no more so than you would expect for Manhattan.  We had a king room with a sofa sleeper and for a family of four it was cozy at night.  The rooms are well laid out though, so we weren't tripping over each other.  How much time do you really spend in your hotel if you're in NYC anyway?  The hotel was kept up well and very clean.  Staff was friendly and helpful.  This is a good hotel to stay at if you want to be close to the downtown attractions.  Walking distance to shopping on 5th avenue, Rockefeller Center, Times Square, NY Public Library, Bryant Park, and Grand Central Station.  Several Subway entrances nearby besides Grand Central also.

Title: Better places to stay in NYC than this location
ReviewText: Overall, the quality here is lacking. There is no lobby to speak of and the rooms are average at best, more like a Fairfield Inn level. Our room was dark, dingy and depressing. It will be our last stay at this particular NY property.

Title: NYC
ReviewText: Below average due to uncourtesy staff

Title: Nice Stay in NYC
ReviewText: Very nice location in NYC with nice staff and pleasant room!

Title: Excellent Location
ReviewText: I recently stayed at the Courtyard Manhattan/Fifth. I really enjoyed being within walking distance to so many things. The library, Broadway, Times Square, Fifth Ave, Grand Central etc. The Courtyard was very comfortable and clean. I would definitely stay there again.

Title: My marathon experience
ReviewText: I had an excellent time in NYC for the marathon experience

Title: Top Notch Service Off fifth Avenue
ReviewText:
Location, high quality customer service, cleanliness and comfort provide the perfect equation for SATISFACTION. I will return to this property and recommend it to others again and again. Did I mention complimentary Starbucks coffee in the mezzanine?
Accessible to some of the best dining in New York City.

Title: muy buen hiotel
ReviewText: Muy buen lugar, bien ubicado y en un excelente ambiente

Title: Amazing!
ReviewText: Outstanding hospitality.  Will stay again.  Perfect location.

Title: Weekend in NY
ReviewText:
The location is very accessible to public transportation.  It was close to many of points of interest.  Very clean and comfortable hotel. Does not have a small refrigerator in the room, but does have a small coffee maker available with courtesy coffee supplied.
It would be great to find some coupons for weekend stays.

Title: Just what you need in NYC
ReviewText: Just what you need in NYC.  Good location.  Store next door for drinks/snacks/other.  Close to subway.  Taxis. Uber. Black car.  Walking to good bars, restaurants, shopping.  Safe secure area.  Front desk personnel were awesome at checkin and for asking questions about the area.  Great value in NYC.

Title: Good considering the City of New York
ReviewText: I had a relatively uneventful stay in a small room best described as adequate, no more that that.  This Mariott makes one drool over the others that I chanced to see in the City.

Title: Great value on midtown NYC
ReviewText: This very conviently located hotel is a real bargain for the business traveler or tourist. The rooms are well maintained and the staff is great. No resturant was not a problem with a deli next door and other eateries near by.

Title: Good Value near Bryant Park area
ReviewText: I have stayed at this Courtyard before and found it to be a good value in a great area for theater and shopping.  Comfortable beds, nice staff and a short walk to theaters and shopping.

Title: Estadia en Nueva York
ReviewText: Excelente hotel muy bien ubicado a escasos metros de la 5 Ave Biblioteca Publica y Bryant Park. Relacion precio producto excelente. Un hotel muy recomendable.

Title: NY
ReviewText:
NY
room too small
old design
no breakfast

Title: Great service- great location
ReviewText: I would definitely recommend this hotel to other business travelers. Prime location in NYC!

Title: Wedding
ReviewText: Hotel was nice and location was convenient for the purpose of our travel.

Title: Great Value and Location
ReviewText: Great location with good Deli next door.  Friendly, helpful staff.

Title: 5th Avenue Hotel
ReviewText: walking distance  to New York library, Port Authority, Saks Fifth Avenue, Rockefeller Center,  St Patrick's Cathedral

Title: dont stay here
ReviewText: save your self the headache.

Title: Review
ReviewText: The only complaints we had were the thinness of the walls and proximity to the elevator.  Not only was our room very close to the elevator, it was also next to a room with a family with small children who were, as small children are, a bit loud.  This made it very difficult to sleep as the walls were very thin.  We did not report this issue as we knew the hotel was fully booked for a wedding at check-in, so we knew there was not much to be done.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: The hotel is in a good location. But doesn't stand out as it is tucked away. The rooms are quite small just for two people and the bed was not the most comfortable. The staff was very nice and the check in and check out process was very quick.

Title: Great location, reasonable price
ReviewText: Location couldn't be better

Title: Excellent Location
ReviewText: Stayed as part of a wedding group and enjoyed the location of the hotel very much.  Close to everything we needed downtown.

Title: Modern and convenient
ReviewText: A modest book tucked into the shelf of high rises, the Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue held for us a modern and convenient story. Close to the New York Public Library and Bryant Park, in a neighborhood of eateries and shops, we enjoyed slipping into the building for rest and relaxation in between museum visits and site seeing tours. The coffee station on the mezzanine provided a fresh cup on demand. We were always greeted warmly by the staff and look forward to returning.

Title: Outstanding
ReviewText: We very much enjoyed our stay. The room was very clean and comfortable! Bed was so comfy and the shower was wonderful. Staff was most welcoming and accommodating. Very well located. Very happy w our hotel stay!

Title: My Experience at Courtyard manhattan
ReviewText:
Satisfactory
Well located with a highly professional staff

Title: Muy buena
ReviewText: Mi estadía fue muy buena, excelente ubicación , las instalaciones adecuadas a mis expectativas. Sigan así .

Title: Excellent place to stay
ReviewText:
This was a great place - the staff was very accommodating and it was in a great location. I would most definitely stay
 here again. 
I put 'Average' for Dining because there was only a Starbucks available within hotel (lobby). But there were places to eat within a block in almost any direction.

Title: US Open visit
ReviewText: Great location but no real lobby area. Rooms relatively small as are hallways on each floor. No place to eat in the hotel or a bar.

Title: Convenient location, but...
ReviewText: The front desk staff was not very friendly.  When we checked in at night, the staff did not smile or greet us.  He didn't say anything except asking for our names.  The bathroom needs a total update.  The tiles and grouts were yellowish.  It's clean but looks like a motel bathroom.

Title: cleanlyness
ReviewText: I found the Courtyard at 3 west 40th N.Y. one of the dirtiest I've ever stayed at

Title: Nice time
ReviewText: Very courteous staff and excellant assistance for arranging transportation

Title: Great location and wonderful staff
ReviewText: Great hotel clean quiet  with a great staff

Title: Will Stay There Everytime
ReviewText: This is the first time I've stayed at this property.  I know they were nearly sold out, but we needed another room.  Not only did they get us that second room, but they got us rooms next to each other.  We didn't ask for that.  They just did it because they are that professional.  Every staff person was friendly, kind, and helpful.  I just wish they had tea in the room with the coffee.  I don't drink coffee, but love tea,  That's my only suggestion.

Title: Great stay!
ReviewText: Perfectly located in the heart of all the sights we wanted to see! Great customer service! Clean rooms! I would stay here again!

Title: It's a courtyard with no amenities
ReviewText: The most boring Courtyard you'll ever stay at the employees are great the rooms are boring the place is boring there's no Market no soda machine no pool you get nothing for what you're paying for.

Title: A wonderful town
ReviewText:
Friendly and helpful staff.
Very clean rooms, efficient and accommodating housekeeping.
Free Starbucks coffee and tea 24/7

Title: Stay was good, but service after our stay is lacking
ReviewText: Our actual stay was good.  The room was a little small, but it was clean and looked nice.  Staff was friendly, and while staying at the hotel, we received good service.  Location is great -- walkable to Grand Central Station, Bryant Park, Rockefeller Center, and lots of shopping.  Only complaint about the room would be the lack of a refrigerator.  After we checked out, we realized that we forgot some items in our room, and we've been having trouble reaching Lost and Found.  We've called numerous times, and no one has answered.  The voice mailbox is full, so we can't leave a message.  We've left a message with the operator to have the manager call us back, but we haven't received a response yet.

Title: Great stay
ReviewText: Very good for couples and good location out of the city crazin essence.

Title: A Great Hotel
ReviewText: Staff was friendly,and helpful. Hotel was clean and in a great location

Title: Stay Here!
ReviewText: Wonderful staff. Clean and comfy rooms.

Title: Great place to stay
ReviewText: The staff was excellent, the room was great, and the location was exceptional. The price was great considering it was over the 4th of July weekend. Overall great visit.

Title: Convenient location.
ReviewText: A fine place to stay for convenient travel throughout NYC. A short walk to Grand Central Station for subway access. Only a few minutes from Bryant Park and numerous bakeries to enjoy a morning outdoor coffee. Theatre district nearby. Car service available for return to airport. We felt safe here.

Title: Value - Convenience!
ReviewText: I am a frequent business traveler and this Courtyard will be booked again.  Great location near the Library, Bryant Park and Grand Central Station, as well as any easy location to get to from LaGuardia - a plus in current NYC traffic conditions.  Staff is very friendly and helpful, and room was clean and comfortable.  Price was very reasonable considering the cost of staying in Manhattan.

Title: Great Location
ReviewText: We chose this location to be in the heart of midtown.  It is extremely close to Grand Central Station, walkable to the Empire State Building, Times Square and more.

Title: Spectacular hotel, literally felt like home
ReviewText: This hotel was wonderful, from the front desk staff to the housekeeping staff! It's a beautiful, clean and friendly place to stay.

Title: COULD HAVE BEEN BETTER
ReviewText: We returned to this hotel 2 years after our first visit. The decor is now looking tired and needs freshened. The housekeeping was poor (bed linen only changed on 7th. day of stay after making complaint) and cleanliness was poor (crumbs not hoovered and bath not cleaned regularly). There are no dining facilities. Taxi to airport was more expensive with the hotel's tied taxi firm. Lots of unnecessary little inconveniences. The location, however, is excellent.

Title: Good hotel in excellent locatiom
ReviewText: This is the second time we have stayed here and would recommend this hotel to other travellers. Excellent location, all staff are very good and helpful and rooms are very clean and comfortable.

Title: Review
ReviewText: Receptions need to be friendly and helpful, overall satisfied.

Title: A Comfortable and Pleasing Night at the Courtyard Marriott in Manhattan
ReviewText: I was pleasantly surprised and relieved by the level of excellence among all staff I encountered in this relatively small but excellently managed and staffed Manhattan hotel

Title: Great place to stay in NYC
ReviewText: The location is great.  Right by the library/Bryant Park.  Can walk to many central Manhattan venues.  Staff was fabulous, so helpful and attentive.  Room was clean and up to date.  Was a little crowded for 2 adults and a child, but you're really only there to sleep anyway!  Would definitely stay here again.

Title: vacation weekend
ReviewText: I don't think I would stay here again until bathroom is updated.

Title: Nice location and staff service!
ReviewText: Recently stayed with my husband and girls at the hotel for city seeing. The location was excellent, near to main Manhattan atractions and placesto eat. The street was quiet and secure at night. The staff were very kind and friendly. The only concern is that the room do not have a small fridge. If i return to NY, I will stay there.

Title: NYC Spring 2016
ReviewText: Not enough room for a dining room/restaurant, bigger gym, a lobby to lounge

Title: EXCELENTE
ReviewText: EXCELENTE MUY BUENA ATENCIO POR PARTE DE TODO EL PERSONAL

Title: Excellent Service and Comfort
ReviewText:
The reason why I choose to stay in Courtyard is the comfort and excellent customer service. The minute we walked in, I mentioned how hot it was outside the lo and behold we received 2 ice cold bottled H2Os. Our hotel room had all the essentials; king-sized bed with queen-sized sofa bed. It is close to everything, from Time Square, 5th Ave, and next to Bryant Park.
  An hour after check out, my daughter realized she forgot her American girl shopping bag (with things we bought the day prior), when we came back to the hotel it's on the front desk with our hotel number and smiles on their faces. For these reasons, we will continue to patronize Marriott. Thank you for your excellent work. We truly appreciate it.

Title: Great hotel, great location
ReviewText: Great hotel with only 7 rooms per floor. Convenient deli and Starbucks right next door. Comfortable room, ample bathroom, nicely decorated, and very courteous employees.

Title: Fabulous NYC Spring Visit
ReviewText: Wonderful stay at the Courtyard NY Manhattan/5th Avenue hotel! The hotel service staff was wonderful - very helpful, pleasant, and proactive. We had several "extra requests" (e.g., fridge in one of the rooms) and the staff accommodated all of these immediately and with a smile! The hotel is conveniently located - very near the subway and with plenty of nearby attractions for you to walk to. The "free" Starbucks coffee/hot choco machine was a great treat! Definitely will come back to this hotel ... they're great at making you feel at home!  Thank you for making my and my family's spring visit a great one!

Title: Girls Trip 2016
ReviewText: I really enjoyed my stay at the Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue location.  It was very nice and comfortable. The staff was friendly and very helpful to us. They were able to give us the help we needed when looking at transportation options.  It would've been nice to have a refrigerator and/or a microwave in the room or at least a microwave available on site. There are also only two ice machines on site (floors 5 and 25). The hotel location is great. It's conveniently close to Times Square and other attractions, but not too close to be disturbed by the sounds and busyness of Times Square. Overall, we really enjoyed our stay and would gladly book another stay.

Title: Excellent location
ReviewText: Right next to Bryant park and shopping on a quiet street. We even had a dollar store across hotel. Times Square and broadway are a short walk away. Would definitely return on next trip.

Title: Marriott
ReviewText: The location,cafe next door and staff were all great.

Title: Great Location and Great Value in NYC
ReviewText: If you're visiting NYC, this hotel offers a great value for a midtown location. Times Square, the Empire State Building. Grand Central Station and many other attractions are a short walk a way. The staff is very friendly and helpful.

Title: Friendly, convenient, comfortable
ReviewText: Close to Times Square for shows, sights and shopping. Easy walk from the front door to the shops of Fifth Ave. Right across the street from Bryant Park, great place for a picnic lunch or lazy weekend breakfast in the sunshine.

Title: Stay for business not for leisure
ReviewText: Room is small. Staffs are nice overall. Room size is Good for 1 person for business only, not for Leisure. Good to have Gym and business center free.

Title: Clean, comfortable hotel in excellent location
ReviewText: The Marriott Courtyard at 5th Ave. is an excellent hotel to serve as a base for a New York City visit. The rooms are clean and stylish. The staff is attentive. The location cannot be beat. The hotel is a stone's throw from Bryant Park and the New York City Public Library and is within easy walking distance of Times Square, Rockefeller Plaza, Grand Central Station and all the 5th Ave. shops.

Title: Low cost stay with a perfect bed
ReviewText: Great location, perfect bed, small rooms.

Title: Sehr gute Lage und sehr gute Mitarbeiter - Immer ansprechbar
ReviewText: Siehe meine Bewertung bei tripadvisor. Das Hotel ist sehr gut gelegen, ordentliche Zimmer und freundliches Personal. Besser als erwartet, Ich würde hier wieder buchen.

Title: Excellent Stay!
ReviewText: Lovely hotel close to 5th Avenue, the NY Public Library and Times Square.  Easy to get to the theaters and subway.  Great location!

Title: fair to stay
ReviewText: convenient location but room space is small. Room rate is high during our stay. bath towels are old, no shower cap or glass in bathroom. The cleanliness is rated 5.

Title: great location for midtown
ReviewText: Right off fifth in a quiet part of town.  Small but clean and efficient rooms. Good facilities for food in the immediate area, even on the weekends.

Title: Good hotel, decent price
ReviewText: Not a luxurious stay, but a good hotel in every sense. Efficient and helpful staff, nice clean rooms, and well placed on Manhattan. I will probably use the hotel for my next visit to New York.

Title: review
ReviewText: Average. For cost there should be a restaurant available.

Title: overall
ReviewText: We were in the city for an overnight and this hotel was perfect. Although the room was warm and we could not figure out how to cool it down, that really was our only complaint. The beds were comfortable, everything was clean & the hotel was not far from the attractions in the city

Title: Ubicación
ReviewText: Lo más destacable, el sitio. De resto, muy promedio

Title: Great staff, centrally located
ReviewText: Loved the hotel, walking distance from grand central close to everything else in mid-town

Title: Staff goes out of their way
ReviewText: The Courtyard New York/Fifth Avenue is at an excellent location as subways are close as are many sites one may wish to visit. The hotel is clean and the staff is very responsive. We had a problem with the toilet leaking and once reported, the staff worked to fix the problem and decided to move us to another room to avoid further problems. That proactive action made me very comfortable feeling that the hotel had our best interests in mind.

Title: Shawn in NYC
ReviewText: Could not have been happier.

Title: Location
ReviewText: The Hotel is located closer to all major landmarks of Manhattan. The staff is very polite and helpful. The rooms are clean and quite modern.

Title: Super Quiet
ReviewText: If you like quiet, this is a great place to stay. There are only 6 rooms per floor so not many people to make noise in the hallways. The walls are nice and thick. Never heard a neighbor. Also less than 5 minute walk to Grand Central so a great place to stay if you are taking the commuter rail into the city.

Title: Best Location and accomodations
ReviewText: The Hotel has a great location and the rooms are really comfortable. The staff is really nice and you'll receive a top experience during your stay

Title: satisfied guest
ReviewText: Great hotel and wonderful staff! We were made to feel welcome from the second we stepped in.

Title: Very Nice
ReviewText: Extremely friendly staff with a great location.

Title: Location! Location! Location!
ReviewText: This hotel is in the best location in NYC! Minutes from everything including the theater, dining, subway, shopping, etc! Clean and quiet! Just what you need!

Title: Courtyard 5th AVENUE
ReviewText: Nice hotel and location. No frills. 2 Blocks from grand Central and Bryant Park. Staff does a good job.

Title: Wonderful stay!
ReviewText:
The staff at this hotel helped make our NYC experience a wonderful one, especially George and Pedro.
Also the room was very comfortable and clean, elevator is fast, easy check in and check out, location is perfect.

Title: Sophia
ReviewText: Sophia from reception was wonderful, very polite and friendly

Title: eb
ReviewText: good hotel to stay for the week end , good location in manhattan

Title: Girl's fiftieth celebration
ReviewText: Location was the best. Not on top of the Time Square crowd, but close enough to walk to. We enjoys the free Starbuck's coffee/tea bar. Gym is small and limited equipment. Only 2 treadmills, a recumbent bike and elliptical. Weights and water are also in the room.

Title: NY Tartan Week in Manhattan
ReviewText: Our first stay here, and we loved it! Very clean hotel, only 7 rooms on our floor (24th) and thus VERY quiet. Staff was friendly and helpful, bellman were exceptionally so. Definitely will return & can highly recommend to others!

Title: Conveniently located and Clean
ReviewText:
The Hotel is conveniently located near the fashion district and great shopping area.
Starbucks is attached to the hotel so makes it easy to grab breakfast on the go.
Rooms were clean, service friendly.

Title: Excellent location!
ReviewText: I loved the location of the hotel in Manhattan and the staff was very professional and helpful. I'll definitely stay there next time I'm in NY

Title: duffer decisions
ReviewText: hard to recall needed details. This property seemed fine to me.

Title: Not a great resprentation of the brand
ReviewText: I didn't receive the courtyard stands and experience at 5th ave

Title: Great Location, Comfortable Room
ReviewText: This property is located right in midtown Manhattan and it near all public transportation (subway and bus). The rooms are comfortable with wonderful beds and pillows. It's not a suite but the room size is adequate for two people. They may have larger rooms available but I have not need to inquire about that. I have begun to see some stress in the elevators and rugs but overall it's a good place to stay.

Title: GOOD
ReviewText: 下次我还住这里！房间舒适，交通便利！服务很好，可以提前入住。

Title: Great Experience
ReviewText: My recent stay at Courtyard was wonderful. Clean nice staff. Close to everything

Title: Great Christmas Visit
ReviewText: We arrived very early and just wanted to check our bags, but our room was ready! What a nice surprise!

Title: Christmas in NTC
ReviewText: Great stay, nice hotel for the money. Staff was amazing!

Title: Great time at the Courtyard Fifth Ave.
ReviewText: Great time in NYC. Excellent location, friendly hotel staff and very nice room.

Title: Good Stay
ReviewText: Great location and service, beautiful room, comfortable bed. Lobby was under refurbishment and was not very comfortable.

Title: Location, location, location!
ReviewText:
We were in NYC from all over the country to celebrate my mom's 80th birthday. The hotel was the perfect venue for this. The location is perfect for viewing the Christmas lights on 5th Avenue and for visiting the Christmas Market at Bryant Park.

The hotel was very clean, but what was truly exceptional was the staff. Everyone seemed to take a personal interest in making my mom's birthday special. Frank, the bellman, even arranged an extraordinary treat for my mom on our way back to the airport.

Cannot speak highly enough about this hotel and its staff!

Title: Courtyard Marriott Fifth Avenue.
ReviewText: Average. Not worth the money. Great location, however.

Title: Christmas in NYC
ReviewText: The Courtyard will be our new go to place when we visit NYC!!! So conveniently located! Right around the corner from Lord and Taylor and just minutes from the beautiful Bryant Park! We grabbed a complimentary Starbucks coffee and tea and enjoyed watching the skaters at Bryant Park! Also very close to Grand Central terminal!!! Everyone was so accommodating! We arrived early and were able to check right in! Can't wait to visit again!!!

Title: great time!! Good clean hotel.
ReviewText: had a great time. friendly staff!

Title: Excelente
ReviewText: Excelente ubicación y respira disponibilidad de servicios

Title: Great place to stay in NYC
ReviewText: I was very happy with the staff, room, bathroom, and ease of stay. My accomodations were never an issue throughout my trip. I would recommend this Marriott to any traveler.

Title: Last minute weekend away
ReviewText: Quick vacation to NYC over Thanksgiving weekend. Booked hotel and arrived 3 hours later, I got the notification that my room was ready about 20 minutes after using the app to check in. The hotel was clean, the staff is extremely friendly and the room is what is expected of a room in NYC. The only downside is that they are remodeling the lobby and that was not disclosed while I was making my reservation, but it did not affect our stay.

Title: Location, location, location
ReviewText: Hotel was in the heart of all tourist locations. It was a quiet hotel with only 6 rooms on each floor yet over 20 floors. Staff was great, and 24 hour deli next door.

ReviewText: Friendly hotel centrally located

ReviewText: Ich fand das Hotel für 4 Sterne nicht im oberen Bereich. Es war normal

Located across from the magnificent public library and Bryant Park, blocks from Grand Central and the shopping of 5th Ave and Madison. Public transportation is very convenient to all parts of the city. I'm planning to stay there again.

Title: NY City
ReviewText: Hotel was very good for the one night stay. Small room and over all felt cramped. Staff was great as usual; very personable and helpful.

Title: Courtyar NY Manhattan 5th Ave
ReviewText: I love NYC! Thank you for being so courteous! I am looking forward to the newly renovated space next door where Salmon River used to be.

Title: Walk to everything
ReviewText: Staying at the Courtyard Manhatten/Fifth ave for business but I also wanted to take in some of the sites after work. The proximity of the hotel to most of the major sites that I wanted to see was fabulous. New York Library, Grand Central Station, Chrysler Building, Times Square, Central Park, Rockerfeller Centre, Radio City - all within easy walking distance. The staff are friendly and courteous, the hotel is very clean and the beds are beyond comfy!. The market beside the hotel has everything you need and is open 24/7 - the guys behind the grill at the market make a great burger and the Munster BLT is to die for!!

Title: Great location and views
ReviewText: I have stayed at Marriot's all over NYC, this is one of the best locations for getting to Central Park, Broadway shows and the subway (went to Yankees game), never needed a taxi.

Title: evaluacion personal cllini
ReviewText: Muy bien en general, calidad y servicio combinados a pleno

Title: Exploring NYC
ReviewText: A great location for all the sights with a clean comfortable bed to tumble into at the end of a long day. the Starbucks coffee was appreciated. Whilst compact, the reception area served our needs very well. The concierge team were exceptionally helpful with luggage, advice on travel and restuarant recommendations. A great stay.

Title: Review
ReviewText: We enjoyed our stay but wish there had been a breakfast and the rooms were very small compared to other hotels in New York.

Title: Easy and convenient
ReviewText: Staff is always alert and courteous. I have often been accommodated when arriving early. No trouble catching a cab there. Rooms typically not large but always clean and neat. No actual restaurant but a well stocked marketplace next door.

Title: Family holiday
ReviewText: Great customer service, clean rooms, close to public transport. Friendly staff.

Title: In the heart of it all
ReviewText: Perfect place for a restful stay in NYC. Food takeout open 24 hrs right next door, park and subway close by. Very friendly staff.

Title: NYC trip
ReviewText: A very nice clean room with an excellent location in Manhatten

ReviewText: Loved staying at this hotel, the location was perfect for what we wanted to do.

DINING.....UNDER CONSTRUCTION AND NO PLACE ON SURVEY FOR N/A!
