ReviewText:
ニューヨークの中心街で、グラセンまで徒歩で５分。何処に行くにも便利で、価値のあるロケーションだ！
ホテルの内装は、改装されて清潔感が増した。
クーラーの温度調整ができなかったのは残念だったが、２階にあるコーヒーサービスは重宝した。一日歩き回って帰ってきたときに安堵を与えてくれた！

Title: Great location in NYC!

Title: Great NYC Hotel
ReviewText: We made this reservation only 2 days in advance for a Saturday overnight and we couldn't have been more pleased with this choice. The hotel was very conveniently located, valet parking was easy for drop-off and pick up, the room was very clean and quiet for 3 of us. The rate was very reasonable, even for a last minute find. Will definitely stay here again.

Title: 纽约旅行
ReviewText: 这个酒店位置极佳，房间宽敞，服务周到，性价比极高，是我在纽约住过最好的酒店，唯一的缺陷是没有早餐提供。

Title: My Review
ReviewText: I would really like if there was a restaurant or deli on sight. The recommended deli was not very appealing to me.

Title: JW would be embarrassed to stay here
ReviewText: The amount of points it cost to stay at the hotel did not correlate to my Marriott experience. I have been in many Marriott hotels and this was a disappointment. I had to be in New York City for an overnight business meeting and chose to go to the Courtyard Marriot Hotel near Bryant Park. My room was very small. The bathroom wasn't what I expected from the Courtyard Brand. The lobby was really just the elevator and reception area. The towel rack was located in the shower which I thought was ridiculous. For a room with double beds, there was only one chair to sit on?! I felt like I was at a cheap motel. This was not a category 8 Marriot experience. For the amount of points it cost I was expecting a Marriott experience as I have had in the past. I have to honestly say this was a big letdown.

Title: Satisfied stays
ReviewText: please add breakfast , check the edges of the desks, some are pretty sharp that can cut people's hands.

Title: Great location. Very clean and comfortable room!
ReviewText: Excellent location by Bryant Park, with an abundance of all types of restaurants in every direction. Very short walk to various Metro Train lines. Very small lobby, but very clean and comfortable room.

Title: Review
ReviewText: Billed credit card instead of rewards points

Title: Not worth it
ReviewText: Only thing going for this hotel is the midtown location.

Title: Over priced Courtyard
ReviewText: Old and tired properties with sparse rooms and no amenities

Title: Small and overpriced with no restaurant
ReviewText: This hotel looks like Marriott purchased a couple of hundred square feet around the elevator shaft, for multiple floors, and then built rooms around it. The location is great but there is no restaurant, meaning that you have to have an unhealthy breakfast from the deli next door (unless you have time to go somewhere else)

Title: Great Stay!
ReviewText: Great Value, great staff and perfect location.

Title: Definitely Reccomend
ReviewText: Everything was great. Price was manageable for relatively low budget too. Staff were super friendly and helpful.

Title: Dirty and No Food Available
ReviewText: This hotel has no food service available. Zero. It does not deserve to be branded as a Courtyard.

Title: New yorl
ReviewText: Great location, nice staff, overall great experience.

Title: GENERAL COMMENT
ReviewText: On my reservation I had a footnote that it was our anniversary stay---yet nothing further was done about this --and I couldn't get an upgrade because it wasn't ready although early check in was on resv. I am a Silver Elite member

Title: Nice for an NYC Hotel
ReviewText: The room was a decent size for downtown NY. Mostly clean with some dirt and rust issues in the bathroom only. Staff was average. The rest of the hotel was nice-a tad outdated but not bad. We were not told of coffee or internet service in the lobby until we asked so we missed out the first day. Beds were great and hardly any noise so we slept great! Close enough to the theater district.

Title: Great Hotel Conveniently Located
ReviewText: The hotel is very conveniently located and the staff were exceptionally friendly. The bed was one of the most comfortable I've ever slept in at a hotel. The wifi worked well and when I did have trouble connecting, there was a help desk that sorted everything out. I loved the Paul Mitchell hair products supplied in the bathroom and the coffee maker in the room. The air conditioner was also very efficient and one of the best I've experienced in a NY hotel. There is no food or drink available at the hotel and the 24-hour coffee room was a little small and disappointing. However, there is deli right next door which was convenient and the food was good.

Title: Happy
ReviewText: Excellent : only the automatic bedroom window shades went up and down on their own : distracting

Title: small hotel
ReviewText: Wonderful staff! The hotel itself is small and doesn't have a lobby or restaurants in site.

Title: Na
ReviewText: No problems and great view

Title: Great Location
ReviewText: This hotel was clean and close to Times Square. The staff were great and very friendly! If you are looking for somewhere that is close to Times Square and at the same time, gives you a peaceful place for a good night's sleep, then you should consider staying here.

Title: H teview
ReviewText:
Late check out should be taken into account for members with marriott rewards card
Also having a breakfast at the hotel as a buffet would make a difference

Title: Disappointing Marriott Courtyard
ReviewText: Would not stay here again even though it was a good lication

Title: Review
ReviewText: Very convenient location. Clean room, friendly staff

Title: Excellent Stay
ReviewText:
The stay was great, Hotel staff was excellent and the concierge service was the best.

Only complaint was there was no quick breakfast offered at the hotel, so we had to find a restaurant/grill each morning which cut into our sightweeing time a bit.

Title: minimal hotel with poor renovations
ReviewText: for a supposedly newly renovated hotel the following fell way short of our expectations having stayed in many Marriott courtyards. The bed was miserable the room was tiny, the bathtub was peeling, the iron was rusting and smelled burnt when you used it and the ironing board had no pad on it you were ironing on metal. the hotel offers no amenities at all and no common space to great guests or business associates it barely has a hall way of a Lobby. I have stayed in other Courtyards in New York and the experience was much better. If you just want a bed and a toilet this is fine but anything else forget it and the staff is rather indifferent to its guests.

Title: limited amenities
ReviewText: Parking was very expensive per 24 hour with no option to take your vehicle out within those times. Otherwise you need to pay additional fee.

Title: New York, New York!!!
ReviewText: We had a wonderful stay in New York at the Courtyard Marriott on 5th Ave. The room was very spacious and clean with comfy beds. The bathroom was large, big enough for all 3 of us to use it at the same time! The bath products were a bit scarce for all 3 of us though, especially the shampoo. We ended up having to buy some. It's located 10 mins from Times Square and around the corner from The New York Public Library and Bryant Park. Plenty of places to eat in the immediate vicinity. The staff were always on hand to answer any questions and were helpful and very friendly. I would recommend this hotel to anyone who wants to have a wonderful stay in NYC at a hotel near to Times Square and most of the sights but who doesn't want to pay the extortionate prices of some of the other hotels. Great value for money.

Title: clean and convenient
ReviewText: Great location. Small rooms bot very clean. Staff is friendly.

Title: Convenient Mid-town Stay
ReviewText:
The Courtyard by Marriott is a smallish property just east of 5th Avenue, offering a clean room, really comfortable beds, and friendly, helpful staff.

All the shopping one could want is just around the corner, and the theatre district just beyond. Worth taking in are the Library Lions who invite all to read everywhere.

The staff are all very willing to answer questions, and provide help when needed.

Title: Convenient, great location, very good service.

Title: NY
ReviewText: Great little hotel to stay for leisure. The location is perfect if you are out exploring NY!

ReviewText: nice location and an assume staff for your family to interact with.

Title: Farmborough Weekend
ReviewText: The Courtyard Marriot 5th Ave. is a Great location for a trip to the City. Bryant Park across the street, Grand Central Station a couple of blocks away, the world is your oyster.

Title: Location Convenient
ReviewText:
Close to fifth avenue and not too busy a side street this hotel is fine for a short stay in NYC.
Being in New York- I wanted to spend as little time in the room as possible.
I did enjoy the complimentary Starbucks coffee machine on the second level.
I would have hoped for a slightly more comfortable bed though.

Title: Just alright

ReviewText:
Great people receive you in the lobby.
Perfect location for anything you want to do.
Views are not amazing but when you get back to your room and lay on that bed you feel at home, relaxed, and ready to sleep after a long day.

Title: 5th AVE Marriott

Title: Marriott Review
ReviewText: We enjoyed our stay at the Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue last weekend.

Title: Perfect location-clean and comfortable
ReviewText: Great hotel. Updated and modern. Few Starbucks 24 hours in the lobby. Clean and comfortable rooms. Very bright. Bed and pillows were awesome. Slept like a baby. Great blackout blinds. Wifi was strong and fast. Location was amazing. Only a couple blocks from Grand Central. Walk to Times Square. Get to anywhere in the city with ease on subway. Overall a great weekend of baseball and relaxation. I will definitely stay here again.

Title: In the heart of Manhatten
ReviewText:
I recently stayed with my partner to celebrate my birthday in New York. The hotel is excellent as it is right off of 5th Avenue and close to Times Square, transportation, shopping and of course, restaurants.
I highly recommend this hotel.

Title: Very nice stay

Title: business +shopping

Title: Good value and location

ReviewText: On business trip, this is a good central location in MidTown.

ReviewText: Had business in Midtown, picked this hotel and was treated right.

Title: 40th & 5th
ReviewText: Excellent service in the ❤️ of NYC

Title: NYC Visit 5/27-31/2015
ReviewText: Clean, though well appointed rooms. Friendly helpful staff. Convenient location for me, close to Grand Central Station.

Title: courtyard
ReviewText: Great location but to small and expensive

Title: Great location, great staff - loved the suite setup
ReviewText: Can't say enough about the staff at this hotel - very helpful and kind. The suite setup was nice with our family, and the king bed was very comfortable. Room lacked a refrigerator, but the staff delivered one instantly on request. Only downside was the quality of the mattress in the pullout - should be replaced. No restaurant, so no breakfast. Coffee bar in the lobby was very good, but only one machine, so had to wait.

Title: Holiday in the Big Apple
ReviewText: Our family has enjoyed Memorial Day in New York for the past several years. It is a wonderful time of the season and a great get-a-way for our family. The courtyard has always been our choice of hotels due to the quality, location and the right mix of amenities for us . . . the Manhattan / Fifth Avenue Courtyard did not let us down! The staff was wonderful and have yet to see so many smiling faces EVERY time we cam and went from the lobby. The staff made us feel like honored guest and not customers, such a bonus! Thank you for being part of our happy memory!

Title: Marriott 5th Ave.
ReviewText: This hotel is ideally located not being too far from Time Square or Bryant Park. Lots of great restaurants in the area! The staff I felt was exceptional just been overall very helpful, welcoming and pleasant! This hotel is ideally located not being too far from Time Square or Bryant Park. Lots of great restaurants in the area! The staff I felt was exceptional just been overall very helpful. The room was perfect and just as we requested. The staff was able to accommodate any special requests we asked for and also gave great directions for where we wanted to go. Defintely a great experience !

Title: Great Location
ReviewText: This is a clean, crisp, convenient hotel, minutes from Grand Central, and a short walk to the theatre district.

Title: Clean and Staff Courteous!
ReviewText: Staff helpful and courteous. The linen and pillow cases were extremely clean. Pillows and Mattresses firm. For downtown Manhattan, next to Bryant park, this hotel is a bargain.

Title: Excellent NYC Location, Up to Date Hotel and Rooms
ReviewText: I loved the NYC location and the cleaniness of the room. Next to Bryant Park and close to Grace Building.

Title: My time in NYC.
ReviewText: The staff were very attentive to my requests, particularly Willie, Sophia, and Frank.

Title: Hotel NY
ReviewText: Comfortable hotel but pricey for a Courtyard

Title: Good Location to sites
ReviewText: Easy access to many sites

Title: Great value
ReviewText: Great value, clean room, great location in NYC.

Title: restful stay on short notice in a superb location
ReviewText: A few yards off Firth Avenue near the NY Public Library and Bryant Park, this hotel provided a quick one night rest during a business trip. The bed was comfortable, the room was clean, and checkin service was very efficient.

Title: Courtyard 5th ave.
ReviewText: Clean and comfortable and staffed with efficient and friendly personnel.

Title: Excellent Location and Stay
ReviewText: Great area of town, Great hotel

Title: Business
ReviewText: My stay was good overall. The room was clean and up to date. Enjoyed my stay and would love to see more of New York City.

Title: Great hotel in a great location
ReviewText: The hotel was excellent in all respects. The reception staff and other staff were very friendly and helpful. The only problem was the internet connectivity which frequently dropped out in the afternoons and at night time plus you have to login again every day. Despite that we managed to complete most internet business.

Title: Great stay!
ReviewText: Can't wait to go back. Great staff! Super location!

Title: excellent
ReviewText: very pleased, close to times square, bryant park and good food

Title: Convienent Location
ReviewText: A good location. Room was clean and size was good for New York City. Automatic shades were nice and room had a nice size feel with the King Size bed. The room was on the 6th floor and the street was a little loud. Nothing bad, but a little louder than other parts of the Murray Hill section of town.

Title: Good hotel at convenient location
ReviewText: The hotel is clean and tidy and is located in a very convenient location when visiting Manhattan

Title: Everything you would expect, but dangerously hot tap water in bathroom.
ReviewText: I'm not a parent, but if I was and my child had been in this hotel, I would have freaked out over how dangerously hot the water in the bathroom tap was. Even turned almost entirely to cold, it would put out hot water. I burned myself twice (when I first used it, and when I was groggy in the morning). I've never encountered such hot water from a tap.

Title: Good quality hotel
ReviewText:
I signed up for a promotion on the website Marriott.com for this Courtyard location and I could not get the assistance to get that promo filled unfortunately.

I like to stay at Courtyards and Residence Inn's during my stays in NY for work primarily because of the breakfast that I get in the mornings. While staying at this Courtyard, there was only a coffee bar no breakfast. I believe that they were doing reconstruction or remodeling on the location that they normally serve breakfast but if I would have known that ahead of time, I would have likely found another Marriott location.

Title: Great Room & Location
ReviewText: Room comfortable for 3. Great location. Staff very helpful.

Title: Great location, average hotel
ReviewText:
An incredibly convenient location, but below average hotel for a Marriott. Staff was fine but not what I consider welcoming or helpful. Rooms and bathrooms are small (but it is NYC), and I found the air conditioner/heater to be faulty. I was also disappointed that there was no dining option within the hotel, as they were searching for a new vendor.

Overall, I'd only recommend this hotel for someone on business- and it still wouldn't be my first choice in the area.

Title: Nice but no kitchen!
ReviewText: The guest room was very clean and nice but I found out too late that it has no kitchen like the Residence Inn (should have booked there instead). But overall, the Courtyard is nice.

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Love to be in the hotel, it is clean and employees are friendly and kind

Title: Comfortable and Convenient
ReviewText:
I stayed 4 nights at the hotel and it was very conveniently located at a short walk past beautiful Bryant Park to Times Square.
Although the hotel does not offer any food service other than coffee, there is an excellent market store next door that has everything you could need.
Staff were very helpful in recommendations of the area.
Room was small but comfortable and bed was great!
Being on the east side incurs additional expense when traveling by taxi from the airport.

Title: Excellent experience at Marriott - NYC-Manhattan\Fifth Ave
ReviewText: Friendly staff, extremely helpful with directions and knowledge of local shopping\restaurant locations and also helpful with arranging transportation to airport. The room was very nice, updated, clean, quiet and larger than many I've seen in NYC. Great location, very centralized in Manhattan.

Title: Courtyard NY Manhattan/Fifth Ave Ratings
ReviewText: We would have preferred to have breakfast options in the hotel, instead of having to go to the deli next door, but got used to that the second day of our stay.

Title: Our New York sojourn
ReviewText: Perfect in all respects.wud be back soon to stay at this hotel wry soon.

Title: convenient
ReviewText:
I choose this hotel because it was convenient to the seminar location in New York plus I am an Elite member. This hotel stay as mediocre. It was a good hotel room. But there were things wrong....
1) construction ran until 2am and started again at 6am! I had to get up early'
2) shower water took too long to get hot!
3) heater/air made crazy noise
4) overall unfriendly staff

I would stay here again ONLY because of convenience

Title: Good Place
ReviewText: The hotel is ideally located. The rooms are small but comfortable. Plenty of hangers in your room. Tv good but could have used a TV directory.

Title: EXCELNTE
ReviewText: Excelente Hotel y atenciones. Buena ubicación .

Title: Nusblatt. Wedding
ReviewText: Didn't enjoy my stay. Tiny room Noisy vac unit A match box of a room three steps from elevator

Title: NYC St. Pat's Day 2015
ReviewText: What made my stay memorable was the service that I received from Frank, the doorman. He assisted me airport shuttle service, local dining suggestions and parade information.

Title: Fantastic stay in the Big Apple
ReviewText: Overall, we had an excellent experience.

Title: Thank you!
ReviewText: Thank you to the entire Courtyard Marriott team. Special thanks to Eddie and Annakein for going above and beyond. Thank you!

Title: small but great location
ReviewText: This is the place to be, midtown Manhattan ! It may have small rooms but the price is OK and the location cannot be beat. You can walk to most any fun place including Times square.

Title: Location, location
ReviewText:
Location of hotel is excellent.
Not the same type of others Courtyard hotels I have been in the USA.

Title: Frío
ReviewText: En términos generales, las instalaciones de los hoteles son buenas, pero tienen un problema que es bastante frecuente en los hoteles de Estados Unidos y es que no le dan importancia al huésped latino y creo que hoy ocupa un porcentaje bastante alto de la población. No hay personas que puedan hablar en Español, lo mismo nos pasó en Indianápolis de dónde veníamos y en Chicago por eso cambiamos de hotel, creo que vale la pena revisar este tema.

Title: Hope you like Deli food
ReviewText: With the Bar and resturant closed, staff should have been ready for the obvious question were can I get a bite to eat and a drink, beyond the deli

Title: A great central Hotel with friendly staff, comfortable rooms
ReviewText: Enjoyed our stay, staff was friendly and helpful. Location was central to access all of NY via subway and walking.

Title: Will stay again
ReviewText: Great location, great staff, love the Starbucks coffee always available.

Title: Perfect location and service for NYC visit
ReviewText:
The Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue is located within walking distance of Times Square and Fifth Avenue shopping without the noise and bustle of actually staying in the middle of Times Square as we have before. The staff is friendly and helpful and gave us excellent recommendations for touring, food, subways and entertainment.
The rooms were clean and the beds were comfortable with firm mattresses that kept our backs and feet recovering after miles of walking. I would recommend this hotel to everyone I know. By the way, the first thing I did before booking the hotel was to get on the bed bug registry. This hotel has never had an incident which is a huge accomplishment in NYC where bed bugs are a real problem.

Title: So so
ReviewText: Generally the hotel is in a good location for shopping, but with no breakfast supply, it is not a convenient place for business trip.

Title: NYC Trip 2-2015
ReviewText: I will be coming back for an annual business and plan on staying here since the location and amenities worked very will for me. My next trip will require a floor much higher to reduce some street noise present.

Title: C by M 5th Ave.
ReviewText: Great Hotel, Friendly staff, good location!

Title: Great Stay at Courtyard in NYC
ReviewText: Superior staff at this location!!!!

Title: NY - Mid-town stay
ReviewText: Great location and price.

Title: Convenient Hotel
ReviewText: I highly recommend this hotel if you're in town for a quick visit, however would not recommend for more than 2 nights to stay. Very close to Times Square and theater district. It was very cold in our room and the temperature maxes out at 78 degrees, however it doesn't feel warm enough. Rooms are very comfortable, but lack room - although, it's New York - a decent amount of space is needed to move around the room. The bathroom was decent, however not cleaned. The beds were comfy. There is no on-site store for necessities for travelers (toothbrush, toothpaste, etc.), however there are plenty of convenient stores nearby. Overall, a good place to stay for about 2 nights, but I would recommend Marriot Marquis for extended stays.

Title: Good location that is all
ReviewText: The court yard hotel do not give any of the vantages that other marriott hotel give to the gold members...

Title: NYC
ReviewText: Excellent location. Good rooms. Excellent staff

Title: Courtyard Fifth Avenue
ReviewText: Courtyard Fifth Avenue is conveniently located hotel for walking access to Grand Central and the theater district. Hotel is excellent choice for an overnight or weekend stay.

Title: Great for price and location
ReviewText: Very nice room except the rheostat was uncooperative. Otherwise our room was quiet, simple but tasteful, with lights by bed. Fast elevator, efficient check-in. It's good for walk to subway (Grand Central), other midtown attractions. Cabs are cheap from here to most of Manhattan.

Title: courtyard by marriott
ReviewText: excellent location for exploring new york. we had top floor room with superb views of the city.

Title: location great......but
ReviewText:
Cold at night as heating pumps in cold air
Need more staff in lobby or better trained to help George and Pedro

Title: Disappointed
ReviewText: Very poor service in reservation aspect, room was to small and had no view, beds were not comfortable, had no help from front desk when I requested a room relocation.

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Good place to stay, where close to all fun loving, sight seeing places in NY.

Title: Perfect
ReviewText: Would book here again.location great

Title: great location
ReviewText: Great location, a little away from the crazy hustle and bustle of Times Square. Rooms are very clean and comfortable, a little small. Would recommend for a short stay.

Title: Unbeatable location for a great price
ReviewText: This property is off 5th avenue across from the library and Bryant park. Wonderful location

Title: Great hotel!
ReviewText: Convenient location and great staff. Can't be beat! Worth the money and great for families.

Title: Perfect location of a clean friendly hotel
ReviewText: Fab location right on 5th oposite the library. Good size room which were cleaned daily. Would definately recommend.

Title: 5 night city break
ReviewText: Hotel was very nice and in a great location. Walking distance to all main attractions and perfect for shopping too. Room was very comfortable and clean. Room for improvement regarding customer service with some staff members but we didn't let that bother us.

Title: Great for a quick get away
ReviewText: Staff was very friendly, rooms were clean and nice. Overall it was a great experience

Title: STAFF
ReviewText: Staff is not friendly whatsoever. It's a great location, but there are other hotels in the same vicinity. Also, there wasn't a fridge in our room which would have been a great help.

Title: Our favorite in NYC
ReviewText: great location, close to Grand Central, Rockefeller Center, both mid town and lower Manhattan, shopping..

Title: Convenient, pleasant hotel
ReviewText: Great location, efficient service, clean, practical and pleasant rooms. Beds great. This hotel is a good example of Marriott Courtyard quality. The rooms are older, but kept up well.

Title: Clean, Comfortable and great location
ReviewText: Courteous and welcoming staff ensured great checkin/out then a super clean room with warm comfortable bed. Great location to Grand Central and Times Sq/34th st etc made the stay efficient. Recommended.

Title: Great stay in NYC
ReviewText: Even though there was no restaurant the Starbucks coffee machine was outstanding. Ground the beans right in front of you. Lots of restaurants nearby and a 24 hour deli next door.

Title: Excellent location
ReviewText: Flew in from Ireland and had two rooms booked for two nights, checked out on Thanksgiving day 2014. Room was small but perfect. Check in was perfect and so was check out. Valet parking was excellent, even though the street was blocked for utility work during our stay. All an all, I would totall reccommend.

Title: Christmas Show
ReviewText: Great staff, disappointed no food in hotel. Would stay again

Title: Not a "Courtyard"
ReviewText: This "Courtyard" is absent a common area to sit or visit. No food service at all. On Mezzanine level, small desk with two computers and an adjacent coffee machine.

Title: Great mid town location.
ReviewText: Nice hotel in the heart of midtown

Title: A comfortable stay
ReviewText: After spending 5 days at this hotel, i would definitely return again. The rooms are comfortable. I had a room with 2 double beds and it was very nice. Free starbucks available 24 hrs. No restaurant or room service but their is a 24hr deli next door which more than meets your needs. Perfectly placed hotel for the tourist that wants to see it all

Title: Great location!
ReviewText: Most shopping and attractions were within a 10-15 min walking distance. So convenient.

Title: Great value & location
ReviewText: I was in NYC for business & my wife went for pleasure. She loved the central location in mid-town Manhattan close to Bryant Park, Times Square & Grand Central Station

Title: Sketchy bellman service
ReviewText: Clean and comfortable hotel. Fitness center was lacking decent TV functionality on machines. Bellman called a "car" service for me and a conversion van showed up 20 minutes late then the driver disputed the rate I was quoted by the bellman once we reached my destination. Made me feel like I was being taken advantage of (and I spend nearly 200 nights a year in hotels - this one made me feel under appreciated)

Title: Location Location Location
ReviewText: The Courtyard NY Manhattan/Fifth is in an excellent location for entertainment and traveling around the city for business. I highly recommend this location for business or pleasure.

Title: Great convenient ocation
ReviewText: This hotel was in a great location close to 5th avenue and Macy's. Rooms were decent size, clean and everyone was friendly.

Title: Perfect stay!
ReviewText: The hotel is in a great location, yet my room was a quiet oasis from outside noise. Staff was welcoming & friendly throughout my stay. Room was clean & comfortable; once again, Marriott bedding did not disappoint! The in-room safe and coffee were most appreciated. I wouldn't hesitate to choose this location again.

Title: average
ReviewText: average - location ok for meeting -

Title: November 2014
ReviewText:
Although room was a decent size and very clean, and the location was excellent, the price for the room was far too high.
We met friends who were visiting from DC and chose this particular Courtyard for its location.

Title: November Christmas Spectacular
ReviewText: Great time spent in NYC, the hotel was central to everything we planned on doing. The staff treated us like we were the only ones staying at the hotel. The next time we travel to NYC you can be sure we will consider the Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Ave for our stay.

Title: Courtyard 5th Avenue
ReviewText: Convenient location. Clean, spacious room and an extremely courteous and efficient staff.

Title: Very Nice Hotel in the Heart of Manhattan
ReviewText: This hotel is located in a very convenient section of Midtown Manhattan. The guest rooms are on the smaller size, but are very clean and comfortable. The staff is very courteous and helpful as well.

Title: Items not retruned after being left in hotel room
ReviewText: If you leave anything in your room in this hotel, good luck getting anyone to return your call or help locating it. Repeated calls not returned, front desk unwilling to help and a 'no-care' attitude is what you get. After staying at Marriott for 20+ years, this will end the relationship.

Title: David's review
ReviewText: Overall great stay just got backed up at the front

Title: Weekend in October
ReviewText: After being a customer for a number of years, I found out that this Hotel lacks the "warmth" I usually appreciate in Marriott and Courtyard hotels. This particular Hotel is located in an extremely noisy street (40 East) with a lot of constructions, enormous trucks passing by and unloading day and night, garbage trucks until midnight, scaffolds in the street all over and debris (white stuff, sheet-rock like) in the lobby and elevator. Perhaps is it only the "normal" New York on display.

Title: Bus Trip
ReviewText: Overall very good hotel, like the location and next to a pretty good deli. No onsite food but lots in walking distance.

Title: Chain that thinks like a boutique.
ReviewText: Staff at this small Courtyard are the friendliest and most helpful that you'll ever find. We have stayed at this property five times and will return.

Title: NY fun trip
ReviewText: Barely adequate, the room was too small for us and our 10 year old daughter along with our bags, shopping, etc. the furniture was very old and banged up, the staff were al great and it isin a good location but as someone who business travLes every week, this place is low grade for the room experience overall. If you don't mind paying a little more try something different, until they upgrade this place.

Title: New to New York
ReviewText: The hotel was under construction when we were visiting which made our hotel experience different. The rooms were clean and updated, the staff was helpful, the location was easy. They did not have a lounge, a place to sit outside the guest rooms or a bar to get a drink or a bite to eat. The rooms are very small and the bathrooms have shower curtains. Other than those few details, we were happy with our experience.

Title: Great location but Horrible Amenities
ReviewText: It was in a great location but the amenities were lacking. It was under construction, so it's hard to judge it fairly. There was no place to sit and congregate with other guests. The rooms are tiny but that is Manhattan!

Title: A near midtown location at a good price
ReviewText: Find yourself 10 minutes walk from midtown, from Penn Station and not far from great downtown destinations. Stroll and shop Fifth and Madison Avenues. Surrounded by good eating including a market next door with great drinks and snacks.

Title: Nice Place
ReviewText:
This is a nice place to stay. I have been there many times. The staff is very good. the hotel is close to Times Square without being in the midst of thr craziness there. It is lso close to shopping with Lord and Taylor vrey close and Macy's about a half mile away, an easy walk.
There are plenty of places to eat in the area.

Title: Small and Good
ReviewText: the hotel is very comfortable,quiet and clean.

Title: Courtyard Marriott - 10/3/14
ReviewText: Staff was friendly and helpful. Allowed an early check in. Room was a little small, but very clean. Great location.

Title: Very small, very expensive
ReviewText: This place is a "Motel 8", but with Marquis prices! But in Manhattan, I guess its what you get.

Title: Great Location
ReviewText: This hotel is in the heart of the City. It was easy to navigate all of New York from here.

Title: Guest Review
ReviewText: Very accommodating and accessible.

Title: Great location, accommodating staff and nice hotel
ReviewText: We stayed here for our wedding and the hotel staff was very accommodating and friendly. The Marriott provided a great price for our block of rooms for our wedding guests. The location is perfect with lots of places to eat, shop and site see nearby. I highly recommend Courtyard NY 5th ave and would stay here again.

Title: New York holiday
ReviewText: A great place to stay for a sightseeing trip with friends. Excellent location, friendly and helpful staff. Good amenities very good value.

Title: Short stay in New York
ReviewText:
Hotel was an excellent choice. Fabulous location for our short stay. Virtually on 5th Avenue.
Would be very happy to stay here again, and recommend to family and friends. Hotel restaurant closed for refurbishment, so cannot comment. Alternative food outlets nearby.

Title: NYC Girls weekend
ReviewText: We had a great weekend in NYC. After an extensive search for hotels that were affordable and conveniently located I chose the Courtyard New York Marriott near Fifth Avenue. I'm very happy with our choice. Our room was ready at check-in. The staff were helpful. The lobby and rooms were very clean. The beds and pillows were extremely comfortable. I loved that we could walk everywhere, it was close to shopping and that the subways were just a few blocks away.

Title: Great Location!
ReviewText: Easy walking distance to many attractions and subway! Courteous staff and clean rooms!

Title: New York Experience
ReviewText: The staff at the hotel were very good but the overall experience was not great. No restaurant facilities, the hotel was also under construction but the location was very good

Title: Great location
ReviewText: A perfect location in manhattan; we walked everywhere

Title: Staying at the Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth
ReviewText: Excellent hotel overall and terrific location!

Title: Zengardner9
ReviewText: Good service, good location, good and clean, hot coffee 24/7, Stayed in this location many years ago when it was owned by another company, Marriott is much better.

Title: B'day Weekend at NY
ReviewText: Centrally located, walking distance from trains, Broadway, many attractions, shops, and restaurants. The staff was very attentive, courteous, and quick in providing service. Rooms were clean, small but comfortable.

Title: Great Location
ReviewText: A great location-close to Bryant park, the empire state building and grand central station. Just around the corner they have a few places that offer a variety of food.

Title: Dave
ReviewText: Great location but limited service. Great for business

Title: One Night Stay
ReviewText: The hotel was extremely convenient, check in was easy the staff was helpful, but the hallways and room were dated. The room was very small, you had to walk sideways to get passed the dresser

Title: Exceptional Value for Manhattan
ReviewText: Excellent room:clean, quiet, large with fast wi-fi.

Title: Hidden jewel
ReviewText: We recently visited NYC for a very short one night stay. Having frequented NYC and often utilizing the larger Marriott Hotels, we needed something quick, convenient and cheap. We found a great rate the night before our visit on the Marriott website. The Courtyard New York Manhattan was easy to get to traveling by car and offered valet parking for a fee. We arrived late night and the staff was very kind and helpful. The parking attendants took care of my car knowing I would need again in the early morning. Our room was recently renovated, clean and stylish. We didn't have much of a view (an old building being renovated, but we weren't there to sightsee.) The lobby was small, but they had some flyers and such and were helpful in directing other tourist as to where to visit even though we didn't utilize that service. They offered us complimentary coffee and tea when we arrived, but we didn't take them up in. Still a nice touch. We were in close walking distance to Times Square and in the morning found Starbucks nearby for a quick coffee. The staff had my car ready when it was needed and even helped me to pull out of a tight space! It was prefect for our quick trip and I would certainly visit again when I take my young boys to sightsee. I liked that it was just a little away from the more touristy areas and that it was a small hotel. I prefer the 3rd floor to the 33rd anyway! It was a great find and I look forward to returning.

Title: Courtyard at Fifth Avenue
ReviewText:
Elegant, Comfortable, Clean....these are the qualities that I value most in a hotel. I found all these qualities at the courtyard Marriott at Fifth avenue. To add to that, courteous staffing is the cherry on top. I found this also to be the case at this hotel.
Thanks to the staff and management for running an excellent business and impacting my visit in such a positive way!

Title: 1st Manhattan Trip
ReviewText: Nice hotel. Great location. Excellent staff. Will stay again next time.

Title: Small rooms, but nice hotel
ReviewText: Compared to other Courtyard properties, this hotel has small rooms. This should be no surprise for any hotel in Manhatten. The rooms were nice and comfortable. The stay was un-eventful, which is good.

Title: Good
ReviewText:
It's a good hotel. It's on Fifth Avenue pretty close to Times Square but rooms are very small (just the size of the bed and little more).
I stayed with member points and breakfast wasn't even included.

Title: Great time in NYC!
ReviewText: had an amazing time. Will definitely stay there again

Title: Courtyard New York Manhattan/Fifth Avenue
ReviewText: Very convenient location a block from Bryant Park. Easy access to subways, Times Square, Radio City, 5th Avenue Shopping.

Title: NY Visit
ReviewText: The Courtyard is a nice place to stay. The staff was welcoming and always helpful. The rooms were comfortable, new, fresh, and functional. The location of this hotel is perfect for visitors - near many attractions as well as Grand Central Station. The hotel was recommended by a family member, and I was pleased with the choice.

Title: Small, but sufficent and a good location
ReviewText: Convenient place to stay for theater trips and the general Manhattan area at a reasonable price.

Title: It was ok
ReviewText: Only good if not needing slipper sofa , refridge or microwave.

Title: Extremely satisfied guest
ReviewText:
We stayed at this hotel in the past and chose it again based on prior positive experience.
We planned on staying about a week and reached out to the hotel to require a quiet room. The hotel staff was extremely accommodating before and during our stay. Before arriving we had some questions and addressed the General Manager who answered in detail displaying ‘first class Marriott customer service’. This hotel is perfect situated in Midtown, best value for the money,spotless rooms and great customer service. Highly recommended.

Title: NY Courtyard
ReviewText: I realize that this is one Marriott's smaller Courtyard hotels. Good location and easy to get around the city from here. The hotels does not offer any food services and I was not told about this prior to arriving. Very difficult to get food during any inclement weather such as during the rain storms that hit the area during my stay. THe hotel should consider enlarging the workout facility. Too small and lacking equipment, most travelers take advantage of these amenities. I worked out when three other guests were in the room and we kept bumping into each other.OC

Title: An Enjoyable Stay
ReviewText: Enjoyable, comfortable,conveniently located, pleasant staff

Title: Baseball trip to NYC
ReviewText: Went to NYC to see baseball games. First to Citi Field to see the Mets and then the next day to Yankee Stadium to see the Yanks. Staying at this hotel allowed me to use public transportation to get to both stadiums without any trouble.

Title: Great
ReviewText: We enjoyed our stay, staff was friendly and helpful.

Title: Don't recommend to stay at this hotel
ReviewText: Staff was arogant, service is non existent

Title: Overpriced and small
ReviewText: No food available in hotel, small in general and of course if a missed it, overpriced!

Title: couple's weekend in New York
ReviewText: This hotel was clean and very conviently located near Grand Central Station,

Title: Simple
ReviewText: Well located, not the value for the money but good enough.

Title: NYC Summer Trip
ReviewText: We stayed here in late July and loved everything about this hotel. It is conveniently located on (right off) 5th Avenue across the street from the Main Public Library and Bryant Park. Rooms were very clean, beds comfortable - we had absolutely no issues with this hotel at all. There is a subway stop at Bryant Park so hopping on the subway is a breeze. You're a few blocks south of the Rockefeller Center (we walked) and a few blocks east of Times Square (we walked). This hotel is a great launching place for numerous adventures throughout New York. Highly recommended.

Title: NYC weekend getaway
ReviewText: Great location! Clean and newly renovated.

Title: Excellent visit to NYC
ReviewText:
We stayed at the Marriott Courtyard which is in a great locations - across from the public library, near Grand Central and Bryant Park. We could walk to most places we needed to get to.
The staff at the hotel was incredibly helpful and friendly. They went out of their way to make us feel comfortable and meet our needs.
As always - Marriott bedding and beds are the BEST. We stayed for 5 nights and they were the best sleep we have had on this trip.

Title: Downtown with most of the amenities
ReviewText: This is a nice Marriott - there is some obnoxious NYC construction going on around it and the lobby is a bit pathetic, but the people are great, the location can't be beat (Bryant Park just a few steps away) and the room I stayed in was all the Marriott's usually offer, except for the necessity of a refrigerator. There is no bistro or restaurant in the hotel which is a bit of an inconvenience, but a really exceptional 24 hour Deli is right next door and has the most food I have ever seen in one place except a grocery store. I'd recommend it, but be prepared to pay more than most middle class business people should have to pay for a room - - - but that, as they say, is life in the big apple.

Title: Friendly staff - hotel needs minor tweaks
ReviewText: Very friendly and professional staff - they need to make changes to the oversized furniture in the room, internet connectivity was slow at night, please put some air in the hallways - they are very stuffy

Title: Value for the Money
ReviewText: Good, clean room. Very nice staff.

Title: First New York Visit
ReviewText: Excellent, would go back when I go to New York

Title: Great, quite city location, but...
ReviewText: no in-house restaurant or ammenities. You will need to go out for food, amenities.

Title: Great location near Bryant Park
ReviewText: Great location, friendly staff near Bryant Park and Times Square.

Title: Great Location to Stay
ReviewText: It is a great location to stay. Subway stations, good restaurants, shopping centers, broadway theaters are all walking distance. Room is small but clean and comfortable. No continental breakfast was offered during our stay. Staff members are ok but not great.

Title: Good hotel
ReviewText: Great upkeep good service they upgraded us for free and it was a good lake view room

Title: A memorable stay
ReviewText: The way staff managed my stay is commendable, they were humble, polite and were very much helpful. I enjoyed the stay and hence have booked my another stay next month again

Title: Best Hotel to stay in Hyderabad
ReviewText: A recent stay at Courtyard by Marriott Hyderabad was a thoroughly pleasant and comfortable experience. The hotel strikes a fine balance between business efficiency and relaxed hospitality, making it ideal for both corporate travelers and families.

Title: Pathetic service
ReviewText:
Pathetic 
feed back already refer it

Title: Not expected from Marriott
ReviewText: Not the best experience expected from Marriott. Very unhappy with my recent stay.

Title: Business Stay
ReviewText: It was really good stay and ambience

Title: Worth a family stay
ReviewText: I liked the experience overall just a but disappointed about the pool, I didn’t get to use the pool at all. It was a family visit for a birthday staycation. I’m glad for I could be served by few amazing people there. They gave me good amount of discount on food & drinks. Buffet breakfast was good at the Momo Cafe, however expected an option to include lunch/dinner buffet too on our package. We didn’t go through booking on make my trip or go ibibo though the prices were lesser there comparatively. We didn’t prefer 3rd party since we wanted the hotel hospitality to be shown. I’d like to personally thank Zarida, Yuvraj, Tamasa, Devdeep & Rigved. Hopefully next time we get to enjoy rooftop pool. Food & experience was great at Altitude too.

Title: Excellent stay at Courtyard Marriot, Hyderabad
ReviewText: The stay was excellent. This  is a really good property. Ragved at the reception was excellent. The Breakfast was good and the service is excellent. Thanks Iba and others. They were ready to get you something which was not on the buffet also. Nice rooms and facilities. The lounge which was at Marriot hotel and convention center  was good though slightly small. I will be more than happy to stay here again

Title: Memorable Stay
ReviewText: I had a memorable stay at Courtyard Marriott Hyderabad and team very cordial.I would like to thanks Mr Pankaj Khoyial for his assistance in sending my bag at my Nashik address with utmost care.My stay was pleasant and comfortable

Title: Great hotel with a top notch staff and service staff
ReviewText: Rooms are great. The size makes you feel comfortable. But what really is the high point is the staff. Courteous, helpful, attentive, friendly and efficient

Title: Excellent
ReviewText:
The hotel staff demonstrated exceptional accommodation and consistently exceeded expectations to ensure a positive guest experience. Any concerns raised were addressed promptly and efficiently.

Special recognition is extended to the night and day reception staff for their outstanding service.

Staffs at housekeeping were brilliant and made sure the room was spotless. 

The restaurant team, particularly Chef Rakesh, and other cheff ( can't remember the Name);provided brilliant service.

Title: No discounts nor anything complimentary
ReviewText: I stayed for the second time in a month and planning to stay again but there are no discounts and nothing to upgrade to a better room and also the ac issue was not resolved even after I said them .

Title: Poor environment Non courtesy staff
ReviewText:
Worst hotel
Staff lacks maturity and courtesy 
Worst than Ibis

Title: Comfortable stay at CourtYard by Marriott in Hyderabad
ReviewText: Loved the property, loved the swimming pool, food was nice, chef was good. Located in city-centre. I recommend it

Title: Nice hotel and Nice staff and Nice management
ReviewText: Morning, breakfast is very good and very good staff and very carefully. Thank you for courtyard.

Title: One of the worst stays and hospitality
ReviewText: You can stay here but donot have meals. Food prices are exhorbitant and policies are strange

Title: Excellent stay
ReviewText:
Very good 
Staff response is excellent ..whenever need something timely served which is must for hospitality service sector.

Title: Comfortable & Pleasent stay
ReviewText: The staff are professional & ensure request of guests is taken care on priority.

Title: 5 Star Staff and Service
ReviewText: Best stay in Hyderabad - Staff is polite and service is one of the best

Title: A Stay Marked by Genuine Hospitality
ReviewText: I had an excellent stay at Courtyard by Marriott Hyderabad. The experience was smooth, comfortable, and aligned well with what I expected from the property. The service throughout my visit was consistently attentive, and I especially appreciated the care shown by the team. One of the managers ensured I was well looked after, which added a thoughtful, personal touch to the stay. Overall, the combination of warm hospitality, good service, and a well‑maintained environment made this a visit worth recommending.

Title: Marriot Courtyard Hyderabad: nice place to stay

Title: Amazing Stay
ReviewText:
My stay at both Marriott Convention Hyderabad and Courtyard Hyderabad was truly memorable and pleasant overall.

For the first two days, I stayed at the Marriott Convention, and the experience was exceptional right from the beginning. The check-in process was smooth, efficient, and very welcoming. The breakfast spread was excellent with a great variety of options. I especially want to highlight the live counter—our request for waffles was fulfilled promptly, and they were absolutely delicious.

We also requested hot chocolate, which unfortunately was not up to the usual standard this time. However, during our previous stays, we have always enjoyed it thoroughly.

During my stay, Abhishek Sharma was extremely helpful, especially while assisting with the extension of my booking. His professionalism and willingness to help were truly appreciated. I would also like to specially mention Ravi Pillai, who stood out for his consistent care and attentiveness. He regularly checked on us and ensured that all our needs were taken care of. His presence and proactive approach made a big difference to our stay.

Additionally, the team was kind enough to extend a complimentary late check-out, which was greatly appreciated.

Following this, I stayed for one night at Courtyard Hyderabad. Siraj was very much helpful at the check in I was pleased to see that the room preference I had mentioned during my last visit was remembered and allocated accordingly this level of personalization truly enhances the guest experience.

There were a couple of minor concerns during this stay. The television did not have a working Wi-Fi connection, which was also an issue during my previous visit. Additionally, the flush was not functioning properly the next morning. While these are areas that could be improved, they were small issues in comparison to the overall positive experience.

Despite these minor setbacks, my stay was highly enjoyable and memorable. I truly appreciate the efforts of the entire team in delivering such a warm and comfortable experience.

I would like to thank each and every team member for their dedication and contribution in maintaining such high standards of hospitality. I look forward to returning soon for many more wonderful experiences.

Title: Renovation Challenges and Cleanliness Concerns
ReviewText:
During my recent stay, I found the hotel to be under renovation, which made navigating to my room quite difficult. Fortunately, I was escorted to the room, and at first glance, everything appeared satisfactory.
Since I had an early checkout, I went to bed early. However, upon waking, I experienced cold symptoms that I believe were most likely due to unclean AC ducts. This was disappointing, as proper maintenance and cleanliness are essential for guest health and comfort.
I sincerely recommend that the hotel management prioritize regular cleaning and upkeep, especially of the air conditioning system. This would significantly improve the guest experience and help prevent health issues during their stay.

Title: My renewed Courtyard stay began
ReviewText:
It's good to see you again, Jana, Ruthi, Rehne, Mimi, every MoMo Cafe Stuff at Courtyard is family to me. U.D.'s fairy smile makes me wake up feeling refreshed every morning. Of course, Mr. Rugved's perfect management ensures smooth arrival at the Courtyard from the HYD-Airport. Above all, what always impresses me is the relaxing time in the executive lounge. Attentive service and a smile are Rostine's specialties. The biggest thing was that I was able to reunite with Nagur!! I believe his presence will transform the lounge's atmosphere into an adult space and be essential in providing a high-quality experience.
The bustling OKRA and Bidri are also great places to enjoy a meal guided by the hilarious Bigg Boss. On Halloween, Suchismita invited me to try body painting, which doubled the fun.
After a day of work and golf, my tired body was easily relaxed in the Tattva Spa, along with the fragrant first shot. 90 min or more is definitely recommended there.
I hope to be able to share my impressions from the renovated my room soon.

Title: Fantastic experience.
ReviewText:
I recently stayed at the Courtyard Hotel and had a largely positive experience, thanks to the warm and professional hospitality of the staff at the front desk and in the kitchen.

First, I want to highlight Rugved from the front desk, who truly stood out with his exceptional service, professionalism, and talent. Rugved was not only efficient and polite, but he also went out of his way to make sure our check-in process was seamless and our stay comfortable. His knowledge of the hotel, attention to detail, and proactive approach really made a difference.He was truly outstanding — professional, attentive, and incredibly efficient. What stood out most was his natural talent for hospitality. Rugved handled every interaction with ease, offered insightful recommendations, and ensured that all our needs were proactively addressed. His energy and dedication set a great tone for our stay and reflect the kind of service that makes a real difference. He's definitely someone who raises the standard for hospitality. Lastly, undoubtedly it’s my second home and despite  of renovations staff and services make up for it.

Prakash, also from the front desk, was courteous and helpful as well. He assisted us with some insights  and was always available with a smile.

The food experience at the hotel was another major highlight. A special mention must go to Chef Satish, whose culinary skills are nothing short of exceptional. Every dish that came out of his kitchen reflected a deep understanding of flavor, texture, and presentation. Chef Satish brings creativity and precision to every plate — whether it was a simple dish or an elaborate dinner entrée, his food consistently impressed. What’s more, his approachable and passionate attitude made it easy to interact with him and understand the inspiration behind his creations. It's clear that he doesn't just cook — he curates an experience.

Chef Santosh also deserves appreciation for maintaining a high standard of quality and delivering consistently good meals throughout our stay. Together, the kitchen team made dining at the hotel a thoroughly enjoyable experience. 

Not to forget suvdip jana and nisha  they did an excellent job, delivering and understanding at right time.

That said, one area that fell well short of expectations was the lounge service. Unfortunately, it lacked the same level of professionalism and attentiveness found elsewhere in the hotel. The staff appeared disengaged, and service was slow and inconsistent.

Title: “World-Class Marriott Hospitality at Courtyard Hyderabad”
ReviewText:
My family and I had the pleasure of staying at Courtyard by Marriott Hyderabad in August 2025. Located close to Hussain Sagar Lake, it offers guests a scenic route for a refreshing morning walk or run.

As always, Marriott delivers best-in-class hospitality, and Courtyard Hyderabad is no exception. The service team here is truly world-class.
	•	Front Office: Special thanks to Dawood for ensuring our accommodation was seamless and for going above and beyond to assist us whenever needed.
	•	Transportation: We used the Marriott cab facility for touring Hyderabad and were impressed with the excellent service provided by Mazhar and Ather. The cab was spotless and well-maintained.
	•	Dining: Breakfast and the Executive Lounge, led by Chef Suvadip Jain, were exceptional. Chef Jain, along with Anand from his team, personally checked in to ensure everything met our expectations. Renee, who assisted at both the Lounge and Breakfast, offered warm, homely service—keeping the food flowing and the tables promptly cleared.

Overall, our stay was marked by attentive service, comfortable facilities, and genuine care from the staff. Courtyard by Marriott Hyderabad is a perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and hospitality, and we look forward to returning.

Title: Exceptional stay at Marriott
ReviewText:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at the Marriott, and from start to finish, the experience was nothing short of exceptional. The property is immaculate, with beautifully maintained rooms, comfortable bedding, and all the amenities one could ask for.

What truly made my stay memorable, however, was the warm and genuine hospitality from the staff—especially Nuresha. She went above and beyond to ensure that every detail of my visit was perfect. From her attentive service to her friendly demeanor, Nuresha made me feel valued and cared for as a guest. It’s rare to find someone who combines professionalism with such a personal touch, and she truly elevated my experience.

I would highly recommend the Marriott not only for its quality and comfort but also for the exceptional team members like Nuresha who make guests feel at home. I look forward to returning soon!

Title: Amazing stay
ReviewText:
I visited Hyderabad in the first week of June for vacation and booked Courtyard for my stay. I got an executive deal which has some perks with it. For executive booking you have priviledge for executive lounge access in the evening at Marriott, which includes free unlimited cocktails/mocktails along with starters and deserts. It was amazing, as I got the chance to enjoy hosptality of oth Courtyard and Marriott.

- Rooms : As always, Courtyard by Marriott lives up to its reputation for luxurious rooms and excellent service. Everything you need is already available in the room, and if anything is missing, housekeeping or room service is just a phone call away. The room features world-class linen, premium bath amenities, and a quality entertainment unit that adds to the overall comfort of the stay.

- Food :
- Courtyard : I chose to have breakfast, and the spread was impressive with a wide variety of dishes from all across India. There were freshly baked breads and cakes, both North and South Indian specialties, along with fresh juices, fruits, milkshakes, tea, and coffee. Some might find the food less spicy, but since this is an international hotel that welcomes many foreign guests, the flavors are well-balanced. Chef Shashidhar and Chef Anand were very kind and made sure all my breakfast needs were met. Divakar also provided excellent hospitality and handled my requests with care.
    - Marriott : I had breakfast at the Marriott, including at the Executive Lounge, and the food quality was excellent—on par with what I've experienced at Courtyard. The spread at Marriott was slightly more extensive, offering a wider variety of options. Chef Sathish, Manoj, and Anushree took personal care of my family’s preferences. Chef Sathish even prepared Chicken Malai specifically on my request, which was a thoughtful touch.

Things which can be improved : One area that could be improved is the communication system. There isn’t a separate number for housekeeping, the restaurant, or other departments—every request has to go through the reception, which sometimes leads to a communication gap or delays.
Additionally, I would recommend updating the bath products to a different brand for a better guest experience.

Title: Exceptional Long Stay Experience – A Home Away from Home
ReviewText:
Our family recently enjoyed an extended stay at Courtyard Marriott, and the experience exceeded our expectations in every way. From the moment we arrived, the staff went above and beyond to make us feel welcome and comfortable.

The accommodations were spacious, well-maintained, and perfect for a long stay. Housekeeping ensured our rooms remained spotless, and any special requests were handled promptly. The hotel’s amenities, including the pool, fitness center, and kids' play area, provided entertainment and relaxation for the entire family.

What truly set this stay apart was the outstanding service. The front desk team was always friendly and helpful, offering great recommendations for local attractions. The restaurant staff remembered our preferences, and the food was consistently delicious, with a variety of options to keep meals exciting.

The hotel’s location was also ideal—close to key attractions but still offering a peaceful retreat. Whether it was arranging transportation, accommodating special dietary needs, or ensuring we had everything we needed for a comfortable stay, the staff's attentiveness made a significant difference.

We highly recommend this property for families looking for a seamless, stress-free long stay. It truly felt like a home away from home, and we look forward to returning in the future!

Title: How the staff and executives of Courtyard Hyderabad transformed our 4-night stay in Dec 2024 into a memorable one
ReviewText: Being a member of Bonvoy, I made the booking myself and it was handled quite efficiently by the hotel's website. The first thing that my wife and I were greeted with, at the time of check-in, was an upgrade to a superior class of the room that we had originally booked, followed by a complementary special tea and snacks when we reached our room. Naturally, it was a pleasant surprise to be treated in this welcoming manner. Our 4-night stay at the hotel became all the more enjoyable when there was a constant inquiry from the staff and executives about our comfort level. A genuine display of concern was visible when they asked us about our satisfaction with the served food (service in the breakfast area was excellent, so also room service). Addressing of small wants such as extra water bottles, towels or hangers for our room was well handled (house-keeping was above par). The front desk staff stood out as quite caring when they volunteered to help us with taxi-booking. We used the well-equipped gymnasium extensively in the mornings. What we liked most was that the gym did not have any restrictive timings. Overall, our stay was comfortable and so well-managed by the on-duty personnel that, I would like to congratulate the management for imparting proper and good training to its staff. I have no hesitation in recommending this hotel to anyone wanting to have a pleasant stay in Hyderabad.

Title: Isolated incidence of cleanliness, poor hygiene; promptly attended, alternatives offered
ReviewText:
An isolated incident of poor quality and hygiene, which was promptly addressed by the professionalism of the managers, who stepped in to reassure us and compensated with complimentary lounge access, a room change, and other measures.

Here’s what happened during our 2-night stay at the Hyderabad Marriott Courtyard:

Day 1:
We checked in around 8:00 PM after a long drive from Bangalore. Since we had an event the next day, we went to bed right after dinner.

Day 2:
I woke up at 5:00 AM, and without turning on the light to avoid disturbing my wife’s sleep, I went to the bathroom, brushed my teeth, gargled a little, then returned and started meditating, as I usually do at that time. I felt a little odd but attributed it to the long drive the previous day.

My wife woke up at 6:00 AM, went to the bathroom, and rushed back to inform me that the water from the tap was muddy and dark brown. She was concerned about whether I had used it for brushing and gargling, and unfortunately, I had.

Afterward, I felt nauseous almost the entire day. I had to skip the event, and only my wife was able to attend, while I stayed in the room and slept throughout the day.

The muddy water issue persisted, even after running the faucet for 30–45 minutes (a support person came and tried to help but couldn’t resolve it; it was beyond his control).

The managers stepped in, patiently listened to me, understood my frustration, and promptly moved us to another room. They took good care of me as I was unwell throughout the day, unable to eat or drink. By the end of the day, I started feeling better and hungry. They offered us lounge access, dinner for both of us, apologized, and did their best to make up for the unfortunate incident.

I’ve been staying at Marriott properties for over 25 years, mostly in the United States, and this has never been my experience before. I consider this an isolated incident for two reasons:

	1.	Your impeccable record of good, hygienic service.
	2.	The professionalism displayed by the two managers on-site(Mr. Rugwed, and Mr. Asif), who reassured me and helped restore my faith in your brand.

Title: Marriot with a new view point
ReviewText:
I had held Marriot with high esteem and regard as a global brand they stand true testament to opulence service and of course standards.
The property in Hyderabad was not up to this mark.
It needs serious attention and upkeep.
The only saving grace would be the restaurant and the service staff there:
They seem to get what Marriot stands for and work diligently to keep up that,whether in the food served or the attention to the details or the items on the menu.
All of these are of exceptional value and greatly appreciated.
On the other hand the reason for my review being dismally bad is on the room and the fact that the AC ducts had issues which lead to me pointing the same to the staff.
They changed the lamp shades as that was the one which had all the dust from the ducts.
The staff was apologetic and had stated the duct was cleaned and set up a new lamp shade.
Sadly I trusted them and continued to stay in that room.
Only to realize later my little one fell sick after a few hours and had a bad cold and a fever.
This was after we checked out that her temperature shoot up.
So I hope the management takes the time and patience to review and fix this shambles of a property in Hyderabad and tries to save the name of Marriot

The Courtyard Marriott team (special mention to Raima and Neerosha, Gaurav, Hemant) took great care of us and made us feel at home from Day 1. 

During our 2 weeks stay, we received special attention from all Hotel staff (my wife and daughter went down with viral fever and Hemant assisted with his special medicinal concoction which eased their throat pain).

Overall, our experience was memorable and we surely will be going back to Courtyard Marriott on our special occasions.

You have got an awesome team !!! Thank you and God Bless everyone.

ReviewText:

For me to get around Hyderabad the front desk staff were so helpful with finding me an Uber. And security ensured that the car plate number was taken for my security. Wow that was excellent

Thanks courtyard

ReviewText:

Stay was excellent at Courtyard Hyderabad *****

Room was up to the mark, clean hygienic, bathroom was well equipped with all the necessities and the cleanliness was impeccable. 
Marriott Hotel & Convention Centre was just right there, connecting with a bridge from one hotel to the other. Gym was excellent and other amenities provided added great value to my stay. 
I would definitely visit again, location is superb. value for money - a big YES. Staff is very helpful and responsive. 
Highly recommended. Keep it up.

ReviewText:
Outstanding staff and service making each guest feel special and valued. From the front office to restaurant to housekeeping, nothing was too much trouble for the fabulous people here. The property was great, well located with good restaurant and all required facilities in the Marriott hotel which is connected with an internal bridge. Marriott had additional facilities such as spa (outstanding massage by Hoiajkim), salon, exec lounge, coffee shop, pool, gym and gardens, all accessible for guests of Courtyard.

Title: Business Stay - A Very Comfortable One
ReviewText:
It has been a very comfortable stay. I liked how the hoteliers, staffs, hostesses were amazingly helpful during my stay. 
Herein - making a shout out for every individual who made my stay very comfortable. 
Sanjay  (Night Manager / Hotelier)  - I was to check-in my hotel at 12 PM on 4th, however, due to the cyclone, all flights were cancelled, and I could come only by 11:30 PM. I was assigned a room , but the room had a strong pungent smell. Sanjay immediately came to rescue and alternatively provided another room, and made sure that the next day, I would shift to a better view room, which he finally did. And my stay at 5*** started. Thanks to Sanjay. 
Raima ( Hotelier / Day Concierge ) - A perfect host throughout, always helping me with my day in queries, with printouts, with booking of cabs. Great employee ! Thanks and cheers to her. She also suggested a place to get sweets for my relatives, whom I visited. 
Asif ( Hotelier / Day Concierge ) - A big thanks to this man ! He not only helped me with some great recommendations for restaurants, but made my evening with my cousins, a definite success, since he put a word to the chef / hostess ( Eli ) of BIDRI restaurant. 
The entire staff of Cafe Momo - ( Gaurav, Arun, Arif, Prasanna, Chef Anurag, Akhil, Kumar, Sanchit, Abshar, Shresth ) - My breakfast, my time at cafe ( worked for few hours from the cafe ). Really amazing set of hosts !!! 
And thanks to all the cleaning services. Always on time. 
Rajesh ( Fitness Coach ) - Very detail oriented trainer. Assisted and guided in all my sessions.

Title: Leisure: A pleasant stay
ReviewText:
Overall Rating: 4.4/5

I recently had the pleasure of staying at this hotel, and my experience was mostly positive. Here's a breakdown of my review:

Arrival & Check-In: 5/5
The check-in process was seamless and welcoming. I was greeted with a refreshing welcome drink, which was a nice touch after a long journey. Mr. Hasan, the staff member who assisted me during check-in, was incredibly helpful and accommodating. His warm reception set a positive tone for my stay.

Accommodation: 4/5
The accommodation provided was comfortable and well-maintained. They arranged a crib and a baby chair for my little one, which made our stay more convenient. The room service was prompt, and any requests we had were attended too quickly.

In-Room Dining: 4/5
The in-room dining experience was generally pleasant. For lunch, Continental Box was surprisingly tasty (except Ratatouille). For dinner, Gongura Mutton dish was a standout - delicious and flavorful. However, I found the portion of rice served with it to be a bit on the smaller side. It would be great if they could increase the portion size for a more satisfying meal.

Dining (Breakfast/Dinner): 4/5
The hotel offered a good variety of dishes for both breakfast and dinner. I appreciated the diverse selection of options available. However, I was a little disappointed not to find any chicken starters on the menu, and the chicken biryani I tried was below my expectations in terms of taste and flavor. On a brighter note, the salads and desserts were exceptional, providing a delightful end to the meals.

Service: 5/5
The hotel's service deserves special mention. The convenience of dialing '0' for any assistance or service needs was highly convenient and efficient. The staff members were consistently helpful throughout my stay, ensuring that I had a comfortable and enjoyable experience.

In summary, my stay at this hotel was a positive one, with excellent service, a warm welcome, and comfortable accommodation. While there were a few minor areas where improvements could be made, such as the in-room dining portion size and the quality of certain dishes, these were overshadowed by the overall quality of service and the pleasant atmosphere. I would certainly consider returning for another stay in the future.

Thank You Team!!

Title: Wonderful experience
ReviewText:
First let me wholeheartedly appreciate your commitment to deliver luxurious accomodation, with personal touch. My family and I are delighted to have chosen marriot as our stay partner in our 4 days of visit to Hyderabad. 
                           I would like to individually name a few people who made our stay memorable. As a foodie, main attraction of any property is the food they serve and let me say you have been exceptional at that. Mr.Gaurav paid keen attention to our request and made personal involvement to tailor some of dishes to suit our kerala palette. Ms.Utsah and Mr.Anurag your chefs are outstanding, did a good job of honouring our requests and also went out of the way to cater to our young daughters request, her being a really pickey eater. Ms.Maria, Mr.Arif,Mr.Arun, Mr.Kumar, Mr.Akhil,Mr.Hussain, Ms.Prasanne in MOMO restaurant also did a good job of serving us with enthusiasm and a smile.
                                In any instance we say 'first impression is the best impression ' . Well your front desk people does exactly that. Ms.Vaishnavi and Ms.Raima made a great impact in making us realise we made the correct choice for our long stay. They were extremely friendly and did a wonderful job making our check in and check out seemless. Had some wonderful lighter moments with them and our daughter will cherish these memories for a long time.
                                 Also housekeeping has been right on mark. Prompt, without delay and giving due importance to hygiene. 
                                 Although I would like to point out a downside. Pool maintenance need urgent check. Some parts of pool are not properly maintained with smell of stagnant water, not in the pool but from overflowing part. Also pigeon feathers were floating all over water. 
                                   Overall experience was fabulous and I along with my family would like to thank you for a wonderful stay.

Title: A stay that is always Exciting
ReviewText:
I recently stayed at Courtyard Hyderabad and I was very impressed with the hotel. The staff was incredibly friendly and helpful, especially Shreshth at the front desk. He was always quick to answer my questions and went out of his way to make sure I had a pleasant stay. The housekeeping staff on the 3rd floor was also excellent. They kept my room clean and tidy, and they were always willing to help with anything I needed.

The hotel is centrally located, just a short walk from the Hussain Sagar Lake. It's also close to a number of restaurants and shops. The breakfast spread was very generous, with a wide variety of Indian and continental dishes to choose from.

Overall, I had a great stay at Courtyard Hyderabad. The staff was wonderful, the location was convenient, and the breakfast was delicious. I would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Hyderabad.

Here are some specific things I appreciated about my stay:

The friendly and helpful staff, especially Shreshth at the front desk.
The clean and tidy rooms.
The generous breakfast spread.
The convenient location, just a short walk from the Hussain Sagar Lake.
I would definitely stay at Courtyard Hyderabad again if I'm ever in Hyderabad.

Title: Want to indulge and pamper family with love and luxury, come to MARRIOTT
ReviewText:
My title is more than enough words, I presume for a review.  It was a great gift for my daughter who was breaking away from her usual university boarding routine in Hyderabad, so extremely thankful to Marriott for making it so special for her.  

I would love to say that they get a 10/10 in all their services ie. humble and extremely attentive staff who are there to pamper you to the fullest, great relaxing and lovely ambience, excellent variety and expanse of food, but I would like it if the breakfast is a bit different on different days since, we got the almost same spread on Saturday morning and Sunday morning though the variety of food was large, so it did not make much of a difference but I would have preferred something different in dessert.  Dining was excellent with absolutely fantastic and tasty food. 

I did not try the spa but next time I would surely do it and would love to have Marriott Hyderabad give option for airport pickup and drop.

I earlier have stayed twice in Port Muziris, a Tribute Portfolio Hotel of Marriott, Kochi and again, I have the same words for it so, I would always recommend Marriott to all.

Title: Exceptional Stay at Courtyard by Marriott, Hyderabad
ReviewText:
Title: Exceptional Stay at Courtyard by Marriott, Hyderabad

Review: Our recent stay at the Courtyard by Marriott in Hyderabad was an unforgettable experience. The overall ambiance, cleanliness, and the top-notch hospitality truly made it an epitome of excellence. The two shining stars of the establishment were Akshat and Siraj. 

Akshat's welcoming spirit ensured a seamless check-in process and made us feel comfortable from the outset. His kind gesture of offering complimentary drinks was a delightful surprise. His constant attention to detail and efforts in personalizing our stay added a special touch to our visit. 

Siraj, with his commendable proactiveness, made sure our breakfast was prepared and packed for our early departure. He also ensured a swift check-out process, allowing us to stick to our tight schedule without compromising the experience.

Both Akshat and Siraj's tireless service and warm, hospitable nature made us feel at home and enhanced our stay. This exceptional level of customer service has not only left us with great memories but also a keen desire to return. We highly recommend Courtyard by Marriott, Hyderabad, for a splendid, seamless, and memorable stay.
