Title: Great location, staff and service
ReviewText: Two stays in a span of two months and the service was top notch. The advantage of two Marriot properties that are interconnected allows the staff and guests to offer options for stay and food and guests to choose without having to travel too far. Service at both properties is excellent. While the Courtyard Marriot doesn't serve alcohol, one can get it at the Convention centre which is just a crossing away. Most importantly, the hotels are connected not just physically but operationally which is a huge advantage for the guest. Bills are not separate, they can transfer guests from one to the other without any major paperwork and the fluidity of the process makes for a great experience.

Title: Courtyard, Hyderabad - Home away from home
ReviewText:
From our arrival at 4am to our departure at 10:30p ten days later, the Courtyard Hyderabad provided attentive, friendly, consistent services.  Our room had everything we needed, plenty of bottled water and was always spotless.  I did not hear neighbors or hallways noise and was delightfully pleased.  The laundry service was prompt and careful, always returning laundry same day, well finished. The food was a wonderful adventure in Hyderabadi cuisine, without being too spicy hot and there was always variety with chefs happy to help with special orders.  We had a delightful stay and were well prepared to accomplish our goals in India.  I would look forward to another stay!
Thank you

Title: Home away from Home
ReviewText:
I stayed at Courtyard Hyderabad for 2 nights in November’22 for attending meeting/conference. I am impressed by the overall hotel, beautiful and clean, full of positive vibe, with rooms full of all the required basic and modern amenities. 
The best part of the stay: MoMo café. What a wide variety of breakfast and lunch/dinner selection. Being in the food capital, I was  very much satisfied with the quality of the food MoMo Café had to offer. However, what really made my stay enjoyable was the staff of the hotel. All the staff, from the associates at the reception desk, to the staff at the MoMo Cafe, including the security guards were wonderful and went out of their ways to make my stay welcome and enjoyable. 
A special shoutout to Prasanna, Naqib, Akash and other excellent staff at Momo Café who especially took care of my needs.
I left this place relaxed and with a big smile, determined to return to Courtyard if I visit Hyderabad again!!

Title: A great start to my Hyderabad chapter...
ReviewText:
Most positive reviews rightly praise the food and facilities, but a special kudos to the frontline team manning the Momo cafe and the reception. My ten days of a temp accommodation at Marriot Courtyard brought me the privilege of seeing some very fine professionals- working with a constant smile through the thick of a festive season, unseasonal rains and what looked like consecutive shifts on an occasion. Courteous, patient, always helpful and carrying themselves with grace...
… to see that energy and warmth at the start and end of a long day totally energised me to take on my day with a similar smile. Thanks, Sous Chef Anup Ganguly and the frontline team of Prasanna, Delish, Naqib, Eliza, Vimal, Pushpa and Rosiya- I take the energy from your delicious spread and spirits to my workplace.
The efforts of their housekeeping team also shine- literally, though I've never met them.
P.S:- Their belgian chocolate cake (with its perfect ganache and just rightly moist and crumbly cake within) and ginger chutney are recipes definitely worth stealing.
Trip typeBusiness

ReviewText: Hotel rooms are run down in terms of upholstery. Torn curtains etc. The food at Marriott is something we have been coming back to for decades but it was sad to see a marked deterioration in taste, spread and quality this time around in all of the restaurants- Momo, Okra and Bidri. The wear and tear and 'oldness' can be seen at Tatva Spa too where the frontdesk this time was particularly indifferent in service. The staff though is what stands out overall in their efforts to ask, listen and provide efficiently. If not for the location of the hotel which fits my family visits, I'd look elsewhere next time.

Title: Excellent Chef, food, staff and services
ReviewText:
1. Check in was very smooth
2. Towels and house keeping amenities were kept for only one adult whereas we were 2 adults in the room
3. Door of the bathroom is very heavy and difficult to slide open and close
4. Rooms are not in a rectangle or square shape. Its like a pentagon.
5. Room and bed was very comfortable to stay
6. Staffs were highly courteous and very cooperative in every step. I loved the services and cooperation of the staffs which makes the property to be recommended 100% to anyone.
7. To compete and beat the hotel staffs, the services of staffs in momo's cafe (restaurant of the hotel)  was exemplary.
A. Starting with the hospitality given by Chef Anoop, words might run short if i have to appreciate him. During the break fast, i informed him that i am lactose and gluten intolerant. He made sambar and chutney in just 15 to 20 minutes to match my needs. He was very polite and service oriented. I have stayed in many 5 star hotels. This was one of the best hospitality i have had.
B. Chef anurag also took equal care in making the customised food for my requirement. The taste of the food made excluding diary and Gluten was really delicious.
C. There was another chef during our dinner whose name i cannot recollect. We ordered a vegetable biryani(normal one without any intolerance effect), biryani was without much gravy and was asked to be had with salon. We explained that non vegetarian biryani may go good with salon but vegetable biryani can go well only with good vegetables gravy made along with biryani and such a dry biryani may qualify as pulao only. However, he was persistent in saying this is how biryani is made and we returned it almost full. However, they still charged for it.
8. Hotel staffs were very cooperative to accommodate our late check out request.

Overall experience was excellent and definitely can recommend to any guests

Title: A Memorable Stay
ReviewText:
My stay was at the Courtyard By Marriott, Hyderabad 
The trip was work related and was for a single night single occupancy.
Being a member I had availed of a discounted price which was very very reasonable.
The location was central, ideal  and close to where I wanted to be for work.
I had checked in online and had received a welcome email from the hotel which also enquired about any special needs I had.
On check in was met by very pleasant reception staff who had all my details and to my pleasure was told that my room rate would include complimentary breakfast even though it was a discounted reservation.
My room was large probably upgraded too. All amenities were perfect and everything was as expected and more. Some extra items which I had asked for were present and shows proper care is taken to every guests requests.
Special thanks to housekeeping staff for immaculate room.

The hotel is connected to its bigger brother Marriott via a walkway from the 2nd floor. 
So overall one has access to both hotel facilities which doubles the restaurant choices etc.
Food was excellent and had all the local delicacies and other dishes to cater to all tastes.
The breakfast was made special, with  Chef Vinayak taking special care to serve me with a fresh healthy juice... The Vinayak Soecial.
From the hostess to the waiting staff, everyone went out of the way to have a pleasant word or a smile with me and was served everything on my table. 
It was made even more memorable as I was about to leave was asked by the staff and Chef to sit n cut a special pastry with a chocolate edible spoon to eat with. Simply overwhelmed by their hospitality and ended with group selfie.
My request for a late check out was quickly accepted by a very courteous staff.
Check out was a breeze and overall 

I would rate it as one of my top experiences in terms of food and hospitality.

Thank you all for making it special and look forward to return soon and with family

Swati & Lumi from Guest realtions, Ranjan (Chef) and Priyanka and the entire staff was very hospitable & took great care. Kids loved this unique experience, awesome service & breakfast buffet.

Title: Great Stay

Title: Excellent Marriott
ReviewText: Always go for Marriott only

Title: 5 * staff

ReviewText: What was a horrible early check in experience was made up fit the excellent staff service. Kudos to Shehzad and Simran!

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Excellent ,good overall experience

Title: Very bad experience
ReviewText: Although the preview of rooms was great on the site, the reality was very different. Property was aware of issues and admitted that they have been receiving complains for past 6 months and no action has been taken up.

Title: Stay at Courtyard by Marriott Hyderabad
ReviewText:
This was a very good stay with very helpful professional staff. 
Service provided at hotel was excellent by the serving staff.
Easy to reach and good Location near the famous Hussain Sagar Lake a picknik point.

Overall experience is excellent.

Title: Courtyyard Marriott Hyderabad - My choice
ReviewText:
Awesome!
From the doorman to reception to check into the room. Food to meet with my choice. Courtesy meeting my expectation and beyond!

Title: Dream stay
ReviewText: We are very happy during our stay, convenient location for traveling

Title: Hotel with great staff and fantastic restaurant
ReviewText: Very good restaurant, food, chefs, and guest relations. Very attentive to the needs of guest. The best I experienced. I was at the courtyard for three weeks and had a very good stay. I want to thank chefs Anurag, Ranjan, and assistant manager Ramu for making my meals at the restaurant a fantastic experience.

Title: Personal touch
ReviewText: My family was delighted by the warmth and the hospitality at Courtyard Hyderabad. Excellent rooms and dining at the Momo Restaurant

Title: Excellent & Friendly Staff
ReviewText: Although the hotel building/room is older but the it is well kept and clean. Even the air did not smell like Indian food! We love the food and its aroma but don't want to sleep with it though. Staffs from bell man to guest relations were super nice and friendly and made us feel like home.

Title: Great Stay at Courtyard Hyderabad
ReviewText:
Like always my stay at Courtyard Hyderabad was excellent.
The staff is excellent and extremely helpful.

Title: Comfort at every destination
ReviewText:
Part of the journey is to have a place to crash after an adventure you have outside in the city or the beach and in my experience what makes Marriot chains stand out is the care that they give to me and my family. 
From the pre-arrival arrangements via emails and the quick support at the early check-in by Hari at the reception, the arrival experience been great. 
Room was very spacious and the bed was comfortable. 
I have tried the gym and it was very clean with the latest equipment.

Title: Customer delight
ReviewText: Comfortable stay, but will prefer facilities such as spa and fitness centre in the property premises

Title: Good value for money
ReviewText: Short stay which went well

Title: Good hotel, outdated and musty smelling rooms
ReviewText: Location is near family's house but the smells from tank bund can be a problem. Rooms are often musty smelling. Thermostat wasn't working properly. Service is outstanding and they go out of their way to make you happy. Breakfast in Cafe momo is awesome!

Title: A Great Stay
ReviewText: I had a great stay at Courtyard by Marriott, Hyderabad. Everything was commendable.

Title: Review
ReviewText: It was good i loved it. Would love to stay again

Title: Great value for money
ReviewText: Good location. Good transport access. Clean, comfortable, more spacious than many hotels of its class. Friendly staff and attentive service

Title: Excellent service
ReviewText: Very well set up and excellent customer service by simran

Title: Fantastic Hotel, Excellent all round facility
ReviewText:
I stayed for 4 nights.  Every staff member I came across, had a smile, very professional, pleasant, friendly and attentive.  Hotel is always welcoming, from front staff to restaurant and management to cleaning staff.

Great location. My preferred work accommodation. The most comfortable, spacious and clean room & beds while working away.

Breakfast buffet was excellent. So much to choose from.   

It is a very well run hotel and staff look like they enjoy working there.   
By choosing Courtyard, I felt not let down. 

Highly recommended.

Title: Experience Marriott at reasonable price.
ReviewText: Everything at Marriott is pleasant, be it welcoming OR breakfast or rooms. I personally find their contemporary room designs more appealing than some other 5 star hotels.

Title: My review
ReviewText: very good stay. Service is excellent especially at MOMO Café, local cuisine is the best here.

Title: Very courteous staff
ReviewText: Great hospitality, excellent dining.

Title: Excellent Service

Title: Great stay
ReviewText: Just stayed for one nite at the end of a grueling business trip with stay in three other Marriott hotels in three other cities. The staff were extra nice, made me feel extra special throughout my short stay. Great value for money. Great location in the heart of the city.

Title: Great personnel
ReviewText: Due to the staff of the hotel: it was a great stay and I will recommend this Courtyard for all visitors of Hyderabad! Beside the personnel: nice and clean hotel, good location, great food, almost nothing to critize even for me as a frequent business traveller!

Title: Wonderful stay at Courtyard Marriot
ReviewText: Wonderful, hospitable, respecting and helpful staff. Clean hotel. Great food.

Title: Altamente recomendable
ReviewText: COURTYARD te hace sentir como en casa. La amabilidad de su personal es muy destacable proporcionando calidez humana.

Title: Great stay
ReviewText: The staff bends over backwards to welcome you and make sure your comfortable.  There is a buffet available for meals but one of the chefs came over to me and assured that they cook anything I wanted I just had to ask. Have use of the Marriott connected by a skybridge.

Title: Pleasant stay
ReviewText: Very good for family or business or tourism purpose. Not too far off from major attractions.

Title: Review of Courtyard by Marriott, Hyderabad.
ReviewText: Excellent experience. Enjoyed the hospitality and prompt service of the staff.  They even arranged a return trip to airport, that was nice. Overall a well managed property.

Title: Excellent Stay

Title: A great place to stay.
ReviewText: I have stayed in this hotel multiple times and I will always love to return here. The staff are super good and take great care. The hotel location is very convenient to most important venues in the city. The rooms are spacious and nice. Great value for money.

Title: Stay at Courtyard with family on 20th Dec
ReviewText: As mentioned earlier, we really enjoyed our stay and especially support provided by Urvashi. She is a pleasure to interact with. She even packed sandwiches for my son as we were going on a long drive

Also very slow for laundry service and check out.

Will not choice this hotel again.

Title: STAY IN COURTYARD
ReviewText: Nice cosy & clean hotel with yummy food and fast room service.

Title: Marriott has always been my preferred choice
ReviewText: Courtyard Marriott Hyderabad, stood up to expectations. Nice staff and great service. I will always recommend this hotel for story trip. The gym, pool, steam, spa such facilities are with Marriott conventional centre for which we have to get down to 2nd floor cross the entire pathway of courtyard to reach other property. For pool we have to get to Marriott conventional centre Okra restaurant and cross that to reach pool. This was little inconvenient. Same for the business centre. But overall the staff was very helpful and I am pretty satisfied. Thanks staff for taking good care

Title: Marriott experience overseas
ReviewText: Would have preferred to be picked up  and dropped off at the closest airport free of charge.

Title: Home Away From Home
ReviewText: We enjoyed the affectionate & courteous behavior of all staff during our stay. The chauffeurs were extremely obedient in their duties due to which we could complete the sightseeing very neatly. The car fleet was well maintained. Front office staff always engaged with us in conversation to fulfill our needs and so as Momo Cafe staff . In-room dining service was quick.  Enjoyed the dinner buffet at Okra with local delicacies. Really, 'home away from home experience'!

Title: Review of Hyderabad Courtyard Hotel
ReviewText: A comfortable modern and up-to-date hotel, with all of the amenities usually expected.  It is our favorite place to stay in Hyderabad.  The buffet breakfast is especially excellent.

Title: Great hotel
ReviewText: Great hotel. Very comfortable, clean and exceptional service. Restaurant is okay..... breakfast buffet limited and the service is very slow.

Title: Home away from home

However, the agreed rate was not valid & I had to pay extra.

I was moved to different room but still has bad odor.

ReviewText:
Food quality was not good in breakfast. I took some poha but it was rotten, then I told chef that it was rotten but he didn’t replace it.
There was little occupancy in momo cafe even though they are serving very slowly. I ordered for a waffle but it took half n hour to serve us.
Toiletries,slippers,towels were insufficient for a double occupancy room.

Title: MARIOTT HYDERABAD

Title: Value for money
ReviewText:
Front office executives are very courteous.Rooms are very spacious.weekend offer is really good.located at center of Hyderabad.lavish dinner and breakfast
Even they have offered a red wine bottle as complimentary..
At least you will feel the human  personal touch and caring type of environment..
Value for money

Title: Would recommend for NRIs
ReviewText:
I would recommend this hotel of NRIs. I found it conveniently located for visiting my family and friend in town.

I called the service and asked to them not to replace the towels every single day. I wanted to conserve water. But the operator on the phone didn't seem to understand simple english. She kept thinking that I was asking for extra towels. There was a sign in the bathroom saying that only the towels placed on the floor will be replaced but the towels I hung on the shower door were also replaced. I think the staff can be trained a little more on water conservation.

Title: Great Hospitality, Excellent Good and Service
ReviewText: Great Hospitality, Excellent Good and Service

Title: Best Place in Hyderabad
ReviewText: Courtyard Marriott in Hyderabad is one of the best places to stay when you visit Hyderabad. Place and people are awesome and you will feel at home. MoMo cafe has the best food and the service you get is like never seen. Rooms are clean and guests are their top priority. You will not regret and I'm sure you will appreciate the stay. I work in HiTech City and I do not mind the hour and half drive one way just to stay at Courtyard Hyderabad. Courtyard never gave me a reason to try any other place when i land in Hyderabad.

Title: Trip to Hyderabad, India
ReviewText: Excellent hotel and staff.

ReviewText: I have stayed here couple of times and find this is one of the best hotels in hyderabad. The staff are friendly, food is good. The overall experience is very good.

Title: Courtyard Hyderabad
ReviewText: Nice place to stay. Food and service is excellent. Very attentive staff in the Front office and restaurant.For the price I paid I get excellent breakfast and high class service.I am itching to go back.

Title: I thought I found the perfect hotel.
ReviewText: Please see other comments.  Everything was going well until they took my money.

Title: Excellent overall experience.
ReviewText: An oasis in a busy (often disorderly) city.  Very comfortable hotel on all levels.  Great food, great beds.  However, the staff deserve 5 star recognition.  Sharp, friendly, and quick to remember you by name.  Their service and attention to detail was some of the best I've experienced in dozens of top hotels globally.  I was there for 7 days, so I feel I got a pretty good look at their "norms."  In my observation, my experience was not unusual for them and would expect similar when I return.  Great job on training and picking great staff.  One notable (Azier) when I was checking out at 4am, I asked how he liked the graveyard shift, and his response was an enthusiastic "I love my job, no matter what time of the day I work."

Title: Marriott Review

Title: Good Hotel for Leisure/Business

Although it is situated away from the IT part of the city, this property is still accessible with reasonable distance and competitive price. Chefs at this hotel are very talented and the food offered is very delicious, no matter Hyderabadi or Continental. Property need to be upgraded in technology though, which I am sure is already in their to-do list.

ReviewText: I must admit that my visit at this hotel was wonderful. Starting from the warm welcome getting and then a comfortable check-in I was given a free upgrade to my room. The hotel manager who assisted me in checking me in was so grateful to have me there and left nothing behind to give the best service. The rooms are pretty neat and clean and well maintained. Location is also very convenient.

ReviewText: Had a Very nice experience during my three stays over the past six moths. Food in momo cafe is very good. Staff tried their best meeting my needs and it reflected in their chores. Very friendly staff with very positive attitudes. I definitely will stick with this hotel while in Hyderabad.

Title: Excellent Hotel

Title: Pleasant stay at Courtyard
ReviewText: It was holiday trip for me and my family. My stay at Courtyard Marriott in Hyderabad was very delightful. I always admire Marriott for its excellent service and this stay was not an exception. Thank you for making my leisure trip much more enjoyable.

Title: My stay at Courtyard Marriott Hyderabad
ReviewText: Excellent staff and service made our stay really memorable.

Title: Excellent staff with a broken property
ReviewText: Hotel was worn out, needs maintenance in lot of aspects. Mattress needs replacement, bathroom leakages should be fixed, room is too humid (dehumidifier is a must), room is smelly due to humidity, limited TV channels (the ones comes are foggy), etc. Staff were excellent with great courteousness. Love the staff but the hotel is so so. Dining choices are very good. Quality food with abundant choices. I have stayed here for few weeks just because of staff and food choices. As a 4 star hotel, I have expected better rooms for the price paid. Over all, the stay is ok.

Title: Overall good stay
ReviewText: Overall it is a good stay. Staff is very courteous and especially at the restaurant. Had good breakfast everyday before leaving hotel. Hotel is clean and staff has taken care of our additional requirements. Security and parking are congested and not that much great. I would recommend this hotel to my friends visiting Hyderabad.

Title: Excellent hotel with great staff and hospitality!
ReviewText: Excellent hotel of this class and for the price offered. Property kept extremely clean. Hotel Management and staff are very polite, friendly and welcoming. Great menu for breakfast buffet that includes Indian as well as Western foods, one of the best in a Courtyard I have experienced. I'll be back to this place and highly recommend to others when in the area.

Title: Simply Awesome
ReviewText: The Courtyard Hyderabad team is the best when it comes to service. They live the customer first attitude and amply demostrate why people would love to come back to Marriott Courtyard Hyderabad. A special mention of Avadesh, Naresh and Adi who made my stay a breeze as they went out of their way to make us comfortable. Avadesh specially has some exceptional inter personal skills and shows supreme people relationship management. And your staff seems to remember even the smallest of choices we made over my 2 weeks stay. Your team deserves a might applause and all the accolades they can get. Keep it going. I surely do see myself giving you a visit sooner.

Title: Stay at Courtyard
ReviewText: Very good stay. No regrets.

Title: Good Property
ReviewText: Overall nice stay in Coutyard marriott.

Title: Awesome experience in Hyderabad
ReviewText: Having stayed at different hotels in 29 countries, it was one of the best experience at Courtyard Marriott in Hyderabad. My wife and young kids especially enjoyed the friendly staff. The food was awesome and the staff was simply exceptional. How may places make and pack sandwiches for your kids at the time of your departure to the airport!! These folks know how to treat their guests well. Awesome place if you are traveling with kids!!

Title: Great Service at Marriott Courtyard
ReviewText: I would rate the service at Marriott Courtyard, Hyderabad, India as excellent! The front desk desk staff (Sumit Mehta, Front Desk manager and others) were very professional and helpful while checking in and checking out. Momo Cafe staff including Madhavi, Naresh, Suraj, Adhilesh (not sure if I recall this name correctly), Suresh and ALL others were very courteous, friendly and personable In their approach and service. When I was not feeling well, they all took special care in suggesting specific beverages and food items to get over my cold. Overall excellent service and I would return to stay there again!

Title: Great stay
ReviewText: Staff was polite and helpful.. Great stay in Hyderabad

Title: Decent experience
ReviewText: Friendly staff. Nice atmosphere and decent rooms.

Title: A truly comfortable stay, in every sense, with exceptionally good food and beverage served with top notch efficiency
ReviewText: A hotel where I would love to stay again, and would vety highly recommend. A hotel with an interesting blend of western sofistication, cleanliness, amemities with Indian grand and unique hospitality.

Title: My fav hotel in HYDERABAD
ReviewText: I LIKE the open area of MOMO and the GYM.

Title: Check In and Enjoy!!
ReviewText: The Marriott hotels are well known for luxury and comfort and this one did not disappoint either. The hotel is located a prime area in Hyderabad. Check in was smooth and efficient Breakfast was superb and the variety on offer was exceptional. Service was unobtrusively quiet and efficient throughout my stay. Excellent food and a very comfortable room. The restaurants are very good and the breakfast superb. Very efficient and cordial staff. Plenty of amenities. Decent pricing. So check in all of you and enjoy! We certainly did!!

Title: my experience
ReviewText: I had stayed at other Courtyard properties but they were not as good as Marriott hotels. However this particular property was as good as regular Marriot properties and best among all courtyards that I stayed so far.

Title: Great service
ReviewText: This hotel is a great deal for the money. Staff are very courteous and helpful. Breakfast at Momo café is amazing. I had the best vadas ever.

Title: Good service and Courteous staff members
ReviewText: Always felt at home with splendid service, courteous and caring staff members. The property is close to major shopping centers and would recommend anyone who is visiting Hyderabad for business or pleasure.

it was worth every penny spent.

Title: A very Pleasant stay

Title: Excellent Hotel to stay for love and comfort
ReviewText:
Stay at the hotel was excellent from the time of check-in till the last step out. The hotel staff took special care of the baby and we never felt left out. Even the room service took note of the baby and kept an additional towel in the bathroom without asking. Chef Naresh was excellent in service and he always kept us in comfort zone at the dinner and breakfast table.

Overall this hotel is excellent for anyone who is looking for pleasure, love and comfort.

Title: My friendly hotel
ReviewText: I would like to specially mention that you have some of the best staff associated with Courtyard Marriott. Beginning with Hari at the front desk, Madhavi and Shridhar at the Momo Cafe and Stephen at the lounge. Very great guys....who not only make you feel comfortable but pamper you....as if you are just a part of their family in real sense.

Title: Superb staff makes you stay worthwhile
ReviewText:
We had a wonderful 3 day stay at the Courtyard Hyderabad. The hotel is located at a slightly offbeat location guarded from the hustle and bustle of the city center. But I would definitely recommend this hotel as the service and restaurant staff are extremely courteous and make you feel at home.

The restaurant staff was especially helpful and took time out even on busy days to make us feel at home. This was not just true for us but we noticed that they took care of each of their patrons.

Thank you for making our stay memorable. Sure to recommend Courtyard Hyderabad to my colleagues who visit Hyderabad often.

Title: Great Stay in Hyderabad, India
ReviewText: Great rooms, great food and great people to assist at every turn.

While departing from Hotel driver was not sure if I was his customer as he was waiting for me but room number provided to him was different .

Title: Hyderabad Courtyard

Title: Terrific Hotel if you don't mind spending a bit more
ReviewText: The London Marriott Hotel County Hall is simply the best Marriott besides St. Pancreas that I've stayed at while visiting London.  You can't beat the location and the easy access to various modes of transportation.  Rooms are comfy and the beds are fantastic as always.  Highly recommend this hotel to Marriott Bonvoy Members.

Title: Incredible Stay—The Location Made Our Family Trip!
ReviewText: Our family had an incredible stay here! The location was the absolute highlight of our trip. Being right next to the London Eye, a block from the Elizabeth Tower, and just down the street from great restaurants meant we could easily walk to everything we wanted to see. The rooms were bright, cozy, and impeccably clean, with more than enough room for a family of four. Best of all, the entire staff—from the concierge to the security team—was so warm and inviting. They genuinely seemed happy to have us, which made our vacation all the more special.

Title: Good

Title: 3 nights in London
ReviewText: This is the best hotel to stay for a 3 night sight seeing tour of London!  The hotel is excellent.  It's located close to attractions and transportation.  We would definitely stay here again and have already recommend it to others.

Title: London vacation
ReviewText: The overall experience was a good one at the London Marriott County Hall. We loved the location of the hotel and how close it was to everything. We appreciated the cleanliness of the rooms. I expected a bit more maintenance in the lobby and hallways especially since it is rated as a 5-star hotel. I did a bit of exploring but didn't notice any courtyard areas to sit and enjoy the outdoors other than a few tables towards the entrance and or balconies for specific rooms. The in-room dining options seemed to be a bit different from the restaurant offerings. Overall our experience was good and would return.

Title: Greta Experience
ReviewText: From the moment we walked up to the front main door, the gentleman there were amazing. We really enjoyed staying at this place. Thank you everyone.

Title: Woke up to see 2 maintenance blokes in my room with a ladder
ReviewText: The maintenance team came in at half eight in the morning without warning or knocking. I was in the toilet and shouted ‘Hello?’. They explained they were not aware the room was occupied and asked what time do I plan on leaving. No apologies until I raised it with the Manager. Still no attempts to make any amends or compensate in any way shape or form.

Title: Great Place

Title: Correct hotel

Title: Fantastic Hotel for Families and Business Guests!
ReviewText: I do not usually write reviews, but was so impressed with this hotel that I wanted to share the experience. My family and I stayed here for four nights and had a wonderful time.  The location and views are fantastic!  The customer service was even better.  We travel a lot for both work and personal reasons.  This was one of the best hotel experiences we have had.  We had the two bedroom suite overlooking the Thames, but likely would have been fine with just one room since the rooms were so large.  The rooms were immaculately clean and the hotel even left gifts for my kids (ages 7 and 5), which were greatly appreciated!  They have one of the best M Clubs that I have visited.  The M Club had a surprising amount of activities for kids and the food options were fantastic.  Everything about the experience was wonderful!  It was also great because of the location- there were several family friendly sites (Parliament, Westminster, London Eye, Paddington Experience, London Dungeon, Boat Rides) extremely close to the hotel and all the tourist trolley buses stop in front of the hotel as well.

Title: Perfect accommodations.

Title: Amazing family trip to London with our family of four
ReviewText:
We absolutely loved our stay at the Marriott London County Hall, and I can honestly say it was the best experience we have ever had at any Marriott property.

I want to give a massive shoutout to the entire front desk staff, and to Hun in particular. He is an absolutely amazing staff member. We were so incredibly grateful that he proactively reached out to us when a suite became available, and he made the entire process of moving rooms completely easy and seamless for us. The bellhop who assisted us with our bags was also fantastic and made our transitions effortless.

Title: Comfy and convenient home for vacation

Title: Exceptional Hospitality and a Truly Memorable Stay
ReviewText:
We had an absolutely wonderful stay at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall. From the moment we arrived, we felt extremely welcomed. We didn’t have to worry about our luggage at all as everything was taken care of for us, which immediately allowed us to relax and enjoy the experience. We were greeted with a complimentary drink and were also kindly offered the option to upgrade our reservation, which made us feel truly valued and taken into consideration as guests.

Overall, the entire team is incredibly welcoming, warm, and extremely polite. What really stood out to us is that the staff genuinely takes the time to greet you — they even stop to say hello, which may seem like a small detail, but it makes a big difference and creates such a pleasant atmosphere.

The food was absolutely extraordinary. Every dish we had was delicious, beautifully presented, and clearly prepared with great care. Beyond the quality of the cuisine, the level of attention from the team was remarkable. The staff is constantly attentive and always making sure everything is perfect for the guests.

We would also like to thank Daniel and Salma, who were both very kind and attentive during lunch. Their friendliness and professionalism made the moment even more enjoyable.

Justin was also incredibly kind. When a salad was brought to us with anchovies that we didn’t enjoy, he immediately helped resolve the situation with such kindness and a genuine desire to make us happy. His attentiveness really meant a lot to us.

Finally, our true highlight was Ankita. She is an absolutely wonderful person — kind, sincere, and incredibly attentive. She truly made our stay feel special. She even noticed that my sister had not come down for breakfast and kindly asked if she was okay and whether we would like to bring something to her. That level of care and thoughtfulness touched us deeply.

Ankita truly embodies exceptional hospitality: warm, professional, and genuinely caring. She made our experience even more memorable.

We were a group of four friends, and thanks to the incredible team, we will keep beautiful memories of this stay. If we ever return to England, we will definitely come back to this Palace.

Title: 简评
ReviewText: 总的来说还不错，地理位置很棒，阳台可以直接看到大本钟和伦敦眼。酒店的早餐很有特色也很好吃，这里感谢主厨，有天下楼迟了些，在早餐时间过了后还依然愿意出餐。唯一美中不足的是预定时登记的两个住客但是房间内一次性用品只提供了一人份，客房服务的号码有时候打不通

Title: Beautiful place with perfect service
ReviewText:
It was a wonderful stay.

The building has a great historical flair. The service is British perfect. Rooms 219 and 220 have a great view of the London Eye.

Title: Easy access to all the sites and friendly service
ReviewText: The hotel is in a great location to access all the sites, though the immediate exterior is quite crowded because of this. The rooms are clean, staff very friendly and the M club offers snacks and beverages every evening and has a very nice view of Big Ben and Parliament. Gillray's bar on the main level offers a great variety of gin and lots of nice cocktails as well. The 2 main issues I have, which are small, are the lack of variety of breakfast options through the M club and the food coming out on the cold side. It would be nice to have a few more options or a buffet type breakfast to make things easier for guests to chose from. The other issue is Bonvoy status recognition and general communication with reservations/check-in and suite rewards often are not available to be used despite rooms being available and no upgraded room with view options despite that being a Platinum perk despite asking numerous times. I had to reach out to the hotel prior to arrival as our son was coming on the trip last minute and I received an email back telling me to book an alternate room for my 10yr old. The hotel quickly rectified the issue but it took lots of back and forth. Again, neither of those issues would prevent me from staying here again. Overall the hotel is great and location is great and I would stay again but hopefully with a better room.

Title: Great location. Beautiful hotel. Horrible view. Surface-level service.
ReviewText: The room heating system was loud/broke. The first night we barely slept. The second night we turned it off and sleep was uncomfortable due to the cold temperature. On the third night we opted to barely sleep (noise) but at the least, be warm. The manager sent maintenance who agreed the noise from the heating system was broke/unbearable. We were offered 10% off our total stay, and then double charged for incidentals. Not at all consistent to prior Marriot experiences. Not satisfied with the conditions or the way the matter was handled.

Title: Amazing

Additionally, it is close to Waterloo Station (rail and tube) for those that want to go out further. The staff was amazing and Sim did a great job in getting us settled into our room. If you can get here, I would highly recommend it.

Title: Clean and Comfortable
ReviewText: We enjoyed our stay at the London County Hall. The hotel is large, but very quiet in your room. The hotel and our room was very clean..the housekeeping staff were top notch. The views are beautiful with a lot of action close by. The staff really went out of their way to make sure you have a nice stay. The restaurants are high quality. Walkable to many attractions. My only gripe was the club level options (beside the breakfast which is great)...not much compared to other hotel's I've done club level at. I felt that it was a little misleading as nothing is really out all day and minimal at a small time frame in the evening. I did discuss this with the front desk and they handled it with kindness.

Title: Building with a past transformed to the five-star hotel
ReviewText:
Excellently positioned in the heart of central London, this establishment benefits from a prime location that affords convenient access to the capital's key attractions and business districts.

The property has undergone refurbishment from its previous use, though the execution appears somewhat inconsistent throughout. Whilst certain areas showcase genuinely impressive restoration work that befits the venue's aspirations, other sections regrettably exhibit signs of wear that detract from the overall guest experience.

The Library breakfast setting provides an undeniably charming and sophisticated atmosphere for morning dining. However, the service execution falls short of expectations one might reasonably hold for a five-star establishment. The provision of capsule coffee, whilst convenient for the staff, lacks the artisanal touch one would anticipate at this level, and the use of plastic covered tables feels incongruous with the otherwise refined surroundings.

Overall, whilst the property demonstrates considerable potential and boasts an enviable location, there remains scope for improvement in ensuring consistency of standards throughout the guest experience.

Title: Short stay
ReviewText: Overall experience was average check in was slow and arduous, we got the incorrect bill in the bar with only 2 groups seated and breakfast was very expensive with a latte costing £7.00. Title: Marriott County Hall
ReviewText: This is an excellent hotel in the heart of London with all the necessary facilities to include gym swimming pool and very good steakhouse restaurant.The staff are excellent and it is also very child friendly

Title: Not great
ReviewText: Poor service, vermin in Hotel and cold food!

Title: Perfect spot to stay
ReviewText: A wonderful hotel with friendly and welcoming staff. We’ll be back

Title: Gracias por una experiencia inolvidable
ReviewText: El Servicio y atención de todo el equipo fue fabuloso, la atención y detalle de servicio desde antes de mi llegada fue brillante, agradezco a Eric O'Doherty | Rooms Voyager, por una fabulosa sorpresa al llegar, muchas gracias

Title: Disappointing
ReviewText: Does not live up to the standards of other Marriott brand hotels we’ve stayed in London such as Westin, Bankside  and the historic Sheraton Grand, as well as older hotels such as Vienna Marriott, Amsterdam etc. M Club food and beverages are  dismal. Library breakfasts are average, cold when should be hot, and cold when should be chilled.  Only one overpriced restaurant. Staff are pleasant.

Title: Un hôtel à la vue exceptionnelle mais avec un service indigne d’un 5 etoiles
ReviewText: Une vue  éblouissante un lieu incroyable mais un service à améliorer

Title: London holiday
ReviewText: Excellent location, great staff, lovely room with a great view, the essence of London is felt

Title: Horrible
ReviewText:
Noisy room, poor hygiene, broken basics
My room had a loud heating unit on the balcony droning all night. Check-in was chaos — over 40 minutes for a room that then smelled bad, with a sewage smell in the bathroom. Water pressure was weak, hot water didn’t work, and nothing was fixed after I reported it. Staff were unprofessional and the overall cleanliness was low. Not the standard I expect from Marriott.

Title: Exactly what was needed
ReviewText: The hotel is fantastic both as a building and for access to central london. The staff really make you feel at home and are professional and couteous. We only had 2 nights as attending a function nearby but really enjoyed the amenities and the customer service that we recieved.

Title: Fantastic hotel
ReviewText:
This hotel is fantastic, in a great location, with all the needed features!

We walked just about everywhere. A quick walk to the changing of the guard, shopping, amazing food and local tour meeting points.

The staff greets you warmly with every entrance and exit. There’s a free candy closet. Nice coffee and tea in the room. Just a nice and comfortable place to stay.

Title: First time travelers to London
ReviewText: County Hall Marriott is perfectly located on the Thames and near major London attractions.  It is a beautiful hotel with friendly and professional staff.  I highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting London.

Title: Terrible noise in the bedroom
ReviewText: Nice hotel but terrible noise in the bedroom all day and all night.

Title: In the heart of it all
ReviewText: I would recommend staying here if you’re in for the major landmarks of London.

Title: Stuck in 200 year old mindset
ReviewText: Despite being a relatively premium Marriott property, the service staff does not treat all its customers equally. Most of the staff was constantly and unnecessarily rude or curt. They made no effort to talk or listen, maybe because they were over worked. Small things like room linens remained unchanged for the duration of the stay, and served items from which food was eaten out of, seems surprising and deeply disappointing. To summarise, the hotel can be avoided if you are not from their "target" customer base.

Title: Magic view against London Eye and Big Ben
ReviewText: Excellent stay magic view, nice environment

Title: Amazing Marriott hotel
ReviewText: Loved my stay there and really felt comfortable with exclusive treatment and amazing service with a spacious room!

Title: Best Hotel in London
ReviewText: This hotel went above and beyond for us. They ensured all requests were fulfilled, and went above and beyond to celebrate my husband’s birthday! Beyond the clean rooms, welcoming and kind staff, the hotel is in the best spot in London. Very easy to walk to just about anything you want to in the city. When we did need to take a taxi to the train very early in the morning, staff ensured they had one waiting. I am blown away by this hotel and their staff! A+ spot in the middle of London!

Title: Stay in the Heart of London
ReviewText: Fabulous hotel found in the Heart of London. Timeless design and elegant architecture with the highest of service.

Title: Always love going back to this hotel !
ReviewText:
It’s our second time staying at this property.  The staff is always so helpful attentive and go above and beyond.  
We will come back again next year!

Title: Stay by the Eye
ReviewText: Excellent / the hotel met my expectations.

Title: A great hotel in the heard of the London city!
ReviewText: This was the 4th time staying in the MH County Hall. The hotel has an amazing location and an overall nice atmosphere. I very much appreciate the traditional "look&feel"; the other hotels in the area look more like hotels in Dubai, and not in UK :-)

Title: Nothing much all good
ReviewText: Thank you so much it was nice staying at Marriott county hall London

Title: LONDON
ReviewText: The hotel relies heavily on its prime location, which is indeed excellent, but unfortunately the overall condition feels rather dated and in need of refurbishment. The breakfast was underwhelming, both in terms of variety and quality. At the restaurant, the steaks we were served at lunch were cold and lacking in flavor, which was quite disappointing. Sadly, it felt like money poorly spent. I truly enjoy staying at Marriott properties in other capital cities, but regrettably, in London I would not choose to return

Title: London's Marriott County Hall gets a TWO THUMBS UP
ReviewText: You will not be disappointed staying at this property.  Marriott always delivers such a wonderful experience, and this one does not disappoint!!!......Everyone and everything was top notch!!  Enjoy!!!

Title: Outstanding Hotel
ReviewText: This hotel was outstanding! Excellent location and the staff was very friendly and helpful. I would highly recommend this hotel!

Title: Room... not as expected for £800 per night.
ReviewText: Room... not as expected for £800 per night.

Title: Excellent experience
ReviewText: This hotel was beyond amazing. It was one of our favourites.  Amazing location. We walked everywhere even to Nottinghill !!!

Title: Mom 78 celebration in London.
ReviewText:
We stayed at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall to celebrate my mother’s 78th birthday, and it was a wonderful experience. The location on the South Bank could not be better, with stunning views of Big Ben and the Thames that made our stay feel truly special. The historic building has so much charm and character, and the atmosphere throughout the hotel felt warm and welcoming.

The staff went out of their way to make our visit memorable. Everyone we encountered was friendly and attentive, which added a personal touch to our stay. The rooms were comfortable, clean, and well-appointed, and we appreciated the thoughtful details that made us feel cared for.

Overall, our experience was excellent. The combination of beautiful views, great service, and a celebratory atmosphere made our visit unforgettable. We would happily return and recommend this hotel to others.

Title: Exceeded expectations
ReviewText: Checkin was very helpful and friendly, rooms were much nicer than expected, m club breakfast was very nice/good, close to tube at Westminster and Waterloo

Title: Excellent base for sightseeing or onward travel by train at Waterloo Station.
ReviewText:
Booked here as we had stayed before and needed a base close to Waterloo station as I had a client in Shaftsbury and were travelling by train to Salisbury from Waterloo.  Room pleasant and quiet. Overlooked gardens that front onto South Bank.   
We didn't eat in hotel, so couldn't really give a rating for that.

Title: Good Hotel but not perfect
ReviewText: Perfect location of this hotel is best thing about it. Old building compromise on rooms - be prepared for very small rooms or rooms with nice big windows with a view on ... wall :-(. Overall good experience but could be much better. Breakfast options are limited if you compare with other similar hotels.

Title: Ideal accommodation for graduations
ReviewText: Our whole family attended our daughter's graduation and wanted truly exceptional accommodation. The Marriott County Hall London exceeded our expectations – from its rich tradition and perfect location to the outstanding staff. Everything was of the highest quality and professionalism. A truly memorable stay.

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Fantastic location. Amazing staff. Beautiful views.

Title: One night for Coldplay
ReviewText:
this was a one night stay, arriving around 15:30 and departing late on Friday at 1300.
On arrival the greeting was immaculate, 1st impressions very good. The courtyard was clean, the door staff polite and reception very smart and courteous.

The room was clean and made up very well, the view of the river and the London Eye very much appreciated.
We visited the swimming pool but the water felt pretty cold unfortunately and so decided against a swim on day 1
We went out for the evening and returned late, when I requested a late check out and booked breakfast, all handled very well.
Slept well and had early breakfast with my son - the coffee grinder in the restaurant was broken apparently but the filter coffee was ok.
My son had eggs benedict  and declared it to be very good.
Later I had breakfast with my Daughter, I had the full breakfast and she had the smashed avocado on toast.
The full breakfast was pretty good, the smashed avocado was just a tad too citrus but still good.

We tried the swimming pool which felt a good (warmer) temperature than the previous evening - the swim was very much appreciated. 
I had used the gym previous to the swim, the gym is clean and well stocked with kit.
Overall very good, 

- the coffee machine in the room? not a fan of the nespresso pods if I'm honest and there is NEVER enough milk! I used the 4 cartons of milk in one drink!
And instead of sugar, offer honey.

The hotel was clean and well looked after and the staff were all excellent, courteous and friendly without being over the top.
Really impressed, thank you

Title: Great Location! Wonderful Stay!
ReviewText: This was our second time staying here!  Very clean, friendly and accommodating staff! Highly recommend!

Title: Very happy with stay
ReviewText: Very happy with my stay, above my expectations and one of the better Marriott hotels in terms of staff and service

Title: Brilliant stay in Westminster London.
ReviewText: The County Hall is riverfront excellence. Attentive staff, excellent food and a location walkable to all of Westminster and beyond. Easy tube access to all of London makes the location perfect for day trips or just zipping around London and the suburbs. Simply wonderful.

Title: Amazing stay in London!
ReviewText:
Marriott London in County Hall was absolutely amazing! We got a River Thames view suite with views of the London Eye and Big Ben. The room was spacious, clean and very well appointed. They even had a nice basket of goodies for my six year old daughter as I had previously explained that this was her first time in Europe. They really went all out and had a Beefeater teddy bear as well as matching robe and slippers, and even some fun toys and snacks for her to enjoy.
Check in was smooth, Bashir at the front desk was very welcoming and offered great suggestions for things to do in the area. Breakfast at Gilray’s steakhouse downstairs was perfect every morning and Sanda made us feel so welcome, always coming to check on us without being overbearing and my daughter absolutely adored her!
Location wise, this place can’t be beat! We were walking distance to the Waterloo bridge so we could easily walk pretty much anywhere and the staff was very helpful about calling taxis for us whenever we needed one.
Overall, this was an amazing trip and the folks at Marriott County Hall really made the trip all the more special and memorable. 10/10, highly recommended and I will certainly be back!

Title: Excellent Experience
ReviewText: The staff was professional, polite and went the extra mile to be helpful.

Title: Exceeded Expectations!
ReviewText: Had a great stay at Marriott County Hall! Perfect location along the Thames, walking distance to major attractions. The staff couldn't have been nicer. The M Club was a huge benefit with great views and staff.

Title: Family trip, not again
ReviewText: only one positive thing, the room was spacious and clean

Title: A hotel in the heart of it all
ReviewText:
My family came to London for a few days of sightseeing in late August and had the pleasure of staying at the London Marriott County Hall. It is truly in the heart of it all, walkable to countless historic locations and just a few minute walk from the train station. The service was excellent, food/restaurants great, and the room was perfect for the three of us with views of the Parliament building and the eye. 
Truly the place to stay if you want to come enjoy London and all its history and beauty.

Title: Séjour loupé
ReviewText: Hôtel qui se targue d etre hôtel international et de grand standing mais bruit perceuse 06h39 peu de personnel parlant français et entretien chambre trop tardif

Title: Great Location.  Great service.
ReviewText: My excellent is a 9 out of 10.  Subject says it all starting with baggage handling when we arrived, when we left and everything in between.  Would have been a 10 but restaurant was an 8 for dinner. Hard to screw up breakfast but haven't you heard of CANADIAN bacon?

Title: Enjoyable London Stay
ReviewText: The hotel is beautiful, staff was excellent, location was perfect. Restaurant service was ok and the menu not kid friendly.

Title: Not recommended
ReviewText: We certainly expect more when staying at a 5-star hotel. The accessories and amenities provided were below expectations, and the breakfast setup was limited and disappointing. It gave the impression that management is cutting costs wherever possible, which unfortunately reduces the overall guest experience.

Title: London
ReviewText: Excellent hotel but not worth the cost.

Title: Excellent Stay for our first time in London
ReviewText:
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at the London Marriott County Hall. The entire staff was exceptional, but a few people truly stood out. Darragh at the front desk was an absolute delight—so helpful and welcoming! This was our first time in London, and he gave us excellent tips that really helped us navigate the city. Eric in the M Club Lounge was so much fun—we looked forward to chatting every evening during cocktail hour.

We were pleasantly surprised with an upgrade to a room overlooking Big Ben and the London Eye. The view was incredible, and we enjoyed it so much. Since it’s the sunny side of the hotel, we did keep the curtains closed during the day to keep the room cool, but it was a small tradeoff for such a beautiful view.

We also loved the M Club and breakfast at the Library—both were highlights of our stay.

There are many places to stay in London, but I’m so glad we chose Marriott County Hall. I would return without hesitation. Thank you to the entire team for making our first trip to London so memorable!

Title: Excellent Stay in London
ReviewText: Great Property-Wonderful Staff-Excellent Location

Title: Lovely London Location
ReviewText: It's unlikely you'll find a better location right next to the Eye and in front of Big Ben. The rooms were lovely and updated and the service was wonderful.

Title: London Thames Hotel
ReviewText: Great location and atmosphere. Good food options and great amenities especially for families. The rooms are clean and bright with nice views.

Title: Good …could be better
ReviewText: For price point we expected higher level of service.

Title: All Around Excellent
ReviewText: The location is perfect, you're in the heart of all to see. The staff is friendly and welcoming. Justin goes above and beyond as supervisor. The building is historical and beautiful.

Title: Family vacation. Could not have been better. These brits don’t play.
ReviewText:
I never leave reviews unless its a disaster or something spectacular.  That averages about one review every five years. So here I am
with a quick note about the county hall: this place has the best service. It’s impeccable. Staff are kind and professional. Food is great. Folks are generous with their time. Rooms are awesome (we arrived too early with my small children and they gave us a room
to refresh..thank you!). Great meals, the girls loved the pool and the best (central location) in London. 10/10.

Title: Excellent Stay
ReviewText: Excellent location, friendly staff and great services.

Title: London Marriott
ReviewText: Five Stars across the board!

Title: 非常好
ReviewText: 房间干净明亮，地理位置极好。为此次英国之行的点睛之笔。

Title: Stuff that memories are made of.
ReviewText:
We walked around to the wrong entrance when we first arrived, but were kindly greeted by the staff of the restaurant, who took our bag and escorted us to the reception desk. From this point onwards we felt well taken care of and looked after. We were treated to a glass of sparkling wine whilst we checked in and found that the whole experience was smooth and stress free. We got to our room to find a thoughtful gesture from the hotel for our anniversary. The room was spacious and the bed comfortable. The room and facilities were all clean and comfortable. 
The club lounge has a wonderful view and is well worth the consideration of an upgrade if offered to you. We were well looked after by Justen and Clara - the hosts of the Club Lounge.
Breakfast in the library was a beautiful experience with fantastic food coupled with great service.
If you are staying in London for a special occasion, the location of this hotel makes it a great choice.
Highly recommend and look forward to getting the chance to stay here again in the future.

Title: Impressive four-night stay at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall
ReviewText: During my recent four-night stay at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall, I was thoroughly impressed by the level of service and attention to detail. Before my arrival, the staff proactively reached out via email to inquire about my preferences and requests, ensuring a personalized experience. Upon check-in, the concierge manager, Furqan, welcomed me and provided a wonderful room that met all my requests. The room itself was elegant and recently renovated, featuring a loft window that offered a stunning view of Big Ben and the River Thames. The bathroom was well-equipped with a luxurious bathtub and Molton Brown toiletries, adding to the overall comfort. Throughout my stay, I enjoyed breakfast at Gillray's Steakhouse & Bar, tried room service, and made use of the laundry service, all of which exceeded my expectations with top-notch service and exceptional hospitality. I can't wait to return!

Title: Our every eryneed met
ReviewText:
2 generations stayed for 2 nights for  the occasion  of  my daughters Graduation  ceremony.
E very member  of staff  went out of their way to make sure our needs were met.
Lovely spacious  rooms and bathrooms

Title: Great location and great staff!
ReviewText: Our family of 4 stayed here for our week in London from the USA. We loved this hotel! The location is amazing and even more importantly the staff is outstanding. The location cannot be beat as you are right in the heart of London and can walk to almost everything. Almost every employee said hello and asked if we needed anything. The entire team strives for an outstanding customer experience and they really care. We loved our stay here and would highly recommend to anyone visiting London. The history of the hotel is also very cool. A very historic building. Great job to the team at the London Marriott County Hall!

Title: Celebrating my daughter’s birthday in London!
ReviewText: My daughter wanted to go to London for her sweet 16 instead of having a party. The hotel staff greeted her arrival with a special birthday treat. She was so excited to have the surprise waiting for her.

Title: amazing stay
ReviewText: iconic trip amazing hotel loved everything about it thank u london marriott hotel county hall

Title: Great Hotel, Excellent Location
ReviewText: A quiet peaceful place to relax.  Great service in at the bar and restaurant.  Maid service and room cleanliness first rate.

Title: Marriott Hotel County Hall London review
ReviewText: This hotel is exceptional in that its historic and cultured nature is clearly defined by its exceptional staff, the amenities offered and how well the hire is kept.

Title: Great stay
ReviewText: Excellent location and view. Staff are professional and friendly.

Title: Great job, Marriot!
ReviewText: Wonderful experience in London!

Title: An amazing stay at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall
ReviewText:
London Marriott Hotel County Hall delivers on all it promises. The Concierge Staff reached out to me prior to my visit and when I informed them I was coming to London to celebrate my anniversary and daughter’s birthday they had an arrangement and celebration cookies setup in my room for our arrival. A very nice special touch.

The front desk staff were amazing as well. The first thing they did was thank me for my status and personally showed me to my room. They were doing this for everyone regardless of status so that reflects greatly upon the customer service of the hotel.

I called them many times for questions during my stay and they politely answered every one of them including showing me how to get to a pharmacy last minute as my daughter had an unexpected overnight illness during our stay.

I will highly recommend the London Marriott Hotel County Hall without reservation to all my family and friends and it will be the hotel of choice for me whenever I come to London.

Title: In the heart of everything!
ReviewText:
We just spent 6 days at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall and would love to return! The historic building is gorgeous and well kept. The rooms are comfortable and outfitted well. The front desk staff, especially Justin who called us before we left the US, was welcoming and helpful; the concierge staff and security, especially Prince and Charlie, made made us feel safe and well-cared for. We were able to enjoy The Library for breakfast every morning and the staff in there as well in the M Club Lounge were friendly and made certain we had everything we needed. Additionally, the views from both of those locations cannot be beat. Sadly, those staff members didn't wear name tags so we cannot give them specific kudos. 
Be aware that the walk to many of the rooms can be very long and the only accessible entrance to the building is located in a secure, guarded area far away from the main portion of the hotel. The drinks and food available in Gillray's bar and restaurant were both good, but this is the only place we found service to be lacking. However, room service delivery of food from there was fast and accurate. 
We would highly recommend staying here to anyone looking for a hotel in central London that is close to everything!

Title: London Marriott County Hall Review
ReviewText: We had a great experience!

ReviewText:

Thank you

Title: Thank You Marriott County Hall For a Wonderful Stay
ReviewText: Beautiful location at Westminster Bridge, the "Eye", Big Ben, Westminster Abbey and Parliament. A wonderful friendly staff will greet you and serve you throughout your stay. History and wonderful restaurants and Pubs are all within walking distance or a short cab ride.

Title: Never disappoints
ReviewText: Fantastic location and service.

Title: Great 4 days stay at Marriott County Hall
ReviewText:
Visited quite a few hotels over the last years and can say that the total experience of this Marriott hotel was higher than my expectations.
The total commitment of the staff to give us the best experience made my wife very happy, smiling all day. The most important element to me.

Title: Horrible Marriott Experience for a Loyal Member
ReviewText: Awful stay where at every point possible there were issues from room location, to customer service, to room maintenance to bill disputes.  Highly disappointing for a very loyal Marriott Member who felt unheard and very little customer service recovery.

Title: Meeting hotel
ReviewText: Need to spend a little money to create wow factor upon entrance.  Wouldnt take much, but it created a negative feeling for the hotel.

Title: Excellent service!
ReviewText: Sam and the team at reception were amazing!  We needed to add a day to our stay and Sam worked hard to make sure we had the room we needed for our family.  Our stay was wonderful!

Title: Great hotel - great location
ReviewText: Great hotel with fantastic staff in a good location.  Spacious, clean rooms. Gillray’s Steakhouse has a delicious dinner menu. Definitely recommend.

Title: Love this hotel with wonderful and helpful staff
ReviewText: We have now stayed at the Marriott hotel, county hall a good number of times and each time it gets better.  The staff are extremely helpful and friendly (say hello to Barry and the team at the front of house).  The interior is beautiful and there are little touches of London throughout the hotel.  The wall paper is unique with a partial map of London via the Thames in the toilets.  We only stay here when available.  It is close to the London eye, Big Ben, Houses of parliament, Buckingham palace etc.  You can park your car at the front of the entrance with easy access.  Highly recommended throughout.

Title: Best Hotel Experience we've ever had!
ReviewText: The hotel is majestic and historic in nature. It is a beautiful place to stay with views of the Thames and Parliament that are incredible. And the staff who run this fine hotel are top knotch, specifically Georgia Lambert and Gabriela who who works at the front desk. Both of these ladies went out of their way to provide personal, top shelf service. They are the best we have ever worked with in any hotel/resort environment! We cannot thank them enough!

Title: Perfect Stay
ReviewText:
Everything was A+. I have to say one of the best parts was the staff! We were spoiled and it was wonderful!
Thank you

Title: Excellent all round.
ReviewText: The hotel was everything we could have asked for, from the first friendly greeting to the final farewell. Excellent food, cooked and presented beautifully.

Title: Amazing location, disappointing experience
ReviewText: Had to move rooms a few times due to technical issues and was offered some points as compensation.  Very expensive sunglasses disappeared from the room after I checked out.  Housekeeping didn’t change the sheets or remove the garbage until specifically requested to do so.  On the bright side the amazing location and beautiful architecture does a fair bit to make up for some of the drawbacks.

Title: Room and View is not the same as booked and paid for.

Restaurent is published with good view of Big Ben and London Eye view witch is not correct,we could see part or view.
Good hotel for good London location.

Title: First time
ReviewText: I though I will have good experience depending of the cost of the room

Title: Consistent High Std
ReviewText: Always committed to a top quality customer experience

Title: Incredible Stay on the Thames
ReviewText: The London Marriott County Hall is perfectly located right on the Queen's Walk and across from Big Ben. Access to the Waterloo and Westminster stations made it very easy to get around the city. And the staff at the hotel are all professional and welcoming. We would absolutely consider staying here again on our next visit to London.

Title: Amazing stay at the Marriott
ReviewText: Fabulous Hotel in a fabulous location. Staff were all very friendly and amazing at their jobs. Every member of staff made us feel happy and special and the Hotel Manager is fabulous x

Title: Wedding Anniversary stay
ReviewText: Over all amazing. Thanks to the whole team. Cate at recepion, M club service and Mikaela at The libraby who brought us a slice of cake with anniversary greetings on them thank you Mikaela, nice chat and great service, amazing breakfast too. Thank you for making our anniversary even more special. Definitely coming back soon. 😊

Title: Great place to stay
ReviewText:
Great staff fantastic location easy access to rail. Lots to do in the area. Next to London Eye and Big Ben. 
Front desk very helpful. Furqah was very kind and made our visit great. 
Appreciate the guest relations manager Eyad for the great support.  Thank you BGC

Title: Five Night Stay
ReviewText: We stayed here 5 nights and had a great experience.  The rooms were quiet and the staff was exceptional.

Title: Is not worth it
ReviewText:
The hotel charges a lot more for the location and the view. Do not hold your breath for the view. The London Eye got a better view of my room than I did of the Big Ben view that I paid 50 pounds more for. In addition, the room was not ready when I arrived at 3:30 PM which is past the check in time. Instead, our room was not ready closer to 7pm. The hotel said they would give me a call when the room was ready, but no one called (that can easily be checked on their phone recordings). The luggage was not brought into the room until I check in and had to call myself to my luggage to be found. 
Due to a late check in, the hotel tried to compensate by giving an access to an executive lounge, but they gave it to the other 50-100 people that were in the same boat. Due to waiting for so long to check in, the front desk said they will give an amazing view (which I already paid for myself) but instead just gave the London eye a view of my room instead and a Thames view for me with a sliver of Big Ben. 
Don’t waste your money and stay somewhere maybe without a view but way better service.

Title: My Family’s #1 Choice in London
ReviewText: Traveling across the Atlantic with a 2-year old and a 6-month old is no small feat, but the London Marriott County Hall made it a remarkably smooth and enjoyable one. This trip we were especially grateful for Justin, Yuri, and Barry who all went above and beyond to ensure my family felt incredibly well-cared for. This place will remain our choice for staying in London!

Title: Top Hotel for London sights
ReviewText: The hotel is outstanding, delivering on food, M club, bar, location to aights and multiple restaurants within ez walking distance!! Great staff and livery accommodations.

Title: Can be better
ReviewText: Location is amazing. However for the price, room is very small, service is usually slow and your door get knocked on multiple time a day which is quite disruptive.

Title: Absolutely fabulous!
ReviewText: We had a wonderful stay. The hotel is lovely.  Our room was spacious (Try finding that in New York City for that price!), well appointed and had a terrific view of Big Ben and the Thames. The location was convenient. The staff was unfailingly helpful and friendly. Can’t wait to return!

Title: Excellent hotel along the river Thames in London
ReviewText: The hotel is in the perfect location to see London.  Across from the Parliament building and next to the London Eye.

Title: Great stay
ReviewText:
Hotel is very welcoming and staff professional, courteous and friendly.

Room was clean and of a high standard. We only stayed for one night but, highly impressed and would highly recommend staying there.

Title: Excellent quality and great value
ReviewText: London Marriott County Hall met or exceeded all our expectations. It’s in an excellent location, provides great service and top notch amenities and is not as expensive as other luxury hotels.

Title: Wonderful experience
ReviewText: Thank you Ms. Sarah and the London Marriot London hotel staff for a wonderful stay our first time in London. London is such a great place with amazing people in it . We had such a great time during our visit . Thank you to the Front desk , Housekeeping , Houseman/Housewoman for your great service and making our experience amazing. You are appreciated . We will return again but with additional family members to experience this wonderful hotel and staff.

Title: Short Weekend
ReviewText: Great amenities, great location, great staff.  Would stay again!

Title: Great Hotel

Title: London visit

Title: Never again
