Title: Terrible trip to the London Marriott county Hall
ReviewText: Our son and his wife and us stayed for 5 nights at your hotel after cruising the Brittish isles with Viking. We had reserved two rooms one being the Westminster suite. Their room had no air conditioning. Our room lost electricity for the first night and next morning we stayed there. We will not stay with Marriott in the future.

Title: Excellent service in a wonderful setting
ReviewText: An excellent location, right on the Thames with views of Big Ben.  But it was the high quality service that made our trip so wonderful.  Plenty of helpful, knowledgeable and friendly staff anticipated and responded to all of our needs.  Kudos to the management team for creating such a great environment.

Title: Gutes Hotel
ReviewText: Hotel mit sehr guter Lage. Schönes Gebäude und schöne Zimmer. Reinigung Zimmer in Ordnung. Personal weitgehend freundlich und hilfsbereit. Speisen in Ordnung jedoch stimmt Preis / Leistung nicht.

Title: Excellent property
ReviewText: Great hotel. Fantastic staff. Central location. Great rooms and art!

Title: County Hall Amazing Stay
ReviewText: We had a fantastic stay at the County Hall Marriott in London. The M Lounge was a standout, comfortable, stylish, and stocked with great food and drinks throughout the day. The staff went above and beyond, always helpful and patient with our questions. Dining at the hotel was excellent, offering a variety of delicious options, and the pool was a big hit with the kids. Highly recommend for families or anyone looking for a comfortable and well-serviced stay in the heart of London.

Title: Definitely expected more from a Marriot hotel. t.
ReviewText: Hotel is not stroller friendly, some porters do not have the initiative to help even when they see us struggling to bring the stroller up the entrance steps. One porter, Yuri, is proactive and very highly commendable. The sweet treats is a brilliant gesture for families. On the last day, we called in to request for a morning wake up call as we had to catch an early flight. I reminded the front desk twice and the second time the guy even shook me off and said that if I told them once it is enough. In the end, no morning call came at all. Truly disappointing and poor service.

Title: Best Marriott staff ever! Thanks.
ReviewText: Love the hard working people there like Barry, Mohamed, Thomas, Sandra, Justin and Oliver!

Title: Beautiful treat
ReviewText: This was a treat for my husbands up and coming big birthday. We had an amazing stay, staff were amazing, hotel was spotless and room was spacious and comfy beds.

Title: Weekend Stay
ReviewText: Excellent location, great members of staff and fantastic service and facilities

Title: Overnight Stay
ReviewText: Clean, efficient, excellent service, friendly, good food, terrific bed, marvellous view from bedroom,

Title: Great hotel! 5 star service and nice rooms
ReviewText: We loved this hotel! The staff in every part of the hotel took great care of us and were friendly and super helpful. The rooms were big, very clean and nice amenities. Housekeeping was on it daily, restaurant and room service were so good. Centrally located to all we wanted to see and do. I needed laundry services as we had been traveling for 2 weeks and the service was easy and done same day. I also ran into an issue around transportation back to Heathrow at checkout and the reception staff had a Mercedes van for us in a matter of 5 minutes which was a relief. Overall 5 stars and we would stay here again.

Title: Fabulous hotel, great location!
ReviewText: I would recommend this hotel to anyone. It’s a beautiful hotel, fabulous location, and the staff so friendly and so accommodating..

Title: Wonderful Experience!
ReviewText: We had a fantastic stay. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful. The dining was excellent, the bar had a terrific atmosphere providing a great place to relax. The location was very convenient. Highly recommend!

Title: Location is best thing about this place
ReviewText: First time to London. Paid for a Big Ben view. Couldn’t really see Big Ben from the room unless you climbed the sofa and pushed your face against the wall. Room service gave me undercooked chicken. I told the staff and nothing was said or done. Other than that, great location. Room was mostly clean with some stained carpet and stained sofa. Waited forever at Gillrays for the food to come out. Just ok.

Title: Great Stay
ReviewText: Very friendly staff and the property was well maintained.   Great location to get around easily

Title: London Marriott review
ReviewText: The service and amenities were excellent. The hotel location is ideal. Breakfast in the Library, looking out the window at Big Ben, will be one of my enduring memories of London.

Title: Wonderful location, attentive service
ReviewText:
The hotel was beautiful, in a prime location to see the sights. In a busy area but inside was quiet and calm. The staff and service is top notch. Extra touches including candy and lemon water. My family of four had an excellent stay! Only knock I’ll give is our first room wasn’t cleaned properly - but we were able to switch and all was well! 
Would return.

Title: Marriott Hotel County Hall 😊
ReviewText: We had the opportunity to spend the night in this hotel. Can only recommend. It was fantastic.

Title: Worth it
ReviewText: A lovely hotel. Everyone was so kind, the hotel was well-maintained, and the room was completely silent for sleep.

Title: The Perfect Stay
ReviewText: We were in London for my birthday and Marriott County Hall gifted me with a great stay. Staff were very attentive, helpful and kind. The room was spacious, food was great, and the M Club Lounge was a quiet respite at the end of the day. Highly recommend.

Title: Stunning hotel
ReviewText: We loved every moment of our stay at the beautiful County Hall in London. The location, the incredible staff, the accommodations…we could go on and on. We can’t wait to return. Thank you!

Title: Just amazing attention to detail in every way exceptional hotel and service
ReviewText: The County Hall Marriott overdelivered on absolutely everything. we were so warmly welcomed and really looked after. The location, the views, the hotel reception, and rooms were stunning. Everything was well designed and spotless. My daughters were so spoiled and they loved the pool. The food was great and the service was spot on. Seriously well done to all involved, best we have stay in years.

Title: Lovely Stay, great location
ReviewText: The hotel staff was excellent.  Everyone was friendly and very helpful. The M Club was great, and staff was excellent.  Rooms were clean and good size. Only issue we had was at the bar/food for Gillroy's.  When we ordered the waiter forgot to request something to the chef in our order leaving the meal not edible based on how it was made for us.   In addition my husbands meal was undercooked that evening. There was an apology, and waiter admitted his fault, but we still paid for full meal. Gillroy's bar had good variety and fun drinks.   The location is excellent for sites and getting around on the tube.

Title: Un séjour inoubliable que nous recommandons chaudement !
ReviewText: L’hôtel, situé dans l’ancien bâtiment historique de la mairie londonienne, a été rénové récemment. Il est idéalement situé, au bord de la Tamise et en face de Westminster et Big Ben, que l’on voit depuis le bar et le restaurant. Ce dernier, bien qu’il soit un Grillhouse avec de bonnes spécialités carnées, est varié et propose de bonnes variantes végétariennes et du poisson. Le personnel est vraiment très accueillant, et le directeur fort sympathique! Les chambres sont confortables et propres. Notre chambre donnait une vue directement sur Big Ben et Westminster. La piscine au 5ème étage est très lumineuse et majestueuse avec ses palmiers, style art déco. Le loung VIP et la bibliothèque sont des extras aussi qui en valent vraiment la peine !  Ce fut un séjour inoubliable que nous recommandons chaudement !

Title: Great location to enjoy London
ReviewText:
Great staff and central location in London 
Easy access to the main sights

Title: An Outstanding Marriott
ReviewText:
This hotel constantly delivers. The rooms really are of what you would expect in a luxury property. The staff are some of the best. Can’t beat the location and the views of the Eye and Parliament! Also love that it’s so close to Waterloo Station. 

This is one of my go to London hotels.

Title: London Marriott an excellent hotel for seeing all London has to offer
ReviewText: London Marriott County Hall is the perfect place to enjoy London.  We enjoyed the hotel amenities, the proximity to everything and the great team that made everything perfect.

Title: Honeymoon stay
ReviewText: We traveled to Europe for our honeymoon and stayed at all Marriott hotels. This was by far the best. To start, the location of the hotel is great. It’s in a very busy central area however it feels very quiet and secluded. It’s in a great location for walking! The staff were amazing. Everyone was very friendly and polite. We were greeted every time we walked into the door and they even recommended activities for us and offered to help us book them if needed. Our room was spectacular! It had a beautiful porch overlooking the river. It was by far the cleanest hotel I’ve ever stayed in. We extremely surprised when we opened the door to our room and it was decorated with rose petals, a champagne bottle, a hand written card, and some tea cookie all for our honeymoon. This was the only Marriott hotel that did something special for us or even mentioned a congratulations even though all the hotels had it noted on our reservation.  A small detail that I really enjoyed was the body care products, they smelt so good and were definitely high quality. We also had turn down service nightly with slippers and chocolates. All in all I felt very special staying here and I would 100% come back.

Title: Excellent spot for a short city break visit to London
ReviewText:
The location is stunning right beside the Thames with views of the London eye, Big Ben & parliament.

So many places are within a very short walking distance.

The staff were extremely friendly

Title: Perfect location for visitors with beautiful view of Big Ben
ReviewText: Excellent location convenient to many sites we were interested in seeing as well as the pier at the London Eye, where we hopped on the Uber “tap on tap off” Uber boats for many other destinations.  The staff, especially our porter, Barry, was excellent and extremely helpful. Short taxi ride to any London theatre.  The facility was beautiful and safe. Included breakfast was hearty and delicious, served by the sweet and attentive Sonde. Ala carte and a bit pricey if not purchased with room.

Title: Amazing view!
ReviewText: Love this hotel. Every thing was perfect. The staff were friendly and welcoming every time we walked in.

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: We had an excellent stay at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall. The staff is welcoming, knowledgeable and very kind. Our room was super clean with an extremely comfortable bed and a gorgeous view of Big Ben and the London Eye. The hotel is in a beautiful historic building and walking distance to everything there is to see in the Westminster area. We didn't have time to try the hotel restaurants but they were fully booked during our stay and that's usually an indication of good food. Everything and everyone at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall was wonderful and we look forward to staying there again on our next visit to London.

Title: Excellent. Hotel is excellent stuff, delicious food,  Great location and great view.
ReviewText: excellent，We' definitely see again as an ambassador member

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Everythings are good as expected from Marriot.  Only disappointed in the THAMES River view as I only assigned on the 2nd floor when I requested a higher floor for 8 days stays.

Title: Great staff and bonus location
ReviewText: The hotel is between two major tube stations- Staff were very professional and kind

Title: Epic London vacation
ReviewText:
The hotel staff is very friendly.
The room is always clean.
I felt safe.
My daughter loved the birthday surprise from the staff. 
Thank you so much!

Title: Family Trip to London
ReviewText: Wonderful hotel in the perfect location. Accommodation standards were excellent, our room was clean, spacious and very comfortable with lovely views. Staff service was excellent, very helpful and friendly. Food options were delicious, lots of variety and all of a a very high quality. Would highly recommend this hotel.

Title: Not at all satisfactory
ReviewText: Nice location, that’s actually the only thing worth paying for. The food and service mediocre. Not worth the price.

Title: This is a great stay！
ReviewText: This stay upgraded me to the Thames View Suite.You can see Westminster Abbey and Big Ben  in London central.

Title: Great stay with room overlooking Big Ben and London eye
ReviewText:
Had a wonderful stay, and Ankitt is a great duty manager who sorted the issues we had prior to check in.
Overall, quality and service breakfast was outstanding. M Club had decent quality food in the evening and an amazing view.
Would stay again.

Title: New Loft rooms
ReviewText: Wonderful hotel -well designed and clean. Front desk staff (Eric) was very professional and helpful. Highly recommended including the breakfast incl option during your stay-very good menu options and not your usual boring buffet with overcooked food. We had an upgraded loft room -very spacious and clean only inconvenience was there was no ledge to put your bathroom products on-its designed for handicap…Excellent location in Westminster for the London eye, Big Ben and Museums nearby as well as tube access.

Title: London Luxury
ReviewText: We experienced a wonderful, comfortable, convenient stay at County Hall!

Title: Exceptional
ReviewText: The stay was great!  I was upgraded to an attic room with a balcony facing probably the most iconic view in London - Westminster Bridge, Parliament, Big Ben, and the Abbey. While the hotel is located in a very busy location, it doesn't feel that way, because of its courtyard entrance; it's quiet and mellow.  The executive lounge seemed fine, and the breakfast downstairs was ok. I don't usually have great expectations when it comes to hotel food, so it really didn't affect my experience.  Another standout piece is the actual 25m 4-lane lap pool on the 5th floor, which is unusual. Swimming is my form of exercise, so for any swimmers coming to London, this is an exceptional find, given its location. Finally, the room was impeccable, stylish and cozy, with good lighting, and the staff was all round welcoming, attentive and responsive.

Title: Amazing stay great location
ReviewText: We loved the hotel, spotless, quite and supportive staff. They provided early check-in. The room is exquisite and the bed is extra comfortable.

Title: Fabulous experience
ReviewText: Great location, fabulous service. We felt really well looked after. The room was bigger than we expected and clean and comfortable. Would highly recommend this hotel.

Title: Excellent hotel, let down by reception staff
ReviewText:
Our stay at the hotel was lovely overall. The location is absolutely perfect, and the room was incredibly spacious. Breakfast was also excellent, with a wide variety of high-quality options.

Unfortunately, the experience at reception fell short of expectations. Upon arrival, there was no greeting, and we noticed other guests being welcomed with champagne. Despite being a Marriott Bonvoy Gold member, there was no acknowledgment of my status, and no mention of an upgrade was made.

I had prepaid for the stay months in advance using a credit card that was later compromised. Upon check-in, I was informed that I needed to pay again, with the assurance that the original transaction would be refunded. However, this refund was not processed as promised. In addition, a £350 security deposit was charged to my card without prior notification.

A week into our stay, I approached the reception desk to follow up on the refund, which had still not been processed. I was informed by a staff member that it had not been done and would take 5-7 business days. Later that day, I spoke with a manager, who claimed the refund had already been processed but blamed the delay on the accounting department not working over weekends. This was untrue, as I only received the refund more than two weeks later—well after returning home.

While speaking with the manager, he asked what he could do to rectify the situation, offering wine or food as compensation. The manner in which this offer was made felt insincere and inadequate, given the inconvenience caused. The offer for wine or food was politely declined. 

While the hotel itself is excellent, with great facilities and an unbeatable location, the poor handling of this issue by the reception staff and management left a lasting negative impression.

Title: Location is Awesome
ReviewText: Location is awesome. Boats get you everywhere you need. They have hop on off under uber app. Eye was there to ride and local subway sandwiches and Starbucks. Car not needed

Title: Stay at the County Hall Marriott
ReviewText: Our stay at the hotel was an  experience .  Thank you

ReviewText: Just enjoyed a 4 night stay at the London Marriott County Hall. Had almost forgotten what truly outstanding service at a hotel was like, but was reminded by the great staff at this property. Bellman Barry is the best!

Title: Recommend
ReviewText: Wonderful stay. Lovely and accommodating staff - very genuine and friendly. Clean and comfortable accommodations.

Title: Will return

Title: Thirty Years of visiting - standards are noticeably slipping.
ReviewText: After 30 years of visiting this hotel, we were desperately disappointed by the lack of attention, care and consideration. We won’t be back this year. Management need to analyse the whole process, many areas are weak and in need of reality check.

Title: Très satisfaite
ReviewText: Merci au London Marriott Hotel county Hall. Ils sont très à l’écoute, l’hôtel est très propre.

Title: Nicht empfehlenswert
ReviewText:
Zu alt zu teuer. Mangelhaft Speisen. 
Fehlerhafte Abrechnung (1300 Pfund zu viel berechnet!!!)

Title: DON’T STAY HERE!!!! RODENTS!!!!!
ReviewText: DO NOT STAY HERE! THE HOTEL HAS RODENTS!!!! My family and I have stayed at the London County Hall multiple times over the years and loved their customer service in the past.  Unfortunately, we stayed here during our Christmas holidays and will never stay again.  We had two rooms for 3 nights that cost me over $5000 and the floor that one of the rooms (605) was on had mice.  They were running down the hallway and you could see them going and coming out of crevices in the rooms and the heaters in the hall.  We saw them 3 times within 2 days!!!!!! I mean, literally running down the long hallway on the 6th floor.  I notified the front desk and management multiple times.  No one seemed concerned at all. After showing the front desk pictures/videos of the mice, my husband and I invited the worker to come with us as you can clearly witness the mice running.  He declined. We were then told by the desk manager that they would let maintenance know in the morning (8 hours later).  I was livid. The next morning, the mice were in the hall again!  I showed the videos and it was clear that the employees were clear of the issue.  One confirmed that mice like the heaters in the halls. I was only offered to move to another room on a different floor after 2 days for our last night.  My daughters were afraid and were dodging the mice when leaving the room. I asked to speak to the hotel manager a few time but was told that he was on holiday and would call me.  I have yet to receive a call after a few follow up calls. As a former Ambassador and current Titanium Elite member, I am throughly disappointed.  I used my platinum Amex to get automatic gold with Hilton. After over 20 plus years as a loyal Marriott supporter, the service has gotten so horrible and the prices keep increasing.  I do not expect to pay $5000 for 3 nights to sleep with rodents.

Title: They cancelled my stay without letting me know.
ReviewText: They cancelled my Balcony Suite booking for 31 December 2024, but as they didn't contact me to notify, and as this reservation was still active within the upcoming reservation section of my online account on 31 December, with me only finding this out upon my arrival at the hotel, could have therefore ended-up with nowhere to stay in London on 31 December 2024, and as they didn't even apologise to me, don't therefore think that they'v ebeen very efficient  in keeping me up to date.

Title: Xmas New Years  maybe Mariott move on
ReviewText:
Hotel Pros
Quick trip London and Paris to celebrate Wife's BD. The preparation execution by hotel staff on cake flowers wine balloons pre order was 110%. 
MClub service great should have a bit larger morning pastry selection
Rooms clean
Hotel Cons
Library breakfast service and food was disappointing
Long walk to rooms
Most activities were across bridges theatre district 30 minute walk
CC cons am ex
As a Canadian am ex business and personal cardholder I only received 15 yearly elite nights for one card and not the other?  While my USA counterparts have received 30 yearly elite nights - why ?  I will now miss my 50 yearly nights for platinum elite status being a few nights short. I hope Marriott will review and provide equal benefits to Canada CC the same as USA CC as it is North America?

Title: Highly Recommended
ReviewText:
I cannot say enough good things about London Marriott County Hall. Their attention to detail and desire to make our trip special started before we arrived. I had sent an email to the hotel letting them know it was our first trip without Spencer and Justin, from the front desk, sent me a heartfelt response welcoming us. When we checked in, Justin was there again to make sure we had everything we needed. When we arrived to our room, he had made sure to leave holiday gifts for the kids and that we had a great view of the Thames, London Eye, and the Christmas Market below. 

Not only was Justin and the rest of the staff wonderful, but Marriott customer service was amazing as well. We had purchased hop on, hop off bus tickets with Marriott points. I was not able to put them in the company's app and they showed as invalid to the drivers. The company's response was sorely inadequate, so Marriott refunded my points without question.

The hotel itself was beautiful and could not have been in a better location to use as a starting point for everything we wanted to do. This all truly added to the incredible experience we had. I highly recommend this hotel to anyone considering a stay in London.

Title: Excellent service, comfortable and chic accommodations, prime location
ReviewText: We loved the location, chic and traditional accommodations, and incredible service from the hotel staff. Not to mention the gorgeous pool!

Title: Wonderful stay
ReviewText: The hotel gave us a charming stay at London with the beautiful view.

Title: Frequent visitor to this wonderful Marriot facility
ReviewText: Wonderful location , friendly staff, v nice breakfast

Title: London Experience
ReviewText: Stayed at the Marriott County Hall, the hotel was awesome, great comfortable rooms, great food , great service. Shout out to Sanda at breakfast at Gilroys , shoutout  to Luisa and Chloe at the executive lounge. The hotel is close to everything within walking distance to bus lines and tours

Title: London visit
ReviewText: Great hotel for visiting London. Location is in a great location for sightseeing and walking

Title: The most incredible home away from home
ReviewText: We absolutely adored every moment of our stay at the Marriott Hotel County Hall from the moment we stepped in the lobby until our departure. Throughout our stay we were greeted with friendly and polite service who even arranged for an upgrade to a room with the view of Big Ben which was truly special and much appreciated. I was also celebrating my birthday and found a lovely selection of gifts waiting for me, and I am so thankful for this special touch. The food, the staff, the elegant decor and attention to detail is incredible. We were met with smile every step of the way and despite it being such a large property we were made to feel at home.

Title: A fantastic stay at London Marriott Hotel
ReviewText: We had an excellent stay at London Marriott Hotel and really enjoyed it. The room that we have taken has a fantastic view of Big Ben and Thames river. The hotel is located near to important landmarks and tourist spot such as London Eye, Westminster Abbey and few miles away from London Bridge so we don't have to spend time thinking about transportation since all these places are reachable by walk. We strongly feel that we have chosen the right place for exploring London. The English breakfast was good but it would have been better if there was Asian and Middle East food options. We are sure that Marriott hotel will incorporate this changes in coming days. We recommend Marriott Hotel for leisurely and business stay at London as this place will provide a fantastic vibe to everyone.

Title: Rat in Executive Lounge
ReviewText: There was a rat in the Executive lounge, the standard of Mariott is no longer great. As a platinum member and with Mariott for 7 years, I don't think I was appreciated at all. You simply don't care about my experience at the hotel.

Title: Great stay in the heart of London!
ReviewText: We had a wonderful time here. The hotel is beautiful and the staff is friendly and helpful. Great service in a great location. Can’t wait to go back!

Title: Best Marriott I have ever been to.
ReviewText: The location is perfect, and the hospitality is exceptional. The facilities are well-maintained, and the restaurant provides a fantastic dining experience with a unique view of Westminster Bridge and Big Ben. What more could you ask for? I will definitely choose the same place for my next stay in London.

Title: Tourist trap very expensive
ReviewText: It is just missing something which left a bad taste in my mouth.

Title: Once again Marriott nails it!
ReviewText: A Christmas stay at Marriott County house was the high point of our vacation. Beautiful old world charm. Gleaming and clean with friendly professional attitudes. Staff were always going a little extra with their help and attitudes. A truly excellent hotel.

Title: Historic County Hall
ReviewText: A warm and friendly hotel right in the heart of London, with beautiful interiors and a great breakfast served at your table. I found it fascinating to stay in a building built on a historic location and having so much history of its own.

Title: Absolutely love this place and so does my family! Thank you
ReviewText: Fantastic team, Fantastic facilities and perfect location.

Title: Management doesn't care
ReviewText: On our 5 day stay we had problem after problem on a daily basis, asked to talk to a supervisor 3 times and never got contacted until after we returned home and wrote them an email.

Title: Good overall stay
ReviewText: Great view from our very comfortable room. Excellent location for catching up in central London. The staff is helpful.

Title: Thanks for another fantastic stay
ReviewText: Another great visit to London thanks to these folks.  The Gilrays folks were outstanding as usual.  Thank you Rayssa, Tiago, Jamie and the rest of your team for the service and professionalism.  Victoria from reception helped make our visit very pleasant from the start as well.  This is our #1 option when visiting London and will continue to be so.

Title: Best hotel stay
ReviewText: This was easily the best hotel experience I’ve ever had. The hotel staff were amazing - friendly, attentive, and helpful for anything I needed. The rooms were also spotless, which made my stay that much more relaxing, knowing I was staying in a clean environment. I’ve already recommended this location to family and friends for their future travel plans and will continue to do so. Thank you!

Title: Birthday stay
ReviewText: Loved every minute of our stay.

Title: Poor service at Marriott Hotel County Hall, London
ReviewText:
We had booked a Deluxe Double room with two beds 6 months before arrival for a special occasion, and we were looking very much forward, because we stayed in your hotel 10 years ago and had a very good experience. When we arrived on 30.11 late in the afternoon, the receptionist could not find our reservation and we felt like B or C guests when waiting for her to find a room because of her attitude. 

After a while we were assigned room 505 (very small room, far away from the reception, freezing cold in the bathroom, facing the backyard and noise from 6.30 am). We were tired from the journey and did not have the energy to go back to the reception to complain when we finally reached the room. Because we wanted to relax in the room we ordered room-service from the menu already at the reception. We wanted two glasses of wine with the food – but that was not possibly? The food was - after long time - served in an orange paper bag, in boxes and without plates, cutlery etc. We have never experienced anything like that before - and in a 5star hotel! The next day we saw a table on wheels with plates etc. a little further down the hall – so the hotel in fact do deliver proper room service the way we have experiences on several other hotels. 

The next day we complained about the room and were moved to room 310, a very nice room. But - the experience from our arrival, the room and the so-called room service overshadowed the good experiences that the hotel subsequently offered. We felt rather humiliated! In the past, we have stayed at Marriott in Singapore, Hua Hinn, Honolulu and Copenhagen and have always enjoyed the fine service. Unfortunately, that was not the experience we got at Marriott Hotel County Hall.

Title: Stay with my family
ReviewText: Amazing stay with my family in the hotel for a long week-end in London. Very kind staff especially with my daughter who was celebrating her birthday.

Title: Great place to stay
ReviewText: Loved this hotel.  I wanted to be centrally located, which it was but it was set back a bit from the street so you didn't hear all of the traffic !!  5 Star experience for sure!!

Title: Scam
ReviewText: On arrival I paid a £100 deposit- not just holding my bank details- actually took the money. Was told I would get it back within the week, week and a half later I’m still waiting. When I called I was told I would get it back in 7-10 days. No lock on my hotel door so felt completely unsafe.

Title: Service and view!
ReviewText: Perfect location with spectacular view! Also its a very clean hotel! I was impressed! Very nice lean bed sheet, big bottles with shampoo and lotion, good minibar and coffee and tea station in room. All team works perfectly, started from bell boy, receptionists, housekeepers and bat/restaurant waitress. Thanks, highly recommend to stay here.

Title: Amazing awesome hotel
ReviewText: Best hotel in London exceptional staff beautiful accommodation top tier. You wouldn't want to stay anywhere else in London.

Title: Wow View and great view
ReviewText: Justin and Yuri were amazing. Room view with London Eye, Thames and Big Ben

Title: Amazing stay
ReviewText: Amazing views and location, perfect for city break

Title: Wedding anniversary weekend
wonderful hotel in every aspect
ReviewText: The hotel is spectacular in every aspect: location, comfort, polite and kind staff, impeccable restaurants and room service. our stay was unforgettable. we will definitely be back.

Title: Excellent stay
ReviewText: What a beautiful hotel! My room was cosy and very well proportioned. I had everything I needed for a pleasant stay. Staff were so polite and always smiling! Will return for sure!

Title: Where you want to be in London
ReviewText: Everything, and I mean everything about this hotel was perfect.  It was am mix of unparalleled service and elegant historical style.  Staff was incredibly attentive and the bars and restaurants were outstanding.  The rooms were impeccably kept and our had a wonderful view of the Thames and Big Ben.  I wouldn't stay anywhere else in London.

Title: Excellent staff
ReviewText: Quiet, comfortable with all amenities. Exceptional staff so pleasant and helpful.

Title: great stay
ReviewText: clean and close to iconic views

Title: Great Base Camp
ReviewText: Great base camp for exploring English culture and history!. You can walk to London Eye, Westminster bridge, and multiple river cruises without having to cross even one street. Easy walk to just about everything! Supposed to be a 5 star hotel so a little hoity-toity (not something we're in to ) , but Justin and his colleagues at the front desk make you feel right at home and are extremely helpful. Room was about what you'd find at any roadside Marriott in the States. Expensive but worth it for its proximity to all the great London stuff! Open the curtains in the morning to see 1000 years of history...

Title: Quality and Comfort
ReviewText: After two weeks of touring, we can always count on Marriott County Hall for a much needed rest and quality of care. It is very convenient to sites and activities if choosing to venture out. If staying in, it offers magnificent views and dining options.

Title: Spectacular visit
ReviewText:
We come to spend a few days in London and The Marriott was amazing. So central for everything we went on from The London Eye to watching The Lion King in the West End. 
Great food and great service.

Title: Exceptional, in every way!!
ReviewText: The staff is the very best, the service incredible, the property fantastic.  The location is one of the best in London.  I highly recommend this fantastic hotel.

Title: Muhammad Riza Marhaban
ReviewText: Excellent hotel to stay. Best location and views. From my experience, if your room is on the end side of the hotel, just prepare for long walk to the room from lifts. And if you want to have breakfast, I suggest to eat outside.

Title: Marriott County Hall
ReviewText: Great location. Make sure to request room close to elevators. Quite a hike if you don’t.

Title: Disabled World Travelers
ReviewText:
The best hotel I've ever stayed in.  Everything was perfect.  Location was perfect, Waking up looking at the time on Big Ben felt like I was still dreaming.  Waving at the passengers on the London Eye was fun.  Location is perfect.
The staff was amazing!  I'm disabled, and the staff went above and beyond making me feel like a VIP.  Shout out to Charles in Security for his superior service.

We loved having a delicious breakfast every morning with the views of BB, LE, sun rising over the Thames River, and everyday the wait staff was vert energetic.  My wife and I are frequent travelers, we have seen a big decline in customer service around the world after COVID, this was not the case here.

Last comment, the decore is perfect.   Beautiful art, hotel history photos, gorgeous historic solid wood ceilings, walls, and doors.  Four, fast, large enough to hold two luggage carts and four passengers elevators.  Silly comment maybe, but we never waited more than 30 seconds for an elevator. 😀

Title: Awesome Location!
ReviewText: Great hotel, great staff, great everything!  Close to all things London and subway (tube) stations.  We could not have picked a better location!  The room was very comfortable and we slept so well here!  The breakfast and breakfast staff (Sanda) were amazing and you must try the berry, granola, yogurt.  We were so happy here that there is no doubt where we will stay with our family next time we get to London!

Title: not worth it
ReviewText: It is not worth it when you consider how much you need to pay

Title: This hotel really dissapointed.
ReviewText: With the construction and the low level of service and variety with their club lounge, this will not be on our list of hotels to stay in London. There are better Marriotts available in the city.

Title: 10/10 Recommend the London Marriott hotel County Hall
ReviewText: This hotel provided us with a top notch experience. We would 10/10 recommend it to anyone visiting London. We will definitely be back!

Title: The place to be.
ReviewText: We really enjoyed our stay at the Marriott County Hall.  We had a view of Big Ben and Parlaiment.  The staff was helpful and friendly, the room and bed were comfortable and clean.  Most of all the location was awesome.

Title: Not worth the money for a room rate
ReviewText: after 20 years I will not be coming back. service quality has deteriorated. very tajic turn of events. At one time this was my go to hotel in London, my home away from home. I cannot be more dissapointed in the treatment I received and the service provided.

Title: A perfect business recognition dinner
ReviewText: From check in the service given to our team was perfect.  Our 11 rooms were beautiful and the food and drink was wonderful, meeting all expectations.  The staff running our event in their private dining rooms treated us so well, friendly and professional.

Title: The comfort and security of my home.
ReviewText: Everything was flawless from our check-in to our check-out at the hotel. The staff was very experienced and helpful. The cleanliness of the hotel and the room was excellent. Security was top-notch.

Title: Royal Treatment
ReviewText: We were treated like royalty from the moment we stepped out of the cab until we checked out 3 days later. The room was ready early and had a view of Big Ben!! Every staff member attended to our every need. Excellent service!! 5 stars+

Title: Amazing service in a phenomenal venue!
ReviewText:
This is the best location in all of London for a London holiday.  The staff is so kind and truly anticipates your every need.  I love how you have utilized this beautiful, historic building.  Gilrays, The Library and the Exec lounge were all fabulous!  
Well done!

Title: Wonderful hotel in a perfect location!
ReviewText: We had a short but wonderful stay at this beautiful hotel.  The service was outstanding!  All staff members we encountered were pleasant and seemed genuinely happy to interact with us.  Eric at check-in was particularly kind and helpful.  The hotel is luxurious without being stuffy, clean and very comfortable.  We enjoyed dinner at Gillray's Steak House, breakfast in the Library, and drinks in the M Club.  All food and drinks were delicious.  We will definitely stay here again next time we return to London.

Title: Great hotel and great location
ReviewText: This hotel is in such a good location, with so many things within walking distance.  We had a view of Big Ben from our room. The staff were all so kind and accommodating. The room service and restaurant food was great!

Title: Last-minute trip to London
ReviewText: I would recommend this hotel for anybody traveling to London especially if this is your first time. The hotel is in a great location to the train station and too many attractions in which you want to see why you are there  Walking in the area from the hotel is very easy and I recommend it.  Pick up a map from the concierge follow their recommendation for which hop on hop off bus you should take and start to explore.  The Waterloo train station is easily accessible and it’s a quick ride to Windsor to see the castle And the town. Ubering is your best bet To get you to and from the airport and to get around town for long distances.

Title: price/quality out of balance
ReviewText: Too expensive for the qualtity offered, nice hotel, nice rooms, outrageous price, too many flaws in service and too many small mishaps that made the experience and stay less pleasant than expected

Title: Poor
ReviewText: Very poor staff terrible no air con wrong room

Title: Family trip to London
ReviewText: Great stay with family. Room was great. Only feedback is that it was really hot overnight,

Title: Great hotel
ReviewText: From the moment we checked in the staff treated us superbly. From checkin to the concierge to the restaurant and even the doormen who greeted us when we came back every night. Couldn’t have asked for a better experience. Throw in a great location right across the Thames from Big Ben and it’s the hotel to definitely stay at. We will definitely come back.

Title: Beautiful Hotel
ReviewText: Beautiful Hotel, great location and excellent staff. The location is perfect within walking distance of many attractions and two tube lines

Title: Great location,  consistently great service
ReviewText: Visited for business with some down time included.  Got a nice room with view of Big Ben and Parliament.   Had great breakfast everyday in the Library and enjoyed the lounge to have a snack and drink.

Title: Best hotel in London
ReviewText:
Most friendly and supportive staff, place is amazing, excellent food and service 
Felt just like being home.

Title: worst ever 5star
ReviewText: We booked 2 rooms for 2nights paid £750 per night per room , we were given 1 room on 5th floor which was under construction ,we informed them me and my daughter are dust allergic but still not been relocated , no house keeping for 2 nights we stayed , TV didn't work called maintenance twice but they still couldn't fix. 2nd room was given  on 3rd floor where window seal was broken and that was constantly making whistle blowing noise .we reported that twice but still not been relocated . very disappointed

Title: Excellent location, great staff, and well maintained hotel
ReviewText: The staff is exceptional,  hotel is very clean and well maintained. From arrival to departure, the staff provided outstanding service.  I would recommend this hotel to anyone coming to London.  You can walk to any of the main attractions.  You can look right out the window and see Big Ben.

Title: Very nice property, great location
ReviewText: Marriott County Hall is in a great location, convenient to everything. Front desk staff was very helpful and friendly.

Title: The London Hotel to Stay At
ReviewText: The location is the best—next to the Thames and near trains and underground. Though in the middle of excitement, the rooms are very quiet, as well as spacious and comfortable. The staff is always a great help and attentive and kind. The restaurant was great for both breakfast and dinner, and room service was very nice. It is the place to stay in London for me.

Title: London Stay
ReviewText:
The London Marriott Hotel County Hall, far exceeded my expectations.
We had a family of four and booked their two queen, family room and was pleasantly surprised with a top notch, very spacious room. The decor of the room was beautiful. The room was clean and very comfortable for a family of four. The hotel is located in a perfect, walkable area. I will definitely be back next time I'm in London.

Title: A perfect stay!
ReviewText: In the heart of it all and the staff excellent. Stay in the rooftop suite if you can, you won't regret it. After showing up late from a failed Airbnb check-in the staff at the hotel did everything to make our stay complete. They even anticipated some of our needs. Kudos to the staff, they are excellent!

Title: Excellent Hotel
ReviewText: Great stay at this London stop. Prime location and easy walking distance. Food at Library was great and the best views of Big Ben.

Title: Lovely hotel excellent location
ReviewText: I had to stay last minute for 2 extra nights in London and chose the Marriott hotel mainly for its location in Westminster however the hotel was lovely and I had a delightful stay despite being there for 2 small operations. It was a lovely welcoming extremely clean room to recover from my anaesthetic. Staff were extremely helpful

Title: Beautiful
ReviewText: Nice room with a beautiful view To Big Ben, clean, friendly

Title: Great location, great staff…will return!!!
ReviewText: Loved it.  Great location.  Great staff.  Great food.  Great views.  Cannot wait to return!

Title: Family Vacation
ReviewText: As a gold elite member I was truly disappointed to mention to all who don’t know the tiers to become a member of the gold status you need to spend a minimum of 25 days a year and perks include early check in and late check out and I generally spend 40 days a year . … nonetheless when I got to the hotel after an international flight at 11:30am ish to check in but the room wasn’t ready I was told the rooms would be ready by 2;00pm … by the time  I got notified both rooms were ready it was past 6:00pm knowing I required connecting rooms as I was travelling with family wife and two daughters aged 16 and 13.  A front desk representative named Om told me the hotel only had 2 connecting rooms and he would try his best but he reassured me he will get both rooms on the same floor as if I was charity….nonetheless, I was given 2 rooms non connecting on the 2nd floor but had to ask one of my daughters to stay with me and the wife will stay with the other as the phones weren’t working.  Given the situation and any other situation that is a security issue because if something were to happen or there was an emergency, they have no way of connecting to me or the hotel staff and that is concerned to me. On my way down I bumped into an employee and asked for a second duvet when delivered it had fresh blood on it once again I had to go down as the phones weren't working.  I met with the night manager on duty Ankit who turned around the visit by correcting all the wrong doings .. Marriott you have a super star, as he tried his best to work with the situation and make the best of situation. I really appreciate his efforts in ensuring our stay was safe and comfortable.  Kindly ensure you treat him better than the way I was treated — Mr Sharma you have my contact feel free I. Contacting me

Title: Luxury family stay
ReviewText: Marriott County Hall  is my favorite in all of Europe. It has a balanced mix of local history, current comfort and excellent service. It is not only centrally located but has a fantastic view of the river and access to many sites. The rooms are large and well cleaned . The pool area is beautifully set up with palm trees and very high ceilings with natural light coming through. They welcome children and provide child care (though I didnt use that service) .

Title: Amazing
ReviewText: Awesome! Had the Big Ben and Thames view, so amazing. Hotel itself is stunning, and walking distance to everything, but seeing Big Ben from the room at night is a special treat

Title: Great location, lovely staff
ReviewText: This was the perfect location for our first trip to London- lots of things to do close to the hotel and easy access to public transportation and tourist sites.  Very helpful and friendly staff.

Title: Great with some modifications
ReviewText: Overall great stay. Hotel should ask guests about allergies and should not rent rooms on floors that are under maintenance with plastics on floors and fresh paints on walls. Expect better from management

Title: Great stay!
ReviewText: Loved everything about it. Thanks Marriott!

Title: Very poor service
ReviewText: Dreadful initial welcome by concierge and reception staff. Difficult to communicate due to language barriers. Big lack of hospitality professional experience and knowledge. We later found out why. This hotel uses temporary agency staff who have little to no interest in supplying a good customer experience. Shocking! Hotel entrance, corridors and room was shabby, tired and dirty. Left our room Saturday morning at 10am returning at 4pm to start our preparation to go out for our big birthday party event, only to learn no room clean had taken place. No clean towels, no clean cups glasses, no coffee/tea, unbelievable. Some of the pastries were rock hard, left us wondering how many days they had been reserved up for breakfast. Hotel concierge was dreadful, had to run out into main road to arrange our own taxi after they failed to arrange a pre booked taxi. This hotel has no spa or treatment service, very limited valet parking, I’m really surprised this hotel is allowed to use a 5 star award??? Hotel manager said he would be in contact to again apologise and compensate us for the for the £1500.00 charge we paid for 2 x night room stay, never received any communication which just about sums up this hotel. Avoid at all cost.

Title: Vacances
ReviewText: Très bonne emplacement l’hôtel très bien pas grand choses à dire bon peut être le petit déjeuner avec seulement deux choix restrictif après les prix des nuits bienvenue à Londres

Title: London Traveler
ReviewText:
Hotel was very nice and staff went out of their way to make sure we had everything we needed. The staff was very attentive and we felt the service was great. 
Also, great location.

Title: فندق سي للغايه
ReviewText: يجب تحسين الفندق وتنوع الطعام واجراء النظافه وتعديل السعر

Title: All absolutely Perfect
ReviewText: 1,000 out of 10… Amazing.

Title: Great stay and location
ReviewText: I really enjoyed my stay here and the Excellent service 8 received by Om

Title: Thank you, Eyad!
ReviewText: Thank you, Eyad! It was a wonderful stay!

Title: Great Location and Excellent Service
ReviewText: Great central location across the bridge from Westminster. Within walking distance of tube stations with easy access and direct access to areas of Central and surrounding London. Staff was professional and welcoming with shared commitment to the desired customer experience whether it was with booking transportation or dinner reservations. Dinner service and food at the Gillray’s Steakhouse was exceptional and would highly recommend during stay (reservations needed). Will have to check out the Library on our next visit as schedule didn’t permit on this trip. Overall, excellent stay!

Title: Excellent stay as always
ReviewText:
Another visit here and another perfect stay. 
Staff are so friendly, professional and welcoming. We as a couple stay here 3/4 times a year and have never found anything to complain about. The food at Gilrays is amazing and Sanda the waitress is lovely, nothing is ever too much trouble for her, and she always has a smile on her face. I would definitely recommend to family and friends

Title: Comfortable room in great location
ReviewText: We had a lovely stay at this hotel. The room was spacious, clean and the bed very comfortable. Location was perfect as we travel to London through Waterloo. The staff were extremely obliging and friendly. We felt very welcomed.

Title: Eye to eye with the London Eye
ReviewText: Location was everything in our jam packed two nighter stay at Marriott County Hall. Close to hop on hop off bus and proximity to golden Houses of Parliament, Big Ben and Westminster Abbey. Witness for the Prosecution being performed in an actual courtroom on site made this particularly fine. Loved taking Uber Boat to Greenwich to pick up Viking cruise.

Title: London
ReviewText: Amazing, need to check this place out

Title: Treated like Royalty
ReviewText: Best experience ever of any Marriott hotel.  Staff friendly, accommodating and went above and beyond to make you feel like British royalty.

Title: Great Place to Stay!
ReviewText: This historic hotel blends the old with the crisp clean new. An old government building turned into a modern day hotel, this place is a jewel find. The service was excellent and the stay was pleasant. I highly recommend this hotel.

Title: London Marriott Hotel County Hall - a superb London venue !
ReviewText: The customer service was excellent --friendly, professional, prompt, always anticipating the guest's needs and ready to be of assistance. Should I have the good fortune to return to London, I would surely choose this hotel, largely due to the helpfulness of the Front Desk Team and the other staff (at the front door, in the Library, housekeeping staff, et al.).

Title: Mr Nam Pham
ReviewText: Location convenience , facility clean , restaurant excellent, fair price .

Title: Family vacation
ReviewText: Took our granddaughter on a special trip after turning 11.  The hotel’s location made it very easy for us to walk to many of the famous buildings, churches, neighborhoods and shopping districts.

Title: My New Favorite Hotel
ReviewText: This is my favorite Marriott of all my experiences. The staff were extremely helpful, professional, and knowledgeable. I really enjoyed breakfast in The Library which included vegan options as well as accommodations for dietary restrictions. The room was clean and comfortable with a nice view. The central location is just icing on the cake.

Title: London June 2024
ReviewText: Gorgeous hotel with breathtaking London views

Title: Bad service, dirty hotel
ReviewText:
Never experienced worse service at a Marriott. The entire hotel also was under construction and smelled like sewage, and there was muddy footprints all over. 

For what i paid there are better marriotts around

Title: Perfect location for a London visit
ReviewText:
This hotel is perfectly located in the center of most activity! Our room had a view of Big Ben and the Eye. We used the tube to go everywhere which is just a 5-8mins across the bridge.  I would highly recommend this place. The M lounge was great with daily treats and the restaurant was also very good! 

As a family of five it was hard to find a room large enough and this location had what we needed. Thank you!

Title: First class hotel experience!
ReviewText: From top to bottom this hotel and the staff have everything you need to make a truly amazing stay in London! Oh, and did I mention the hotel is right next to the London Eye and across the River Thames is Big Ben and Parliament. Excellent hotel in an exclusive location.

Title: Unexpected Bad Services
ReviewText: Disappointing stay compared to high price and Marriott Brand

Title: Good stuff
ReviewText: I like the way it was, good trip

Title: Top stay in an iconic hotel
ReviewText: I have wanted to stay in the County Hall Marriott for a long time and finally got round to booking it.  I had a fabulous room overlooking the River Thames and Big Ben.  The staff were all very friendly and helpful.  The room was spacious, the bed was comfortable and I slept well.  What I really liked was that they serve you breakfast rather than you having to get it yourself from a buffet and the coffee was strong.  The only things to be aware of is that your room may not be ready to check into at 3pm and if you are a fan of ITV3 this TV channel isn't available.  Overall I recommend staying here.

Title: An overrated staying at Marriott County Hall
ReviewText:
Well… some people had good experience but we didn’t. Apart from the room was ok, and rest went bad… the staff was indifferent and slow when we checked in… We eventually got it with lounge access but our first impression was NOT good… the common areas of the hotel was dirty and there was tissue on the corridor… i am not sure what the cleaning staff was doing..  the breakfast selection was extremely small not up to international hotel standard….So I was asked what was my perfect holiday in London and my expectations went high.. then moment when I checked in… our experience went down… ps. The door staff was particularly unwelcoming and helpless.
Sorry to say, it doesn’t worth the value of money. I will definitely not choose Marriott county again next time.  I don’t recommend this hotel.

Title: Great Stay!
ReviewText: Stayed with our children for 3 nights in a family suite - beautiful hotel, amazing location. Can't wait until we return!
Best Location Good Atmosfer personal 👍🏼

Title: Family short break
ReviewText: Fabulous hotel, staff, food and location. Looking forward to returning soon.

Title: Great stay for a birthday trip
ReviewText: The staff was helpful and attentive. They were sure to make our stay one of the most pleasant I’ve ever experienced. They anticipated our needs and went above and beyond to make our trip great. The location is central to most of the major attractions. Definitely recommend.

Title: Comfort hotel
ReviewText: Friendly staff, excellent location, tidy room, nice drinks and food. But it could be provide more children equipment in family room e.g bedrail and stool.

Title: Urgently in need of renovation. Bad value for money
ReviewText:
We traveled to London with great anticipation and consciously chose the Marriott County Hall. Unfortunately we were disappointed. The following points led to this: 

We asked for two separate duvets by email in advance and upon arrival. They had guaranteed that. When we came into the room there was only a duvet.

The sofa in the room was dirty. The stain was clearly visible and it was uncomfortable to sit on this dirty sofa.

There was no socket for the hairdryer in the bathroom. 

The swimming pool was advertised upon arrival. When I went to swim the first morning, it was closed for construction. 

The breakfast included was limited, there was only one cold and one warm dish. We weren't full. 

The breakfast room is shabby. The parquet floor is completely old and worn out. The furniture was scraped. The wind hisses through the windows. 

Overall, the hotel urgently needs renovation. The price-performance ratio is not acceptable.

Title: Vacation
ReviewText: This is the second time we have stayed at this hotel.  Everything was great.  They were doing some renovations. The only complaint would be the pillows on our bed were too soft.  They would go flat after a bit of using them.

Title: Spitzenhotel in Toplage
ReviewText:
In diesen Marriott hat wirklich alles gepasst. Saubere Zimmer, freundliches und kompetentes Personal und ein gutes Frühstück.
Kombiniert mit der Toplage für einen London Besuch geht es nicht besser.

Title: Great Stay in London-Gem
ReviewText: Great location, clean, amazing staff, and excellent ambiance. Exceeded my expectations.

Title: Fab hotel
ReviewText: Fab hotel,Staff amazing ,food not 100% but good . Over all very good hotel

Title: Fantastic Marriott property
ReviewText: Highly recommend the London Marriott County Hall. The location is perfect for easy walkability to the major attractions and there is a metro stop close by as well. The rooms are spacious, clean and beautifully decorated. But most importantly, the STAFF at this hotel are top notch and provide exemplary customer service:  From our check-in at Reception to the doormen who greeted us when we would come and go, everyone was super friendly, helpful and engaging. I was here with my family on holiday and they truly made our trip even more special.

Title: Vacation
ReviewText: We had a wonderful stay at the hotel. It was quiet. Staff very accommodating. Grounds were lovely. Hotel room well appointed. Lounge and restaurant were great.

Title: Week-end
ReviewText: Excellent établissement, avec des prestations de qualité et un très beau cadre.

Title: Excellent stay
ReviewText: Marriott hotel county hall is a place to visit. Excellent staff and great service

Title: The BEST stay in every way!
ReviewText: So many reasons why this is my favorite hotel in the world.  First, and most important-THE PEOPLE!   There is a culture of genuine warmth and kindness that exceeds every expectation.  I've stayed here 3 times this year and they demonstrate excellence every time.  The food in Gilroy's and the M Club is great.  The rooms are beautiful and the attention to detail is impressive.  Plus, the location is great.  Easy walking distance to so many of the main London sights and super easy access to the Tube and important bus routes.

Title: Great Hotel, simply perfect.
ReviewText: Even better than expected. Location, staff, room space and comfort. The best hotel I stayed in.

Title: Disappointing stay with poor Elite recognition
ReviewText:
My family stayed at the Marriott County Hall when visiting London - booked especially as I had a number of good stays here before, but it seemed like it had gone very downhill.

Requests made through the in-app chat seemed to be ignored or not passed through the right people at the hotel, and on check in my room was not ready despite letting the hotel know our arrival time. My Elite status was unfortunately not recognised until I prompted at there very end of check-in, and an 'upgrade' offered had a poorer view and was dark and dingy versus the original room type booked. This was disappointing as a Titanium member as it did appear actual suites were available on the day.

The location of the hotel is excellent if you are a tourist, and walkable to all major tourist sites. The hotel should make more of access via the riverside walkway into Gilray's as the 'main' hotel entrance is tucked away and hidden.

Title: 初のロンドン旅行
ReviewText: とても景色もよく、最高のステイでした。朝ごはんも美味しかったです。

Title: Felt like Royalty
ReviewText: We spent 18 days traveling through Europe. When you book online you never know what you’ll get till you arrive. London County Hall exceeded all expectations. Fabulous service, amenities, view, food and location.

Title: No where to eat
ReviewText:
Good morning…
Thank you again for acknowledging our 50th!
Firstly I’d like to say that Barry at the door is the one of the few competent employees.
It’s appalling in 5 star Marriott to not hand more than one restaurant available, yet not at all times. To be turned away from your club at 11am was ridiculous. That left us with no other options than room service at a ridiculous cost.
One day after returning from a strenuous tour, we went to Gilroys for lunch. The bar was very crowded so we were offered at table in the restaurant.
My husband attempted to order a koby hamburger and was in fined its only well done.
So he asked for a regular hamburger…he was told it’s only served in the bar. So he asked for a hamburger from the kids menu and was denied. So he said he would order two, assuming that they’re kids size. NOW the manager had to be involved and was very helpful. So we ended up with two giant hamburgers from the kids menu.

One day our room wasn’t done. Not only not done, but on good days the glassware wasn’t replaced, but way too many waters were left.

Since I’ve only had the Bonvoy card since last year, I’ve stayed at JW in Venice, Bernini in Rome, Courtyard in Aruba, and I’m booked for moxy in Bergen. I’m looking for alternatives since the card is not what I expected.
Happy 50th wedding anniversary to me.

Title: Excellent Hotel in a Fantastic Location
ReviewText:
Celebrated an anniversary in the London County Hall Marriott. Super friendly service in a traditional style hotel in amazing central London location.
Breakfast in the Library was a really wonderful experience but the service and snacks offered in the M Club Lounge was slightly disappointing.
Overall a great location to celebrate a special anniversary

Title: Best London stay came back after 10 years.
ReviewText:
We stayed at Marriott County Hall before and when we wanted to return to visit we selected Marriott again.

The staff is the best, highly recommend.

Title: Happy guest
ReviewText: Quiet luxury at a great location with easy access to many London attractions.

Title: Very well trained staff but the rooms can be better designed
ReviewText: The location of the hotel is amazing, staff are amazing. Just thought the rooms can be better designed. There’s a mini fridge in the room on the room which I happened to kicked many times in the middle of the night. The corridor to the entrance of the room is really spacious where they should have put a long bench for luggages or for putting on shoes.

Title: Great Service
ReviewText: Ian was amazing!!! I can't say it enough. He was hands down the best employee we encountered during our stay. He wouldn't accept a tip for going above and beyond. I wish I could e-mail his supervisor directly and share how great an employee he is. His service made me rebook with the hotel. I was booked at a different Marriott and decided to stay with him longer. The employee's service was excellent, but he was phenomenal.

Title: Pass
ReviewText: Horrible room locations next to slamming house keeping doors all day and night. Followed by a surprise purchase that was sent to the birthday person instead of the purchaser.

Title: Very family friendly hotel!
ReviewText:
We loved our stay here. The hotel is very central but it feels tucked away thanks to the courtyard and the view towards the Thames and park. As soon as we checked in the kids could pick a bag of candy and they got games to do in the room, very appreciated. 

Everyone in the staff were friendly and welcoming!

Extra plus for the huge indoor pool.

Title: Great hotel!  Great service!
ReviewText: This hotel staff went above and beyond to accommodate us arriving early and accommodating us with an early check-in after a long overnight flight from the states!

Title: Feedback
ReviewText:
Waited 50 minutes for my room
Check in process extremely long

Title: Expensive for a lousy room and hotel experience
ReviewText: I booked a more expensive room because I wanted a view of the river and the Tower Clock.  The front desk lady provided us a room on the 2nd floor right in front of the ferris wheel (The Eye), allowing passengers a clear view into our room #220.  The hotel scale is beyond fathomable.  It literally was the County Hall.  Historically preserved well, but one feels like being in another Heathrow Airport.  Our room was located on Terminal F for epic fail; literally about a 10-15 minutes away from the lobby; walking from room, waiting for elevator, and exiting the hotel.  Down comforter lost the down!  Felt like an Amazon special.  Mattress was hard and very uncomfortable.  Food was good.  Service was bad in the lounge and dining room.  The Library tea service was elegant and delightful, but food was just good and it was pricey.  I would not stay here again, despite a perfect location.  Too many other hotels to experience ...

Title: Great hotel with views of the Thames River.
ReviewText:
The hotel has a great view of Thames River. Darraugh was very helpful getting us settled in a room after an overnight flight. We are Platinum members and received a Suite upgrade. 
The room had a great view of Big Ben. We visited the M Club and all the employees were very helpful. The food was good and they have food offered starting at 530 along with drinks. 
We bought tickets for the hop on hop off Big bus and rode around London. The bus stops right in front of the hotel.

Title: Came for the London Marathon
ReviewText: My partner and I traveled to London for the Marathon. Our stay at the Marriott County Hall was the BEST we’ve ever had,

Title: Amazing family vacation
ReviewText: Incredible location for London sight-seeing! Food, staff, rooms were all amazing.

Title: Views and rooms are incredible. Service is not.
ReviewText: If you book a suite with a Big Ben view—I can’t think of a better view in London. Truly. They are pricey but worth it. That being said if you don’t get a Ben Ben view room this hotel is just not worth it. The service is poor and the front desk staff are not helpful and certainly not the level of service you’d expect for such a lovely hotel. There is also a lot of construction. A lot. My first two days I had planned to leave a glowing review. We splurged on a suite and everything was incredible about the room. There is quite a bit of construction that wasn’t advertised. Like very heavy construction. And paper covering the carpets in the hallway and every time you leave your room you pass workers in hard hats. This wasn’t a terrible inconvenience for us as we were sightseeing all day but if you’re looking for a refined or relaxing vibe it wasn’t relaxing to have so much construction. It was also a bit loud if you need quiet during the day. The worst was the front desk staff calling me and insisting I get back to the hotel to switch rooms while my family was on a tour. I had never had this happen before. He wanted me back before check out to move my room?! I told him I was on a bike tour and he suggested he would have the hotel staff move for me. I wasn’t even packed and certainly didn’t want someone moving my things. This was just so bizarre then I did rush back and packed my things and the new room wasn’t even ready. For $1200 a night I really expected more. Finally when it was all settled they didn’t even do anything to try and make it right. I also didn’t get the room I booked for my third night. I booked Big Ben view and that’s not where they put me but I was so tired of going to the front desk I just let it go. It was just too adversarial. Also I got a random $4 minibar charge emailed to me the next day. I didn’t touch the mini bar and it was inconvenient to have to email them about it. The view is still fantastic as is the overall quality of the facility but just be prepared for adversarial attitudes at the front desk who don’t seem incentivized to work together on issues with guests.

Title: Be weary of 5 star rating
ReviewText: For being rated as five star hotel w high nightly costs, it was by far the worst stay of all my trips to Europe.  I would recommend reviewing your room and be aware that housekeeping care is poor on daily basis.  Construction is ongoing on 5th floor w loose nails on the floor so use caution. We weren’t warned of any construction at any time during check in.

Title: Very Dysfunctional Check In
ReviewText: Although the hotel looks lovely and the doormen are amazing, the front desk was a disaster and check in was a mess. We requested to be located near the other couple we were traveling with and not only did we end up two floors below them, our room took newly 5 hours to be ready. Many, many guests checked in over and over after us and they still could not figure out how to get us a room. They tried to soften the blow with a bottle of wine but it was a bit too late for that. I don’t usually write reviews, but this one required it. Hopefully Marriott will do something about it.

Title: Perfect stay
ReviewText:
Everything was perfect. 
Location, food, drinks and service were all fantastic and faultless from the moment we arrived and until our taxi arrived to take us to the station.

Title: Wonderful Stay
ReviewText: First time in London, I came with my younger sister. The hotel is beautiful and even though it is right next to the London Eye (within steps!), the hotel itself is tucked away from all the crowds. Definitely worth the splurge to stay here. We felt safe as two female travelers and would stay here again.

Title: Never disappointed always delighted
ReviewText: This is first class from the greeting you receive at the front door all the way through my stay

Title: One of the best properties Marriott has.
ReviewText:
Our family loved our stay at County Hall.  After 2 weeks of traveling throughout Europe, this hotel was a highlight.  Staff is extremely welcoming, helpful, and professional.  
The location in London is excellent.   The service at the Executive Lounge reminds me of how JW Marriotts use to be pre COVID.  Just 10's all around.   We had Tea and breakfast at the Library, and it exceeded our expectations.   The only improvement I would say was that steak dinner at Gilray's was just okay, but I am willing to chalk that up to an off night as the rest of the hotel services were exceptional.

Title: Overpriced 3-star hotel and Bonvoy Who?
ReviewText: Housekeeping was inconsistent, some days new towels, toilet paper and water, some days not. The drinks always added a $5.50 bar charge, example, a straight up vodka martini, Vodka $18 and bar charge aka olives $5.50. Same for a mimosa. I've never paid $23 for a mimosa in my life. And lastly, when dealing with a credit request they could careless I was a long standing Bonvoy member, like robots just stated its the policy.

Title: Amazing stay at London Marriott Hotel County Hall
ReviewText: We had a lovely stay at the Marriott Hotel County Hall. Harsha and Justin were amazing since the moment we met at the registration desk. They made us fell so welcomed and being our first time in London, this was an amazing experience. They knew we were there celebrating our daughter’s Quinceañera and they went out of their way to send a gift to her and my husband for their birthdays. The rooms were amazing and the location is a great plus. We have no word to thank them for being so awesome during our entire stay, all the staff from the reception, to restaurant were great.

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Excellent. Nice. Kind people

Title: An urgent refurbishment need for the Gym centre
ReviewText: The gym centre should be accommodate a huge size river facing room. The facilities need a necessary maintenance as well.

Title: Poor service not what i expect from Marriott
ReviewText: I upgraded to the county hall suite at £1500 and I was asked to pay the difference. My existing rooms had a rack rate of £1200. Instead of charging me £300 they charged me £500 which appeared 2 days after I checked out. Not good, being a Marriott member and Marriott vacation club member I use regularly but will not be going back to this hotel

Title: True British Stay
ReviewText: This was a once-in-a-lifetime trip for our family, and the London Marriott Hotel County Hall was the icing on the cake.  You truly have a remarkable group of people there, and we've never been treated so special as when we stayed at this magnificent hotel.  Justin checked us in, and he was a delight!  Our mornings were greeted with Barry, whom we looked forward to each day.  He was so charming and always had useful information about the hotel and London, itself.  He was so personal and made the place feel like home.  In the evening my husband and I frequently went to the M Club and had the pleasure of being waited on by Jerald and Laura.  They were so incredibly kind and personal, as well.  I am sure these employees meet so many people and families every day, but each employee had their own way of making us feel like we were their favorite - that's hard to find in today's customer service jobs.  Please let them know what an outstanding job they're doing at Marriott County Hall.  We will let everyone know about this hotel and you've gained customers for life in London!

Title: Best hotel experience ever
ReviewText: I really liked my stay and the level of attention and service of the staff.

Title: Perfection in London!
ReviewText: Our stay was absolutely fantastic. We experienced the stellar service, the respectful staff, the wonderful well appointed rooms! We stayed in two king rooms facing the London Eye. We called upon the assistance of the concierge to best make the most of our time in London. We dined and had dessert and drinks while there. We celebrated Easter festivities. All throughout our stay we were received perfectly, It is with pleasure that I submit this review and with great gratitude to all of you who made our first trip to London a magical stay!

Title: London Gem
ReviewText: A truly wonderful experience at the Marriott County Hall. Gorgeous interior, clean rooms, wonderful food and drinks, amazing service and top of the line amenities make this hotel a must stay. Not to metion the location was absolutely perfect! Close to transportation and some of London's best tourist destinations like the London Eye, River Thames, Parliament and Big Ben!

Title: Good experience
ReviewText:
The staff were friendly and helpful, my room was spacious and clean. All amenities required were provided. 
Overall a great service and experience. 

My only small issue with the room was the wind whistling through the inside soundproofing slider windows, some were a little worn creating a whistle when windy. A piece of paper to prevent movement was all that was needed to stop the whistling. 
I did not mention this to staff as I honestly don’t believe there’s anything more to be done other than putting a piece of paper there and I was travelling with my 4 year old so I was a little distracted and again, I don’t feel it’s was much of an issue. 
I was more than happy with my stay.

I have reviewed the food as good seeing as I only had breakfast and didn’t try any other dining options. Plenty of options for breakfast, tasty and filling. Croissants were amazing!

Title: Tolle Lage mitten in London, man sollte allerdings auswärts essen

ReviewText: Beautiful stay right on the Thames overlooking Big Ben. County Hall staff made us all feel as welcome and had a beautiful treat for our daughter’s 10th birthday. We’ll be back for sure!

In particular, Japveer at the front desk was most attentive and professional; Library server Natalia was particularly engaging, Laura at the Club Lounge and Ana Paula at Gilray's were both very pleasant and helpful.

ReviewText: Outstanding hotel, location and service.  Fitness center needs improvement   Thanks to Barry Sabi and Jay

Title: fancy hotel with great service
ReviewText:

Title: Great stay at County Hall!
