Title: A Disappointing Experience at London Marriott Hotel County Hall: Failing the Ambassador Elite Expectations
ReviewText:
I recently had the unfortunate experience of staying at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall, a reputed 5-star luxury hotel, as an ambassador elite member of the hotel's membership program. 

Firstly, after a long drive from Heathrow Airport, we were greeted by an unwelcoming concierge who directed us to park our car away from the main entrance without offering assistance with unloading our luggage. This lack of consideration for our needs was disheartening and set a disappointing tone for the rest of our stay. Furthermore, the concierge failed to inquire about whether we were staying at the hotel or had dining plans, further highlighting a lack of attentiveness and personalized service.

On a positive note, I must acknowledge the helpfulness of the bellboy who promptly assisted us with unloading our luggage and escorting it to our room. His friendly and efficient service offered a glimmer of hope amidst an otherwise disappointing experience.

Unfortunately, my upgrade request was abruptly declined at the last minute, leaving me without the enhanced accommodations I had hoped for. This refusal was particularly frustrating as it left me with no alternative options or the ability to make other arrangements. As an ambassador elite member, I expected to receive priority treatment and the opportunity to enjoy the benefits of my membership. The hotel's failure to honor my upgrade request demonstrated a lack of appreciation for loyal guests.

Furthermore, the staff at the front desk during check-in displayed a concerning level of impoliteness. Their inquiry about whether I had used points to redeem our stay or paid with money made me feel uncomfortable and questioned my decision to utilize my membership points. When I inquired about the availability of a suite, I was informed that one was available, but only if I stayed for four nights instead of the three nights I had originally booked. This response was dismissive and discouraging, further eroding my confidence in the hotel's commitment to providing a superior guest experience. However, I must acknowledge the friendly and helpful service provided by Japveer during our check-out process, which offered a glimmer of professionalism amidst the overall disappointing experience.

To compound matters, the discovery of someone else's old plaster (bandage) stuck to the hotel bath towel was both unsettling and unacceptable. It not only compromised the hotel's commitment to cleanliness but also left me feeling disgusted.

Title: Weekend in London
ReviewText: Our family loved this hotel. The views of Big Ben, Parliment and the Thames were incredible. The service was outstanding! Anything we needed was at our door in 2 minutes. So attentive. The food in the Gillray was delicious! We loved all of it!!

Title: The best hotel with the best views!
ReviewText: Marriott County hall is situated in the best location for iconic views and sight seeing. Very family and child friendly. The customer service is 100%!!! Will return every time. Such a relaxed and peaceful ambience.

Title: The best Marriott hotel
ReviewText: Great Suites, the best beds, very friendly staff, excellent dinner and perfect swimming pool for doing laps.

Title: Great hotel for a 70th birthday
ReviewText: Hotel was great, from walking through the door to the final checkout the staff were first class. Helpful and considerate on all encounters. Room was spacious  clean, had everything you needed, with an excellent view. Bar and restaurant were expensive but guess this was to be expected (its London).

Title: I will visit again
ReviewText: 10 of 10 for everything, especially the staff

Title: London county hall
ReviewText: Great hotel, friendly staff in a central location.

Title: lovely stay at marriot
ReviewText: had a lovely week at marriot county hall couldnt fault staff, room or food, look forward to staying again

Title: London at its best!
ReviewText: We were very well treated during our stay at the Marriott City Hall by the warm and friendly staff.  Our room exceeded our expectations with a beautiful view of the Thames River and surrounding area!

Title: Exceptional experience
ReviewText:
I had the pleasure of staying at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall recently, and I must say it was an exceptional experience from start to finish.

The service at this hotel is truly top-notch. From the moment I arrived, the staff went above and beyond to make me feel welcome and ensure that every aspect of my stay was comfortable. The level of professionalism and genuine friendliness displayed by the entire team was remarkable.

A special mention must be made for the M Club staff who truly stood out. Their attention to detail, proactive approach, and genuine passion for ensuring a memorable stay made a significant impact on my overall experience. They were always ready with a warm smile and eager to assist with any request. Whether it was providing helpful local insights or going the extra mile to make sure I had everything I needed, the M Club staff's dedication was truly commendable.

The M Club itself was a delightful retreat within the hotel. The exclusive atmosphere, coupled with the impeccable service, added an extra layer of luxury to my stay. The attentiveness of the M Club staff in catering to the guests' needs was evident, and it enhanced the overall ambiance of this fantastic facility.

The rooms were not only well-appointed but also meticulously maintained, reflecting the hotel's commitment to excellence. The breathtaking views of London from my room added an extra touch of magic to the experience.

In conclusion, my stay at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall exceeded all expectations. The outstanding service and the exceptional M Club staff made it a truly memorable and delightful stay. I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a luxurious and unparalleled experience in the heart of London.

Title: London Marriott Hotel County Hall!! 10/10 Super Stay! 5 Stars!
ReviewText: The London Marriott Hotel County Hall was by far one of the best Marriott properties world wide that I have every stayed at! From the warm welcome, the entire team, the restaurants, room service, concierge who helped with West End theatre tickets, helpful bell captains with directions - this was a 10/10 stay. Loved the balcony and seeing Big Ben and the London Eye from my room was exceptional!! Love, Love, Love this hotel - you will too!

Title: Incredible county hall
ReviewText:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at the London Marriott Hotel, and I must say that my experience was nothing short of exceptional. From the moment I arrived, the staff went above and beyond to ensure that I felt welcomed and well taken care of.

The level of hospitality and warmth displayed by the hotel staff was truly remarkable. They greeted me with genuine smiles and were always ready to assist with any queries or requests I had. Whether it was recommending local attractions, arranging transportation, or providing information about the hotel amenities, the staff was knowledgeable, attentive, and incredibly helpful.

The rooms at the London Marriott Hotel were spacious, comfortable, and elegantly designed. The attention to detail in the room's decor and cleanliness was impressive. I felt like I was stepping into a cozy sanctuary every time I returned to my room after a long day of exploring the city

The hotel's location was also ideal, with easy access to popular attractions, shopping districts, and public transportation. This made it convenient for me to explore London's vibrant cityscape without any hassle.

Furthermore, the dining experience at the hotel's restaurant was delightful. The menu offered a wide range of delectable dishes, and the service was impeccable. The staff took great care to accommodate any dietary preferences or restrictions, ensuring a memorable culinary experience.

Title: Amazing location
ReviewText: Came for conference. Amazing location. Really nice room. Brilliant stay

Title: Excellent Luxury Hotel, Exceptional Staff
ReviewText:
This is an absolutely wonderful hotel directly across the Thames from Westminster Abbey and The Imperial War Rooms.  Double-decker buses stop steps away from the front entrance for easy access to the West End, or museums near Trafalgar Square.  There's a tube stop just across the river (which, of course, gets you everywhere), but the hotel doormen will happily call you a taxi if you prefer, which arrive within minutes.  It's also an easy tube ride, or 20-30 pound taxi ride from Paddington Station, in case you're arriving via the Heathrow Express (a very efficient way into London from the airport).

The hotel is a former government building where Winston Churchill once made speeches.  It has been expertly preserved and you can really feel the sense of its history as you walk around the lobby area and the curved hallways upstairs.  We booked a room with a view of Big Ben, which was far more spacious than what you often find in London/Europe and was trimmed in exquisite design features.  The view didn't disappoint and I would greatly recommend this option, even if it costs you extra.  Really sweet.

We were comped for Club access when the staff learned that our bags had been lost by the airline, which was typical of their aim to please in this place.  This nicety got us an included breakfast for our three mornings in The Library, a cozy, posh setting with great food.  We also ate dinner one night at Gillray's, making use of their "Theater Menu" which was a reasonable fixed price.  I would also recommend The Strings, a great little dinner spot in the hotel building, just to the right of the main driveway.  They have occasional live acoustic guitar playing which compliments dinner nicely.  Their ravioli pasta dish was cooked al dente, which we loved.  Friendly staff, anxious to please.

The hotel staff, meanwhile, was professional, helpful, friendly, welcoming--really top notch.  Just another reason why this is a great choice for central London!

Title: Beautiful, comfortable, and excellent service.
ReviewText: Had a great stay.  Professional staff, clean, comfortable, and will stay again.

Title: Great service!
ReviewText: Great location,  great staff, 100% recommended.

Title: Magical...
ReviewText: Incredible..we had the most magical stay..staff were incredible every need met and more...the hotel stunning...we will be without a shadow of a doubt staying here again

Title: Best location with amazing view and great service
ReviewText:
Our family of 5 (3 teenagers) chose London Marriott Hotel County Hall from location and other reviews.  What a great decision!  We love every moment there.  The hotel is a converted from previous government building and was opened by King George V in 1922.  The architecture of the building is beautiful and the renovation to hotel is as grand.  

The location is just perfect.  We enjoyed walking out and had a stroll every day when we were there.  Despite the cold, we could walk to Imperial War Museum, Buckingham Palace, Borough Market, etc.  And walking around gave us different view of city of westminster which we all thoroughly enjoyed.

The service was 5 stars.  The staffs are very friendly and helpful from doormen to room services .  We loved our breakfast at the Library every morning.  It's such a luxury to wake up to beautiful view every breakfast and started our walk with stunning view of Westminster and Big Ben.

Thank you for making our kids' first trip to London very memorable.

Title: Pefect in every way!
ReviewText: Yes, it's a great location and beutiful hotel.   But the staff...WOW!  Everyone we met showed such welcoming, warmth, and kindness....and all of it so genunine.   Really made it feel like a home more than a hotel.

Title: Excellent Weekend getaway
ReviewText: A very welcoming hotel with all the amenities you need for a great weekend stay. From the food at breakfast, to the snacks and drinks in the M-Club lounge, you cannot go wrong with staying here.

Title: Dream hotel!
ReviewText: One of the best hotel experiences I've ever had!

Title: Old World Elegance on the Thames
ReviewText: This hotel has the elegance that goes along with it's history of being in the county hall. The staff throughout the hotel were friendly and helpful. My room overlooked the Thames and Big Ben smiled at me as I ate my breakfast in the old world ambiance of the "Library". The location was perfect for enjoying the best of London. The London Eye was right outside the door of the hotel. Trafalgar Square was a 15 minute walk away, making the art galleries and theatre district easy to access.

Title: An amazing stay at London Marriott County Hall
ReviewText:
This is by far the best Marriott hotel we visited so far.
Everything was amazing, great staff always ready to assist.
The hotel is very well kept and very clean.
The breakfast in the Library is one of a kind experience,a great thank you to all the staff- Amazing!!
If you also count the location of the hotel, then for sure this is your best option when visiting London!!!

Title: Our favourite hotel
ReviewText: Never book anything else other than Marriott hotels

Title: 위치가 매우 좋아요

Title: The best Hotel I have ever stayed at
ReviewText: I am a Marriott Titanium for life as well as the top tier for life at Hyatt hotels and I have stayed at other hotels throughout the world, by far this is the best by far.

Title: Nice hotel but some amenities did not reflect the price charged
ReviewText: Stayed NYE and had a fabulous view of the fireworks. Information sent to me prior to check in was accurate and managed our expectations about what was available and what was closed as a result of the NYE Gala Dinner. Front desk staff very welcoming. Room was great, as described and spacious for the family. Nice touch from the hotel to provide a complimentary bottle to see in the NY. Hotel is very nice but there were a couple of things that didn't really reflect the room rate paid. Check in is 3pm but we didn't get our room until after 5pm after two chasers at the front desk. The downstairs bar was unavailable (fine as this was in the pre check-in information), but the access to the Club Lounge was very poor. All food and drink has to be paid for and the price does not reflect the quality at all. Menu very limited and (for example) you couldn't buy glasses of wine, only bottles. Very strange, inconvenient and smacked of a hotel cashing in. Just left a bit of a sour taste given we had to spend two hours in there whilst our room was ready (weather was appalling so we couldn't go out for a walk) - you'd expect a hotel can throw in a bit of finger food and drinks in a club lounge when you pay over two grand for one night (acknowledging that it was NYE and I did request a river view). All in all nice hotel and great room, but the overall experience did not reflect the price paid.

Title: Ruined NYE night!
ReviewText: Our family could not watch NYE fireworks together as Marriott did not know what to do!

Title: Amazing!
ReviewText: I chose this hotel for the location but ended up loving it for the overall experience. The staff were very helpful and kind, the food was great, and I had a very pleasant time.

Title: The good could be better
ReviewText: I liked my stay. The hotel Location is spectacular. Would love to repeat the experience soon.

Title: Perfect hotel for family
ReviewText: Perfect location. Friendly staff. Adriana is the best. Nice breakfast and lounge facility.

Title: Nice hotel and staff in a fabulous location
ReviewText:
Great location, great restaurant in historic building. Friendly, helpful staff. However, no information given at check in on breakfast timing or lounges slum pickings and timing. 
Rooms appear nice, sizable bathroom. Insufficient attention to details that count, such as reachable shelves to unpack, shower soap dish much too small to hold large bath gel, shampoo and conditioner bottles, really difficult to locate the towel hooks against the lovely and interesting wallpaper. Insufficient clarity about  how to deal with weekly fire alarm drills, impact on lifts and how to leave the hotel at that time.  
Pity, as these "little" details make the difference between a good hotel and a great one.

Title: Underwhelming Hotel
ReviewText:
1. Thin, overused, old, stiff bathroom towels. 2. Sewage smell in the hallway and in our room.
3. Room layout: Television was on a random wall that did not face the bed or mini couch in the room.

Title: Generally good but some staff need training
ReviewText: The hotel was good, the location was good, the parking was good.  The only thing that let it down for us is that 3 times someone tried to enter our room unannounced.   We had to then lock the door as a precaution.

Title: The best way to experience London
ReviewText: Starting with the location of the hotel  and continuing with the kindness of its workers, I recommend this hotel for an authentic London experience…

Title: Could be better
ReviewText: Good location and Breakfast in Library were the good points however noisy adjoining room you could hear every word especially kids running around and screaming from 05:00.  Minimal upgrade as a Titanium Elite member.  Nice Thames view but wind whistled through inner window so had to keep it open and then different noise from outside but better.  Club Lounge food even when described as nibbles is by order only 2 cold 1 hot per person but 6 olives 2 button mushrooms and a hot single chicken nugget is not what I expected nor experienced from any Marriott brand worldwide.

Title: What are best Marriott! Staff went out of the way!!
ReviewText: One of  the best Marriott

Title: The best
ReviewText: It’s in the heart of the greatest tourist attraction in London and has everything ( restaurants and stations ) around it. Great design and very comfortable rooms. Amazing staff, cheerful and helpful all the time.

Title: Great atmosphere and kind staff.
ReviewText: Marriott County Hall has a great, festive atmosphere at the holidays, is well-located to get around London by foot and public transportation, and the staff are kind, courteous, and professional. We have stayed several times and never been disappointed.

Title: Service
ReviewText: Does not meet 5 star standards,

Title: Déçue après une première belle expérience
ReviewText: Déçue du service après une première belle expérience s’agissant de l’accueil et du service. Une literie d’appoint dans une chambre à 800 euros la nuit. Un lit d’appoint cauchemardesque!

Title: Top notch hotel
ReviewText: Hotel was expensive but the service was worth it. The director of food and beverage looked after us, we used the swimming pool and all staff were extremely polite.

Title: London Christmas Lights
ReviewText: Took my wife to see the Christmas lights in London this December 2023. The County Hall was an exceptional stay with an even greater view of Big Ben and Parliament right on the Thames. Enjoyed a special Tea in the Marriott Library, great food and Natalia our server was incredible. Also breakfast each morning in the Library was spectacular, thanks Ana!

Title: Daughters Graduation
ReviewText: One of the best hotels I have ever stayed at

Title: Amazing stay
ReviewText: Wonderful hotel, great location and service… plus the room was very clean and the bed very comfortable. Highly recommended!

Title: Hotel Under Construction
ReviewText: Hotel itself was great and the staff super friendly.  The downside was the construction that started around 8am each morning.  When you’re on vacation especially when your jet lagged it’s nice to have a lie in.  There was no chance to sleep through the noise.  If we had known about the construction we would have chosen another hotel.

Title: A Wonderful Stay
ReviewText: The location is one of a kind. If you are lucky enough to get a room with a view, Big Ben, The London Eye, Parliament , Westminster Bridge are all there   Extraordinary. The staff is friendly and conscientious.  They make you feel special.   The food was superb. No complaints other than the fitness room was small, no windows and it is not open24-7 which can be problem with early morning plane travel .   That is a small issue when considering the hotel experience you are given.  Highly recommend

Title: Great location and Staff
ReviewText: Overall an very good Marriott since I usually choose Marriott when traveling. The beds are a bit firm for the brand but this is not unusual for Europe. Breakfast is very nice and staff is very friendly. The indoor pool is fantastic for lap swimmers.

Title: Disappointed
ReviewText: Disappointed. Really wanted to dine at the Library but were turned away for unclear reasons.

Title: Nice stay in London!
ReviewText: Everythink was as expected!

Title: Perfect Ambiance
ReviewText: Perfect location, perfect ambiance looking at Big Ben with friendly staff

Title: THE RESTAURANT
ReviewText:
Hotel beautiful staff excellent hotel clean very good location 
restaurant expensive to eat and food not that good

Title: Perfect London Stay
ReviewText: This is such an excellent location in London! The location, the staff, the atmosphere, is all unbeatable in London, this hotel is all the things you need for your visit to London

Title: Unbeatable Environment, Staff, & Location
ReviewText: A great place to stay and enjoy for any visit to London. Welcoming staff and environment in a central location, between two close by underground stations.

Title: Fantastic Thanksgiving Holiday
ReviewText: My family spent the Thanksgiving holiday at this hotel and thoroughly enjoyed the location, the history, and the service.  The staff went out of their way to ensure we enjoyed our stay.  The restaurants were excellent quality which made an easy choice for us to use every day of our stay.

Title: Absolutely superb
ReviewText: The staff went above and beyond on our recent stay, we where so impressed with the service, the hotel is excellent and an ideal location , I cannot recommend highly enough

Title: Survey
ReviewText: Average with no special requirement

Title: Steve’s take
ReviewText: Only criticism the food was plain and mundane. Otherwise a great stay with great staff.

Title: Memorable stay
ReviewText: Literally memorable, unique experience right in front of the Big Ben. Extremely convenient location to major sightseeing spots. Breakfast is offered at The Library for elite members, and it was amazing. Authentic English Full Breakfast was impressive thanks to friendly staffs.

Title: Excellent! Highly recommend!
ReviewText: We had a lovely experience! Our room was beautiful and the staff were friendly and accommodating.

Title: Fantastic Hotel
ReviewText: From start to finish! Great service, beautiful views, and just a lovely hotel.

Title: Shocked no breakfast
ReviewText: Nice room but for the price

Title: Wonderful Hotel!
ReviewText: I stayed here for a week and it was wonderful! The staff was friendly and knowledgeable. My room had ample space. The public areas were always kept clean and have beautiful architecture features. The Westminster tube station was a quick walk across the bridge and Waterloo Station was not far away. I’d definitely stay here again.

Title: Outstanding experience, perfect London location
ReviewText:
If you're looking for a scenic, central location in London with unbelievable service, this is the place. Look out the window across the Thames at the Clock Tower and Parliament, and the London Eye. 
And the personal service was incredible, from the moment of check-in all the way through. Restaurant staff remembered all our preferences and was incredibly friendly. Great suggestions from concierge. Elegant design, and we were lucky enough to be there when the Christmas decorations went up. Tasteful, festive and charming. I'll happily stay here again.

Title: Home away from home in London
ReviewText: Marriot County Hall is always and excellent stay!

Title: Great service and accommodation
ReviewText: The staff were friendly from pre-check in via chat to our check out process. They helped us as needed and with a smile.

Title: London stay 11/2023
ReviewText: Best hotel ever😊 Staff was on top of every need we had! Room and hotel were above a 10.

Title: Excellent Hotel; Highly Recommend!
ReviewText:
We couldn’t have asked for a more comfortable and welcoming stay in London! From the moment we arrived at reception for check-in, greeted by the lovely Valentyna who happily addressed all of our requests and provided us with a great room. The room was wonderful, clean, has all the amenities we needed and was spacious enough to accommodate us comfortably (which is rare amongst so many hotels in London, it seems). Bedding was extremely comfortable, bathroom quire spacious and in excellent condition. The window was small and seemed outdated in terms of design (due to the building structure itself), which unfortunately obstructed the lovely view of London Eye and Thames; yet we were still able to see it

A couple of points for improvement: 
- The TV is quite outdated and needs to be replaced with a proper ‘smart TV’ that has good quality display, is more responsive and compatible with Apple products screen-sharing. 
- The hotel room service menu (especially the all-day menu) is quite unappealing. Options are very limited and not really inclusive of any hotel comfort food or the usual selections you’d find at a Marriott.

Title: Really enjoy our stay and thank you for the great service!
ReviewText: We are very happy with our stay and appreciate the excellent service we received throughout the Marriott County Hall in London. Thank you for making our holiday a very pleasant experience.

Title: Excellent Service, staff and location
ReviewText: My favorite place to stay in London.

Title: Thank You!
ReviewText: Top notch accommodations and service. There was a protest going on and the doormen walked blocks away with our luggage to get us to a taxi in time to get to the airport. Beyond grateful!

Title: Convenient location .. that is it
ReviewText:
If u want a good view and convenient location. This hotel is a good choice. 
Other than this, don’t expect too much.

Title: Great 5 star stay
ReviewText: I can’t wait until I return to London… will definitely have this at the top of my list

Title: Outstanding Experience
ReviewText: What a great experience from check-in to check-out. The hotel is clean and somehow both classic and modern. All staff we interacted with were super friendly and helpful. I would also say this is the first Bonvoy hotel that actually let me use my suite night awards and made me feel like being a Bonvoy member at a certain status is worth the investment of my money and loyalty. Well done!

Title: Best hotel in London!
ReviewText: Great location, top notch service, and the hotel was immaculate!

Title: Confortable
ReviewText: All may needs were pleased

Title: Safe and Clean
ReviewText: The service in the restaurants was brutal...The steak house dinner was awful. Waited about 15 minutes to be acknowledged, I think the server forgot to put in our order. The after about 45 minutes the server came to our table and said our order coming right up, 15 minutes later the manager came to the table and mentioned that food should be right up and then another 15 minutes later the food actually arrived. The quality of the food was poor..

Title: Wonderful experience at a well maintained and run Marriott.
ReviewText: I would recommend the County Hall Hotel, it is very clean, safe, the staff are excellent in all areas and I was able to relax knowing I was looked after.

Title: Outstanding Service!!!!!!
ReviewText: The best service from any Marriott we've stayed.  The staff was awesome!!

Title: Review Oct 2023
ReviewText: Highly recommend as the staff was very pleasant and very knowledgeable about the property and made sure our stay was excellent. I stayed in 3 properties on this trip and can say that the Marriott was the only one that was knowledgeable about the area and knowledgeable on their own hotel. Rooms had amazing views and had cleaning and turn down service. I’ve been to a lot of properties abroad and this is definitely a top.

Title: Excellent hotel
ReviewText: Great location, very clean, and polite staff.

Title: 非常差的体验和不专业的经理
ReviewText: 非常差，不会再来。很糟糕的体验，态度很差的经理服务

Title: Amazing night
ReviewText: London was so vibrant at this time of night the hotel to come back to was even a better experience

Title: Another wonderful stay
ReviewText: We adore this hotel. We have never had a bad experience. The staff, the rooms, the food….. all 10/10!

Title: Wonderful stay!
ReviewText:
Staying here over the weekend of our wedding proved to be the perfect choice.

The hotel took care of everything we needed from them and could not have been more helpful.

Just a delightful stay where everything we could possibly have needed or wanted was taken care of.

Title: A Great Marriott Experience in London
ReviewText:
We have stayed at London's County Hall 3X.  Everything about this hotel is special.  Starting with the drive through to the Circle at the entrance - to the Lobby, to Gilray's, to the Hallways, and then to your Room.  Amazing.  But first, the front desk.  The staff at check in is attentive, friendly, and provide the best of what you expect at Marriott.  Don't miss a drink at Gilray's, breakfast in the Library, or a visit to the Lounge.  
Ask for a room with a Thames View - the view of Big Ben, Houses of Parliament, London Eye and the River Thames are incredible.
The location of this hotel - right at the Westminster Bridge - is SO convenient for touring London - short walks to :  Buckingham Palace, Parliament, 10 Downing Street, Churchill War Rooms - you could go on and on.
To sum it up - this isn't only a Great Marriott Hotel - it's a Great London Hotel.

Title: Like going home
ReviewText: London Marriott County Hall is a great place to stay in London. I have stayed several times in last couple years and have always had a great experience. It is clean, the rooms are comfortable, and the restaurant food is great. It is close to sites to visit, the underground is easy to get to and use. There is a pharmacy and a couple pop in grocery stores within a five minute walk. Plus the view is incredible. Barry, at the door, is friendly and helpful, Laura, in the M club is as well. The M club is a great place to relax after a day of exploring the city. And both the Library and Gillroy’s offer great breakfast and meals.

Title: London
ReviewText: Silver and Barry both are WONDERFUL.   Silver really went above and beyond.

Title: Amazing place to stay!
ReviewText: The location is the best!  Perfect for a river cruise, dining, seeing Big Ben, etc.

Title: Excellent Stay
ReviewText: I thoroughly enjoyed my stay at the Marriott County Hall. The staff are excellent, food is great quality, and the decor is a mixture of classic and vibrant which sets the right tone and atmosphere for a wonderful London experience. Can’t beat the location as well.

Title: Delightful Week in London
ReviewText: Located on the Thames by The Eye and Westminster Bridge, the Marriott County Hall was a lovely home away from home during our week in London. Accommodations were outstanding and the staff friendly, kind and helpful. We felt like they were very happy that we were there.

Title: Fantastic Hotel
ReviewText: Everything about this hotel is top notch.  From the location to the view to the staff it was wonderful.  Highly recommend

Title: London Trip
ReviewText: The best Marriott yet. Service and friendliness of staff excellent.

Title: Lovely
ReviewText:
Lovely room. Cool, calm and curtains that black out the light.
So we sleep well
Was very clean and the staff were lovely

Title: Great location
ReviewText: We loved the location and found the staff to be welcoming and prompt.

Title: Excellent property and location for sight seeing
ReviewText:
The staff and the location complement this high-quality Marriott property.  We visited to celebrate our 35th wedding anniversary and the staff truly made our time enjoyable. 

It was one of the hottest weeks on record for September but the property is well-maintained and staffed with very courteous folks

Title: How to treat a Lifetime Platinum Member
ReviewText: Overall, the staff was great; they should have communicated the construction situation and tried to offer different options. The atmosphere felt very nice. It is a very convenient location to get around the city. I would most likely stay again, depending on the circumstances.

Title: alright
ReviewText:
The room was spotless.
The breakfast was poor.
in the first night we had steak and it was delicious so next day we decided to have lunch so I had a burger what it was a desaster…  I couldn’t stop throwing up… badly food poisoning.

Title: Lack of hospitality
ReviewText: Overall experience is bad

Title: Great service and location without good breakfast
ReviewText: There is no great breakfast in a great Hotel. It is weird.

Title: Great hospitality
ReviewText: We flew over from the United States and were extremely worn out upon arrival.  The staff immediately took care of our bags, told us to have a seat and gave us a much needed glass of water.  The room was very big for European standards and the bath very modern.  Great hotel!

Title: JScarlet
ReviewText: Overall, fantastic facility. Quiet ambience, clean rooms. Eatery arrangement can be improved.

Title: County Hall
ReviewText: Great place to stay! Great location and close to everything.

Title: great stay
ReviewText:
recommend for anyone, staff are great
location is amazing

Title: Fantastic
ReviewText:
We stayed here for my 50 th birthday,which was made extremely special by this hotel.
The staff were really friendly and helpful,the room was beautiful and really clean.
We had an amazing view of Big Ben from our bedroom.

Title: Best hotel in London
ReviewText: If you are looking to stay in an iconic hotel in London in a fantastic  location you must book a room at the London Marriott County Hall. You feel as if you have stepped into history as the building is gorgeous and you are on the Thames directly across from Westminster Abby and Big Ben. Stepping onto the Westminster Bridge all you have to do is to look to your right or left to see London spread out around you. The staff are super helpful and friendly, the rooms are large, and the amenities are great. Loved the pool!

Title: GREAT PLACE
ReviewText:
GREAT HOTEL
BEST OF THE BEST

Title: It’s our firm favourite.
ReviewText: It’s our favourite hotel. Always enjoy our stay. Even if things weren’t quiet perfect it was still lovely.

Title: Great Marriott! Great staff. Super convenient.
ReviewText:
I visited London for 5 days to drop my daughter at school. I had recently stayed at the Marriott Residence Inn in Kensington, which was fine but not great, so I was a little hesitant to try this hotel. What a difference! The location is fantastic. It’s 3 feet from the London Eye and a stone’s throw from Parliament and Big Ben. You can walk to Piccadilly Circus and Oxford Circus easily. It’s a few blocks to both the Waterloo and Westminster tube (and National train) stops which link to many of the main lines. 

The room was lovely. The staff were so nice and helpful. And I appreciate that it feels very intimate and discreet and you can come and go without parading through swarms of people in the lobby. I will definitely stay here on my next visit to London.

Title: Home away from home !
ReviewText: Excellent location, great service

Title: London
ReviewText: Great hotel and location. In the heart of London on the River. Wish they would bring back concierge.

Title: Quality you can count on
ReviewText: Top notch location - well trained professional staff

Title: 很赞，适合家庭出游。
ReviewText: 地理位置优越，出门就是大本钟和伦敦眼，泰晤士河。房间布置设施完善，服务好。

Title: Great hotel, excellent service and premium location
ReviewText: Me and my family stayed at this hotel for 5 days. The hotel is very clean, well maintained and at  a premium location close to main attractions, restaurants, train stations, etc. The staff is amazing! You could tell that all of them cared for the customer experience. The food at their restaurants is also pretty good. I highly recommend this hotel!

Title: Good location but facility is dated
ReviewText: The beds and rooms were comfy. Liked breakfast and the location.  However, to enter/ exit the hotel, you have to go through a long passage to the street.  Convenient for cars, but not so much for pedestrians.  The shower was nice but had trouble draining.  Robes and slippers were provided- a nice touch.  River view room had just that- view of river, not Parliament.

Title: Good location but noisy room
ReviewText: Perfect location, good bed and size of rooms comfortable for a long stay. Some noise in the morning hours after 07:00 because of workers (which probably bringing materials for the hotel).

Title: Wonderful views of the Thames and Big Ben
ReviewText: It was our first time at The Marriott County hall and we loved every minute of our 6 nights stay. Our room waa spacious with 2 queen beds. Breakfast was delicious albeit pricey. Tje restaurant had a red meat centric menu and we had to look for other options to ensure balanced diet for all. We will definitely return.

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Everything was good for staying as a couple

Title: Disappointed
ReviewText: Disappointed by the lack of professionalism from Muhammad mainly at reception. Overall not a great stay

Title: Best location and accommodations in London
ReviewText: A fantastic hotel, with superior service and amenities. You will be in the center of the best London has to offer while being treated like royalty.

Title: Best service
ReviewText: If you like not being ignored and taken care of well Marriott is the way to go!

Title: Amazing place to stay
ReviewText:
Location :
- Best of the best in London
Staff :
- Nice and so kind
- Helpful with information
- Greeting as great as British style
Breakfast :
- Really really good
- Bagel Salmon is the must try menu
- Only thing is it would be better if the menu has Salad or vegetables thing
Executive Lounge :
- Very very amazing
- Only thing is it a small portion of evening canapes

Title: Lovely staff & location, clean facilities, inadequate fitness center
ReviewText: We loved the location of this Marriott as well as the hospitality and assistance of the staff. Everyone was exceptionally courteous and friendly. It was very clean and well looked after. Unfortunately the regular fitness center wasn't available and we were told there was access to a temporary one, which would've been fine except it was about 90 degrees F in there.

Title: Fantastic
ReviewText: This Marriott is more like a ritz Carlton. Big rooms, amazing service. I highly recommend getting a room with access to executive lounge. Totally worth it. Happy hour is in evenings is basically dinner. Huge space with lots of seating and an incredible view of Big Ben.

Title: Incomparable Stay at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall
ReviewText: It is hard to beat the location that this property has and the ambience that this property exudes. Highly recommended, and would stay here again.

Title: Great location; acceptable service.
ReviewText:
The location can't be beat, with many rooms having views over the Thames and Parliament.  Most things are done very well (as they should be at a five-star-priced property).

Avoid their breakfast.  It's overpriced, with only average quality and very uneven service.

Title: Not a 5 star
ReviewText:
All not a 5 star hotel
Service terrible
Food poor

Title: Not worth the money
ReviewText: Totally overrated, overpriced.  I have been a Bonvoy member for several years and have been overall happy but  we paid a small fortune for the “deluxe family room” and the beds were 8inches apart and there wasn’t a desk.  There was no outlet in the bathroom so I dried my hair next to the bed.  The only good things I can say is the breakfast was free and the location makes it easy to get to major sightseeing attractions.

Title: perfect hotel
ReviewText: We are from Germany and came to London for 3 days of sight-seeing with our 3 children. We stayed 2 nights in your great hotel. We recommend your hotel 100%! The staff was very friendly and polite, the rooms and the breakfast were perfect, too, certainly! The hotel is located right next to Westminster Bridge, so we could explore London by walking, but public transport or sightseeing bus stops were very nearby, too! We had no experience with Marriott before, but we would return to the hotel in the future again, if possible - and if there is an opportunity for us to get back to London! Thank you very much for your hospitality and for your help!

Title: A fantastic week in London at the London Marriott County Hall
ReviewText:
Excellent property! The location is perfect for a home base with easy access to a lot of attractions and public transportation. The rooms are beautifully appointed, comfortable and the staff is friendly and efficient. The amenities are fantastic, including the M Lounge, the pool and the gym.
The food and drinks we tried were excellent. We visited The Library and the M Lounge during our stay. The gym, the pool and the common areas throughout the hotel were beautiful and nicely decorated.
The hotel has easy access to public transportation but the staff is always willing to hail a cab. Speaking of the staff, they are extremely helpful and responsive. I left a few items in my closet and they worked to ship them to me in the US. Everything is hassle-free at this property.

Title: Worth Every Penny
ReviewText: Incredible stay. I would recommend this hotel highly. I stay in Marriott's up to 90 days per year and this is the best I have ever stayed in.

Title: My County Hall Experience
ReviewText: Everything at this hotel was perfection!! From the super comfortable modern rooms to the excellent decoration to the breakfast food and service at the library. I would highly recommend.

Title: Best view in London
ReviewText: I specifically booked our room and I was in awe when we arrived. We had unobstructed view of London Eye/River Thames/Big Ben/ Westminster with a balcony! We also had welcome champagne and gift when we arrived. Breakfast was also delicious. Service and staff were exceptional. Book this hotel when in London. Thank you Marriott.

Title: Top notch experience and location in London
ReviewText: There is no better combination of experience and location than the Marriott County Hall. Multiple stays at this location and will be more in the future.

Title: Great Hotel and Excellent Location.
ReviewText: Beautiful decor and comfortable rooms very convenient location to many amazing attractions.

Title: So far so good and Excellent experience
ReviewText: God and excellent experience both on accommodation feeding and service delivery

Title: London City Hall
ReviewText: Absolutely fabulous because of the staff and the overall building

Title: Nice and beautiful hotel
ReviewText: We love the hotel so beautiful but we had bad experience since the day 1. We booked Big Ben view but they gave us Thames river view. The other room was noisy with construction at 10 am that ridiculous. But the staffs are so nice. And yes we got compensation. But definitely will comeback to this beautiful hotel.

Title: Excellent stay in Marriott County Hall London
ReviewText: Very convenient hotel with good view of Westminster and Big Ben. Staff is quite professional and nice. especially Leena Mistry helped us a lot with booking and experience explaining. I have recommended my friend to book your hotel in August.

Title: poor service
ReviewText: been many times before. overall service not 5star by any stretch of the imagination. Will use Mariott in the future but not this hotel.

Title: Just good…. average
ReviewText: An average hotel with a hefty price tag.  A real shame as I was super excited to stay.  Little things missing like turn down, clean evening towels and biscuits with your tea and coffee.  Room service menu/ options were poor and had to wait in a queue for breakfast.  Lift and corridor has a bad smell throughout my stay and food/service for afternoon tea was awful.

Title: Perfect stay for kids' first trip to London!
ReviewText:
London Marriott County Hall was our home base for 6 nights in London. The room was perfect for us and my boys never grew tired of the view or of hearing Big Ben.

The staff went above and beyond to make all of us comfortable and to ensure a memorable stay. In particular, Rami and Anna were amazing at breakfast, helping us start our day on a happy note. Their thoughtfulness was really exceptional - after noting our family obsession with Pokemon Go, they gifted my boys with a few little Pokemon figurines on our last day at breakfast. Rami had even taken photos of them in other spots of the hotel and told the boys they needed to look after the Pokemon so they didn't get in trouble. Anna also made sure they had everything they needed (and wanted!) at breakfast. Others in the lounge, at the pool, etc, were just as kind as well. Thank you to Rami, Anna, and all the others for this super memorable stay! And to Ms Shah who helped me secure the room type I wanted when I struggled to book it myself - it made all the difference!

Title: 遠い部屋はやめておいた方が良い
ReviewText:
遠い部屋といわれたら、眺望が良くなくても近い部屋をお願いした方が良いです。遠いと言われたらすごく遠い部屋です。ラウンジは２４時間は入れるので、有難かったです。
アップグレードでもバスタブは無いので、バスタブのある部屋と指定しておいた方が良かったなと思いました。

Title: Perfect Location Etc.
ReviewText: This is a wonderful spot on the South Bank.  In between 2 tube stations.  Facing Big Ben and the River.  Pool was lovely.  The lounge was so nice.  Won't go anywhere else unless I have to.

Title: Poor experience despite being a titanium member.
ReviewText: The room I reserved was not available despite already checked in online. And alternative arrangements were very slow and had to wait a long time.

Title: Above and Beyond
ReviewText: Expected quality was above and beyond!

Title: Marriott ruined a milestone birthday
ReviewText: I am incredibly disappointed in Marriott after over 275 stays the quality and service gets worse, I think this will be my last stay with this chain.

Title: London Visit
ReviewText: Luxury hotel located in Central London and close to everything.  Walk, Taxi, Bus, Tube (subway), Uber all easily accessible from the hotel. Would recommend this hotel to anyone visiting London.

Title: A little disappointed
ReviewText: Great location, great breakfast, needs an update inside. poor check in process

Title: Amazing hotel in the perfect location
ReviewText: Incredible how an older building was transformed into an incredible modern hotel. Impeccably clean, terrific staff, an overall amazing experience. The location right next to the London Eye is perfect. Could not recommend more highly.

Title: Lovely Hotel
ReviewText: The hotel was amazing and staff members were exceptional and accommodating! Food was good as well and the location is just superb!

Title: Not the Hotel I was Expecting
ReviewText: Did not honor my Suites upgrade.  Ran out of linens.  False fire alarms in the middle of the night without explanation.

Title: Harmony. Crutcher
ReviewText: Excellent location. Minutes away from Big Ben and Buckingham palace. We walked to most major sites. The building structure is beautiful. The staff was extremely friendly and helpful.

Title: Fabulous Hotel
ReviewText: The rooms are large. The hotel is immaculate and the staff are wonderful. Food was fabulous.  The hotel is in a centrally located area of London. A nice walk or taxi ride to most places. We stayed a week and had a lovely vacation.

Title: Great location with awesome staff
ReviewText: My wife and I were in London for our honeymoon, and we had such a wonderful experience. We had some unfortunate events happen out in the city at the beginning of our trip but despite that we had an incredible time because of the amazing staff and overall stellar experience. Eyad at the front desk helped us get settled smoothly and helped us with booking tours close by and getting us a taxi when we’re ready to go. And our servers Sanda and Sudheena gave us good recommendations for the city as well as provided excellent service and made sure we felt special while on our honeymoon! We would definitely come back again, they made sure we had a wonderful time in London!

Title: One of my favorite hotels globally
ReviewText: Great hotel in an amazing location, with exceptional food and service.

Title: First time visitor
ReviewText: Staff and cleanliness was excellent

Title: Nice Stay in London by Marriott London County Hall
ReviewText: A very nice experience by Marriott London County Hall! Perfect location in London, direct view of Thames, London Eye and Parliament. Professional and excellent service Team! Thank you!

Title: MALO
ReviewText: MALO, LOS MOTIVOS ESTAN EXPUESTOS AL PRINCIPIO, DE TODOS MODOS EL ESFUERZO POR EL PERSONAL DEL HOTEL DE QUERER ENTENDERNOS EN ESPAÑOL FUE CERO.

Title: First time in London
ReviewText: Excellent Staff, Great restaurants, Rooms were great and Location was Fantastic!!

Title: Vacation in London
ReviewText: wonderful experience at London Marriott County Hall. From location to service and amenities

Title: Great hotel, excellent staff
ReviewText: The hotel is great and the location is fantastic; however, the best part of it was staff. The staff made our stay exceptional. I definitely recommend this hotel.

Title: It can’t get much better
ReviewText: The hotel staff, the location and the facility was top notch. The hotel staff could not have been more helpful, accommodating and genuinely nice people. After stopping at the concierge with a question we were greeted with two glasses of champagne for no reason. what a great experience. The County Hall Marriott is my only choice for my future visits to London.

Title: London Holiday break
ReviewText: We spent 2 nights at the county hall Marriott. Loved the hotel. Great welcome at reception as were travelling with a 5 yr old.  Fruit and a balloon which he loved. Breakfast is al carte style.Staff in the restaurant are very attentive.  Anna looked after us and remembered our selections which was very sweet.  Hotel room was lovely - great big bathrooms. Big hotel so might have a long walk to the rooms. Awesome location for sight seeing.  Kids playground around the corner.  Have stayed at a couple of Marriotts in the last month.  No amenities in the bathrooms.  Feel silly calling house keeping for cotton buds / toothbrush etc.  Also young adults are not catered for with bathrobes, slippers and kid toiletries …. I found this was really lovely at the Shangri-La Sentosa. And the Mgallery in Prague .  My little was very excited to see he had his own special things. Overall amazing stay - would absolutely stay here again.

Title: I just want to get a drink!
ReviewText: Overall the hotel was ok, although expensive for what it was. Staff generally unhelpful or constrained by process. Bar staff refused to serve me and was told that I had to take a seat and a waiter would attend to me.... was informed that the barman could not speak english but then later heard him speaking good english. Again constrained by some pathetic processes I presume. Every person I dealt with in the hotel had English as a second language.

Title: Incredible property
ReviewText: Everything about our stay was perfect. The location and hotel were amazing. The room and facilities were modern and clean. Breakfast was amazing and staff were always so kind! We couldn’t recommend this place enough!!

Title: Wonderful accommodation and location
ReviewText: We had a wonderful time and the best  accommodation , food, service. We were treated with kindness and warmth during our  6 days in London. We will return and visit again.

Title: Excellent location for dated property
ReviewText: This historic building sits in a prime location along the Thames. Next door to the London Eye, across from Big Ben and the Parliment building; there is no better location in the city. The hotel itself is dated and sorely needs to be updated. In room furnishings, bar/lounge and lobby all would benefit tremendously from a renovation.

Title: Comfortable, Friendly and trustworthy
ReviewText: The staff at Gilray restaurant were very friendly to my son who had Autism and Speech Delay. They handled our request with patience and provide service without any hesitation. The cleaning staff were also very friendly, they greet us every morning and very considerable to our kids situation. There were laptops, cameras, mobile phones and even cash laying around but none of it were taken or even touched by the staff, they were very trustworthy. The reception team were also very helpful and handy during check ins, adjustment to our reservations as well helping us with transportation and luggage handling.

Title: Excellent!
ReviewText:
Excellent staff, very efficient and cooperative. property and rooms are well kept, clean. 
Very good!

Title: The people make the experience.
ReviewText: The people always make the experience special. Thanks to Steve in the M Club and Barry at the door for assisting us everyday.

Title: A first visit
ReviewText:
I took my husband to London for his first time and we loved our accommodations. Our room was as pictured in the reservation, overlooking the river and London eye view. He really liked the proximity to everything. Unfortunately, we did not know that it was the weekend of the London Marathon so roads were closed, making it difficult to get to our next destination. He really enjoyed the indoor pool and facilities. We were not happy with the quality of room service food for the price.  We also tried afternoon tea at the library which was very pricey, but the overall experience was well worth the cost. We had a table overlooking the River Thames, and our server Alex was very attentive and professional. Our dinner at Gilrays was absolutely delicious and worth the price. My husband had the prime rib and said it was one of the best he has ever tasted in 30 years. I had the rosemary/thyme half-chicken. It was also delicious, fresh, and tender.
We found the front desk staff not as friendly and helpful as they had once been in the past. The wait staff were quite the opposite and very responsive to our needs for more coffee, milk, and toiletries. 
We stayed 4 nights and found that it was a satisfying stay in general. Do be prepared to pay more for your accommodations and experience at this location.

Title: Great location
ReviewText:
Had a very comfortable stay, staff very friendly and attentive.
Food delicious 
Great Views from the dining room

Title: Ein Erlebnis in London
ReviewText: Die Lage des Hotels - direkt am London Eye und gegenüber vom Big Ben - ist unschlagbar. Wir wurden beim Check-In außerdem besonders überrascht und haben ein Update auf die einzigartige und wesentliche teurere Westminster Suite erhalten. Eine wirklich sehr großzügige Suite mit 2 Badezimmern, Esstisch für bis zu 10 Personen mit VIP-Blick auf Big Ben. Für uns war das eine besondere Erfahrung und auch das ältere Gebäude mit Geschichte hat Charme. Kids hatten im Pool (fast schon kleines Schwimmbad) viel Spaß. Kurz und knapp: TOP!

Title: Marriott London County Hall
ReviewText: In the center of where you want to be! The Marriott County Hall delivers the finest of food, service, and amenities. From the moment you check in, you know you are in great hands. I am fortunate to stay at some of the most exclusive hotels around the globe, but when I come to London, there is no other place for me to call 'home'.

Title: Marriott County Hall London
ReviewText: Had a lovely weekend stay. First time stay at this Marriott, was not disappointed. Great location, welcoming staff and lovely accommodation. Would highly recommend.

Title: Outstanding
ReviewText: As an Elite Member we have stopped at a variety of Marriotts. County Hall is best in class. Outstanding.

Title: Wonderful place to stay!
ReviewText: Everything met our expectations. Every staff member we encountered was friendly, professional and helpful. Our room was clean and comfortable. The gym is enormous! All of the amenities as a Bonvoy member were above par. Location was perfect-close to everything a tourist needs! Highly recommend this hotel and will stay here again.

Title: Marriott county Hall
ReviewText: Perfect location, has iconic views. Service was excellent and the staff were very professional, helpful, friendly, and polite. Hotel is well maintained. I’d come back and stay here longer for sure.

Title: A week of creating family memories.
ReviewText: Beautiful hotel with a great staff and fantastic location.

Title: A perfect 10+ rating review!
ReviewText: A beautiful hotel, in perfect location, delicious food/restaurant, with the most caring and attentive staff across all aspects of the hotel. Thank you Marriott!!! You went over and beyond for our family!!

Title: Marriott Experience
ReviewText: Outstanding quality and service.  We had an excellent trip and will return to this hotel.

Title: High end Marriott experience
ReviewText:
We stayed in the beautiful County Hall property on the River Thames in London.  The location cannot be beat for getting to many of the tourist sites.  As for our room, the staff experience, the  concierge lounge and the upgraded balcony room, every thing about our stay was wonderful and amazing.  I have been a Bonvoy member for many years, and this hotel ranks high on our list, as compared to other hotel brands.

We have enjoyed many of the Marriott brand hotels, and can honestly say that the higher end hotels have never disappointed.  We use our points wisely, and have been awarded upgrades quite often and/or have cashed in our “suite night” awards.

I highly recommend not just this hotel but to consider being a Bonvoy member.  I find the perks to be of great value, especially when we are on vacation and have a choice on where I stay.

Title: great
ReviewText: we have a great  time  in  your hotel the evening  was amazing and  the hospitality was very good

Title: Your go to Marriott hotel in London
ReviewText: They keep it simple , great location and club amenities

Title: Enjoy London.
ReviewText: Nice hotel but there are better hotels close by.

Title: 2 Night Trip
ReviewText: I wanted an amazing venue in London for a trip with my wife. My daughter joined us for one night. The hotel is located in a spectacular location with easy access to transport on the river or tube. Great place to stay.

Title: Stay
ReviewText:
Very happy with our stay would recommend to people 

We stay at marriots around the world 
Very happy

Title: Amazing experience, awesome hotel
ReviewText: Family of five travelled to London. We had an amazing experience. Room was spacious and clean, staff was friendly and amazing, and food was pretty good too. Location is amazing - centrally located easy to get to everywhere. I would definitely recommend checking the hotel out if you are headed for London.

Title: A perfect location for my Family of Teenagers!
ReviewText: The hotel was every thing we expected and it was very centrally located.

Title: Amazing location and prime views
ReviewText:
We stayed for a week with the family.  

Amazing suite views and a balcony overlooking the Thames River, Big Ben and London Eye.  Staff was amazing and easy to get around.

Title: Totally Worth It!
ReviewText:
Arrival and check-in was very good and fairly quick for our family of my wife and I and our 4 year old. Room was a outstanding, view absolutely amazing, exactly what we hoped for.
M Lounge was basic but cool, service was very nice. Made use of it several times while we were there on our 5 day stay. Library was cool but had bad service, very cool view a must do at least once. Main restaurant was a great way to start our day each morning. Service was great except when we had that server (I think he must need more training, nice but not good at his job). 
Dinner at the main dining room was nice serves was very slow but very nice and the food was pretty good. Would go again next time we come. Strings is another restaurant on property that was wonderful, easy to walk to. Cant beat the location for the tube and taxi's and the bus are all easy to connect. I think this is arguably the best hotel location in London. You can get to everywhere pretty quickly. We have done AirB&B in the past, which are cool but this is a fun great option. Great place for the whole family. We look forward to coming and staying in the same type of room. If you can get the balcony room, it's worth it. Cheers!

Title: Outstanding
ReviewText:
Excellent service. Hotel was very Clean. 
Staff were knowledgeable, professional and helpful

Title: Best Hotel in London
ReviewText: I strongly recommend this hotel if anyone is staying in London. Everything will exceed your expectations. The facilities are elegant, clean, and spacious. The service from every single staff member is impeccable. The location couldn’t be better. If you are a platinum elite status holder , you will definitely feel appreciated. The M club is gorgeous , with an out of this world view. You’ll get your moneys worth, I guarantee it.

Title: Winter holidays in London
ReviewText:
The location is not as desirable as expected. distance away from westminister station. 

breakfast not up to standard. croissants very plain and dry. selection very limited and uninteresting. 

long corridors and some rooms are located far from lift.

Title: Best Marriot ever stayed in
ReviewText: A very unique experience with the best staffs available.

Title: Wonderful stay
ReviewText: I had a wonderful stay at the Marriott County Hall. Great location, fantastic room and very helpful and kind staff. I will definitely stay here when I come to London for work in the future.

Title: Well worth the money
ReviewText: The location is amazing, and the staff were so friendly and helpful. The views of Big Ben from our room were beautiful. Our children, six and eight years old, loved the swimming pool and we thought the gym facilities were excellent. It was well worth the money spent to have access to the M club and a full breakfast every day.

Title: 3 nights at the Balcony Suite
ReviewText: If you love to take nice photos, the balcony suite is an inevitable!!

Title: Location perfect
ReviewText:
Great staff and location
Pool was good, gym was great 
Clean hotel

Title: Enjoyable stay at the Marriott Hotel
ReviewText:
I had a very enjoyable stay at the Marriott Hotel County Hall with my mum as I had a hospital appointment at St George's hospital in Tooting. 
The staff were all very friendly and helpful and quickly ordered a taxi for us when we needed one when we went out.
Our room was spotlessly clean, the beds were comfortable and the feather pillows were removed from our room as my mum has a severe feather allergy. Our dietary needs were catered for too with gluten free breakfast cereal and a wide choice of food.

I would definitely book to stay at the Marriott Hotel County Hall again and highly recommend it.

Title: Honeymoon Gift a dream of a stay in heart of London
ReviewText:
Fantastic iconic views of London from room and Gilrays restaurant and Library Tea Room and excellent service and food. Position ideal to visit London attractions and shopping in Oxford Street etc and all famous parks theatres and iconic sites, shops and museums.
Bonus of spa and pool if you can find time as so much to see.
Close to Waterloo station as underground stations and red buses everywhere as well as the iconic black taxi to travel around London but easily done by walking as everything so close by.

Title: Our favourite
ReviewText:
We use this hotel for every stay in London. I always wish we could stay forever. 

Such a beautiful hotel in a beautiful location.

Title: Friendly, organized hotel in great location.
ReviewText: The hotel was clean and the staff very friendly and helpful. My room was spacious and very clean. I had a great view of the Elizabeth tower (ie Big Ben) from one window and the London eye from another- it was very pretty at night as lite up with color. Afternoon tea in the library was excellent and I had dinner once at Gillroy which was also excellent. The location of the hotel is between two underground’s (Westminster and Waterloo) so getting around the city was  convenient. I plan on staying at this hotel again!

Title: LONDON WEEKEND TRIP
ReviewText: WOULD STAY AGAIN VERY RELAXING AND CLEAN HOTEL

Title: Great location
ReviewText: The hotel is located in the perfect spot to see London.  The staff was great and very accommodating.

Title: London Marriott Hotel County Hall
ReviewText: The Hotel was great to stay at. The staff is attentive- exceptional. The Hotel and rooms are clean and quiet. All services from concierge, front of the house staff with baggage and cars, restaurants and clubs is great. Pool and gym are great.

Title: Amazing Stay
ReviewText: I will be back for sure!!

Title: A better Marriott
ReviewText: We were upgraded to a beautiful room facing Big Ben and the London Eye. The room was spotless clean and well designed with Molton Brown amenities. The service at the reception and M lounge were all friendly and professional, especially Sandra and the Italian waitress at the lounge. However, the breakfast was a letdown. It’s too stingy not being able to choose more than one item from cold dishes, considering the portion of English Breakfast was small.

Title: Best Hotel in London
ReviewText: If you are looking for the perfect location for a visit to London, this is the place.  Walked to all the top locations from the hotel.  Loved watching the London Eye go round and see beautiful Big Ben from my room.  Staff were so great, always available to help. Never waited for anything.

Title: Amazing Hotel
ReviewText:
The best place we could choose. Everything was perfect since the very first monent.
Great location, excellent restaurant and a very polite and attentious staff. Perfect hotel!

Title: Amazing location, a must stay in central London.
ReviewText: If the rate is good, treat yourself, this property is excellent.

Title: Nice hotel but not sure it is worth the hefty price tag
ReviewText: Nice hotel but v small side view from what is a v expensive room. Pool very badly signposted and a very rude swimming instructor who directed us to move out of one of the lanes as she had a swimming lesson which turned out to be in half an hours time so everyone was squashed into the remaining part of the pool unneccessarily. I wouldn't go back.

Title: Phenomenal service.
ReviewText: From checkin to checkout the service was amazing. The food was very good.

Title: Terrible service. Room unavailable for 2 hours after check in time and staff unhelpful
ReviewText:
Room wasn’t available at our check in time of 3pm, and we were left waiting in the lobby for nearly 2 hours, despite making staff aware we had an event to attend. The only alternative option offered to us was to upgrade to a different room that was available; at a cost of over £100 to us even though it wasn’t our fault! 

Staff left me to get ready for our event in their public toilets, and only on my insistence did they eventually let us use a temporary room to actually get changed in. 

Terrible service and we won’t be returning again. 

Toilet doors in main toilets were broken and locks weren’t working. Taps in main toilets also leaking. Not what you’d expect from a supposed 5 star experience.

Title: Excellent hotel - Switch off your mini bars.
ReviewText:
Great hotel. Loved the welcome and excellent and friendly attitude of your staff on the desk. Best hotel I’ve stayed in London out of 4 I’ve stayed in in the last couple of months.

One suggestion. You have empty fridges (the old mini bars) that are still switched on in each room. The buzzing is loud at night; they waste electricity (it’s not green to have them on when empty) - my suggestion would be to switch them all off - that would be say 400 fridges. Or pop in a little switch for the guest to switch them on if they really want to, with a comment about doing our bit to save the planet. Switching off 400 fridges would be fab for your electricity bill and the planet - plus the buzzing of the fridge kicking in at night wouldn’t wake me up. Triple bonus.

Title: Traditionell, stylish Marriott between Big Ben and London Eye
ReviewText: I love this hotel, it’s style and location, the very friendly staff and the lovely rooms. It’s one of my favorites in London.

Title: Very good in many ways but 2 bedroom suite not really suitable for families
ReviewText:
I had booked the two bedroom County Hall Suite for myself and my family (2 children). Many aspects of the hotel were excellent - the room was modern and spacious, the service in the executive lounge in particular was really good and the breakfast was very well done. The location of the hotel is also extremely convenient for central London. Value for money I would say it was overall good considering the space and quality of the accommodation.

However the two bedroom suite had king beds in both bedrooms and despite my trying very hard to get twin beds in the second bedroom the front desk were adamant this room cannot be set up in that configuration. I would imagine for many families this would make it unacceptable if your children do not want to share a bed, and had I realised this was not possible I would not have booked the room in the first place.

If you are travelling as a couple then the 1 bedroom suite would be a very good choice but for a family I would have to say look elsewhere.

Title: Excellent London hotel
ReviewText: Everything was as you would want it. It was like I was at home.

Title: Very positive stay
ReviewText: Very positive stay, we felt well taken care of allowing good privacy

Title: Best Marriott Staff Ever!
ReviewText: While the location is great and the history of the building is impressive, the main highlight of this hotel is the staff. They are truly wonderful and provide you with the best service. I have now stayed at this hotel for several nights and I am always very impressed by the friendliness and the professionalism of the staff here. My sincere thanks goes to Martina, Felicia, and Andrea who have always been great at the Library and the Concierge Lounge. Guest service provided by Jasmine and Sonia has been helpful as well. There are several other staff members here who have been incredible and I wish I remembered everyone's name. I am looking forward to returning back to this hotel again.

Title: Excellent location
ReviewText:
We stayed for two nights in a river Thames view room and overlooked big Ben and it was a true delight.
Nothing was too much trouble for the staff, clean, tidy and well presented rooms, couldn’t ask for anything more.

Title: Amazing property in heart of central London .
ReviewText: This review is based on not one but multiple stays , consistency in exceptional service from staff , historic property located few steps away from the London eye , Parliament building , Big Ben , easy access to Underground , safe , clean , family friendly , executive lounge is comfortable and offers great views , you can spend hours in the serene environment , breakfast in The Library is great , I can go on and on , amazing value for money .

Title: Family trip with young children
ReviewText: The service at this hotel was exceptional -warm and genuine and a real interest in the children (6&4)

Title: The best stay and highly recommended
ReviewText: The best stay and highly recommended. Special thanks to Sanda from Gillray's Steak for the great service.

Title: Weekend in London
ReviewText: Centrally located by the river - clean and reliable

Title: Good Location
ReviewText:
The restaurant staff is excellent. We stay here often, and they always remember us. Sanda, especially, is fantastic in her service and warmth. 
Just don’t checkin after midnight. The front desk definitely needs more training. When we objected to the room we were shown, we were told that the hotel was “fully booked”. (In January). When I expressed my disbelief at this statement, the desk person managed to find a more suitable room.

Title: County Hall
ReviewText:
Staff - 5StarThe staff at this property are all great! They all go above and beyond to make your stay comfortable. 
Location - 5*
Dining Menu- 4*
Cleanliness- 4*

Title: Incredible service
ReviewText: I have had to work closely with the staff since I am currently in the hospital and will be returning to the hotel after my release.  Their generosity and sincere willingness to help has been a lifesaver.  I would rate them a high 20

Title: Great Experience
ReviewText: We traveled to London as a couple from the states. We read reviews and had stayed at domestic Marriotts so we expected this hotel to be nice, BUT it exceeded our expectations. The staff was helpful, attentive, kind and knowledgable. The rooms were very clean (I am picky) and had very nice toiletries available for use. I also have to say the rooms were spacious. We were not able to connect our phones to the TV to watch Netflix, but admittedly we never asked for help and we ended up finding plenty of shows to watch on cable. The only odd thing was there were no outlets in the bathroom except one to shave. I ended up finding an outlet in the closet to plug in the provided hairdryer. Bravo!

Title: Do not stay
ReviewText:
Overpriced. mini bar empty  booked for a view of parliament and did not receive  
Had to chase room to be cleaned

Title: Great stay!
ReviewText: This was the perfect hotel for our recent  vacation to London. It was in a great location, with many sights within walking distance (if you like to walk). It was very clean, with great amenities, and friendly staff. Can’t say enough about our experience at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall.

Title: Fantastic girlie night away
ReviewText: Warm welcome, beautiful room with great view, staff couldn’t be more helpful

Title: Mrs
ReviewText: The staff has to be more understanding of the client requirements

Title: LOVE this hotel. My new London favorite.
ReviewText: I've always stayed at the same hotel in London and decided this trip would be different.  I arrived MUCH earlier than anticipated (8:30 am).  The front desk staff moved heaven and earth to make sure a room was ready for me by 10 am so I could go to sleep since I flew in from the states and hadn't slept in 24 hours. I was VERY appreciative of that and was HAPPY that I was given a room with the view of Big Ben.  My only critique would be the tall tub to bath in. While It had a hand-held shower, water got everywhere since the glass only was a qtr of the length of the tub (honestly not a big deal).  Other than that, it was PERFECT.

Title: January at London Marriott County Hall
ReviewText:
We highly recommend the London Marriott County Hall as its central geographic location made it easy for us to navigate around London and because its staff made us feel welcomed and comfortable throughout the week. The Bonvoy member breakfasts which were included in the cost were phenomenal. For those interested in the full breakfast, there were two courses, juice and coffee/tea with a magnificent view of the classic London vista of the Houses of Parliament and Ben Ben. We recommend the Full English Breakfast for anyone new to England. 
There is a concierge lounge for Bonvoy members which makes drinks and snacks available around the clock. 
These services plus the pleasant staff at the entrance and the Front Desk made our holiday a really wonderful one.

Title: Exceptional Service.
ReviewText: Exceptional service, exquisite decor and a view to die for.

Title: Excellence at all levels.
ReviewText: Perfect location, service and rooms were immaculate, staff set the tone from first step on grounds. well done.

Title: Marriott County Hall Just the ticket while in London
ReviewText: The familiar welcoming of the Marriott Hotel County Hall was the perfect choice for our last night in London.  Within easy walking distance from the Westminster tube station, you emerge from the underground to behold the beautiful Elizabeth Tower (Big Ben) to most.  A short walk across the bridge toward the amazing London Eye and you arrive at the Marriott County Hall.  A warm, friendly welcome and a beautiful suite to enjoy as we prepared to fly back to the states.  Our only sadness was that we could not enjoy more of the hotels amenities.  The quiet courtyard entrance to the hotel is a lovely break from the busy London streets.  A great location if you intend to use the underground to get around.  Our family enjoyed our stay here and Marcus at the front desk went out of his way to offer suggestions on how to make the most of our last few hours in the city.  We will be back for another stay.

Title: Central Location
ReviewText:
The hotels was comfortable and friendly. The central location made exploring the Westminster area a pleasure.
If you haven't stayed at this hotel yet, I would book a stay now. 
I look forward to my next stay.

Title: They all seemed to know my name!
ReviewText: This was one of my best Marriott experiences anywhere in the world.  The accommodations were everything and more than expected.  It is close to everything you want to see while in London.  Their restaurants and staff are exemplary!  Will definitely stay there again on my next visit!

Title: Wonderful stay while in London
ReviewText: This is a beautiful hotel. Location is top notch. The service and cleanliness of the hotel as you could expect from a Marriott hotel and that is why we choose it and we’re not disappointed. Also the view from the room is worth every penny. The M lounge and included breakfast were a welcomed addition. Would definitely stay here again. Thank you!

Title: Ritz residents stayed at London Marriott hotel county hall
ReviewText: The M club services and foods can be the worst we have ever experienced all over the world

Title: Our new favorite London Hotel
ReviewText: From the moment we left the taxi we had an excellent customer service experience. The front desk staff was welcoming and accommodating to our room request. We were an early morning arrival and they checked our bags so we could hit the town and took our cell number to let us know just as soon as a room became available.  From the bar to the bellman and everything in between we felt appreciated and taken care of.  Thank you London Marriott County Hall we will be sending people your way and hope to return again someday!

Title: January 2023 with Family
ReviewText: Great location for enjoying all Tourist attractions, right next to London Eye.

Title: Not what I expected
ReviewText: We stayed a week over New Years Eve. It was very expensive and I expected more from being a Marriott Property. The staff was rude and unfriendly on multiple occasions. Victoria at the front desk was the only persons that was helpful and nice.

Title: Wonderful hotel and location
ReviewText: A beautiful building, great staff and a wonderful location. We had a wonderful view a gorgeous room it was just perfect

Title: Not a marriott standard
ReviewText: Penny not worth it. Service should be improved. Excellent location.

Title: Family Trip
ReviewText: I traveled with my spouse, kids and elderly mother in a wheelchair. Wheelchair access was a total pain in the neck and the steak house food and service was not what we would expect from a Marriot.

Title: Fabulous hotel but...
ReviewText:
