First of all let me say how beautiful this hotel is. Its in a fantastic location too.

I used ny points for a 1 night stay in a twin bed family riverview room.

Our room wasn't ready when we arrived which was fine as it was before 3pm check in.   We dropped off our bags, was given a complimentary glass of sparkling each and we left the hotel for some shopping.

We came back around 5pm for a quick shower and change to leave for a show. The additional pillows we requested were not in the room but we requested again when we left.

We we returned around 11.30pm, we went to Gillrays for some wine and nibbles which was lovely.

A great night's sleep was had by all. The following morning we decided to have breakfast in the hotel as it was an easy option. Food was great. It was hot and very tasty.

Back to the room to shower and depart . All 3 of us unfortunately had a cold shower.  When I mentioned this on checkout, I was passively agressively asked with a smile 'did you inform the front desk of the problem'? I hadn't because I knew that we were leaving shortly and didn't see the point in doing so. Then that was it, no apologies just a thank you for staying with us. 

We were just a little disappointed the way it was handled. Yes it was a free night but we still spent almost £200 on the bar bill and breakfast.
Great staff and great location. Room was clean and spacious for our family of 4.

Title: Marriott County Hall
ReviewText: I would highly recommend staying at this Marriott location. The staff went above and beyond our expectations and their main concerns were how best to assist us throughout the entirety of our stay. Further, the hotel is conveniently located between two underground stops, and you’re a few short minutes from major attractions, restaurants, etc.

Title: Service Wonderful, location best
ReviewText:
The balcony suites are unbelievable. The location and views from the balcony are incredible. The bar/lounge is great with the best Whiskey Sours ever, full stop.

Only critic, we were rather underwhelmed with the Christmas Dinner at Gilrays. It took forever and the steaks were not good, being it is a steakhouse we thought they’d be decent. However, the veg was the star of that meal.

Title: The Best of Bonvoy
ReviewText: The London Marriott Hotel County Hall offers the BEST of the Bonvoy if you are traveling to London. Stunning views of Big Ben. Gorgeous rooms, Molton Brown toiletries, great M Club overlooking the Thames, and wonderful staff. And considering the location, while it might seem pricey, it is far more reasonable than some of the other hotels (such as Luxury Collection Park Tower) which are triple in price, offer no views, awful toiletries, service so slow we had to abandon even getting a drink at the bar (after 45 minutes of waiting), nearly missed our evening theater show because the room wasn't ready until late evening, and the rooms themselves were severely out-dated. Marriott County Hall should be Luxury Collection! Not Park Tower! And the staff at County Hall. Just WOW. They accommodated our early arrival, immediately approved my 4pm late checkout, they were friendly from the moment we arrived. Bell service was expedient, Front Desk welcomed my family with waters, M Club staff was a delight, Library breakfast staff friendly and prompt...ALL TOP NOTCH!

Title: Best Views, Best Personnel and Best location and wonderful food!!
ReviewText: Everything was top notch in this beautiful hotel.  We had a family room which had plenty of space for all out luggage, an American outlet for a curling iron (we used out adapter for other electronics). I would never hesitate to stay here.  Just wonderful!!

Title: Amazing Stay
ReviewText: From a welcome glass of champagne to impressively quick room service, we were blown away by all the small touches that made us feel right at home.  The service and friendliness extended from the front desk, to housekeeping, to the restaurant staff.  This is our new home away from home in London.

Title: Could do better
ReviewText: Poor experience at reception and in the dinning room

Title: Marriott County Hall
ReviewText: Excellent location, facilities, great service and staff attention

Title: Not as good as it used to be
ReviewText:
Gone downhill in terms of service and quality 

Overpriced

Title: Excellent hotel
ReviewText: Lovely , warm, friendly atmospheric hotel

Title: Adventszeit in London
ReviewText:
Es war sehr schön in diesem Hotel. 
Essen super lecker - Zimmer sehr sauber - richtig schön geschmückt- Lage perfekt ! Super freundliche Mitarbeiter immer mit einem Lächeln und immer hilfsbereit. Wir werden definitiv noch einmal kommen

Title: Love London, Disappointing Marriott
ReviewText: Great location but not a destination property.  Nice rooms but unable to help their guests get the most out of London. No concierge, no knowledge, rooms not ready to early evening, very limited room service, just seemed under  prepared.

Title: You'll be disappointed if you don't stay here!
ReviewText: After booking another hotel for several days and being disappointed in their level of service, we moved to this hotel and it was such an improvement! Spacious bedrooms, luxurious bathrooms, and the most amazing views! They even have washcloths here! There's lots of staff that are very helpful and attentive to your every need and the bellmen are top notch! Extremely close to the Westminster Abbey. Disappointed in myself for not booking them for our whole stay, but definitely will rebook them for future visits!

Title: Weekend break
ReviewText: Great stay as always stayed many times I will be repeating

Title: Don’t eat at Gillray’s
ReviewText: Hotel let down by its restaurant, Gillray’s.

Title: County Hall Marriott, London
ReviewText: Wonderful stay at County Hall Marriott, staff were excellent, polite and extremely helpful.  Superb location with easy access to sites of London.

Title: Great stay thank you and see you soon
ReviewText: Great stay thank you and see you soon

Title: Perfect London Lodging
ReviewText: Every aspect of our stay at the Marriott London County Hall was fantastic.

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Excellent Hotel. We really enjoyed staying with you. A respectable and pleasant hotel, your rooms and beds are comfortable and great. It was fun and we will definitely be back. The hotel provides such peace and calm that allows you to enjoy an invested trip.

Title: Gold Standard
ReviewText: Excellent hotel with attention to detail! One of my all time favorite Marriotts.

Title: Premium Location but Average Experience
ReviewText:
The Marriott Hotel County Hall is in a premium location and this is essentially what you are paying for. Don't expect a "premium" stay even with high nightly cost. If your main concern is location then look no further as it is easy to get to and from the tourist spots in London from this hotel. However, if you are thinking of staying here to also take advantage of the Hotel's amenities then you will be disappointed. It would seem this Hotel, and especially Gillray's, is still experiencing a hangover from the pandemic. Service at the restaurant was very lackluster and it is as though the staff could not care less that you were even there. On every visit for breakfast, our order was either lost or just completely wrong. Our first night for dinner no one even came by our table to take our drink orders for twenty minutes. 

Overall I am quite disappointed with the experience given how much we paid nightly for 7 nights.

Title: 初めての欧州マリオット
ReviewText: 安定した良さ、アメリカン過ぎないけどホスピタリティも満点。

Title: Excellent and nicely decorated hotel with good service.
ReviewText: Clean and nicely decorated room, family friendly hotel, with good service.

Title: Service makes this a much better value
ReviewText: I travel a lot on business and pleasure.  The service level I experienced my last time at the London Marriot County Hall was exemplary! 10 out of 10.

Title: For the Price Stay at another Marriott
ReviewText: This Marriott has great people, but for the price stay at another Marriott in London. This was high priced for what it was. Do not ask for a sight of the Thames, I payed $1600 more and the Eye blocked our sight.

Title: Great location & experience in Westminster
ReviewText:
We love staying in the london Marriott county hall hotel.

Always a welcoming & accommodating team. With views of the Thames & Houses of Parliament to boost the London Surroundings.

The rooms are clean & tasteful,  making the stay a great experience.  With the staff always available to support.

Our go to hotel in London.

Title: London Marriott
ReviewText: Very accessible for all travel and right on the Thames and has beautiful views.

Title: Beautiful hotel & great location
ReviewText: Spent 3 nights.  Hotel is beautiful!  Staff, especially Barry, was very helpful and welcoming.  Barry was incredibly friendly and genuinely cared about us. One in our group got sick and he checked up on them as well as offered suggestions for food and drinks! He was so nice we will come back to say hi to him! Hotel is close to many sights.  Will book again on our next trip to London.

Title: Awful
ReviewText: On arrival i simply wanted a sandwich and tea in my room at about 2:30 PM.  A complete shambles, it took two hours. (despite the best efforts of Victoria who was very helpful) i didnt want a "takeout or a steak.  Later when in the bar I had to send back two drinks for my guests which were dreadful.  The attitude and "what do you want me to do with these" response in front of a number of guests was inexcusable. Certainly not what i would expect in a 5* hotel.

Title: Wonderful Family Trip
ReviewText: From help having arrived early to leaving everything was great, food, Christmas decor, room and service, made for a perfect trip

Title: excellent experience
ReviewText: fantastic location, very kind people, all clean, good food and all services available. strongly raccomanded.

Title: Excellent stay at Marriott County Hall
ReviewText: We found this hotel to be a great location! Only steps to the London Eye and views of Big Ben and Westminster and a convenient stop for Big Bus Tours right out front. Also it was a short walk to Waterloo Station. The rooms were adequently sized with modern decor. Loved the accessibility to Gillrays Steakhouse that was on-site. Hotel staff was hospitable and helpful. Would highly recommend and we would stay here again for any return trips to London.

Title: Another disappointing visit to Count Hall Marriott
ReviewText: Disappointing visit to County Hall Marriott as room we booked was not available at Check In.

Title: Amazing service & would definitely return
ReviewText: I truly enjoyed my stay. I was here for a conference & it was a great facility. Staff was amazing. I would 100% return.

Title: Birthday Weekend
ReviewText: Really good stay. Excellent location for exploring London. Bed super comfy

Title: Virginia's Blue Ridge Professional
ReviewText: Excellent choice for business and pleasure.  Highly recommend to others.  I will stay there the next time I visit London.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: The hotel is in the prime location if you want sightseeing. The staff is friendly and nice. The room was clean. Overall a great stay. Would definitely come back to stay here again.

Title: Marriott Review.
ReviewText: Over all experience was very good.

Title: Great hotel & location let down by breakfast
ReviewText: Great building in a perfect location to explore central London. Excellent service and bar. Bed comfortable and minimal little noise intrusion in room. Only let down was breakfast which was really, really badly prepared. Ordered two different cooked dishes both stone cold and eggs overcooked (fried egg could have been used as a frisbee). Did mention and meals replaced, those also cold but eggs slightly better. Overall very poor breakfast experience. Coffee was great tho.

Title: Marriott County Hall Made Our 1st Trip To London Great
ReviewText: Our 1st trip to London was incredible!! It took me a couple weeks of researching hotels in London to finally pull the plug and choose one. My husband and I are extremely happy with the choice we made. While it was located right next to the London Eye it was super quiet and relaxing. The decor was very nice and the view was awesome! The beds were comfy, the fridge and 2 closets were nice to have and the staff was beyond helpful and friendly. We would 100% stay there again.

Title: A very pleasant hôtel but a bad restaurant
ReviewText: A very nice hotel ideally located on the Thames opposite Big Ben. A shame it doesn't have a Marriott standard restaurant.

Title: County Hall London
ReviewText: Without doubt the best hotel we have stayed in London or anywhere else in the world. Amenities, staff and service without fault and nothing too much trouble.

Title: One Year later
ReviewText:
We were last at the Marriott County Hall in Oct'21, and came back this year to stay while visiting family in London.
The hotel occupancy was higher this year which is not surprising considering the COVID restrictions last year.

It was really nice to see that many of the staff we met last year were still at the hotel this year and this was reflected in the high quality of service. The hotel must be doing something right to retain their best staff from Ibron and his team in concierge lounge to Felicia and the team at breakfast in the Library.

Location, Ambiance and Service are the key highlights of the Marriott County Hall.

There are a few things that could be improved but they are relatively minor. The directions to get to the pool could do with better signage since you could easily get lost. The quality of the drinks in the bar could do with some improvement. For example, don't pour all the tonic into the glass of Gin and tonic - give the customer the bottle and let them decide how much tonic to add.

Overall we had a very pleasant stay and will be coming back next year on our annual trip to visit family in the UK.

Title: London Weekend
ReviewText: The hotel was amazing! Beautiful view.....location perfect. Had a fabulous time!

Title: London trip
ReviewText: Excellent experience starts right at the entrance with warm smiles and greetings right when i hop off the cab! Thereafter, service from check-in to the room was well within expectations of a Marriott brand name.

Title: Fault fire system
ReviewText: The restaurant staff told me the fire system work because there is problem in the kitchen if the kitchen use the life station the alarm will work. I think it is silly problem the have to fix immediately not waiting for 3 days of faults evacuation alarm .

Title: Great weekend
ReviewText: Perfect position to enjoy London sites

Title: Marriott County Hall
ReviewText: The best location in London/Westminster.... convenient to everything in this area of London.  Plenty of restaurants & pubs to choose from that are nearby..... as well as shopping if that is what you want.  Convenient to several tube & train stations.

Title: Birthday Treat
ReviewText: Welcomed on arrival with a glass of sparkling wine. Check-in was friendly and efficient. Birthday surprise was in our room. Excellent delicious afternoon tea in The Library. Comfortable and well-appointed room with a view of the River Thames. Excellent breakfast.

Title: Poor condition on everything!
ReviewText: We used to love this hotel because it was next to London Eye. However, after last visit, there were a lot more issues. For example, the room had an odd smell, the light bulbs were out, 3 time Fire FAULT Alarm that made everyone leave the hotel building. Also after the fault alarm, there were NO explanations at all.

Title: Just a few things missed for a very good
ReviewText: Actually we had booked the W hotel. as it didn’t work out When checking in in London. Turned out to be much better in this Marriott tail to be honest, since this hotel was much better than the W. We got a really nice room with a view to the Elizabeth Tower. Considering that I just booked 30 minutes before arriving at the hotel, that was excellent, but one thing should be better; considering the four people in this one room It would obviously be more logic to have a separate toilet to the bathroom. That’s the one thing where I would like to say that the price is too high for the room. I had to use the toilet at the executive lounge. So we didn’t lose too much time in preparing for going out into the city.

Title: Three nights at Marriott County Hall, London
ReviewText: My family and I spent three nights earlier this month at the Marriott County Hall, London. From the moment we arrived (our luggage instantly ceased to be our problem), to accommodating an early check-in (we arrived around mid-morning!) and a warm room with two luxurious queen beds with a fantastic view of River Thames and the Westminster Abbey beyond, was to say the least, a fantastic experience that we had never hoped for. We were graciously treated to a complimentary bottle of wine in an ice bucket, English Biscuits and Butter Toffees. To say we felt pampered would be an understatement. The breakfast although not a buffet (which the hotel had stopped since the pandemic began), was rich, hot and filling and served with old English warmth and wholehearted hospitality. I did not note down names of any specific staff, they were all so nice to us, all the time, all the way up to loading our luggage in the taxi on checkout on 12th October. If we ever come to London, we will be staying in Marriott County Hall for the reasons above and also for it's close (walkable) proximity to most tourist attractions in Central London. Please convey my best wishes to everyone at Marriott, County Hall. Warm regards -- Venu, Lakshmi and Krishnan, Abu Dhabi, UAE.

Title: Excellent hotel/amazing staff - no 24 hour room service
ReviewText: Lovely hotel, classic English luxury service. Food was great but unable to get room service of any level after 11pm and no mini bar!

Title: Best stay ever!
ReviewText:
Greatest staff!!  Cannot wait to return again soon!   People were so friendly!  Thank you for the best experience.  

Even the lounge was top notch service.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Great location, very clean. Elite breakfast was decent. It was a last-minute booking and was offered to upgrade to a river view room. The downside was I could barely see the river from the room.

Title: we'll be back!
ReviewText: came with a group of friends from the U.S. to celebrate a bachelorette and the hotel went above and beyond to help us create the perfect stay. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and look forward to coming back again soon!

Title: Excellent Family Hotel
ReviewText: The Marriott County Hall was the perfect hotel for our family vacation. With 3 kids under 12, this location was perfect. It is right in the middle of so many wonderful sights. The staff is extremely helpful!  We recommend this hotel.

Title: Incredible Location
ReviewText: This hotel was located right next to the London Eye and across the river from Big Ben. You could not ask for a better sightseeing location. The staff was incredible, they were full of restaurant recommendations etc. The room was beautiful and spacious. I would highly recommend this hotel.

Title: London trip
ReviewText: Amazing hotel, great location service and staff. Need some flavor in their restaurant meals and menu. But overall great service

Title: Pick up the food quality and internet speed
ReviewText: The Internet speed was inadequate for doing any real business. Also, the food in the library/executive lounge were subpar with small options. Everything else at the hotel is certainly a 9 or 10.

Title: Review - Jon
ReviewText: Great work by the staff, very attentive, offered suggestions on attractions. Clean room

Title: Avoid at all costs!
ReviewText: Overall a dreadful experience and one that I will never repeat.

Title: We love London, we love the County Hall Marriott
ReviewText: The hotel is excellent.  My negative comments relate to the MClub rooms and costs.    The MClub has changed over the years and is not a good value.  Meager offerings, no longer an entirely self-serve service.  Evening apps/drinks very lacking.  Breakfast is ok, but is a la carte via menu rather than a buffet.  Not as good anymore.

Title: Loved the London Hotel County Hall!
ReviewText:
Lovely staff
Good food spacious room!
Location is the best!

Title: Wonderful stay in the County Hall
ReviewText:
The London County Hall is a great destination for any individual, couple or family vacationing in London. We were well taken care in from check in to check out. The front office staff is well trained and very attentive to your needs.  The support staff is equally excellent. 

The rooms are well appointed and spacious.  We stayed in a King room and the view was magnificent.  Looking through our window we could see Big Ben and were situated on the Thames. The hotel is in a great location overall. Close to public transportation and several major sites including Westminster Abbey, parliament etc

The eating options are good whether looking for casual or more fine dining.

Our room was maintained well during the visit and the hotel demonstrated good sanitary precautions.

I highly recommend the hotel and believe the value per $ spent was outstanding.

Title: Excellent stay at a wonderful location
ReviewText: I had a recent stay at the Marriot County Hall. I found the staff to be excellent and helpful, making me feel very welcomed as a guest in London. My room was nicely serviced and spacious. The location is in the heart of the city and I would recommend this hotel to my friends and colleagues.

Title: Visit to The Queen
ReviewText: We were not expecting to be in London for the Queen's funeral. It was  set to be a leisure trip to The UK. We left The USA the day after Queen Elizabeth II died. We arrived in London on the following Saturday. There were people lined up on the streets and the city was extremely busy. Without us requesting, the Marriott staff upgraded our room so that we had a good view of what was going on across the River Thames. It was a good visit despite the somber tone of the city. The Marriott staff were gracious and very helpful with our departure on Monday, the day of HM funeral.

Title: Exceptional Staff, Location, Dining, and Room
ReviewText: I highly recommend this hotel. The staff and views from the hotel and rooms are remarkable. Arriving just days after the Queen's death, the staff upgraded me and helped me figure out how to get around the crowds and road closures. The free breakfast and Lounge had lots of options. The hotel is walking distance from the main tourist locations and for a walk around the Thames.

Title: Please improve the food options at the Club Lounge!
ReviewText:
The Club Lounge fell quite short of the expectations for a five-star hotel. 
The Food at the Lounge was scarce and with little variety. In the evening, all the options were spicy.

Title: Plw
ReviewText: Great location, wonderful food and comfortable stay!

Title: County Hall Marriott a must stay!
ReviewText: This place is lovely.  Staff is very attentive.  Food, terrific. We experienced a delay with the chauffeur to get to the airport due to the street shut down during the queen’s procession. Savi helped us get to our driver and went above and beyond helping us!  You are treated like royalty there!

Title: Honeymoon trip
ReviewText: You want go wrong staying here. Beyond the location being amazing the staff is just as great.

Title: Excellent Hotel. Very Pleasant.
ReviewText: Central London location. Excellently managed. Amazing historical building.  Excellent service from staff. Very welcoming. 5 star. Great value.

Title: Overpriced tourist trap
ReviewText: Positioned as luxury it is actually just mass tourism at boutique hotel prices. Just don’t do it.

Title: Excellent
ReviewText:
We loved our stay:
1. Incredible location
2. Pool amazing (better help to find in the building would be good)
3. All the staff were wonderful - particularly in the restaurant
4. Prepaid breakfast delicious

Title: Luxury
ReviewText: Perfect location, wonderful staff.

Title: Beautiful hotel with a great location.
ReviewText:
Hotel is located within walking distance of many tourist attractions. There is a bus stop just outside the hotel for longer journeys. Cabs are also available and will pick you up at the front door. 
     The hotel has no pantry, so any food or snacks will need to be purchased at a nearby store. 
     A word of caution if you have trouble walking, the rooms overlooking the park are on the opposite end of the hotel and can be a bit of a walk.

Title: Perfect Hotel & Location
ReviewText: All of the staff we encountered were so pleasant and helpful. The M Club offered great evening snacks and the breakfast in the library every morning was superb. The location was steps away from some of London’s finest buildings and monuments. Highly recommend this property.

Title: Best Hotel in London !
ReviewText: We had a great time with great service at a great location ! I’m ready to come back!

Title: Excellent location but a couple of issues
ReviewText: Room 206 had a great view. But it was a long walk from the elevator. My shower water didn't drain well so I'm glad I had my flip flops on. I also had two pending bills of almost $2,000 on my credit card. When I called, I was told one would disappear soon. And when I wanted the loyalty points put on my husband's account, they didn't do it. Now, I will have to call someone and have it done.

Title: Best staff
ReviewText: This hotel is better than I expected.  The staff is very helpful and on top of every request.  Hotel is in good shape and clean, room is clean and very convenient to everywhere.

Title: Excellent location, spacious suites!
ReviewText:
We all had a great time with great views, (Westminster suite and 2 bedroom suite). Shame the food in room service is given in takeaway bags and no real cutlery or plates.  This was explained to us before we ordered but prefer the normal room service as in other hotels.
A couple of small bits missed like no soap in the toilet and lock jamming the door shut in the bathroom which you would not expect in the presidential suite but hopefully they will pick up on the comments and fix it.  Other then that I would highly recommend the hotel and will be staying here again in the future.  Staff were all nice and facilities fantastic!  (Only reason my food rating is not so high is that I don’t eat meat so my choice is limited and dislike eating in hotel suites in Paper plates with disposable cutlery.). Otherwise I’m sure the rest of the food is great.
Thanks

Title: The staff make the Marriott County Hall special
ReviewText: Our stay at Marriott County Hall was made special by the warm and friendly staff. From being greeted at the front door, to the reception, and to the dining, all staff made us welcome.

Title: Great hotel.
ReviewText:
Fabulous hotel - great location on the Thames with lots of restaurants, bars and things to do very near. 
Rooms are lovely - spacious and bright with everything you need.
Great choice of food and drink in the restaurant and bar.
Amazing staff - so very helpful, welcoming and friendly.
Have stayed a couple of times - never disappointed - and will visit again!

Title: Great Hotel in Central London
ReviewText: what else do you need ? location, views, excellent quality rooms, a pool and fantastic staff.. one of the best Marriotts and I should know, have stayed in a few !!!!

Title: Stunning
ReviewText: This hotel is in a fantastic position for sight seeing and soaking up the very unique Southbank experience. The beautifully decorated and spacious room had the most amazing view of the Thames and Parliament. It was very tempting to stay up all night to soak in the view but the effective, but very quiet, air conditioning and crisp linen had us drifting off into a great night’s sleep- highly recommend!

Title: No accountability
ReviewText: Repair work happening for our one-night stay. No communication, workers in and out of our room, tools left in the bathroom with our two small children around. No consideration and compensation except offering our family of four a room with one bed. A very expensive stay for an incredibly poor and disruptive experience.

Title: A great home base to explore London
ReviewText: This was the perfect spot to stay when seeing all of the great historical sights in London. It was so comfortable, staff was friendly and helpful and we had a great visit.

Title: Bhajan Ratra
ReviewText: Not worth the amount you paid for staying at Marriott.

Title: Everything is amazing
ReviewText:
The room size is good
The room service is fabulous 
The breakfast is not tasty

Title: Superb experience
ReviewText: This is an absolutely wonderful hotel to stay in while in London. Staff are outgoing and very welcoming and warm. The restaurant was fantastic both for dinner and our breakfasts. Beautiful rooms with fantastic views. Felt totally spoiled and would not hesitate to stay here again

Title: Great stay
ReviewText: This hotel is perfectly situated for easy access to sites in walking distance or use of public transportation. The staff is friendly and the rooms are clean and comfortable. I would definitely stay here again.

Title: Spectacular London Property
ReviewText: We had a fabulous family trip to London. The staff were excellent (front desk, restaurant, library, executive lounge, fitness center, front door). The hotel location was convenient to numerous attractions and transportation options. The rooms had ample space. The food was quite good. When we come back to London, this will be the first place we look to stay.

Title: Excellent location, beautiful hotel
ReviewText: We very much like this hotel and it was not not our first stay. Rooms are spacious and well maintained, very clean and tastefully decorated. Location is superb and so are the facilities - pool is great. Restaurant is very pricey in terms of breakfast (if you do not have a bed and breakfast arrangement).

Title: Excellent central London vacation stay
ReviewText: Perfect location that is private, yet easy to access the sights we wanted to get to. Great staff, awesome pool.

Title: Incredible hotel, absolutely the best
ReviewText: We love this hotel, it was amazing.  Great service, incredible views, great location... it has it all.

Title: Could have done much better
ReviewText: The hotel is far too old, the room that we stayed was miles away from elevators. During our stay, you can hear next door when they have shower , slam the door etc. Aircon keeps turning off during the night. Some light switches beside bed aren’t working properly. We stayed for two nights but the housekeeper never top up coffee / tea and milk for us.

Title: Nice hotel
ReviewText: We had a lovely stay. The rooms are large and clean. The included breakfast was great, and the service overall was very good. The downside is that due to its location, the second you walk out the door, there are hordes of people. Soooo crowded. I had to brace myself each time we left. It would have been nice to have some communal outdoor areas within the hotel so that there was another place to hang out besides the room while we were on the property. But overall, a very pleasant stay and a good value for the money.

Title: My favourite hotel in London!!
ReviewText: The hotel is very modern and clean with a traditional touch. The architecture and location are perfect. The Big Ben view is worth every penny. Staff are really kind and polite. And the food…..delicious!

Title: Excellent stay
ReviewText: Very accommodating to our needs and requests.

Title: Top London Hotel Stay
ReviewText: Great experience.. great attentive staff. Quality food & drink

Title: Amazing
ReviewText: Loved staying here, and I’m so glad I did. The location can’t be beat, and even though it’s in the city, it’s so quiet. I felt safe with the security. Breakfast was great each day, and the service was amazing. I’d gladly stay again.  I also used the lap pool and loved having a daily swim.

Title: Spectacular
ReviewText: Great job. The hotel is stunning. The amenities are top notch. The service is kind and prompt. We would only come back here when we visit London again!

Title: Great place and location.
ReviewText: Stay at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall if you can. It is a little bit more per night than other locations, but you will not be disappointed. It is well worth it!

Title: Service
ReviewText: The London Marriott is five stars hotel so all the staff should be professional with service to the customers.

Title: Good location
ReviewText: Very good location, very convenient,

Title: Elite! More like HMP!
ReviewText: Please see opening comments

Title: Great location, service and staff at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall!
ReviewText:
We had a great experience at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall! Everything from the check-in/check-out experience, front desk staff, rooms/amenities helped make our stay a pleasant one. Location was great and convenient for touring the city. 
Morning breakfast at the Gillray's Streakhouse & Bar was perfect to start the day and the staff out there was excellent!

Title: Great Location, Average Hotel
ReviewText:
This was our first big family European vacation so we chose this hotel for its location and its 8-star rating. Check in service was fantastic, we arrived early so they sent us to the M lounge to relax from our long trip while the room was prepared. The family room was well appointed and the view out the window of the clock tower and Parliament was incredible! Housekeeping and room service was good as well. The lobby and Gilroy's is a let down. One of three elevators was out of service our entire stay. The main bar and dining, Gilroy's, is also the main thoroughfare to the boardwalk outside so there is constant, loud traffic in the bar lounge area. There is no fine dining experience to be had at this hotel. It felt more like a cruise ship poolside par than a fine dinning experience. The wait staff was inexperienced. Our waiter brought the wrong bottle of wine to the table three times before someone else finally took our table over. We had difficulty getting cab service at the hotel so we finally relented to using Uber.

Again the County Hall is very centrally located so that was great for a family vacation trip but I would not consider this an 8-star hotel. Its a strong 4-star hotel at best overall.

Title: Great place for business or pleasure
ReviewText: Third time I've been to this hotel. Love location , to government bullrings as well as train and tube station. Service is great - have used the conference center - outstanding!

Title: Memorable experience
ReviewText: The staff made the difference from check-in till check out. Check-in was outstanding, the bonus points raffle for the kids was unique & generous, same as the free bubbly upon arrival. It's simply a classy hotel dedicated to quality

Title: Wonderful stay in London
ReviewText: The hotel was really lovely! great rooms! good restaurant and bar! All the Staff were friendly and helpful! The attendants at the door were especially welcoming every time we walked back into the hotel. This was a family trip with my daughter, and my sister and her family.  We felt very taken care of.

Title: Amazing hotel in prime location
ReviewText: Our experience at the Marriott County Hall was fantastic. The staff was extremely helpful and the location was central to all of the primary tourist sites.

Title: My Favorite Marriott
ReviewText:
Throughout my life I have stayed in Marriotts over 600 nights (mostly for business). This stay was for pleasure and Marriott Couny Hall is my favorite Marriott in the world. All staff, from bell-hops, to reception (Jasmine is amazing and helpful), to the dining rooms and concierge lounge, treated us as welcomed guests. This hotel is obviously very well managed.
The location just across the bridge from Big Ben is quite nice as well, especially if you are lucky enough to get a river view room.
It’s our second time staying here and we hope to be back.
Many thanks to all at Marriott County Hall for the beautiful memories.

Title: Location, Location, Location!
ReviewText: A slightly unusual location with the hotel being a partiak space tenant in the Count Hall building. Quaint, old, and spread out atmosphere gave plenty of space , but also a lot of walking to get to different areas af the hotel. Great service, good food (we did not have dinner, only breakfast and lounge snacks), aand the staff was excellent.

Title: Somewhat Disappointed
ReviewText: We stayed hear years ago, it does not seem to be of the same quality. Most staff were very kind but just no longer a Wow experience.

Title: Best hotel in London
ReviewText: One of the best hotels I ever stayed

Title: Great Location Doesn't Make Up For Lack of Service
ReviewText:
This hotel has a great location. That's it.
It is not well marked. For those walking around the entire County Hall Building, rhe entrance is on the west side of the building where you down a driveway to enter a roundabout in front of the main door.
Check in was chaotic. Agent taking other people in front of us who arrived after. No recognition of elite status. No concierge.
No bottled water in the M Club. For the pool you enter on the fifth floor then walk upstairs go through the gum to the locker room then find the secret door to the hallway that leads to the door to the pool. Coming back the secret door is locked so you have to walk along the hotel sixth floor hallway to the elevator which you take down to five and get out, enter the facility, go back upstairs, through the gym and back to the locker room.
There is not hot tub
The staff doesn't have a lot of useful information to answer questions or help with anything. Answers are either no, or I don't know.
The elite complimentary breakfast was in the library. Got seated, attendant took our drink order, returned with my son's drink and then never returned with my drink or to take our order in the twenty minutes we sat there and waited.
Laundry service is very expensive as expected as most hotels charge ridiculously for even one shirt. Found an outside place to do our laundry and return it to the hotel for $30. Hotel received it but not only didn't deliver it to my room, they didn't even tell me it had arrived. Same thing with a build a bear I ordered for my son online. Had to put in the name of the county for the delivery and the hotel employee on the at your service line said Lambeth. I knew that was wrong.
Smart travelers know a hotel is as good as its location, service, and amenities. Excellence in one does not excuse or over take the absence of the other two.
They don't have to do anything but breath to have a great location. Any effort at all would be an improvement to their service.
Be a smart traveler, avoid this property.

Title: Central location
ReviewText: Good location. Clean and easy.

Title: Hirzel family
ReviewText: Great service, people are very kind and afable in the center of everything, highly recommend

Title: London Marriott County Hall
ReviewText: This Marriott is beautifully located and impeccably appointed. I would recommend looking elsewhere other than Gilliarys restaurant for your dining experience!

Title: We loved this hotel!
ReviewText: This was the perfect hotel for us in London and we would stay there again!  The location is amazing. The views from our room were stunning.  The decor inside and outside the hotel were gorgeous.  Restaurants convenient and very good with lovely ambience.  Wonderful welcoming staff and service.

Title: LMCH
ReviewText: This is the best hotel for visiting London.  My Room had a Balcony overlooking the Thames.  My visit was awesome.

Title: Best marriot property
ReviewText:
This is the best Marriot branded property I had ever stay in the world.

It’s at a great location, the decor is modern and new.  They have great friendly staff.  The M Lounge
Is amazing with great cocktails and appetizers.  

The gym has everything you can think of.  I highly recommend this hotel.

Title: Beautiful location Terrible food quality & Service
ReviewText:
Location and hotel is breathtaking, unfortunately room service is the lowest you can expect, frágil carton boxes with frágil utensils -deplorable-

Not very experienced servers and waiters at restaurant -terrible service-

Title: What a downgrade!
ReviewText: What was once an impressive stay became only a memory. This hotel has downgraded terribly in its food quality and service.

Title: Stylish rooms with views
ReviewText: Wasn’t aware of this hotel prior to a business event. The bedrooms are lovely - very stylish , spacious with great natural light. The only negative it’s in a very touristy location with lots of people queuing to the eye so it doesn’t feel relaxing leaving the hotel.

Title: Great Family Stay High;y Recommend
ReviewText: Great location and breakfast

Title: Would not recommend for families with children
ReviewText: I chose this hotel because it was Marriott (I am used to a particular standard in the states) and thought it would be child friendly. Unfortunately the rules surrounding the fitness center, in addition to the way some of the stay interacted with us will keep me from staying here or recommending it to anyone in the future. Some (not all) of the young staff said things in a condescending manner (what they actually said wasn't bad but how they said it). In addition, the hours and ages for use of the fitness center and pool were extremely unrealistic. It was well past 7pm when we were actually able to go and exercise and were turned away. Perhaps this doesn't matter to you because of a business clientele, but there were other families there and complaining as well. It is sad that I had better service at a different hotel in London and moved here for a conference so my daughter would be able to have superior treatment. A less minor concern was the lack of USB plugs in the rooms. There were only two, which is sadly lacking compared to the other hotels we stayed at. I myself have three devices in need of charging, which left none for my daughter, so we had to rotate.

Title: Great Location
ReviewText: I always stay around the westminster area because I want to be able to walk to different attractions, and marriott’s location is perfect where I want to go around; london eye, parliament building, big ben, buckingham palace, trafalgar square, westminster abbey, old bond and new bond street, picadilly circus. With marriott you will always get an excellent service.

Title: 2 night stay
ReviewText:
Great location. Clean, with a very nice staff.
A bit pricey.
Bar is way too expensive. Unbelievably expensive.

Title: Location Location
ReviewText: This is the finest Marriott experience we have ever experienced.   From the staff, the beautiful facility, to the amazing location.     This is your hotel for all the sites in London.

Title: Excellent hotel staff and location
ReviewText: The staff at County Hall were the absolute best of all Marriott's at which I have stayed, and there have been many. Immediately approaching the hotel we were greeted by our porter, Barry, who was super polite, took our bags to our room, and gave us lots of useful information. The front desk staff and concierge answered our every question and request. Our room was always kept clean and neat. The food at Gilray's was great as well, we ate there several times. The English high tea at The Library is also a fun experience to enjoy with special tea selections, sandwiches, scones, and desserts. The location is very convenient with easy access to the greater Westminster and surrounding areas by foot or public transportation. We had a great time during our stay and would recommend this hotel to anyone.

Title: Historic yet Homey
ReviewText: This was my third stay here and I love this hotel. We arrived in the middle of a tube, train and taxi strike and we walked everywhere - it’s close to all the major tourist attractions.

Title: Excellent Service - Perfect Location
ReviewText: We will definitely return and highly recommend this location.  Rooms are super quiet and comfortable.   Food/Service is excellent.

Title: A great stay at the London Marriott - County Hall
ReviewText:
This Hotel is perfectly located for touring London.   
The Staff is excellent is every respect - courteous, helpful, etc.
The M Club facility was very nice - wonderful snacks and beverages were available, with very friendly staff.
The Hotel GM was seen one morning busing and cleaning tables in the Breakfast Dining room - as they had a large crowd, and no job is beneath the Leader!!!   This is the attitude of the entire Staff.

Title: Love this Marriott
ReviewText: The room and its view of the River Thames was absolutely magical. I felt like a princess in a castle and couldn’t get enough of the view day and night.  The bathroom in my room was a dream with the subway tile, rain shower option which is my absolute favorite life indulgence, and gentle lighting under the floating sink. The map of London wallpaper, small black and white checked floor tiles, and numbered artworks on the walls were a beautiful touch. I used the coffee and tea machines to start and end my days. The TV options to merge my phone apps was a surprise bonus. The pool was a glorious luxury after an amazing steak dinner in the hotel’s restaurant. The room service was incredibly prompt and delicious and the staff overall was warm, welcoming, patient, and professional. Absolutely worth the price! Would stay here again in a heartbeat!

Title: Beautiful Hotel
ReviewText: We had a wonderful time. A beautiful view, helpful staff, delicious food.

Title: Recent Trip to London
ReviewText: Amazing stay -- wonderful service, excellent location, clean room and friendly staff!!!!  Superb M Club service and attention to detail.  One of best Marriott's I've ever stayed (and am Lifetime Platinum Bonvoy member)

Title: Amazing Hotel!  The staff were extremely impressive with their welcoming gracious attitudes!
ReviewText: Could not have asked for better treatment.   What a breath of fresh air!

Title: Best Location. Best Weather
ReviewText: We had a suite with a corner view that was superb. We saw across the Thames River to Parliament and big Ben and the Westminster bridge. If we looked downstream we could face the London Eye right next to the hotel. The location was excellent for the big red bus and the other similar rides. Easy Walking distance to many of the central sites as well. The hotel has wonderful accommodations and nice amenities including complementary drinks for guests at the suite level. Very nice breakfast every morning at the restaurant. My only disappointment was that the indoor heated pool needed to be a little bit warmer for my taste. I only visited the pool once. On my next trip to London I will definitely stay at this hotel and I completely recommend it to American tourists particularly who will be familiar with its quality and amenities.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Great location, nice rooms, great restaurant, but mediocre to apathetic service (sometimes even rude service from spa / pool) from staff.

Title: Perfect Location
ReviewText: This location is at the heart of everything!

Title: Can't beat this Location
ReviewText:
It was my first time to London and I could not of been happier with the location.
The rooms were clean and maintained, I had a river view so this was also a bonus.
The team were friendly and professional and genuine.
I want to call out the Breakfast Team in particular Sanda who was professional, friendly and made me feel extremely welcome, I can tell she really loves her job.  Thank you to the entire team.

Title: Great sleep, poor steakhouse
ReviewText: The steakhouse argued that brown dry steak is medium rare, messed up 3 times and charged us 30 pounds for chips and a salad.  This place had great desserts but billed itself as a steakhouse, incredibly bad experience, will look to find other hotels with better food for longer stays, the hotel staff and room were execellent.

Title: Pre wedding stay
ReviewText: I’ve never felt so welcome and at home in a hotel ever! Gorica and the team made this special occasion truly magical. Nothing was too much trouble for them, and I was blown away by how friendly and genuine everyone was. I was very lucky to have a beautiful suite, immaculately maintained, overlooking the Thames and House of Commons. I’d chosen to stay here the night before my wedding, which is of course a little nerve wracking- it was abundantly clear that whatever may come, the whole team at the hotel was there to rally around me and make sure everything went perfectly. They created a truly magical and special moment for myself and my loved ones, with lots of wonderful surprises and treats. What stood out for me most though was just knowing that I had their full and genuine support on such an important day for me. I really can’t thank everyone enough… ❤️

Title: London Business Trip
ReviewText: This was my third stay at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall.  The staff is amazing.  So professional and well trained to meet your every need.  Nothing was out of their ability to do for you.  Rooms were clean and very comfortable.  Location is fantastic as there is so much to do and see in a short walk.

Title: Superb!
ReviewText: We felt very taken care of when we stayed at the Marriott County Hall. We will return.

Title: Fantastic Hotel
ReviewText: From the moment we arrived we were given a warm welcome from all the staff we encountered check in went so smoothly and a glass of champagne to welcome you is a nice touch , We had lovely spacious room with a view of the Thames which was fantastic at night when you could see London all lit up the room itself was clean to a very high standard and kept that way all week we used room service which was very quick and a really nice meal food couldn’t be faulted we also used Gilrays restaurant downstairs and had a fantastic meal the speciality Bullhead steak was stunning and cooked to perfection a must do for anyone visiting, we only had one minor issue of not having a mini fridge in the room to keep drinks cold but the staff offered to supply us one but we declined as it really wasn’t a biggy, the staff from the moment we arrived until we leaved were so friendly and attentive always saying good morning and evening asking how your days exploring went everyone of them were a credit to your company overall I can’t recommend Marriott County Hall highly enough and hope to be back sooner rather than later

Title: The Perfect Location to stay in London
ReviewText: My friends & I had an amazing time in London while staying at the Marriott County Hall.  The location is fantastic!  Right across the Westminster Bridge with a breathtaking view of Big Ben and the London Eye.  Easy access for catching the Underground subway or walking to Westminster Abbey or Buckingham Palace.  Our trip was a dream come true!  Location is everything!!!

Title: Westminister
ReviewText: Excellent location for exploring London. Fantastic job of converting a Government building into a top tier hotel. Staff was friendly and helpful. Quiet, despite its location adjacent to the Eye.

Title: Jubilee Weekend
ReviewText: Excellent hotel, very convenient for all events. Staff exceptional catered for our every need. Room immaculate bed very comfortable.

Title: Amazing
ReviewText: My wife and I had a short stay in London and we chose this hotel because of the location, we met with and incredible staff from the moment that we stepped onto the property.

Title: Lovely stay in London
ReviewText: We loved our stay here.  Great location, food, and the staff were so amazing.

Title: County Hall on the Thames is simply Excellent!
ReviewText: Every aspect of a premiere hotel at County Hall was simply outstanding. The staff was over the top helpful and accommodating. We will stay there again!

Title: Outstanding Service
ReviewText: That was a enjoyable days in this locations, with a Staff that always there to help you

Title: Excellent all round
ReviewText:
Excellent experience, friendly staff, attentive, polite 
Location is prime 
A small on site gift shop wouldn’t go amiss 
I am English but have lived in the states for 30 years & visited with my family, would certainly stay there again

Title: Top class hotel never nothing to much trouble
ReviewText: Excellent stay room was amazing staff couldn't do enough for us .

Title: great for visits and access to London and beyond
ReviewText: Great hotel, centrally located, access to transit is strong and views are great

Title: EXCELLENT
ReviewText: Very friendly staff, both at the reception and at the restaurant, swimming pool and cleaning staff, classy services, congratulations Marriott!

Title: Comfortable stay, great accessible location, family rooms
ReviewText: Our check in was delayed but otherwise it was a great stay overall. Our room view was upgraded. Deluxe family room was ideal for family of 5.

Title: A wonderful opulent and luxurious stay
ReviewText:
Me and my two children stayed overnight at the County Hall Marriott. It was a 5* experience from start to finish. The staff at check in were so attentive and friendly, we had arrived early to just drop our bags off, and Martina had said that our room was already available now if we wanted to check into it, we were delighted by this. 

We had dinner at Gilroy’s steak house that evening and the service from start to finish was incredible. It was a later end to the meal service but they still managed to find us space, and it was with a view.

Our bedroom was the 2 Double Beds, Deluxe Family Guest Room. It was very lovely and all them amenities were provided for, the bathroom had a bathtub and a shower, my only negative was that I went to have a soak in the bath and I found it to be not the long in length, and I am not a tall person. That was the only thing out of the entire stay I wasn’t happy with. 

The beds were comfortable and nice to sleep on. 
Breakfast was wonderful and delightful with many choices to choose from. 

All in a a pretty much 5/6* stay the staff just can’t do enough for you,
Martina on the Reception desk, Jamie on the bar was so helpful. The staff on the main front door were always so happy and friendly and greeted you with a lovely smile. 

I would definitely be back to stay here, the main points always being that it’s so close to a lot of the attractions/Theatres. Not far from underground stations. A absolute delight to be right next to the London eye and the river Thames.

Title: 8 day stay
ReviewText:
Excellent hotel, superb location.
Services are excellent, staff is very friendly.
Hotel need a bit of modernization (floor carpets etc)
But overall excellent stay,

Title: London Trip
ReviewText: Everything is perfect and we liked the services

Title: Conference
ReviewText: Excellent venue for a conference

Title: Had an amazing anniversary
ReviewText: I came here for an anniversary/ birthday and this hotel exceeded my expectations. The staff was friendly and helpful, i love the location and i LOVE the room. We had the balcony suite and the view was just amazing, it was a beautiful and clean room as well. I loved it, definitely would recommend it to people. The only thing i had an issue with was during checkin, the pervious person took forever to checkout and we had to wait longer than the 3pm checkin time, we had just landed and were exhausted and needed to rest but we were given a temporary room to rest in which was great. I requested for an anniversary package to surprise my boyfriend, everything went well! I would definitely stay again in the future.

Title: Great Location and Friendly Staff
ReviewText: I traveled to London on business and my week long stay at Marriott County Hall made the trip better.  First, the location is excellent, both in terms of being on the river and close to key landmarks and the proximity to Waterloo and Westminster underground stations.  It was very easy to get to work and back, and while I didn't do a lot of sightseeing it would have been easy to get to everything if I had.  All of the staff were friendly and attentive to my needs.  And the room was quite spacious and comfortable.  It's a little expensive but worth it.  Highly recommended.

Title: Recent stay
ReviewText: Great location, wonderful rooms and staff. Only issue was breakfast which seemed very badly organised  and let the hotel down.

Title: Great location, great hotel, great staff
ReviewText:
My wife and I stayed here whilst in London for the weekend.
The staff on reception were excellent, and even though we arrived early found us a room.
The room was clean and tidy, and a great place to relax and base ourselves.
Breakfast was good, although no hot buffet due to COVID the many choices were good and the food was very tasty, and the staff in the restaurant very helpful and attentive.
I’d have no problem recommending this hotel, and would happily stay here again.

Title: Exceptional service and historic location.
ReviewText: Every member of the staff is dedicated to providing excellent service.  The doormen, Barry, Sabi, and Mike make exceptional first impressions to all guests arriving at the property.  Security is in the very capable hands of Georgi.  The staff in Gillray’s provides personal service at breakfast and dinner.  Stan at the Gillray’s bar and manager Robin provide friendly and efficient personalized service.   The front desk staff led by Mr. Badu met every question with a smile and friendly answer.  Housekeeping kept the rooms in immaculate condition with fresh towels, Nespresso pods, and general cleaning every day with supervisory follow up.  My guest room was comfortable with a king size bed, large screen TV, console refrigerator, and work chair with desk.   The walk in shower with dual mode rain and hand held shower heads provides the perfect experience to clean.  I will happily return to this property for future business or leisure travel.

Title: Awesomeness!
ReviewText:
My wife and I were able to stay in your hotel for a couple of weeks and thoroughly enjoyed our experience.  The moment we checked in to the time we left the staff was over-the-top exceptional in every way.  We became friends with the doormen and porters, they were so much fun to visit with and were super happy to help in any way with any thing we needed.  Barry, Saib, and Maiko, and Ash, were unbelievably helpful and interested in our well being while we stayed at the hotel.  In fact, we mentioned to Makio that we were celebrating our 25th wedding anniversary while were were staying at the hotel.  Well, we went out for the day and when we came back to our room there was a card and balloons signed by the staff congratulating us on our anniversary. 

I was so impressed with literally everybody.  There wasn't one staff person we interacted with that was pleasant and helpful in any way they could.  Honestly, we have stayed in a lot of different hotels, our experience with the Marriott County Hall in London was by far the absolutely amazing.  Whatever you are doing, keep it up.

Title: Perfect Stay All Around
ReviewText: Great service in all areas.

Title: The Marriot in March
ReviewText: Loved every corner I turned to, every hallway I walked down. The room was pleasant, bed was comfy, food was great, service was excellent. Will I be coming back? Definitely!

Title: Second stay in four months but…
ReviewText: …generally a good experience but I wouldn’t say it was great. At the price I think it should be. Fantastic friendly and professional staff but over two stays fantastic rooms, great views, disappointing housekeeping, don’t even think about ordering room service and don’t expect any Bonvoy rewards if you book using the most popular booking site…

Title: Weekend away
ReviewText: The property was itself amazing and the supporting staff met and exceeded expectations leading to a most memorable weekend.

Title: Great stay, I loved the location and view .
ReviewText: Everything was great, from the staff at the door to the front desk. They helped in every way. I enjoyed the conversations with all of them.

Title: Promises not delivered ....
ReviewText: This Hotel is in a great location. Staff are nice. My biggest problem was that what is advertised on the website when you book is not guaranteed with your stay. I booked a room specifically for the bath and it was not available one I checked in. It clearly stated that it was a bath/shower combo and all I received was the shower. DISAPPOINTED  is an understatement. When I complained I was told that it was all booked up ... I should expected that I would have been one of the ones that was considered booked. It wasn't a short stay either. It was for 5 days so I would have hoped they could have made me feel more appreciated.

Title: Birthday trip
ReviewText: This was a two night stay to celebrate a couple of birthdays. The whole experience was wonderful. The afternoon tea in The Library and breakfast and dinner at the steakhouse were fantastic. We would really enjoy another stay like this.

Title: First time in London
ReviewText: My husband and I stayed here for our first time in London and absolutely loved it. Gorgeous hotel, incredible location in central London, very clean, wonderful staff….10/10. We will recommend to our friends and family.

Title: Noise and no sleep
ReviewText: The hotel it’s self was lovely but due to the endless nice I could sleep from about 12am onwards there was a pump or something that would start and run for approximately 12-16 mins every few hours

Title: The perfect London hotel
ReviewText:
The London Marriott County Hall exceeded every expectation that I had. Situated right next to Waterloo Station it is easy to get to. Almost every location in London is easily accessible via walking, bus or train. Gillray's Steakhouse, in the hotel serves outstanding meals with top notch service., with a view looking out at the River Thames and the London Eye. The fish & chips were Heaven!! The room was spacious, clean and serviced every day. Only negative was it was quite a hike from the elevator to the room, but really wasn't an issue. 
Finally, the staff: Totally Amazing. They were all so nice, friendly and willing to assist with anything, and it seemed like they weren't even trying.  
The best of the best was Barry. He greeted us at the door, helped us with our bags, took us to our room, gave us a tour of the room. He greeted us each day he was there as if we had known him all of our lives. Barry made recommendations, called taxis and provided insight as to goings on in London.

Title: Celebrated Our 28th Wedding Anniversary & My Wife’s Return To Her Homeland
ReviewText: A wonderful experience. Form, Function, & Facility were all addressed in high quality.

Title: Excellent Stay in the Heart of London
ReviewText:
Pleasant stay. 
Great amenities: swimming pool, fitness and sauna.
The food was average.

Title: COVID has left a mark on the County Hall
ReviewText: A lot has changed with the County Hall Marriott as a result of COVID. Room service menus food offering and service is not what we have come to expect. We went out of our war to stay at the County Hall in past not sure I would return.

Title: Excellent facilities and staff
ReviewText: I would stay here again in a heartbeat. The location is incredibly convenient to central London. Our suite was the perfect size and had the perfect amenities with a spectacular view. The executive lounge was a wonderful place to kick off the evening with snacks and drinks. And the staff everywhere were outstanding. Everyone made us feel welcome and special and clearly enjoyed doing so. We didn't get everyone's names, but Ashanti, Barry, Georgi, Martina, and Gorica and ,  and their colleagues provided amazing service.

Title: Book for the view. Stay for the hospitality.
ReviewText: We spent 4 nights at the London Marriott County Hall with our two children (8 and 12). The location is unmatched—views of the London Eye and Big Ben. Walking distance to the Waterloo, Embankment, and Westminster tube stations. The staff was incredible. They treated us like family.  Barry delivered our bags, welcomed us to London, and showed us the features of our room. Sanda served us breakfast each morning and went out of her way each day to make sure we felt cared for (and fed).  The staff culture of kindness and hospitality meant a great deal to our family. We would look forward to any opportunity to return.

Title: Perfect place to stay
ReviewText: Very good service, beautiful rooms, very central and easy to get to and from activities.

Title: Wonderful Stay in Amazing Location
ReviewText: The location and the building itself are unbeatable!  A quick walk across Westminster Bridge to the Underground, or a few steps to a bus stop, and the city if unlocked!  The Hotel was wonderful...nine nights with a family and not one issue!  The food was great and the staff in both The Library and The M Lounge were superb.  Communication with the front desk before our stay was both prompt and helpful.  Housekeeping did a great job making our room impeccable each day while we enjoyed London.  HIGHLY RECOMMEND!

Title: Kein 5 Sterne Hotel
ReviewText:
Leider entspricht der Standard des Services, der Sauberkeit im Hotel
und der Zustand des SPA-Bereiches keineswegs einem
5 Sterne Hotel, eher 3-4 Sterne.
Der Preis liegt aber bei 5 Sternen

Title: Family touring
ReviewText:
The location was excellent. Wonderful service. Comfortable rooms.  Food good. Beautiful view on Thames. Convenient to underground and tourist sites. Only negative , wish they had knowledgeable concierge services .
Would stay again and recommend it.

Title: Beautiful Location and Hotel
ReviewText: Sat right on the approach to Westminster Bridge the hotel is perfect for business or leisure.  Great rooms overlooking the Thames and London Eye.  Very clean, great staff, fresh and luxurious feel.

Title: Wonderful location.
ReviewText: Very walkable location with great views of Big Ben and the London Eye.  Good food and historic building to enjoy.

Title: Amazing!!!!!
ReviewText: This hotel was exceptional. Perfect location, clean and the staff is very kind and personable! The room service was SHOCKINGLY FAST!!!!!! Food was very good, made to order and piping hot!!!! We will be back!

Title: My experience at the Marriott County Hall
ReviewText:
A great hotel, great location, not too overpriced.
Executive lounge in the evening was very good and great staff
Room was good and nice view of the Thames.
Check staff gave me the wrong room, it was already occupied by someone watching TV. 2nd attempt at check in was better, got a room that was vacant
Breakfast in the library was disappointing.  1st morning we had the full English, The scrambled eggs were very dry, the bacon was nice and thick but very tough, the beans were luke warm at best and the whole breakfast was disappointing and felt rushed. 
2nd morning we ordered the vegan option as a change. it was a bit better, but still not hot, again beans were mildly warm at best. again disappointed. On both days it seemed rushed, the main breakfast course was served when we were only half way through our first course of granola.
In the evening the executive lounge staff were excellent and made us very welcome.
The rooms lack any USB charge facilities, although reception did loan me a USB plug.
The room and bathroom was very clean.
Would I stay there agin? yes, but would go for breakfast somewhere else.

Title: The best hotel ever
ReviewText:
Hotel gave us precious time.
with polite and tender staffs, clean & relaxing room.
Was the great experience for us.

Title: Fantastic hotel
ReviewText:
I stayed at the hotel last week for a company meeting, the staff, service, and hotel were first class.

Cannot wait to return!

Title: overall a very good experience
ReviewText:
to sum it, I did expect more of a category 8 Marriott hotel....

pros:
staff is very friendly
location (not in the heart of things but easy access by public transportation)
very spacious rooms
amenities (including robes, coffee machine and more)
view from room
indoor pool 

cons:
long walk to the room (long hallways, require quite some walking)
breakfast is a-la-cart which limits your choice and variety
curtains do not provide real black-out 
towels of medium quality

Title: Wonderful
ReviewText: Very pleasant reception with a glass of bubbly. The receptionist carefully selected a good room for us. We had a double twin room with our 16 and 14 year old teenagers. Room was clean, with good beds, nice bathroom and a view of the gardens near the London Eye. Breakfast was superb, afternoon tea too. Staff very friendly, both at the reception and in the restaurant, but also the housekeeping staff!

Title: London theatre stay
ReviewText:
We stayed for one night in Feb 2022. The concierge was friendly enough but quite informal for a 5 star hotel. The hotel itself is huge. The swimming pool is fairly basic (it was operating a lane swim system whilst we were there and there were swimming lessons taking place) and there was no sauna, jacuzzi or steam room. The room was great though: really spacious and beautifully decorated and the bed was incredibly comfy, as were the pillows.

There was very little in the way of tea/coffee/biscuits in the room and no mini bar whatsoever.  Overall, it was fine but nothing to write home about: we’ve definitely stayed in MUCH better 5 star hotels in London. It was just lacking anything special; and for the money we paid we would have expected more of a wow factor/more impressive service.

Title: Lovely weekend
ReviewText: Lovely room excellent service

Title: Only thing I would describe as great is the location. Disappointing!
ReviewText: As a titanium member who has stayed at this location multiple times I will say this will be my last. Service has gone down. Ordered room service 3 times and incorrect every time! Selected rate that included breakfast but was told that had to be verified every morning we attended breakfast. Only thing I would describe as great is the location.

Title: Superior Stay
ReviewText: Excellent staff made checking in delightful. Excellent all round; superior stay indeed - would gladly stay again.

Title: Marriot County Hall London
ReviewText: Good room, average food, off hand staff.

Title: Great hotel
ReviewText: Wonderful hotel in the best location . Room was exceptionally clean , and staff superb. One thing that let it down was the breakfast we ordered in room on first morning . Tooooo basic ( even for us vegans , that don't expect much). It came in a cardboard bag , no tray service , not very warm , and cost £58 !!!!! ( We had to ask for a glass of orange juice each , which cost £8 , should have been included !!)...... What a shame , this really did let the hotel down , but besides this absolutely superb !!!

Title: Excellent location and service
ReviewText: If you are traveling to London, this hotel will be a great choice.

Title: Excellent Location, friendly Staff, Clean Rooms Breathtaking views
ReviewText: The hotel is place in the best location in London, it cant be better then this . Staff is very Supportive, rooms are good size. Always Clean .

Title: Disappointed
ReviewText: Disappointed with accommodation and hospitality.

Title: Not what I expected
ReviewText: The hotel is in an ideal location and has very nice rooms but they are cold and noisey; you can hear the wind outside whistling through the 2 double sets of windows. The service the next morning at breakfast was poor. A large amount of guests, around 12 were looked after by one person, which meant you had to wait a long time.

Title: The best stay on the Southbank
ReviewText: The location is unbeatable. Walking distance to James Park, Buckingham Palace, Trafalgar Square and the Globe Theater. Near restaurants, coffee shops and grocery store. Provides amazing and unobstructed  views from the hotel of the House of Parliament, the Big Ben and the London Eye. Plus, the staff is eager to assist and friendly which made our stay even more wonderful and enjoyable.

Title: Valentines stay
ReviewText: We were very happy with a spacious, clean rooms and the little touches the hotel added that made it special. We received sparkling wine and a treat on arrival, a coffee machine in our room. Staff were very happy to help with an enquiries. We would stay again and recommend it to others. Thank you for our stay.

Title: Lovely birthday stay
ReviewText: Lovely stay, room decorated with balloons and sweets. Very comfortable and spacious, great swimming pool too and nice restaurant on site. Loved all the queens jubilee decorations too - great fun! Location couldn’t be better and they upgraded us to a fabulous view of Big Ben.

Title: great 4 night in London
ReviewText: Best hotel so far, everything was great and clean also, i will come back again for sure

Title: Views
ReviewText: The views from the rooms are fantastic

Title: Weekend stay
ReviewText: Everything amazing and perfect staff absolutely amazing and very professional

Title: Wonder stay
ReviewText: Wonder staff and wonderful room in a wonderful location

Title: London vacation
ReviewText: Great location with unbelievable views.  Convenient to all of London.  Staff wonderful

Title: Wonderful experience, ideal location
ReviewText: This is a top tier hotel at a great location - it's in central London, around 10 mins walk from Waterloo station. Rooms are in amazing condition offering a wonderful view alongside the necessary privacy. Don't forget to visit the pool and the executive lounge for a productive day.

Title: Wonderful Stay
ReviewText: This was my second stay at the County Hall and hopefully won't be my last. I find the hotel to be a calm, peaceful oasis in busy, noisy London with comfortable rooms, great food and welcoming, professional staff. I stayed in a double double bed, river view room with great views of the Houses of Parliament across the Thames. My only tiny complaint is that the hairdryer cable is not long enough and I would prefer larger bath towels. The service is friendly and I felt well looked after.

Title: Fantastic hotel, faultless stay.
ReviewText:
I booked a one- night stay and was not dissapointed. 
The room was spacious, clean, and very comfortable. I was lucky enough to have a river view which had amazing views. 
I ate at Gillroy's steakhouse which was delicious, and good service. 
Amazing location as there are many attractions nearby for the family.  
My overall stay was faultless, and I will be returning. highly recommend this hotel.

Title: Perfect Hotel
ReviewText: This historic building and the view make the location just perfect. The staff make the stay perfect. In simple words its a perfect hotel.

Title: Отдых
ReviewText: Мне очень понравился отель, удобное место расположения, приветливый персонал, а вид из окна на реку, просто прекра

Title: Hotel Stay
ReviewText: I was was very well looked after and bedroom was lovely and comfortable.

Title: good surprise
ReviewText: new and clean rooms with excellent staff

Title: Fantastic hotel
ReviewText: Fantastic hotel, had great view of parliament and london eye from room. Staff were all very helpful and nice. Breakfast was great too. Very easy location to get anywhere else in london.

Title: Great hotel
ReviewText: It’s our second time staying at the county hall, staff is friendly, rooms are perfect. The only thing we didn’t like was the changes to room service. The menu is average and everything comes in takeaway packaging, awful. Not so luxurious anymore.

Title: Great Weekend Birthday Treat Stay
ReviewText: Great hotel throughout clean friendly modern great location

Title: Fist class accommodation and service
ReviewText: A truly magnificent building. Service and room were exceptional - highly recommended

Title: London at it's best
ReviewText: Such an amazing building in a fabulously central location.  Staff were all happy approachable courteous and helpful.  The bar staff made the best 'Old Fashioned' my husband has ever had. The restaurant was such an amazing experience to. We ventured to the pool after a long day out and warmed our bones in the sauna, perfect.

Title: Special Location in London
ReviewText: The hotel is special to me because of it's great location on the Thames River opposite Houses of Parliament, Big Ben, and behind the London Eye!  I try to book the very special rooms with the balcony on the top floor - which is just spectacular!

Title: Double bed
ReviewText: Double bed look like single bed

Title: Comfort, beauty, and care!
ReviewText: My family's stay at this location was amazing! The hotel is stunning and is placed perfectly in London. I can't get over how breathtaking that was. The breakfast that comes with the room was insane for being complimentary, so delicious! The rooms were so comfortable and the ambience was just right. The staff was out if this world. The care and hospitality was just awesome to have. They sparked conversations and gave great recommendations for the city of London. They also helped my family with the ever changing Covid rules for flights. They helped arrange a new PCR test and didn't stop helping until it was fully resolved. I wish I could thank them again! Thank you Marriot London County Hall for a perfect experience.

Title: Great hotel in a great location
ReviewText: Very well located hotel with excellent attentive staff.  Room was very nice…missing a few modern touches like usb charging sockets but that’s all that was missing.  Would definitely stay again.

Title: Amazing Hotel!
ReviewText: One of the best in London, superb hotel with great facilities, staff and location. Definitely worth a visit!

Title: Amazing
ReviewText: The best hotel we’ve stayed and well worth the money, service was so good and the views and surroundings are just lovely, the London eye was right outside our window.

Title: Nice room but shower was filthy
ReviewText: Apparently upgraded to a “lovely room”. Room itself was nice enough however the shower was filthy

Title: Excellent staff and excellent location
ReviewText: The whole staff from the bellman, front desk, restaurant/bar and housekeeping were so amazing. My second time there and I will continue to stay there  I definitely recommend this hotel.

Title: Beautiful hotel in an excellent location...
ReviewText: As a family we absolutely loved the hotel and the staff were excellent and friendly. We would highly recommend this for families.

Title: Christmas break
ReviewText: We booked this hotel as we were in London to see a show. It is in a great location with wonderful river views. The staff are very welcoming and accommodating. It was a nice touch to receive a glass of bubbly on arrival. The suite was fabulous with a large walk in bathroom/shower, lovely bath robes and Moulton Brown products. The bed was really comfortable with walk in wardrobe space. Will definitely return.

Title: Excellent stay
ReviewText: Stayed here for new year's eve. Unfortunately due to the cancellation of most new year celebrations in London for a second year it was a relatively low key evening, however we still enjoyed our stay and the staff made us feel extremely welcome. The location is absolutely perfect for taking in London's tourist attractions and we are looking forward to a return visit.

Title: Family wknd birthday stay
ReviewText:
