The Bellman, too bad I forgot his name but he had such a happy welcoming smile every time we saw him, our 9-yr old son called him “grandpa”. We had such a pleasant and memorable stay. Thank you very much

Title: Elegant and Excellent
ReviewText: Wonderful location, excellent staff, and a bit of history.

Title: Lovely
ReviewText:
Great hospitality, good location, kind
and nice staff!

Title: Great stay at a great location
ReviewText:
The County Hall is a great location in the center of London. You're right across the Thames from the political center of London with great views of Big Ben, Parliment and the London Eye. We were able to walk to a lot of the attractions or were just a few bus stops/underground stops away from anything else.

They have an incredible weight room that doubles as a fitness club so there's everything there you need. In evenings we would head to the executive lounge for a drink to finish off long days.

Great staff and a very comfortable interior. Overall, a great stay and I would definitely recommend for a pleasure or business trip.

Title: Great staff and location
ReviewText: For tourists or business this is a great location.  Room and lobby are up to date, amenities were nice and a the staff was professional, friendly and helpful.

Title: Inviting Central London Experience
ReviewText: A great hotel right by Parliament.  Friendly staff and inviting rooms.  Quiet too.  Breakfast at the lounge could be more filling but otherwise one of my favorite hotels in London.

Title: A room with a view
ReviewText:
Excellent hotel but do not expect to be pampered for being an Elite Platinum member.  The hotel is just across from the London Eye and five minutes walk from Westminster Abbey and the Parliament. The hotel is a five minutes walk from the Westminster Tube and almost ten minutes away from the Waterloo Station. It is based in the old County Hall. A historic and nice building. 

The Hotel overlooks the parliament and offers a breathtaking view. However, it seems to be always crowded so getting a room that you want is a challenge. The London Eye overlooked our first room and we had no privacy whatsoever so we requested a room change. We got kind of a smaller room but with a nicer view in a lower floor.

Rooms were comfy, clean, and very practical. They appear to have been recently renovated. Water and Nespresso capsules were offered on daily basis. The executive lounge was good. The breakfast was Ok and the evening bites were interesting. The Lounge staff were really nice and helpful. They really made us feel at home. We do recommend Marriott Ccounty Hall and we would not hesitate to stay there again.

Title: Amazing
ReviewText: Best hotel I have stayed in. Graham made it amazing and the whole experience was amazing cannot wait to come back.

Title: Best city Marriott
ReviewText:
Great location, and straight away from the doormen and checking staff you know the experience will be great. 
Hotel is beautifully decorated, bars and lounges have that great classy feel, and the staff are courteous and knowledgeable.
The room we had on the 6th floor was so stylish, great views and loads of space.
I stay in Marriotts and others all around the World, and I can safely say this is the best.

Title: No es un buen hotel
ReviewText: Sistema calefacción no funciona bien. Y sin presión en la ducha .

Title: Good hotel
ReviewText: 酒店整体很好，已经入住了很多次，价格在伦敦也能算得上五星级的物超所值，房间整洁干净，洗手间也很有特色。

Title: Great location. Great staff. Beautiful hotel
ReviewText:
We loved our stay at Marriott County Hall. The hotel is beautiful and spotless. Our room was big, clean, quiet and comfortable. The staff was friendly and helpful from the welcome at the door to the desk to the executive lounge. The location was great especially with our kids. Lots to do in area. Easy to just walk places and hop on underground. I can’t wait to return to this hotel. 
The executive lounge is great good breakfast and delicious food in evening.

Title: Outstanding property and staff
ReviewText: This elegant hotel is in a prime location for touring on foot or by public transit. The staff is excellent, very attentive and proactive.

Title: What an experience!
ReviewText:
As a frequent traveller, I often stay in hotels for work, or for pleasure: London Marriott County Hall had been a true delight!

The warm welcome at the entrance made us soon realize that our stay would have been extraordinary. Quick and friendly check in from the dynamic team at the front desk, and then up to the room: the details, the cleanliness, the harmony of the elements so genuinely assembled made us perceive the grandeur and the history of the building in which we found ourselves spending the night.

Don't miss out on the incredible bar and restaurant: whether you are looking for a convivial meal, or a drink with your partner to get the night started, head over to Gillray's for an incredible time. 

All this enriched by one of the most spectacular views you could wish for in London: decadent, charming and so uniquely London. Staff, location and decor made us have a fantastic night, and looking forward to be back at this fabulous property!

Title: London with Marriott
ReviewText: Very good hotel. Amazing view and excellent service.

Title: County Hall Marriott review - thumbs down.
ReviewText: Unfortunately thumbs down for many reasons... still not resolved- or bare minimum. Very unprofessional. There are better Marriotts in the area!!! Choose a different one!

Title: Amazing County Hall Hotel
ReviewText:
Without doubt the best hotel I’ve stayed in. The design, furnishings and ambience of the hotel are exemplary. The facilities are second to none. And the hotel staff, from the doormen, cleaners, waiting staff, front of of house to the management, only enhance an already perfect hotel.
I cannot wait to visit the hotel again and would highly recommend to anyone looking to stay in London.

Title: Great location
ReviewText: This hotel is in a great location with views of the London eye and river Thames. For the cost I expected a higher level of service but the hotel itself in a nice spot and easy to access transportation

Title: Birthday Weekend
ReviewText: Very disappointing 1st room we had been allocated on 6th floor, dark and depressing, no bath and marked/stained carpets and furniture.  2nd room better but 2 Queen beds instead of King bed, faulty television which was not repaired during our stay even though reported on no less than 4 occasions and being disturbed early on morning of check out by someone who wanted to check the minibar.

Title: London Jan 2018
ReviewText: Great stay, thank you. A little expensive food and drinks

Title: Outstanding
ReviewText: The team at this property is professional, helpful and reliable.  The property is clean, well maintained and in an excellent location for access to Central London.  If you are looking for someplace special, you've found it.

Title: 对客人的需求安排不到位
ReviewText: 对客人的需求安排不到位，希望能有普通的基础设备，像充电线等等

Title: Comfortable Hotel - Good Position
ReviewText:
This is a very nice hotel with friendly staff.   The position is good for London sightseeing.  The room was clean with a very comfortable bed and a great view.
The Gilrays Restaurant was excellent on the first night but on the second visit some meals were unavailable and the fish was dry and over cooked but overall
a very pleasant two night stay in London.

Title: The Place to stay
ReviewText: We love the South Bank with the theatres, the walks and the West End on your door step. County Hall is an Iconic London building and we love it and what Marriott does with it. Always a treat.

Title: Excellent Hotel in the Heart of London
ReviewText: Would completely stay again at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall. Perfect location to move about the city and use the underground. Staff were incredibly helpful and rooms beautiful with great views of the city -- as well as quiet from hall and outside noise. High tea at the hotel was lovely and convenient. The hotel helped to make our trip even more magical.

Title: Happy Traveler
ReviewText: We had an excellent time. Spent Christmas & News Years there. Location is perfect for Hop-On-Hop-Off and local transport is right out in front of the hotel. You can walk across the Westminster Bridge to the Parliament and West Minister Abbey to tour. I would highly this hotel for location and high standards in quality.

Title: A+ Hotel in London
ReviewText: The London Marriott County Hall is a wonderful hotel with a convenient location for seeing London attractions, modern and comfortable rooms, and a friendly and accommodating staff.

Title: Christmas in London
ReviewText:
Overall nice hotel and within the range of the Marriott brand. (As huge business traveller, I often use this brand)
Couple of things to get fixed in the hotel, but we spent a wonderful time in London over the Christmas days.
I found the hotel nicely located, right next to major London's must see touristic places.
Minor note from me: the cost for parking my car in the hotel's entrance was criminal (£42/day), but we're in London and it's a common practice..
No time to visit the gym/pool, but as Gold Member, the Executive Lounge presented quick way of starting our day and good alternative for eating some food as well.
Will recommend this hotel and definitively will come back next time we'll stay in London.

Title: Christmas break
ReviewText:
Wonderful setting for Christmas 
Excellent service from the friendly staff

Title: Excellent Property!
ReviewText: I was a bit concerned that the location would be too in the thick of things, but I was pleased to find that the entrance was from a very quiet courtyard and that the rooms were high enough to avoid any issue with noise.  The room was absolutely beautiful, very classic modern design.  The building itself it gorgeous and historic, and the refurb into hotel space was extremely well done.  Views are fantastic...I had dead-on view of Westminster Bridge, the Thames, Houses of Parliament, etc.  Service was top-notch.

Title: Amazing views over London landmarks
ReviewText:
Location: 4/5
Service: 4/5
Room: 3/5  ( No bottled water)
TV channel variety: 3/5 ( No options for kids )
Bathroom: 3/5  ( No bedit )
Cleanliness: 4/5
Facilities: 5/5
Staff Friendliness: 5/5

Title: Lousy weather but lovely hotel accomodation
ReviewText: Special thanks to Dani and Talket

Title: Great week in London,
ReviewText:
We came to do Christmas shopping and limited tourist stuff.
The staff was helpful, assisting us with every question we had.

Location was phenomenal for both shopping and ease of getting around.

Would definitely stay in same hotel if/when we return

Title: London Visit
ReviewText: A stunning building on the banks of the Thames which is ideally positioned to enjoy the sites of London. We enjoyed a beautiful junior suite with stunning views of the Houses of Parliament and Big Ben. Easy walking distance to the London Eye, Covent Garden, Soho and many other attractions that London has to offer. Overall the hotel is great but could do with some tweaks with service in the F&B areas.

Title: Perfect Software with great hardware
ReviewText: Great location, decoration and view, but most importantly are the software, here I means ALL staff. From doorman, conceige, check in staff and room service, they provide perfect service which would give you a home-staying feeling. They are all friendly, kind, sweet and talkative. Would definitely recommend friends to stay, and I would visit this hotel again shortly for sure. Love you guys.

Title: Mini bar
ReviewText: Apart from being charged £16 for a mini bar charge that I did not use, it was great please could you refund my card.

Title: 早餐和客房卫生
ReviewText: 服务生都很认真负责 只是早餐种类再多一些就好了 而且枕头上有黑点 注重一下卫生 就会更好了  如果可以的话也希望提供一次性牙刷和梳子

Title: WTM Show 2017
ReviewText:
Overall stay suburb.  Only draw back was when I researching hotels it comes to looking over the menus, I saw a bone-in Prime Rib did not say prime rib eye, or any other description it said Prime Rib.  So you can imagine my surprise when a rib eye steak was presented.

The meal was good, but my expectations were set on prime rib, the best cut of beef - prime rib.

Title: 本物の格式
ReviewText: 豪華絢爛を全面に押し出すホテルではない。だがそこが良い。程良い静けさが館内に満ちている。あんなに賑やかなロケーションにも関わらず。日本人向けには適したホテルだと感じた。勿論再訪したい。

Title: Good service and location
ReviewText: The Big Ben was renovated and damaged the view ...but it's not hotel"s fault,and the staff are helpful and passionate..

Title: Great property, staff responsiveness needs work
ReviewText: Nice property, but repeated sub-par service experiences.

Title: Clean, convenient and quiet
ReviewText:
We stayed for a long weekend in London. The location is perfect for tourists. It is close to major attractions and to the Westminster underground station, so getting around the city is easy. For all the hustle and bustle around the hotel, the minute you step inside it is quiet and calm. Our room was spacious, clean and well appointed. 
We also had access to the club level so breakfast was included ( as well as other snacks) everyday. 
I plan to stay here again on our next trip to London.

Title: Great hotel in a great location with friendly staff!
ReviewText: This is definitely the best hotel we have stayed in London. Hotel is bright and spacious; staff are mostly friendly and most importantly it is in a very convenient location. Central London can be reached by foot! The only downside of this hotel is the executive lounge, probably the worst we have used in the five star hotels. But that didn’t affect our stay whatsoever and will definitely consider staying there again!

Title: Family friendly hotel with super location
ReviewText: We stayed two nights at the County Hall (second time around) and were very satisfied with room, staff and breakfast. The room was large, with comfortable beds and beautiful decor. The location is great, close to the Westminster tube, several restaurants and many family friendly attractions. We also went for a swim in the hotel pool, which our children really loved.

Title: London Hotel
ReviewText: This is a lovely hotel situated in the hart of London. There is short walking distance to London eye, Parliament and Big ben the aquarium and London dungeons. For other London sights there is either a short trip with the tube or a walk away. The hotel standard is very nice, and the staff is helpful and friendly. The breakfast is very good. They have a lovely pool and a big gym for the use of hotel guest.

Title: Ok
ReviewText: Steak fatty, pillows too soft

Title: Spectacular Hotel
ReviewText: The London Marriott County Hall is a wonderful place to stay.  The property is tastefully decorated, the rooms are comfortable with a soothing color palette.   The staff is exceptional and very accommodating.  This hotel is in a fantastic location for sightseers.

Title: ABSOLUTELY WONDERFUL!!
ReviewText: If you're looking for a great, spotless place to stay, right on the Thames and alongside The Eye, this is it!!!!

Title: London County Hall - Great Experience
ReviewText: Have stayed here 4 times. Always great service and nice amenities.

Title: Hotel an perfekter Lage
ReviewText: Sehr schönes und sauberes Hotel an perfekter Lage

Title: One of the Best!
ReviewText: A crown jewel in Marriott’s portfolio.  This was an absolutely perfect stay with first class service all around.  Some of the highlights: 1) a room upgrade to junior suite, 2) 11 AM check in, 3) 4 PM check out.  All in all, this was one of the best Marriott experiences I’ve ever had and the location cannot be beat!  The only (minor) issue is that there’s only one elevator and the distance to some of the rooms is very far.  But that’s part of the stately charm of the old County Hall building!

Title: Probably my favorite Marriott property in the world!
ReviewText: Love the place - and the staff. It's outstanding - and well located for my needs in Southbank....

Title: Great Room Bad Food
ReviewText:
Food not worth cost
Air condition not working it's warm

Title: BUENAS HABITACIONES PARTES COMUNES ANTICUADAS
ReviewText:
Se trata de un buen Hotel, bien situado, las habitaciones reformadas. 
Las pegas son que las partes comunes son antiguas y que se ha de caminar muchisimo hasta llegar a tu habitación, además la ducha de la habitación no tiene presión. 
El personal es muy amable y eficiente.

Title: Business Travel
ReviewText: Ideal in every capacity for business travel .

Title: London Marriott County Hall is a MUST STAY!!!
ReviewText: Location, staff, ambiance, property are all incredible!  It made our first trip to London very memorable!  Can't say enough about this hotel!

Title: Gorgeous hotel
ReviewText: Gorgeous hotel, lovely views and brilliant staff will definitely be back. Great location and views on the river & parliament.

Title: The view is almost as good as the staff.
ReviewText: When you wake up in London and you are overlooking the Thames, London Eye and all that is Westminster and ‘Big Ben’ it’s extremely hard to match that view. The staff especially at the bar & Gillrays and the Concierge / door staff really surpass even that great view. Comfortable beds, old world feel in an updated hotel with an excellent location. I walk everywhere in London from this location. Parks tourist sights and work are all easily accessible by walking or the choice of 2 nearby tube stations.

Title: Great Location and Staff
ReviewText: A five star resort with a five star staff

Title: Weekend Break
ReviewText:
Excellent service and staff from the moment we arrived until we left.
Booked again for Christmas break as soon as we got home

Title: Raven's game trip to London
ReviewText: What a wonderful hotel. Close to everything. The Westminster tube station was a 5 minute walk across the bridge. Easy to take the tube everywhere. Plenty of cabs except traffic makes them a little expensive. A week pass on the tube is a better option. Direct trains to Heathrow from Paddington station which is a short train ride from Westminster station. The Lounge was wonderful. Everyone goes out of their way to take care of you. Never met any staff that did not say hello or smile. Not a cheap hotel but you are close to everything. Best location in London and worth the money. I was not a big fan of the eggs in the lounge during breakfast. Always the same every day. But everything else was GREAT!! The gym is amazing and so is the pool. They have a Spa as well. We just did not have time to us it or the pool.

Title: SJC Experience
ReviewText: Excellent Marriott property and right price forLondon

Title: Schlafen beim London EYE
ReviewText: Mit Blick auf BIG BEN und London EYE den Abend in stillvolem Ambiente ausklingen lassen.

Title: Outstanding hotel experience
ReviewText: A great property. Centrally located with close proximity to many London attractions.  Excellent accommodations and very helpful staff.  You won't go wrong staying at this hotel.

Title: Great Place to Stay in London
ReviewText: The Marriott is well located to a wide variety of activities and sightseeing activities.  The rooms are extremely clean and the bed and pillows are very comfortable.  The staff are great they are helpful cheerful and eager to help.  The food both breakfast and supper are well prepared and are very good.  You can get to a wide variety of eating just along the river down in the direction of the London Eye..... Great place to stay.

Title: Excellent Hotel On River Thames!
ReviewText:
Absolutely the best hotel and location!  Service is impeccable!  We loved our view of Big Ben and were right by the Eye!  From the moment you walk in you are greeted with a huge smile & Welcome!  The staff are so very friendly and knowledgeable. The room was fabulous and well stocked. Loved the fitness room and pool. 
Cannot wait to return.

Title: Mr li
ReviewText: Great location nice view. Overall recommend this Hotel

Title: A home in the heart of London
ReviewText: We spent 5 days site seeing London.  Marriott County Hall was our base for our daily's excursions. The hotel is exceptionally well sited for all major London attractions, in a save area. Extremely clean facilities with super friendly and knowledgeable staff. If you want an enjoyable, relaxing and comfortable room for resting before heading up exploring the city; do yourself a favour and choose Marriott County Hall. You will thank me later.

Title: no value for money
ReviewText: no bottel water received on arrival no chocolates as it was in the package but when asked for a tiny box was provided as the romance package says it should be a little more extravagant

Title: Supera las expectativas
ReviewText:
Servicio excepcional, ubicación excelente instalaciones de primera; personal que le
Gusta su trabajo y lo transmite al huésped!! Por si fuera poco el restaurant comida de lujo

Title: Great hotel, excellent location, fabulous staff
ReviewText:
We had a great time at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall.  We were visiting the UK for my son's 10 birthday and London was the last stop on our trip.  The hotel knew my son was celebrating a birthday and even though his birthday was a few days before, they provided him with a cake with the logo of his favorite team as well as balloons to celebrate his special day.  The room was spacious and the beds very comfortable.  Our view was great, we could see Big Ben and the River Thames.

The hotel is central, really central.  We could walk to almost everywhere we needed to get to within 30 minutes.  We walked to Trafalger Square, Leister Square, Picadilly Circus, Buckingham Palace, I could go on.

We will definitely be staying here again on our next visit to London.

Title: Nice Looking But Lacks Comfort & Service
ReviewText: It's a nice looking hotel. The rooms were clean and looked nice. But the bed was short and the mattress was not at par with a 5 start hotel. The customer service also lacked courtesy.

Title: Schönes Hotel an  Lage
ReviewText: Hotel liegt gerade neben London Eye und mit Blick auf Big Ben. Direkter Zugang Hop on zu Bus und Ausflugsboote. Für U-Bahn zu Fuss über Westminster-Brücke (5 min). Schöne, komfortable Zimmer. Sehr gut ausgestattetes, grosses Fitness Center und Swimming Pool.

Title: Do Marriott staff respond to their app?
ReviewText: Hotel great, staff great face to face but ignore phone and app

Title: Lowe
ReviewText: We had an excellent experience and would stay there again .

Title: A great birthday stay
ReviewText: This hotel is awsome ! The entire staff from the greeting, check in...Gary in concierge, May at the restaurant is excellent. You want a great place to stay in the heart of London ...this is it !

Title: Nice Stay
ReviewText: Overall we had a great time. Poor daily cleaning service but otherwise a great experience.

Title: Great location, not much else.
ReviewText:
This was my second time staying at this facility and neither were great experiences. Our company chooses this location when we come to London, but it wouldn't be at the top of my list of hotels to stay if I had a choice. If you stay here in the summer prepare to stay in a warm stuffy room even when you leave the AC on all day at its lowest possible setting. The chair in the room is rubbish so prepare to sit on your bed for the duration of your stay. To be honest it is really difficult to justify the amount charged per night for the quality of the room and the associated accommodations other than it is close to all of the local attractions.

The bright side is the staff. They are always polite and helpful!

Title: 最高
ReviewText: お風呂のドアがきちんと閉まらなくて水浸しになったが、それ以外は全て最高でした

Title: 立地が良い
ReviewText: 立地は最高です。全ての部屋からビッグベンが見えるわけではありません。

Title: Top Notch!!
ReviewText: Excellent hotel!! Staff was great and so was location!!

Title: 良好感受
ReviewText: 感受良好，略有遗憾。地理位置有越、出行方便，房间略高

Title: 立派な外観
ReviewText: ロンドンアイ後方にそびえる立派な外観、素敵な内装のホテル．鉄道の便は至極良いです．中心部からは離れていますが歩いて行ける範囲にビッグベン等名所もそれなりにあります．

Title: Excelente estancia
ReviewText: Excelente ubicación, calidad de servicio y habitaciones muy limpias

Title: Impressive service
ReviewText: Great location, friendly staff, beautiful rooms/bathrooms, good food. Would recommend to family an friends

Title: Top notch! A+!
ReviewText: I cannot express enough how amazing of a hotel this is! From the moment you arrive until you leave, you will get the best customer service!!! Rooms are recently remodeled and are beautiful! The staff are very courteous and friendly- simply the best I have ever encountered! The location of the hotel was perfect for us. It was a central location for getting around the city. I would recommend this hotel for sure!!!

Title: Terrific Location
ReviewText: Convenient to transportation and many must-see sites; lovely walk along the Thames to the Globe (about 30 minutes); the London Eye, Big Ben, Westminster Abbey are all practically at your back door.

Title: Not worth for this hotel
ReviewText: Room far away from life, member no ungrade…

Title: Great property
ReviewText: Very well located property, with nice spacious, remodeled rooms with views to the London Eye, Big Ben and the Parliament; and a great Lounge too! EXCELLENT staff that tries hard to accommodate every need one may possibly have in a kind, quick and professional way. Indeed a wonderful hotel.

Title: 名勝景點入窗，出門見景點，交通方便
ReviewText: 感覺良好，賓至如歸，名勝景點入窗，出門見景點，交通方便

Title: Ideal London Location
ReviewText: This hotel was excellent in terms of staff, room accommodations, amenities, and food.  Public area decor is a little dated with more of a business look than tourist look, however our rooms were very nice and clean.  Concierge was fun to work with.  He make great recommendations and secured reservations when needed.  Hotel is centrally located and within walking distance to many tourist attractions including the London Eye, Parliament, Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Downing Street, Buckingham Palace and more, and is only a short taxi ride to the London Tower, Tower Bridge and shopping districts.  There is so much to see and do in this area.

Title: Not good.
ReviewText: It was 'least' good experience during this London trips for a month.

Title: Excelente!
ReviewText: Excelente en todos los aspectos. La zona fuera del hotel un poco desprolija

Title: London Wow
ReviewText: The wow factor at this Marriott is off the charts. From the proximity to many historical locations (Big Ben, Parliament and Westminster Abby less than 1/2 mile away) to the moment you pull into the tunnel way leading to the front door, to being greeted at the front door by extremely friendly staff, to entering the history filled building you know this is a special place.  All of the staff members went above and beyond to make sure that our stay was fabulous.

Title: Best spot for traveling in London
ReviewText: Marriott County Hall must be the number 1 choice to stay if you are traveling in London. It has the great location which most of the attractions are in walking distance and the most wonderful view which you can see the London eye and the Big Ben.

Title: Spectacular location!
ReviewText: Our room with the view of the Thames, Big Ben, Westminster Bridge and the London Eye was breathtaking.  The location made walking to virtually all of the 'must-see's easy.  You could feel the vibrancy of this great city as soon as you stepped out the front door.  But the room was a quiet oasis.

Title: London done right
ReviewText: Truly a 5 star experience.  Hands down the best staffed hotel we have ever been to.  Great location, fantastic rooms, and exceptional staff.  No place better to stay at while in London

Title: No Value For Money
ReviewText: Poor room service. It was difficult to get what we wanted. The staff seems to be lost as to what they should be doing. Some could not be bothered to do the job they were paid for. The staff seems to have be put on the job without training.

Title: Perfect hotel in perfect location
ReviewText: GREAT HOTEL , BEAUTIFULLY REFURBISHED

Title: Great location in London
ReviewText:
Spent five days here in June 2017. Had requested two double rooms side by side but at check-in received a King and a double. Hotel was full so we made do. 

Staff throughout were extremely friendly, especially several of the restaurant staff. Had line access but the area was small and pretty busy for breakfast so we ended up eating in the restaurant where we only had to pay a small supplement instead of the full late which was a nice touch.

Rooms were great and pretty big. I preferred the king room as it had a desk area and a chaise long that the double did not. Bathrooms were big and functional.

I did have two issues with the hotel. The first was a letter one morning telling me I had been smoking in my room and had to pay 150GBP cleaning fee. Only problem is I have never even tried smoking! The second was an incorrect charge I only noticed after checkout. In both cases they were quickly rectified. I would have thought for the doing charge they would have taken the time to double check a room if they think this is the case as it did leave a bad taste in my mouth.

Location is ideal for walking around Central London

Title: Marriott London County Hall_June 2017
ReviewText: Property is in a great location, close to many of London's top tourist attractions. Staff were very helpful with restaurant suggestions/reservations, as well as tickets and advice for museums and tours.  Concierge helped arrange transportation back to airport for a flat rate. The recent renovations have relocated the Executive lounge to the 5th floor; it is bright and modern, though the food choices have been reduced at both breakfast and happy hour.  Updated rooms are nice, though some room layouts are awkward, and without a proper desk and chair, which is not at all conducive to working in the evening.

Title: Unbeatable tourist location, five star service
ReviewText:
I am a Lifetime Platinum member and this was one of the top stays I've ever had at a Marriott. I booked this reservation last minute, on the day of our stay beginning, and the front desk staff went above and beyond to handle my request and cater my elite status to the best of their ability. I'd like to specifically call out Guiherme from the front desk staff, he was as accommodating as he had the power to be and went above and beyond with regards to courtesy and friendliness. Though a last minute booking during a near-capacity weekend, I was upgraded to a waterview with a view of the Thames. This was a real treat and the capstone of my trip to England. 
I'd also like to call out the concierge level staff, the service inside the lounge really went the extra degree to ensure I had everything I needed. They tried to predict my needs by proactively bringing me refills and items before I even had to ask.
This is all in addition to the ideal location, that speaks for itself. I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone and have already done so with friends with plans to go to London- you will be seeing my friends soon.

Title: Great hotel, location and modern fresh rooms
ReviewText: Super great hotel.  Long walk to your room but once you are there its very tastefully decorated in modern colours and great amenities.  The only thing was I couldnt work out how to turn the little light out in the bathroom under the sink which stayed on the whole night and I don't like half shower doors as everything gets wet.  Really dont understand why England have them! Otherwise a brilliant stay and a huge GYM too with lots of facilities.

Title: My review
ReviewText: Fantastic stay! We had an excellent time and the property was beautiful

Title: A Must Stay when in London!
ReviewText: The London Marriott Hotel County Hall is a MUST STAY for anyone spending time in London.  The location is excellent...easy access to public transportation, tour busses, etc.  Convenience stores, restaurants, attractions all surround the facility.  The staff of the hotel are EXCEPTIONAL!  Do not miss this GEM in the Marriott Collection!  We can hardly wait to visit again!

Title: London Marriott Hotel County Hall
ReviewText: This Marriott hotel was outstanding from the time we pulled in with the taxi to the time we left in a private car. The staff throughout the hotel was phenomenal. You could tell from the get go that they loved their jobs and they thoroughly enjoyed talking to the travelers staying at the hotel. Everyone really went above and beyond to make sure you had the best stay possible. There was a huge pool and fitness center with machines, classes, sauna that you could use - and I would have if I had more time. The room was so spacious and comfortable and the bathroom was very modern. We used the executive lounge and it had a beautiful view of Big Ben and the Thames and it was extremely relaxing to sit and enjoy the delicious food and drinks. We also ate at Gillray's and the food was one of the best, if not the best, meals we had during our trip. You could also purchase tickets to shows or sightseeing from the concierge. The doormen were so friendly and when we were checking out we discussed with the doorman the best and most cost efficient way to get to the airport and he recommended the car service. It was a great and safe way to travel. Everything at the hotel was perfect. I will definitely be staying at the London County Hall again - no matter how long it takes to get back to London!

Title: Great Location, Poor service
ReviewText: The rooms were very nice, and the location was great.  The food was good.  However, the service was not up to standard.  The people didn't seem to care.  We were asked when we checked in if we wanted a paper in the morning, never got one and when asked about it the first morning, didn't seem to care that we didn't get one.  Neither the Concierges nor the bellman out front seemed very knowledgeable about the area.

Title: Great Hotel & Service
ReviewText: Excellent service, great place to stay on any occasion.

Title: MERVEILLEUX
ReviewText:
Hotel super bien place et personnel agreable avec l avantage d avoir certaines personnes qui parlent francais 
Merci pour votre accueil et sourire

Title: Great place and location.
ReviewText: Perfect location to visit everything in London

Title: Wonderful staff, appalling systems and management.
ReviewText:
The check in and check out were derisory: chaotic. And the disabled access is dangerous and inadequate: do not use this hotel if you have any accessibility issues. 

Also, for anyone, make sure you get what you booked.

Title: Best Location in London
ReviewText: For London sights, theater, view and so much more you cant find a better hotel option in London than the London Marriott Hotel Country Hall. Big Ben, Westminster and the London Eye are all right there and within 15 minutes walk you are in the heart of the Theater District.

Title: There is no better Marriott than the County Hall
ReviewText: I have stayed at many Marriott's and not one has impressed me as much as the Marriott County Hall.  From the beginning of when I booked my trip they were able to help me figure things out such as getting someone to do my hair for he wedding I was attending, car service and all the other little details I needed.  I have to be very honest and say that I took this trip and stayed at this property in less than 12 months only because I had fallen in love with the location and the property. The manager Jenna who I wasn't able to meet is fabulous!!! She assisted me via email.  I don't think I would consider staying at any other Marriott in London except for this one.

Title: Great Location, Great Hotel
ReviewText: We had a suite on the top floor under the London Eye with Executive Lounge access. It was a magic experience. The view was stunning The suites are stylish and comfortable. The Lounge was great - well stocked with an attentive staff. The bell men were very helpful in terms of directions, and in our case, helping us cope when a minicab failed to show. You can't beat the location. The gym was spectacular but we were too busy visiting the sights or enjoying the view from our balcony to enjoy it. I have come to rely on Marriott's quality and service. It helped make our visit truly special.

Title: AMAZING
ReviewText: I will again book here with my family.  I love the location, staff, the rooms etc. Amazing place I love the Marriott County Hall.  Everyone was helpful and very accommodating to whatever our needs were.  The concierge was very helpful even giving maps to help us explore around. If you needed a taxi the doormen were excellent in getting one for us even walking to the end of the road to flag one down.  The Executive Lounge was beautiful and comfortable looking out to see Big Ben in the night light was amazing. Very romantic even in the Lounge. We even received our upgrade at the check-in.  This place is amazing it is now one of my favorite places to be.  Thanks for everything!!!  Everyone was amazing!!!  The hotel alone made our stay in London that much better.

Title: Beautiful hotel
ReviewText: I want to specifically point out that if you are lucky enough to have Alex as your bartender, he is exceptional!  He made this stay absolutely wonderful with his attention to detail and his customer service.  The hotel is in a fabulous location--easy access to metro and walking to historical sites.  The rooms are exquisite and the flower arrangements throughout the main floor was absolutely beautiful.

Title: Превосходно!
ReviewText:
Прекрасный отель в самом сердце Лондона, отличный сервис и дизайн номера, приветливый персонал!
Понравилось все, кроме расстояния от лифта до номера , которое было огромным.

Title: Fantastic Stay
ReviewText: We had a wonderful 15 night stay at the London Marriott County Hall.  The location is great with easy access to central London, an Underground Station just across the Bridge, and Waterloo Train station a few minutes walk from the hotel.  Our room was large and recently renovated with comfortable bedding and we had a spectacular view of Big Ben and Parliament.  The staff (especially Lara, Kate, Andre, Kuki, Felicia, Kibrom, Jose, Sam & Ivana) of the Executive Lounge was first rate and made us feel like family.  We enjoyed the daily breakfast and evening light bites and drinks in the newly remodeled Lounge.  We will definitely stay at this hotel any time we are in London.

Title: Great all around
ReviewText: Hotel staff are friendly location is awesome. I only wish the hotel had a lift into the main entrance as I had some broken bones to deal with.  Overall just a great place to be.

Title: Unforgettable Anniversary
ReviewText: What a wonderful hotel! The hotel was clean and quiet. You cannot find a hotel with a better view of Big Ben and the London Eye. The bathroom was very clean and modern. The balcony was nothing short of amazing. We would definitely stay there again when visiting London.

Title: Easter Holiday 2017
ReviewText: My family and I had a fantastic Easter holiday in London, staying at the Marriott County Hall. The hotel itself, its location and the highly service oriented staff ensured we had a magnificent stay and for that we are truly grateful. We already look forward to visiting London, and the Marriott County Hall again soon.

Title: Location, Location, Location + Marriott charm
ReviewText:
This hotel located at the heart of London few minutes walk from many major attractions, we love our room with Parliament view - nice elite upgrade. Everyone from the hotel staff was very friendly and helpful.

The only small negative that we've experienced is that new rules for Executive lounge don't allow you to take your kids there free of charge - now it cost 80 pounds which is too much

Title: Amazing room
ReviewText: View and room were spectacular.

Title: Location and excellent hospitality combined
ReviewText: The staff is top notch! Excellent communicators who are personable, knowledgeable, and friendly with a ready smile. The staff in the Executive lounge was the BEST! The bartenders in the downstairs bar were great teachers on the various types of gin. The Easter surprises were fun for our son as well. The location is wonderful. I am still dreaming that I hear the chimes of Big Ben. Overall excellent hospitality!

Title: Excellent hotel
ReviewText: The location of the hotel is one of the best in London.The service is great, very friendly and profesional personnel. The rooms and other amenities  are modern. Perfect place for business and/or leisure.

Title: Great hotel and better than our expectations
ReviewText: Our stay at the Marriott County Hall was better than could be expected.  The accommodations were clean and attractive.  Room size was much larger than anticipated and the the entire staff was helpful and responsive during our stay.  The gym was the most complete exercise facility I have ever used while staying at a hotel.  The hotel location is excellent as well with convenient access to two major tube stops.  We didn't eat at the hotel (though the options looked promising) but we had numerous meals at many restaurants within easy walking distance from the grounds.  There is also easy access to a couple grocery stores to pick up snacks, fruit etc...  Our trip, which went off without a hitch, involved two younger children in London for 8 days and much of this was due to our lodging choice.  We originally based our initial hotel selection mainly on the ability to have four people in one room (which seemed like more of a novelty in London when researching options), but I would eagerly stay here again if it were only me on a future trip.

Title: Mr T
ReviewText: Great Hotel and great location.

Title: Must stay here
ReviewText: Great room. Spacious, nice view of Thames/London Eye. Fabulous staff. Superb Executive lounge. Great breakfast with helpful servers who gave good recommendations for our next travel location. Bus tour outside hotel entrance. Three minute walk to tube station. Will stay here again when in London.

Title: Marriott County Hall is an excellent hotel
ReviewText:
We stayed at the County Hall for two nights for my son's birthday. The staff were warm and welcoming, they made sure we felt happy with our stay. There was nothing stuffy about the hotel. Staff made a real effort to interact with our children which made it all the more better for us. There's a swimming pool which we made good use of and plenty of sweets at reception that the kids loved. 

There was a queue upon check out but someone came and took our bags for storage while we waited. I cannot fault this hotel. Large, clean rooms. Huge bathrooms.

Title: My Memorable Stay in London
ReviewText: The Marriott Hotel County Hall was like a home away from home, in the best possible location in London.

Title: Oustanding on every level
ReviewText: This property cleanliness, modern facilities, fantastic staff, attention to detail, welcoming sense and appreciation of Elite status, this is one of the best Marriott properties I have ever stayed at (room, cleanliness, staff, Executive Lounge, restaurant, fitness facilities, etc.). I will be staying here whenever in London, and would strongly recommend it to anyone!

Title: Great location
ReviewText: Excellent location for business or pleasure. Superb hotel offering high quality accommodation in the centre of London. Large well equipped rooms. Good bar and dining facilities. Knowledgeable staff. Highly recommended.

Title: A week at the London Marriott County Hall
ReviewText: Great location and very modern on the inside. Convenient to the tube and Waterloo station. Right next to the Westminster Bridge and London Eye. Very clean and feels upscale, but not stuffy (which can happen in many older hotels in London). I heard some of the rooms have fantastic views of the Thames and Parliament. Unfortunately our room faces the back alley and the dumpsters. Staff was very helpful and professional. Great people working there. The only other complains, internet went down for almost 20 hours, and the glass bathroom scale shattered when I stepped on it (I weight only 65 kg!!!). Luckily I was wearing flip flops and no one got hurt. The staff was very prompt to respond, and helped cleared the shattered glass fragments right away. Overall a great stay.

Title: london 2017
ReviewText: The only ding on this review was the service at breakfast.  I found the service staff a bit rude.  The manager was excellent but the wait staff was the only thing that i can complain about but the overall rating was great and I would not let this deter me form staying again,

Title: 地址非常好
ReviewText: 酒店非常好,酒店装修,服务生,早餐,出去周边相当便利

Title: Bad service
ReviewText: Was treated wrong because I felt we were dressed classy.

Title: Excellet hotel for the value
ReviewText: We stayed at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall for a weeks vacation and I must say it was an absolute delight to stay here.  The staff treated us very well and the room was very nice.  We had a balcony overlooking the Thames, Parliament, Westminster and the London Eye.  The views were just amazing.  The room was comfortable and the quality of the furniture was quite nice.  Although the bed wasn't a pillow top it was still quite comfortable.  The internet speed was fast, room service was timely and the quality of the food was very good.  The Executive Lounge provided a wide variety of breakfast items(meets, cheeses, fruits, cereals, four different juices, real scrambled eggs, etc)  well beyond the standard Marriott selection.  In the evening they had different wines, beers, etc with pretty good finger food items (we only went once in the evening).  The lounge and bar are also very nice and worth a trip if you don't feel like going out to eat. The Fitness Center is very large with a huge selection of exercise equipment.  Plus you can attend any of the classes (spinning, cycling, core training) for no charge.  The hotel is right around the corner to the Waterloo station which was very convenient because we made a day trip to Stonehenge so it didn't require a lot of travelling around to find the train.  The hotel also arranged a car service to pick us up and drop us off at Heathrow which just made our trip even more relaxing.  What more can I say other than I would absolutely stay at this Marriott Hotel again when visiting London.  It was worth every pound!

Title: Great hotel and location
ReviewText: One thing the price of a local call is too much but the staff adjusted it and I am a Platinum member.

Title: 很好
ReviewText: 房间大，干净，设施齐全，安静。服务周到，离景点很近。食物味道不错。

Title: Magnifique lieu et mémorable séjour: Testez par vous même!
ReviewText:
L'hôtel est magnifique et dispose d'un emplacement unique au coeur de Londres.
Décoré avec raffinement, les chambres et notamment les salles de bains, avec ce look "british" accompagné d'un touche moderne sont splendides. L'ensemble du personnel est souriant et très à l'écoute. 
Le petit-déjeuner est copieux et très bon. 
Un réel plaisir et un magnifique moment grâce à l'atmosphère de ce lieu.

Title: Magnifique hôtel
ReviewText:
Un hôtel magnifique, décoré avec beaucoup de goût.
Un personnel au petit soin.

Title: 完美的位置，出色的景色
ReviewText: 酒店建筑非常优雅，泰晤士河景和大本钟让我每天醒来都像来到另一个梦中

Title: Location + Service + Value
ReviewText: Good spot. Good service. Ideally situated.

Title: TOP-Hotel London
ReviewText: Nachdem nun auch die Zimmer vollständig neu renoviert sind, ist das Marriott county Hall eine der absoluten Top-Adressen in London. Beste Lage, bester Blick, sehr schöne Zimmer, sehr sehr empfehlenswert.

Title: excellent experience
ReviewText: The location of the hotel is perfect, next to the Big Ben and The Thames. There are two subway station nearby, So you can reach other attractions easily.

Title: Amazing hotel with the best service.
ReviewText: We can't wait to return to the lovely hotel. We was made to feel so welcome and we experienced such wonderful service.

Title: Schlecht
ReviewText: Schlecht, Preis-Leistung stimmt absolut nicht, Zimmer nicht sauber

Title: London Getaway Weekend
ReviewText: Every aspect of our weekend vacation was full of great memories.

Title: Super Hotel
ReviewText: Sehr zentral gelegenes Hotel, welches ein altehrwürdiges Ambiente mit moderner Einrichtung kombiniert. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Kann man nur weiterempfehlen!

Title: Marriott Hotel County Hall
ReviewText: Great location and easy to get to places.  Friendly staff and very nice room size.

Title: Staff attitude
ReviewText:
Room wasn't what we paid for
Awful attitude of concierge staff abrupt and aggressive

Title: poor food,great location and views
ReviewText:
Try it out yourself, location for tourists is great.
If you are used to poor cusine than its OK
They really have to bring up their Chef und their FB&B manager to acceptable standards.
Prices are for the quality exorbitant. You better go outside for breakfast and dining.

Title: 100% Luxury
ReviewText: This was our first stay at the Marriott County Hall, London. We stayed in a One Bedroom Executive Suite, the view from our suite was fantastic. The staff were excellent, the hotel decor is to a very high standard, this is definitely a 5 Star hotel. I would strongly recommend that if you are planning a visit to London, you book into the Marriott County Hall, it is 100% luxury.

Title: Muito Bom
ReviewText: Hotel muito bem localizado

Title: 圣诞假期
ReviewText: 绝佳的地理位置 优雅的环境 优质的服务态度 美丽的建筑都是London Marriot Hotel Country Hall 的特色

Title: Amazing new years eve!
ReviewText:
As a family of 4 we have stayed a few times at the County Hall, but this stay, over New Year's eve was definitely our best.  The team did their best to give us a view of the fireworks, which we did, but something they go over and above, is making our children feel most welcome.  The staff throughout the hotel are always on hand and nothing is too much, and whilst it was exceptionally busy (New Years Eve) everything from arrival to departure was very smooth.

We have stayed now in the Autumn, Winter and Spring, so now it's planning for the summer!

Title: New Years Eve
ReviewText: We had a lovely time at your hotel.  Only 2 suggestions:   Room service was much slower than I expected.  We ordered room service twice.  One night it took 1 1/2 hours, the second night, a little over an hour.  I was compensated for the second night.  Secondly, it would be nice if there was somewhere within the hotel to purchase snacks.   Sometimes you just want something to nibble on without having to order room service.

Title: great location
ReviewText: warm staff and very helpful good location and beautiful atmosphere

Title: Nice hotel
ReviewText: I'm very happy with everything about this hotel except one day we call room service for breakfast and we wait about an hour and half then when my boyfriend call them back They did not even take the order , anyways we had to wait about  40 more minutes,....... and the bed is too hard, I couldn't sleep During my stance there!

Title: Perfect Hotel For a London Stay
ReviewText: This hotel has a superior staff that is not stuffy or pretentious.  They are attentive and ensure that your stay is to your satisfaction.  Great views from the rooms and from the dining room.  Rooms are clean and a nice size for a London hotel.  The location of this hotel is great for walks to the West End, The City of London, Westminster and Buckingham Palace.

Title: Excellent location, amazing staff, beautiful property.
ReviewText: Loved this hotel! We stayed here with our kids. The staff was amazing. Gave our kids (9 and 7) stockings upon our xmas day arrival. Everyone was really kind and the location was excellent. Would definitely stay here again!

Title: Not as expected
ReviewText: Not the best value for your money.

Title: Fantastic
ReviewText: Fantastic hotel. Highly recommend.

Title: London Marriott County Hall
ReviewText: The staff at the hotel delivered not great but exceptional service, would return without question from Katie at breakfast to Nickoli on reception to the gentleman and ladies at Gilrays bar and restaurant, we had a small child with us and nothing was any trouble, a great job from all staff

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Superb hotel. Pricey but worth it.

Title: Marriott London
ReviewText: Location good, hotel interesting from historical perspective. Would like to see staff recognized status level during stay.

Title: Perfect Hotel for a holiday in London
ReviewText:
This hotel is located in the heart 
of London. Easy on and off the Underground which let's you fully experience the city. The staff at the hotel is nothing short of first class. Would recommend this property to anyone heading to London for either there first trip or repeat trips.

Title: Best place to stay in london centre
ReviewText: Excellent location and view, great ambiance

Title: Excellent Hotel
ReviewText: I would highly recommend the Marriott County Hall.  The location is perfect for sight seeing - close to everything.  Staff was helpful for any needs.  Stay here if you get the chance!

Title: London for Christmas
ReviewText: .good trip great location, close to tube and sightseeing buses

Title: Mj
ReviewText: Bien ubicado, hotel renovado con vistas privilegiadas al Big Ben y buena relación calidad precio

Title: Perfect Location
ReviewText:
This was my first visit to London and the Marriott County Hall is perfect!! 
We stayed for 10 days from end of November to December in a Executive Big Bend View and WOW it was amazing!! 
The breakfast buffet and afternoon service was outstanding and I can't say enough about the staff at this hotel. They make you feel like you are royalty. 
The location is walking distance to the tube, Westminster, Buckingham Palace,Coventry and so many other top tourist spots.
I can't wait to go back soon!!

Title: Amazing Marriott in the Heart of London!
ReviewText: This hotel is now on my list of top hotels. The hotel is set back from Westminster Bridge near the iconic attractions: Big Ben, London Eye, Parliament and is just two blocks from Westminster Abbey. Besides being in an ideal location, the hotel is beautifully maintained with decor that can only be described as historic charm meets modern elegance. The wallpaper in the elevator lobbies features Penguin book covers creating a colorful display and a nod to the publishing company's Penguin logo created in London. My room overlooked the River Thames and the London Eye. The room was inviting, spacious and smelled amazing. As someone who travels at least two weeks of every month, this hotel room felt like home away from home. It was fun, energizing and comfortable. I would recommend this hotel to anyone that wants a central London location, comfortable stay and excellent service.

Title: Lo calificaría como hotel de cuatro estrellas
ReviewText: Mala relación calidad precio. Cola de quince minutos para disfrutar del desayuno. Sin zumo de naranja en el desayuno. Sin amenities en los baños, solo gel y champú. Lo calificaría como un hotel de cuatro estrellas.

Title: Great place
ReviewText: Great location and great historic hotel to visit the London eye and Big Ben

Title: El mejor hotel de Londres
ReviewText:
La ubicación estratégica me permitió conocer los puntos mas importantes de Londres y el servicio que ahí se me brindo fue por mucho superado a mis expectativas.   Todo el personal contagia alegría y se esmera por que me sintiera cómodo.
Un hotel que desborda elegancia!

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Un très agréable séjour dans un cadre magnifique, entouré d'un personnel de qualité.

Title: Très bien mais room service vraiment pas à la hauteur
ReviewText:
Bel emplacement même si le quartier manque de restaurants sympas.
Du coup on a utilisé le room service qui n'était vraiment pas à la hauteur. Plats froids, peu variés et plutôt mauvais.
Le room service est la grand déception de cet hotel. 
Pour le reste, hôtel, classe, beau volume avec une superbe vue des chambres. 
Salle de restaurant vraiment belle avec un accueil le matin vraiment chaleureux.  
Piscine vraiment agréable et chaude.

Title: 结账时多收一晚房费
ReviewText:
退房时在下午3点半，已经完成退房后前台人员重新要求我们多付一晚房费。
正常即使要付房费也是多付半日，并且我认为已经完成退房后在重新要求多付一晚房费比较过分。
结果是我多付了一晚房费，因为3：30退房。
我不知道我的会员权益是否可以享受延迟退房，但是多付一晚房费确实让我难受。

Title: Favorite Place to stay in London
ReviewText: The location on the river in the center of London is perfect for walking around. Close to the Tate, Courtauld and concert venues, boat excursions and underground stops, access to all of London is easy. A blend of history and hospitality!

Title: Family stay - London
ReviewText: as platinum member with spg and life time gold this was first opportunity to use Marriott Hotel in London. Very modern, stylish hotel and spotlessly clean. This was a family overnight stay with my 4 year daughter, the staff were very attentive and friendly, must say one of the best and most enjoyable hotel experiences I have had in many years, well done Marriott County Hall, I will definitely be rebooking.

Title: Steve
ReviewText: The hotel was clean, staff friendly, and the location was excellent

Title: Location Location Location!
ReviewText: Our first trip to London, and the Marriott Hotel County Hall made it unforgettable!  Spectacular re-use of beautiful architectural gem County Hall - creative, unique rooms, and distinctively different than a "hotel" atmosphere.  Central to all things wonderful on the bank of the River Thames.  Our view was postcard perfect!  High tea, with champagne, is not to be missed!  In the evenings, enjoy viewing the London Eye and sip something wonderful after a long sightseeing day.  The lounge bar and wait staff are world class!  Savor a meal at Gillrays that comes with a view that cannot be matched! Spoil yourself and stay here!

Title: Not suitable for families with small children
ReviewText: No. bath tub, essential with. A baby. Flat old pillows and a 2 wait fir room service delivering cold food... London has much better hotels on offer

Title: Great location
ReviewText: This hotel is beautiful and a great location to many attractions. Close to Big Ben and the London eye. Walking distance to the shar and  Trafalga square and buckinham palace. Beautiful rooms and beds are comfortable. At night for turn down service they leave a small bottle of lavender spray for your bed. What a nice touch. I would recommend staying here with out a doubt. I will be back again.

Title: You pay for Location
ReviewText:
Perfect location for Business or pleasure in London and the price of hotel, and the food and beverages reflects that, hotel has excellent staff is newly refurbished and is a relaxing and luxurious place to come back to at the end of a long days sight seeing.
Tip. don't bother paying for a Big Ben view room our's looked straight at the London eye which is a lot closer than you might think, just go for a river view you will probably still be able to see Big Ben anyway.

Title: London Marriott
ReviewText: Wonderful hotel and great location!

Title: Perfect location
ReviewText: Perfect location! Tube is just across the bridge. Views of river were stunning. I loved everything about this hotel. Rooms are beautifully appointed, clean and very comfortable. The staff was so kind and friendly and with any request we had. Would recommend to anyone traveling and wanting to stay in central London.

Title: 出色
ReviewText: 很棒的酒店，地理位置和服务都很好！入住体验很好！值得推荐！

Title: Beautiful Hotel with a view
ReviewText: Marriott County Hall has an excellent view of Big Ben and the Eye.  It is withing walking distance of multiple tourist sites and well situated.  The staff is fabulous.

Title: From Connecticut to London
ReviewText:
Excellent hotel, staff was very helpful and friendly. 
Complimentary breakfast was the best of it's kind.

Free water for guests would be my only suggestion.

Title: Our stay in London
ReviewText: Very enjoyable stay and very attentive staff at the hotel.

Title: Amazing staff
ReviewText: We only stayed for one night but was made to feel very welcome. The staff without exception were all fabulous, attentive and all looked like they enjoyed their jobs, thank you Marriot we will return.....

Title: Great London experience
ReviewText: One of the best places to stay for s visit to Lindon, great ambience and walking distance to a dozen not to be missed London experiences

Title: Great Location and a Beautiful Facility
ReviewText: The London Marriott Hotel County Hall resides in the old London's county council. The architecture is amazing, the rooms are quite large, updated, quite and comfortable. The bathroom was function and beautiful. We ate breakfast and it was very good with a great choice. The location could not be better. It is on the Thames river across from Parliament and Big Ben and next to the London Eye. There are two Tube stations within easy walking distance and it is not a bad walk to Buckingham Palace and London's wonderful parks. Just two notes of caution. One, there does not appear to be handi-cap access (or baby strollers in our case). You may want to check with the hotel on this. Also, ask for a room close to the elevators or you may be walking a mile to your room (not really a mile but I counted over 200 steps - a very long way).

Title: Good owerall
ReviewText: Good location if you want to be around Big ben. Nice view and good walking.

Title: Elegant Hotel, Elegant View
ReviewText: Our stay at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall celebrated my daughter's acceptance into and start of the graduate program at Bournemouth University. We stayed in Room 627, a studio suite overlooking the London Eye and Thames River with Big Ben in the background. The view is gorgeous and the lit up skyline at night is stunning!  Yes, the London Eye is directly out the window so mind your affairs in that regard if the balcony doors are open! The room is very nicely decorated and spacious and not far from the lift. Overall, this room is money well spent.

Title: Excellent Customer Service & LOcation
ReviewText: Upon arrival Gemma welcomed us with a smile and offer to enjoy breakfast as our room was not quite ready yet.  After waiting longer than she had expected she provided us with a Gold Status upgrade to a Jr. suite - with a wonderful view.  The concierge desk was full of helpful tips and assistance in booking our excursions - "Al" in particular was quite informative and extremely friendly.  I don't remember the name of the gentleman in the Club Lounge but he could not have been nicer, more attentive, and welcoming to us - truly appreciated!!!  The room itself was nice, I would have liked a tub but the extra space of the suite was worth not having one.  The only factor that was frustrating was the internet was extremely slow and went down one evening (we called) and the Air Play did not work on the main television (we called about this also).  The proximity to attractions was the best feature.

Title: Great job!
ReviewText: This was a great place to stay, would do it again!

Title: Ein unvergessliches Erlebnis
ReviewText:
Die Freundlichkeit, Hilfsbereitschaft und Aufmersamkeit aller Mitarbeiter des Marriott County Hall haben unseren Aufenthalt in diesem sehr geschmackvoll eingerichteten und äußerst sauberen Hotel zu einem unvergesslichen Erlebnis werden lassen.
Der Blick auf Westminster und Big Ben vom Balkon der Zimmer in der 6. Etage ist fantastisch.

Title: MR.
ReviewText: Rooms were ordered through hotel website. I confirmed one night before arrival. However, I checked in kingsize bed rooms instead of double beds. Please save whatever rooms customers booked. Thanks

Title: Family Trip to London 2016
ReviewText:
The family and I traveled to London to celebrate my wife's birthday. My wife and two kids had never been there before and I had been there with my dad 40 years ago. The location of this Marriott was the main reason we picked this location. The reputation that Marriott has sealed the deal. We got two rooms with Big Ben, The Thames and London Eye views and that never got old to look at, day or night. The London Eye was so close we flet we could reach out and touch it. One room had a huge double window and the other two huge windows that let a large amount of light in a bright colored room. The rooms had what two people could need to store items away...but not overly busy with drawers of lamps. Plenty of outlet to plug in and charge up whatever you bring. The bathrooms were big, modern with shower, that once it was turned it on, you wanted to leave.
As with any hotel at any location, the customer needs to do their diligence. You should not solely rely on web sites and pictures to answer questions or make assumptions about what is happening at the hotel currently. Everyone's stay at hotel is different and if you have question...give them a call and get them answered. For example, I thought the hotel had a laundry room ( don't they all ) but a quick call told me "no". So, I was got surprised when i got there.
Absolutely no hotel is perfect, there is always something to point a finger at and complain about. With the name "Marriott"  a person should expect that they are striving for perfection. Well, The London Marriott County Hall, does not disappoint. For all the things I can get at any hotel, nothing has a bigger impact on me then the staff. The staff here were courteous when I had nothing to ask of them and seemed eager to help when I did. The front desk made me feel that I was the most import thing going on when we spoke.
It is not a "cheap" hotel to be sure. But if you plan your time well and get your questions answered...it could be money well spent with memories to last a lifetime

Title: Excellent location
ReviewText:
The location is excellent for tourist.  Very convenient to go to various attractions.  Staff are very helpful and polite. 
However, one thing I do not understand is that they do not provide free room Wifi service.

Title: Excellent Stay
ReviewText: I really enjoyed staying at the London Marriott Hotel County Hall. With an easy walk to both the Waterloo train station and Underground and the Westminster Underground as well as taxis and buses near by, getting around was easy. The room was clean and comfortable and the bathroom was excellent with the walk-in shower and the rain shower head. Despite being close to a hospital (lots of ambulances flying by) and a bunch of tourist attractions (Palace of Westminster, Westminster Abby, London Eye, etc.) the room was very quiet. Overall, I look forward to coming back on my next visit to London!

Title: Our Recent Stay
ReviewText:
We stayed for a long weekend to meet with our family - daughter and three grandchildren.  The River Thames View room had been remodeled.  It was very comfortable and included a sofa.  The bathroom was modern and functionally efficient.
The hotel swimming pool is a great attraction.

Staff were welcoming in all departments.  We would commend in particular the Breakfast Manager and his team.
Our experience was much improved on last year, when we met with several problems associated with the refurbishment program.

Title: Viagem a Londres
ReviewText: Equipe fantastica. Linda vista. Precisa verificar melhor as instalacoes hidraulicas. Voltaria ao Hotel com absoluta certeza.

Title: Great Hotel
ReviewText: Beautiful hotel in historic building. Great location. Excellent for families and close to many attractions.  The staff was extremely friendly and helpful.  The health club is amazing.  Would definitely stay here again.

Title: 打开窗户就是London eye和big Ben
ReviewText: London eye 泰晤士河 big Ben就在酒店面前 楼下有麦当劳和pret 紧邻滑铁卢和威斯敏斯特地铁站

Title: Party like a Rock Star!
ReviewText: The newly remodeled rooms at this luxury hotel in the hub of London's brouhaha was a paradise on earth.  I used points on my visit and am used to being given only a standard room when points are redeemed.  I was delighted by the upgrade to The Westminster Suite.  A gigantic flat on the top floor that was bigger than my own apartment!  I didn't even want to leave the room, it was THAT deluxe!  Thanks for making my Anniversary special! I will never forget it.

Title: my single worst experience at a marriott
ReviewText:
Avoid this hotel as there are many other properties in London. The deficiencies with this property are too many to list, but chief among them is the major construction & inattentive staff. A construction worker was peering into our room (through our window) as my wife exited the shower. The staff seemed unconcerned with this. 
While Marriott promotes this as a high level hotel, it is nothing of the sort.

Title: Beware of exterior construction
ReviewText: We just returned form a trip to London (7/31/16 to 8/5/16).  While the inside of the hotel was very nice and our room was very clean, our windows were obstructed by scaffolding and netting for exterior work.  This was not disclosed when booking. Disappointing after traveling from Seattle with family for vacation, and spending this much money.

Title: Great London Hotel
ReviewText: Great location.  Great staff and service.  I have stayed here twice now for leisure and both times I was upgrade to a room facing the London Eye.

Title: London stay
ReviewText: Nice hotel and staff - who needs a gym when you have to walk a half mile just to get to your room (no joke!)

Title: London Calling
ReviewText: The location was ideal. The room size was a little small but the view of "Big Ben" and "London Eye" more than compensated for this criticism. I would absolutely book this hotel again.

Title: Great hotel
ReviewText: Located very strategically, this is a well run newly remodeled hotel.  It has the best gym in London and the staff is very attentive to any need.  Overall, a wonderful experience.  I recommend this hotel highly.

Title: In trasition and could get better but would suggest other properties!
ReviewText: Was not the worst experience but was not the best.  Consider other properties first.

Title: Great location.. Accommodation superb!
ReviewText: Located next to London eye and across the bridge from Big Ben and Westminster abbey we were ideally located. Love the staff, our room was brand new and awesome.

Title: Excellent Stay
ReviewText: Terrific family stay, thanks to a remodeled hotel and terrific customer service. Our points & cash stay benefitted from a generous upgrade and wonderful attention by the front of office staff to ensure our family had everything we could have asked for. The executive Big Ben view rooms are beautifully bright and large, with an excellent shower and pull out couch if needed. We felt very welcome in the hotel and by the attention of hotel staff. Each call to guest services garnered a polite response. There aren't many rooms in London that can accommodate a family of four better than the executive rooms here. We loved our stay and would love to return!

Title: excellent with a few kinks to work out
ReviewText:
Loved this hotel and property.  Location cannot be beat.  Stayed with our 3 kids (one with special needs), and had a wonderful experience.  Many sights/activities in walking distance.  Pool a real plus-great showers in pool area to rinse kids after swimming.
Rooms are updated, but a little dusty.  Ate at Gillroys for 2 dinners and each breakfast; service inconsistent but food very good.  Seems like they need someone to come in and command the ship (in the restaurant).
Would stay here again.

Title: Hotel Being Renovated, Poor Staffing
ReviewText: Hotel is being renovated but no discounts given.  Four door men but only one reception desk employee.  Very slow service at reception.  Room key stopped working.  Most of the rooms are a very, very long way from the elevator.  Stay in rooms ending in 50.  Less than 40 require a long, long walk.

Title: Excellent Hotel with Wonderful Customer Service!
ReviewText: London Marriott Hotel County Hall is an excellent hotel with central location. The staff is friendly and helpful. Thank you, London Marriott Hotel County Hall for a wonderful time and experience!

Title: Terrific property in great location
ReviewText: Highly recommend this great hotel!  Super location, friendly staff, nice big comfortable rooms.  Will stay here again on our next visit.

Title: Great time in London
ReviewText: Excellent location in easy walking distance of the tube and sites. Wonderful views of Big Ben!

Title: Room with a view
ReviewText: I'll never forget that view and what a wonderful time we had

Title: A Lovely Spot Next to the London Eye
ReviewText: I book a Marriott Hotel wherever I go whenever possible because I know I can rely on great service in a handsome facility. The London Marriott County Hall exceeded my expectations, however, in both the elegance of the hotel and the friendliness of the staff. I'll be back!

Title: Great experience at Marriott London County Hall
ReviewText: excellent location and service.

Title: Excellent service
ReviewText:
Great hotel. Great staff. Clean. Big room. 

Scaffolding visible from room 202 and I may have heard a bit of noise from my neighbors, but it was a good experience.  202 is far from the elevator, so people with mobility issues may want to ask to be closer. 

It is ridiculously close to the Londom Eye and a few other activities to keep family members entertained. Westminster Tube is over the bridge, there are cafes nearby, and there's another train station that is pretty close too.

Title: Beautiful rooms, beautiful views,
ReviewText: This in an opportunity to experience one of Londons great hotels for something less than full price due to the renovation in the lobby. But once you see the size and appointments of the room you will be thrilled. The staff were professional yet personable, helpful and genuine. It was a great location as well. You simply cannot choose a better hotel for which to see London.

Title: Good stay
ReviewText: Great location, good clean hotel, good amenities and decent rooms.

Title: Completely disappointed
ReviewText: We stayed in room 232, which literally looked over a trash dumpster. Even after complaining to the front desk several times, no actions were taken. All they said was "sorry, there's nothing we can do about it." THAT IS COMPLETELY RIDICULOUS FOR A MARRIOT REWARDS GOLD ELITE. We stayed in this hotel for five days, and the staff was never willing to engage with us despite our complaints. We had reserved a room for three, and the unhelpful staff at the front desk kept telling us that there would be a sofa bed for us. However, when we got to our room we noticed it was only set up for two people. After an unplanned fire drill, which inconveniently happened in the morning, the housekeeping staff did not even know where the fire exit was, and confused guests even more. I've usually enjoyed my stays at Marriott, but I would NEVER recommend this hotel due to their poor customer service.

Title: Truly Outstanding Service!
ReviewText: A wonderful experience for my family and I. Great friendly staff that took the time to greet us, take care of our needs (including my high maintenance wife), and even remember our names...job well done!

Title: Who could ask for anything more!
ReviewText: The location of Marriott Hotel County Hall could not be any better having a room that was eye to eye with London Eye,   overlooking the Thames River with a view of Big Ben and the Parliament too! The tube also was close by just across the Westminster Bridge and Waterloo train station just a couple of blocks away to take to Windsor/Eton. The newly renovated rooms were spacious, clean, neat and comfortable.  The executive lounge was a bit awkward being placed temporarily in the library and side room that was not as convenient for access anytime of the day.  The food at the Gillray restaurant was excellent.  The entire staff (front desk, concierge, housekeeping porter, executive lounge/bar) were all most helpful in making our stay an excellent one.  We would love to stay here again if we ever return for another visit to London!

Title: Excellent hotel
ReviewText: Perfect location for exploring London. Would highly recommend to anyone who is visiting London.

Title: Excellent hotel
ReviewText: Beautiful hotel, smartly furnished in an excellent location. Top notch staff.
Great location with excellent view

Title: Not at all impressed
ReviewText: Paid premium price for this hotel expecting quality service and amenities....very disappointed

Title: Excellent Hotel
ReviewText: My husband and I recently stayed at the hotel for 4 nights in a room with a view of Big Ben, the Thames, and London Eye.  The view was amazing.  The recently renovated rooms are beautiful and very clean.  The staff was very helpful and friendly.  It's within walking distance of the Westminster tube station and many sites.  The hop on/hop off bus tours also stop right outside.  We would stay here again.

Title: Excellent service and comfortable place
ReviewText: Excellent service since our arrival until we checked out, we got our room upgraded with a nice view to the Big Ben, London Eye and Thames river. All the staff had really good attitude. This hotel is located near to all the interesting locations at walking distance. We highly recommend this hotel.

Title: Great Location
ReviewText: Great location with a magnificent view of the Houses of Parliament.  Easy access to the Tube.

Title: De los mejores
ReviewText: En un lugar muy exclusivo y privilegiado. Altamente recomendado como uno de los mejores de Londres.

Title: Family
ReviewText: Weekend in London with family. Very nice hotel with exelent staff, vert Good breakfast and a Nice pool. We ordered a romance pack with champagne and chocolate upon arrivall! That did we not get, so thats why I dont trust 100% on this hotell and will not recomend it.

Title: Great location, excellent service
ReviewText: Highly recommend for great location, superb cleanliness and very helpful staff

Title: Best Marriott ever
ReviewText: One of the best Marriott experiences I've ever had. Hotel Was wonderful and the best room .

Title: Excellent Hotel and Staff
ReviewText: As always, I love staying at the Marriott County Hall.  The staff and accommodations are always excellent.

Title: Outstanding service cannot be matched
ReviewText: Staff was very attentive.. every time we asked for something it was taken care of in mins.. helpful in every way.. just outstanding service... and the location was perfect.. short walk to all the main tourist spots. Strongly recommend this hotel.

Title: Tasteful and Elegant
ReviewText:
The London Marriott Hotel County Hall is the very definition of hospitality!  The British are known worldwide for their excellent service, and this particular Marriott wears British service as their standard.  The hotel is very convenient to just about anywhere you'd want to go in London, yet quiet and reserved, so it's easy to get a restful night's sleep before a long day of either working or visiting tourist attractions.  

The decor of the hotel is understated; tasteful and elegant.  The staff is amazing and they "go the extra mile" for any request, it seems.  I'd recommend the Marriott Hotel County Hill to anyone who has a reason to be in London.

Title: Excellent London experience
ReviewText: Everything was great the location,staff and amenities.

Title: Location, Location, Location
ReviewText: Have stayed in several London-area hotels, and this easily was the best location. Of course, that hinges on the types of things you want to do -- so if you want convenience in terms of London attractions, this is perfect. The staff was extremely helpful and always pleasant and the room size was very good considering many hotel rooms in the city are not that large.

Title: Great hotel with a great location
ReviewText: Wonderful people, excellent location, great service.

Title: Marriott feels like home!
ReviewText:
